data.en: Abbreviations: ECA, Economic Commission for Africa; ECE, Economic Commission for Europe; ECLAC, Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean; ESCAP, Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific; ESCWA, Economic and Social Commission for Western Asia.
data.zh: 二.

data.en: II.
data.zh: 区域内和区域间部分合作领域的近况和成果，包括在联合国发展系统重新定位方面的近况和成果

data.en: Since 2018, regional commissions, which are driven primarily by transboundary mandates, have strengthened their engagement with the resident coordinator system and United Nations country teams, through enhanced collaboration at the regional, subregional and national levels.
data.zh: 为了确保与驻地协调员和联合国国家工作队进行有系统的协商，各区域委员会实施了管理和问责框架，为此审查并在必要时修订与驻地协调员的互动协作办法，包括对考绩提出意见。

data.en: The regional commissions provide inputs, data-driven analysis, advocacy and guidance for country-level programming through their participation, upon request, in common country analyses and the formulation and review of cooperation frameworks, which involves leveraging cross-sectoral expertise and ensuring a more in-depth analysis of regional and transboundary issues.
data.zh: 各区域委员会作为同行支助小组的成员，还为各自区域的所有共同国家分析、联合国可持续发展合作框架和联合工作计划提供质量保证。

data.en: The system-wide results to which the regional commissions contribute at the country level are reported in the United Nations country team annual country results and are presented on an annual basis to the Economic and Social Council in the report of the Chair of the United Nations Sustainable Development Group on the Development Coordination Office (E/2023/62).
data.zh: 为筹备可持续发展区域论坛，发布区域协作平台各专题联盟的区域全系统成果报告。

data.en: A.
data.zh: 在区域一级促进政策一致性和联合行动

data.en: Issue-based coalitions are vehicles established under the auspices of the regional collaborative platforms for inter-agency collaboration.
data.zh: 这些联盟通过调配区域资产支持国家一级的统筹行动，应对紧迫发展挑战的区域和次区域层面问题。

data.en: The coalitions address the regional and subregional dimensions of pressing development challenges by deploying regional assets in support of integrated action at the country level.
data.zh: 在各区域，各区域委员会在具有比较优势的领域共同领导并参与专题联盟的工作，并在处理跨界发展问题方面向联合国国家工作队提供综合政策支持。

data.en: Across the regions, the regional commissions co-lead and participate in the work of the coalitions in areas where they have comparative advantage and provide integrated policy support to United Nations country teams to address cross-border development issues.
data.zh: 一个实例就是动员利益攸关方筹备教育变革峰会和联合国气候变化框架公约缔约方会议第二十七届会议等全球高级别活动并采取后续行动。

data.en: All the regional commissions help to facilitate the channelling of requests for support by resident coordinators and United Nations country teams to the relevant coalitions and inter-agency groups.
data.zh: 通过这些联盟，各区域委员会还应请求向驻地协调员和联合国国家工作队提供必要的专门知识，以填补在落实联合国可持续发展合作框架之前或期间出现的能力缺口。

data.en: In the Africa region, ECA continues to play a key role within the Regional Collaborative Platform for Africa, as a member of the joint secretariat, issue-based coalitions and task forces, by offering support at the country level in advancing regional priorities relating to data and statistics, climate action, macroeconomic transformation and energy and digital transitions.
data.zh: 非洲区域协作平台与非洲联盟协作，通过各专题联盟，协助成员国通过《关于能源获取和公正能源转型的非洲共同立场》并对教育变革峰会采取后续行动。

data.en: In collaboration with the African Union, the Regional Collaborative Platform for Africa, through its issue-based coalitions, supported member States in the adoption of the African Common Position on Energy Access and Just Energy Transition and the follow-up to the Transforming Education Summit.
data.zh: 考虑到非洲体制和政治现实情况的独特性以及在区域和国家两级将联合国全球战略转化为行动的必要性，区域协作平台认识到，若要在非洲实现变革，就必须与非洲联盟的工作重点密切配合，以便确保各项行动衔接顺畅，同时必须过渡到横向和纵向职能兼顾的结构，以便在国家和区域两级扩大影响力和加强问责。

data.en: ECA responded to United Nations country team requests by providing strategic and advisory support to regional economic communities and African countries.
data.zh: 这方面的实例包括协助5个国家执行与非洲大陆自由贸易区有关的国家战略，在联合国气候变化框架公约缔约方会议第二十七届会议之前培训气候问题谈判人员，为8个国家提供关于进行数字化普查的技术援助。

data.en: In the Arab region, the Regional Collaborative Platform for Arab States continues to provide value-added support for the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 2022年，平台通过8个专题联盟，交付12份政策简报和多利益攸关方区域对话，举办3次能力建设讲习班，编写两份重要分析报告。

data.en: In 2022, through its eight issue-based coalitions, the Platform delivered 12 policy briefs and multi-stakeholder regional dialogues, three capacity-building workshops and two major analytical reports.
data.zh: 这些交付成果涉及气候、移民、能源、粮食安全、社会保护、青年和数字化等广泛的主题，并回应了驻地协调员全年提出的29项请求。

data.en: Those deliverables covered a wide range of themes, including climate, migration, energy, food security, social protection, youth and digitalization, and responded to 29 of the requests flagged by resident coordinators throughout the year.
data.zh: 此外，还在知识和数据中心Manara(阿拉伯文中意为“灯塔”)的功能方面取得重大进展，该中心通过一个交互平台向成员国提供联合国的所有知识产品和数据。

data.en: Furthermore, significant advances were made on the functionality of Manara (“lighthouse” in Arabic), the knowledge and data hub through which all United Nations knowledge products and data are made available to member States on an interactive platform.
data.zh: 西亚经社会除了担任区域协作平台联合秘书处的成员外，还共同召集关于移民和经济管理的专题联盟。

data.en: In the Asia-Pacific region, ESCAP co-chairs the issue-based coalition on raising ambitions on climate action and the Working Group on Sustainable Development Goals Data and Statistics.
data.zh: 亚太经社会还是关于包容经济增长和COVID-19疫后复苏的专题联盟以及在亚洲及太平洋区域协作平台主持下召集的其他机构间小组的成员。

data.en: ESCAP is also a member of the issue-based coalition on inclusive economic growth and COVID-19 recovery and other inter-agency groups under the auspices of the Regional Collaborative Platform for Asia and the Pacific.
data.zh: 这些专题联盟和工作组构成了可以在国家一级提供支持的区域专门知识名册。

data.en: These issue-based coalitions and working groups form the regional roster of expertise for support at the country level.
data.zh: 这些专题联盟和工作组协助联合国国家工作队开展能力建设活动，例如将减少灾害风险和气候风险纳入共同国家分析和联合国可持续发展合作框架，在联合国气候变化框架公约缔约方会议第二十七届会议之前开展关于气候雄心的对话，并对可持续发展目标的具体指标进行深入的技术评估。

data.en: They supported capacity-building exercises for United Nations country teams, such as integrating disaster risk reduction and climate risks into common country analyses and United Nations Sustainable Development Cooperation Frameworks, as well as a dialogue on climate ambitions in the lead-up to the twenty-seventh session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change and in-depth technical assessments of specific Sustainable Development Goal indicators.
data.zh: 作为对多国办事处审查的回应，亚太经社会修订了驻斐济次区域办事处的设置，并部署一名区域顾问，以支持在密克罗尼西亚联邦新设立的多国办事处。

data.en: In response to the multi-country office review, ESCAP revised the setting of its subregional office in Fiji and has deployed a regional adviser to support the newly established multi-country office in the Federated States of Micronesia.
data.zh: 展望未来，亚太经社会将继续协助太平洋岛屿论坛秘书处落实《2050年蓝色太平洋大陆战略》。

data.en: Going forward, ESCAP will continue to support the Pacific Islands Forum secretariat in the implementation of the 2050 Strategy for the Blue Pacific Continent.
data.zh: 虽然以次区域办事处形式派驻的人员有限，但亚太经社会在应成员国或驻地协调员的请求开展实质性国家一级项目的国家中是联合国国家工作队的成员，此外还是支持特殊处境国家合作框架的签署方。

data.en: In the Latin American and Caribbean region, ECLAC provides support, upon request, for the development of common country analyses and the formulation and review of cooperation frameworks.
data.zh: 拉加经委会利用跨部门专门知识，确保对区域和跨界问题进行更深入的分析，包括国家一级应对日益严重的野火问题的办法以及对人员流动的协调一致对策。

data.en: The Commission leverages its cross-sectoral expertise and ensures a more in-depth analysis of regional and transboundary issues, including country-level approaches to the increasing intensity of wildfires, and a coordinated response to human mobility.
data.zh: 作为区域同行支助小组的成员，拉加经委会为共同国家分析和联合国可持续发展合作框架提供质量保证。

data.en: As a member of the regional Peer Support Group, ECLAC provides quality assurance for common country analyses and United Nations Sustainable Development Cooperation Frameworks.
data.zh: 还在专题联盟方面加强努力，以支持在该区域的人道、发展、建设和平及人权支柱领域发挥作用的跨界和次区域举措。

data.en: Country discussions with resident coordinators were organized as part of the agenda of the Regional Collaborative Platform for Latin America and the Caribbean, including on Haiti and Peru, as well as on shared challenges in the subregions of the Caribbean and Central America.
data.zh: 根据利益攸关方的反馈意见，在2023年4月推出经过增强的拉丁美洲和加勒比区域协作平台，简化了操作程序，并在国家一级的支持方面有了更明确的专题重点。

data.en: In response to feedback received from stakeholders, an enhanced Regional Collaborative Platform for Latin America and the Caribbean was launched in April 2023, with simplified operating procedures and a sharper thematic focus in terms of country-level support.
data.zh: 2022年8月，区域协作平台完成了专门知识名册，该名册根据专题联盟和工作组的专题重点进行编排，以方便驻地协调员和联合国国家工作队使用。

data.en: In the ECE region, since its establishment, the Regional Collaborative Platform has scaled up joined-up regional support for several cross-cutting issues.
data.zh: 专题联盟、联合国欧洲和中亚数据及统计区域协调小组以及同行支助小组能够在政策、分析和业务方面提供更有针对性的实务支持，以满足国家一级的需求。

data.en: The issue-based coalitions, Regional United Nations Coordination Group on Data and Statistics for Europe and Central Asia and the Peer Support Group have been able to provide more targeted substantive policy, analytical and operational support to meet the demands at the country level.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会正在共同领导关于环境和气候变化的专题联盟、联合国欧洲和中亚数字变革小组以及联合国欧洲和中亚数据及统计区域协调小组，并参与其他专题联盟和小组。

data.en: ECE is co-leading the issue-based coalition on environment and climate change, the United Nations Digital Transformation Group for Europe and Central Asia and the Regional United Nations Coordination Group on Data and Statistics for Europe and Central Asia, and participating in other issue-based coalitions and groups.
data.zh: 关于环境和气候变化的专题联盟在中亚跨界水合作方面向驻地协调员和联合国国家工作队提供支持。

data.en: The issue-based coalition on environment and climate change provided support to resident coordinators and United Nations country teams for transboundary water cooperation in Central Asia.
data.zh: 2022年，推出一个面向欧洲和中亚的新网站，目的是促进区域协作，并为获取专题联盟的专门知识和资源提供统一入口，网站包含项目概要介绍，以便协助开展机构间协调。

data.en: The regional commissions have made significant contributions in their respective regions in terms of positioning the knowledge management hubs as the go‑to online space for member States and United Nations system entities to obtain access to regional expertise, data and knowledge resources.
data.zh: 在使区域数据生态系统协调一致以支持循证政策制定、监测和报告可持续发展目标方面取得了显著进展。

data.en: In the Africa region, progress has focused on two flagship initiatives related to the development and operationalization of knowledge hubs and the cross-agency expertise location tool and communities of practice platform.
data.zh: 在知识中心方面，不断开发和维护关于COVID-19的联合国非洲区域知识中心，该中心提供关于《2030年议程》的联合国区域知识资产。

data.en: In relation to the knowledge hubs, there was continuous development and maintenance of the Africa United Nations Regional Knowledge Hub on COVID-19, which provides access to regional United Nations knowledge assets on the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 此外，还开发了一个跨机构专门知识查找工具，方便摸清并识别与各项可持续发展目标有关的专门知识。

data.en: A cross-agency expertise location tool, which facilitates the mapping and identification of expertise across the Goals, was also developed.
data.zh: 与此同时，同业交流平台将为同行之间的知识促进和网络构建服务提供空间，从而促进联合国区域实体之间的协作。

data.en: In the Arab region, ESCWA led the efforts of the Regional Collaborative Platform to develop an online regional knowledge management and data hub known as Manara.
data.zh: Manara于2023年3月推出，是一个全面的交互式平台，也是一个提供源自联合国、成员国和其他伙伴的《2030年议程》相关知识、信息和数据的“一站式中心”。

data.en: Launched in March 2023, Manara is a comprehensive, interactive platform and a “one-stop shop” for knowledge, information and data from United Nations sources, member States and other partners on the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: Manara与其他相关区域平台进行交流，并利用人工智能、机器学习和自然语言处理方面的最新发展，纳入与关切领域相关的实时新闻和社交媒体内容，以及交互式地图和图表。

data.en: In the Asia-Pacific region, the Asia-Pacific Knowledge Management Hub has seen the number of users increase by 150 per cent and a 70 per cent increase in page views compared with 2021.
data.zh: 该中心目前有9 200多名用户，页面浏览量超过32 000次。

data.en: The Hub now welcomes over 9,200 users and has registered more than 32,000 page views.
data.zh: 中心还为250多个知识资源提供软硬件支持，其中包括14个联合国实体的旗舰报告、政策指南和研究报告。

data.en: It also hosts over 250 knowledge resources, which include flagship reports, policy guidance and research by 14 United Nations entities.
data.zh: 中心扩大了各项解决方案，以便纳入以需求为导向的定制服务，并为亚太区域建立一个专题联盟信息库，作为专题联盟开展机构间协作的专门空间。

data.en: In the Latin American and Caribbean region, ECLAC collaborates at the regional and global levels on data and statistics, including with the Statistics Division, other regional commissions, the Committee for the Coordination of Statistical Activities, resident coordinators and the network of data management officers of the Development Coordination Office as well as the group on data and statistics of the Regional Collaborative Platform.
data.zh: 在美洲统计会议的框架内设立新的工作组，就11个不同的问题领域编制区域指南和最佳做法汇编。

data.en: Within the framework of the Statistical Conference of the Americas, new working groups were created to produce regional guidelines and collections of best practices in 11 different subject areas.
data.zh: 拉加经委会还通过增加了新功能和地理信息门户的拉加经委会统计平台等途径，加强对区域可比统计数据的传播和使用。

data.en: ECLAC has also reinforced the dissemination and use of regionally comparable statistics, including through its CEPALSTAT platform, adding new capabilities and a geoportal.
data.zh: 还开发了补充工具，包括关于社会和经济不平等数据的专用门户网站、经济调查微观数据存储库、投入产出汇总表和住户调查微观数据处理工具。

data.en: The Regional Knowledge Management Platform for the Sustainable Development Goals in Latin America and the Caribbean (also known as the SDG Gateway), consolidates and displays the regional work of the United Nations development system related to the 2030 Agenda, including information on how the United Nations system is supporting countries in monitoring and reporting on the Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 该平台采用去中心化系统，使拉丁美洲和加勒比区域协作平台成员能够上传信息，从而提高了联合国区域资产的可见度和可及性。

data.en: Across all the regions, progress has been made in mobilizing regional business operations strategies to support efficiency initiatives.
data.zh: 各区域委员会是区域业务管理小组的共同牵头机构或成员，并为制定区域业务活动战略做出了贡献，这些战略将共同服务领域列为实现增效的优先事项。

data.en: The regional commissions are co-leads or part of a regional operations management team and have contributed to the development of regional business operations strategies with common service areas prioritized for achieving efficiency gains.
data.zh: 在业务活动战略的框架内，除欧洲经委会之外的所有区域委员会都是联合国系统实体的服务提供方，涉及的领域包括人力资源、差旅、采购、信息和通信技术、财务、设施管理、总务、会议、安保、礼宾、法律和医疗服务。

data.en: Within the framework of the Business Operations Strategy, all the regional commissions, except ECE, are service providers for United Nations system entities in areas including human resources, travel, procurement, information and communications technology, finance, facilities management, general services, conference, security, protocol, legal and medical services.
data.zh: 亚太经社会、非洲经委会和西亚经社会向在曼谷、亚的斯亚贝巴和贝鲁特同地办公的联合国实体提供共同房地服务。

data.en: In the Latin American and Caribbean and Arab regions, the delivery of common services is projected to generate a total cost avoidance of $4.0 million and $1.9 million, respectively, as a net benefit over the period 2022–2024.
data.zh: 在非洲区域，由于在11项共同服务上开展机构间协作，预计今后五年将总共避免费用270万美元。

data.en: B.
data.zh: 促进区域间合作：各区域委员会采取的联合举措

data.en: Under the leadership of the Deputy Secretary-General and in the lead-up to the twenty-seventh session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change, the regional commissions collaborated with the Egyptian presidency of the twenty-seventh session of the Conference of the Parties and the high-level champions for climate action to organize five regional round tables to accelerate public and private investment in mature and scalable projects that are in line with the Paris Agreement.
data.zh: 圆桌会议的成果包括释放资金流所需的政策措施和一份简编文件， 其中介绍一系列响应国家驱动的优先事项和计划且已准备好接受投资的气候相关举措。

data.en: The outcome of the round tables included policy measures that are needed to unlock finance flows and a compendium featuring a pipeline of investment-ready climate-related initiatives that respond to country-driven priorities and plans.
data.zh: 这份于2022年11月中旬发布的简编文件是一个重要工具，能够吸引投资以加强气候行动，其中包含的长期复原力和适应措施也有助于推动落实《2030年议程》。

data.en: In the context of the United Nations Conference on the Midterm Comprehensive Review of the Implementation of the Objectives of the International Decade for Action, “Water for Sustainable Development”, 2018–2028, held in March 2023, the regional commissions organized a joint high-level event to showcase the outcomes of regional consultations held to assess progress and mobilize water action ahead of the Conference.
data.zh: 在会议期间，各区域委员会发布一份联合政策简报，概述在区域协商中产生的重要信息和前瞻性建议。

data.en: On the margins of the Economic and Social Council forum on financing for development follow-up held in April 2023, the regional commissions organized a joint high-level event on addressing public debt challenges to pursue the Goals and issued a joint policy brief calling for a shift in thinking about leveraging public debt for development gains.
data.zh: 各区域委员会继续加大支持力度，努力建立共同的国际债务解决机制和重组框架。

data.en: The regional commissions continue to step up their support for efforts towards common international debt resolution mechanisms and restructuring frameworks.
data.zh: 各区域委员会还在计量非法资金流动、追回资产和对数字经济征税等领域开展协作。

data.en: Leveraging opportunities offered by the United Nations Development Account, the regional commissions are implementing several joint projects.
data.zh: 各区域委员会由西亚经社会牵头并与联合国贸易和发展会议(贸发会议)密切合作实施一个项目，目的是增强国家创新和技术能力，利用区块链技术促进贸易，支持可持续发展。

data.en: Under the leadership of ESCWA and working closely with the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD), the regional commissions implemented a project aimed at strengthening national innovation and technological capacities for the use of blockchain technology to boost trade in support of sustainable development.
data.zh: 西亚经社会和非洲经委会正在协作开展一个项目，目的是开发一个交互式数字知识平台，提供关于阿拉伯国家联盟地下水的各种资源。

data.en: ESCWA and ECA are collaborating on a project aimed at developing an interactive digital knowledge platform that provides access to resources on groundwater in the League of Arab States.
data.zh: 各区域委员会还在拉加经委会的牵头下与联合国人类住区规划署(人居署)联合实施一个项目，目的是提高执行、监测和报告《新城市议程》的能力。

data.en: With a view to advancing resilient energy systems in Central Asia, ECE, together with ESCAP and other organizations, organized the second Almaty Energy Forum in November 2022 on modernizing regional infrastructure through innovation and investments that deliver on net-zero targets and increase the efficiency, affordability and resilience of the energy system.
data.zh: 亚太经社会与欧洲经委会和拉加经委会协作，正在实施一个旨在加强处境特殊国家能源政策的项目。

data.en: In cooperation with UNCTAD, the regional commissions launched the fifth United Nations Global Survey on Digital and Sustainable Trade Facilitation in January 2023.
data.zh: 各区域委员会与贸发会议一起编写并定期更新对乌克兰战争影响的分析，以便监测五个区域中每个区域在国家一级融资、粮食和能源安全方面的脆弱性，并提出政策建议。

data.en: Ahead of the fifteenth meeting of the Conference of the Parties to the Convention on Biological Diversity, the regional commissions issued a joint statement calling for the mainstreaming of biodiversity into policies and programmes and the strengthening of knowledge exchange on biodiversity.
data.zh: 三.

data.en: III.
data.zh: 展望未来：各区域委员会推进2023年优先事项的计划预览

data.en: The regional commissions continue to work in evolving and innovative ways to support member States in countering the interlocking and complex crises and advance efforts to implement the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 在未来的一年里，各区域委员会将继续围绕四个共同优先领域推进联合行动，这些领域是：《2030年议程》中期审查和可持续发展目标峰会；发展筹资；气候行动；秘书长题为“我们的共同议程”的报告(A/75/982)所载相关建议的执行。

data.en: In preparation for the Sustainable Development Goals Summit, the regional commissions are mobilizing regional stakeholders and facilitating the coordination of regional inputs towards shaping the outcome of the Summit.
data.zh: 区域委员会还共同为定于2024年举行的未来峰会的筹备进程提出实质性意见，重点是加快可持续发展目标进展的重要转型。

data.en: They are also making joint substantive contributions to the preparatory process for the Summit of the Future, to be held in 2024, with the emphasis on key transitions for accelerating progress on the Goals.
data.zh: 各区域委员会将在秘书长按照《我们的共同议程》的提议与区域组织负责人举行第一次年度会议之前不断开展筹备工作。

data.en: In advancing the financing for development agenda, the regional commissions seek to undertake coordinated action to support advocacy efforts around the Sustainable Development Goal stimulus to scale up affordable, long-term financing for development.
data.zh: 各区域委员会还将帮助制定解决办法并动员各行为体，以推动全球金融架构的全面改革。

data.en: In the lead-up to the Climate Ambition Summit to be held in September 2023 and the twenty-eighth session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change, the regional commissions will support preparatory events at the regional level to foster specific and credible climate action.
data.zh: 各区域委员会还将继续协助成员国推进关于减缓、适应和抵御气候变化的目标。

data.en: They will also continue to support member States in advancing their climate mitigation, adaptation and resilience goals.
data.zh: 四.

data.en: IV.
data.zh: 结论

data.en: The regional commissions have further strengthened their role as thought leaders, knowledge generators and conveners of intergovernmental and multi-stakeholder policy dialogue to foster regional and interregional cooperation in the context of cascading crises.
data.zh: 各区域委员会的工作增强了全球协议和建议在区域环境中的转化，并为协助在融资、数字和能源转型以及气候行动等重要领域采取有效的国家一级行动提供了桥梁。

data.en: Their work has enhanced the translation of global agreements and recommendations in regional settings and provided a bridge to support effective country-level action in key areas such as financing, the digital and energy transition and climate action.
data.zh: 为配合联合国发展系统的改革，各区域委员会通过在区域一级加强协调，调整了旨在协助后续落实和执行《2030年议程》的努力，以适应成员国和联合国国家工作队的需要。
