data.en: Towards Transformation of the Development Model in Latin America and the Caribbean: Production, Inclusion and Sustainability (United Nations publication, 2022).
data.zh: 可持续发展问题非洲区域论坛，2023年2月28日至3月2日；拉丁美洲和加勒比国家可持续发展论坛，2023年4月25日至28日；欧洲经济委员会区域可持续发展区域论坛，2023年3月29日至30日；亚太可持续发展论坛，2023年3月27日至30日；阿拉伯可持续发展论坛，2023年3月14日至16日。

data.en: Africa Regional Forum on Sustainable Development, 28 February–2 March 2023; Forum of the Countries of Latin America and the Caribbean on Sustainable Development, 25-28 April 2023; Regional Forum on Sustainable Development for the Economic Commission for Europe Region, 29 and 30 March 2023; Asia-Pacific Forum on Sustainable Development, 27-30 March 2023; and Arab Forum for Sustainable Development, 14-16 March 2023.
data.zh: 2022年有乍得、科摩罗、肯尼亚、毛里求斯、卢旺达和突尼斯。

data.en: Chad, Comoros, Kenya, Mauritius, Rwanda and Tunisia in 2022.
data.zh: 在非洲大陆自由贸易区方面，向布基纳法索、刚果、几内亚、尼日尔和多哥提供协助；在数字化普查方面，向利比里亚、毛里求斯、尼日利亚、塞舌尔、塞拉利昂、多哥、赞比亚和津巴布韦提供协助。

data.en: In relation to the African Continental Free Trade Area, support for Burkina Faso, Congo, Guinea, the Niger and Togo; in relation to the digital censuses, support for Liberia, Mauritius, Nigeria, Seychelles, Sierra Leone, Togo, Zambia and Zimbabwe.
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会主持召开的可持续发展高级别政治论坛

data.en: High-level political forum on sustainable development convened under the auspices of the Economic and Social Council

data.zh: 经济及社会理事会主席关于在理事会2023年届会期间主持召开的可持续发展高级别政治论坛的摘要

data.en: Summary by the President of the Economic and Social Council of the high-level political forum on sustainable development convened under the auspices of the Council at its 2023 session
data.zh: 一．

data.en: I.
data.zh: 导言

data.en: The high-level political forum on sustainable development convened under the auspices of the Economic and Social Council met from 10 to 19 July 2023 at United Nations Headquarters in New York.
data.zh: 论坛包括7月17日至19日为期三天的部长级部分。

data.en: It included a three-day ministerial segment, from 17 to 19 July.
data.zh: 2023年论坛是自2019年冠状病毒病(COVID-19)大流行暴发以来首次完全以面对面的形式举行的论坛。

data.en: The forum examined progress in the context of the theme “Accelerating the recovery from the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) and the full implementation of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development at all levels”.
data.zh: 与会者讨论了应对COVID-19疫情对可持续发展目标的影响的有效和包容性复苏措施，并探讨了全面落实《2030年议程》的可操作政策指导。

data.en: A total of 38 countries presented voluntary national reviews, of which 1 was presenting for the first time, 36 for the second time, and 1 for the third time.
data.zh: 欧洲联盟也介绍了其第一份自愿评估报告。本报告附件载有介绍评估报告的国家和集团名单。

data.en: An in-person general debate was held from 17 to 20 July, during the high-level segment of the Council, which included the three-day ministerial meeting of the forum. The debate was focused on the theme “Building momentum towards the 2023 Sustainable Development Goals Summit: transformation for accelerating implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals”.
data.zh: 论坛为与会国的部长和高级别代表以及政府间组织、联合国系统各实体、主要群体和其他利益攸关方的代表提供了机会，就即将于2023年9月举行的可持续发展目标峰会交流经验教训、政策指导、转型行动和倡议。

data.en: In his special edition report entitled “Progress towards the Sustainable Development Goals: towards a rescue plan for people and planet” (A/78/80-E/2023/64), prepared in advance of the session, the Secretary-General emphasized that the defining principle and promise of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development to leave no one behind was in peril.
data.zh: 此外，秘书长指出，许多目标的进展偏离轨道，偏离程度从中等到严重不等，并提出从2023年到2030年期间挽救这些目标并加快执行步伐的五项主要建议，供会员国在可持续发展目标峰会之前审议。

data.en: The 2023 forum constitutes the conclusion of the forum’s second four-year review cycle of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development and the 17 Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 经社理事会7月主持召开的论坛成果将为拟于2023年9月在联合国大会主持下举行的论坛提供信息，在联大期间，各国元首和政府首脑将齐聚联合国总部，对《2030年议程》的执行进展情况进行中期审议，并承诺采取具体行动，确保在执行期的下半程加快进度。

data.en: More than 120 representatives of Governments, including ministers, vice-ministers and one prime minister, participated in the forum, along with heads of entity of organizations and bodies of the United Nations system and other organizations, and more than 800 representatives of major groups and other stakeholders from all regions.
data.zh: 高级别政治论坛所有会议的专题小组讨论都有青年代表发言。

data.en: The panels of all sessions of the high-level political forum included youth representatives as speakers.
data.zh: 此外，还举办了12次高级别特别活动、204次会外活动(141次面对面活动和63次虚拟活动)、16个自愿国别评估实验室和19个展览。

data.en: There were also 12 high-level special events, 204 side events (141 in-person and 63 virtual), 16 voluntary national review labs and 19 exhibitions.
data.zh: 二.

data.en: II.
data.zh: 一般性辩论的主要讯息
各国受到多重相互交织的危机的严重影响，这些危机进一步加剧了紧迫的挑战，包括与贫困、粮食不安全、通货膨胀、债务和能源有关的挑战。

data.en: Countries have been severely affected by multiple interlocking crises that have further amplified pressing challenges, including those relating to poverty, food insecurity, inflation, debt and energy.
data.zh: 面对最近的这些挑战，各国在实现可持续发展目标方面的进度进一步滞后。

data.en: Countries have fallen further behind in progress towards achieving the Sustainable Development Goals in the face of those recent challenges.
data.zh: 因此，需要加强集体努力，以落实《2030年议程》；
尽管在实现可持续发展目标方面遭遇挫折，但这些目标仍然至关重要。

data.en: Despite the setbacks in achieving them, the Goals remain essential.
data.zh: 科学分析表明，如果各国有效合作，可持续发展目标仍然是可以实现的。

data.en: Scientific analysis demonstrates that the Goals are still achievable if countries collaborate efficiently.
data.zh: 《2030年议程》被公认为实现可持续发展的共同路线图；
即将在2023年9月召开的可持续发展目标峰会将成为重申对《2030年议程》的承诺并采取具体行动挽救和实现可持续发展目标的独特机会；
所有这些目标都同等重要，实现每一项目标都面临挑战。

data.en: All the Goals are equally important and the achievement of each faces challenges.
data.zh: 粮食安全(目标2)和享有清洁饮水和卫生设施(目标6)的现状尤为严峻。

data.en: The current situation regarding food security (Goal 2) and access to clean water and sanitation (Goal 6) is particularly critical.
data.zh: 对于所有可持续发展目标，科学技术和创新在克服挑战和加速进展方面发挥着至关重要的作用；
必须重申不让任何一个人掉队的承诺，包括为此采取行动支持性别平等和应对儿童和青年面临的挑战；
气候行动以及应对生物多样性丧失和环境退化的迫切需要是关键的优先事项。

data.en: Climate action, as well as the urgent need to tackle biodiversity loss and environmental degradation, are key priorities.
data.zh: 以公正和公平的方式减少温室气体排放和向可再生能源转型至关重要；
需要加大对特殊处境国家的支持力度。

data.en: There is a need for greater support for countries in special situations.
data.zh: 应认识到最不发达国家、内陆发展中国家和小岛屿发展中国家面临的独特挑战，与此同时还应铭记中等收入国家面临的特殊挑战；
获得资金是实现可持续发展的一个关键挑战。

data.en: Access to financing is a key challenge to achieving sustainable development.
data.zh: 由于债务困扰、高利率、财政空间受限、负担得起的融资选择有限，发展中国家面临重大障碍。

data.en: Developing countries face significant obstacles owing to debt distress, high interest rates and constrained fiscal space, with limited affordable financing options.
data.zh: 许多国家呼吁提供更多优惠融资，改革国际金融架构和提供创新融资解决方案，包括减免债务以换取气候行动；
多利益攸关方伙伴关系和全球协调，包括与民间社会、私营部门和地方政府的协调，对于落实《2030年议程》至关重要。

data.en: Multi-stakeholder partnerships and global coordination, including with civil society, the private sector and local governments, are critical for implementing the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 必须本着信任和诚意的精神加强这些伙伴关系；
和平与安全是可持续发展的先决条件；没有和平就没有可持续发展，没有可持续发展就没有和平。

data.en: Peace and security are prerequisites for sustainable development; there is no sustainable development without peace, and no peace without sustainable development.
data.zh: 三.

data.en: III.
data.zh: 高级别政治论坛的其他关键讯息
通往2030年的路程已经过半，人们普遍担心，世界在实现《2030年议程》方面偏离了轨道。

data.en: Halfway to 2030, there is shared concern that the world is off track from fulfilling the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: “多重危机”一词涉及当前全球挑战的相互关联性质，并表明全球应对措施也必须相互关联。
现在是采取行动的时候了。

data.en: The time has come for action.
data.zh: 迫切需要在各级采取有效、加速和变革性行动，以实现可持续发展目标，并确保不让任何一个人掉队。

data.en: There is an urgent need for effective, accelerated, transformative action at all levels to achieve the Goals and ensure that no one is left behind.
data.zh: 需要创新政策和系统性变革来支持实现可持续发展目标，对抗当前的全球趋势，以及促进多利益攸关方的合作；
可持续发展目标峰会将提供一个重要机会，以增强雄心壮志、政治意愿和更广泛的社会联盟，以强大的科学知识为基础，促进和锁定变革势头，使实现《2030年议程》所需的转型的惠益最大化，并缓冲其代价的影响；
多边主义和国际合作是有效落实《2030年议程》的必要条件。

data.en: Multilateralism and international cooperation are imperative for effective implementation of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 全球团结对于可持续发展至关重要；
全球在为可持续发展目标提供资金方面严重不足。

data.en: The world is falling radically short in its funding of the Goals.
data.zh: 需要大规模筹集资金，包括从私人来源筹集资金。

data.en: Massive mobilization of funding is needed, including from private sources.
data.zh: 许多国家，特别是非洲国家，分配给偿债的资源多于分配给公共服务的资源。

data.en: Many countries, in particular in Africa, are allocating more resources for debt service than for public services.
data.zh: 联合国是讨论发展筹资问题、包括国际金融架构改革问题的最具包容性和最民主的多边场所；
在国家一级，包容性的全社会办法和动员伙伴关系，包括公私伙伴关系，是推动进步和让所有人都能享受到实现目标带来的惠益的关键驱动力；
弱势群体必须被视为关键利益攸关方，并被纳入落实可持续发展目标的决策和行动中。

data.en: Vulnerable populations must be seen as key stakeholders and be included in the decisions and actions for Goal implementation.
data.zh: 还必须扩大妇女、女童和青年的声音，并就此采取行动，以实现所有17项可持续发展目标；
人人享有清洁饮水和环境卫生对生活和实现可持续发展目标至关重要。

data.en: Clean water and sanitation for all are essential to life and to achieving the Goals.
data.zh: 需要利用现有数据和科学证据改进水资源和废物管理系统。

data.en: Water and waste management systems need to be improved by using available data and scientific evidence.
data.zh: 继2023年3月在纽约成功召开联合国2018-2028“水促进可持续发展”国际行动十年目标执行情况中期全面审查会议之后，全球行动和势头应得以继续；
清洁和负担得起的能源是重新回到实现可持续发展目标和到2050年实现净零排放轨道上的重要手段。

data.en: Clean and affordable energy is an essential means for getting back on track to achieving the Goals and net zero emissions by 2050.
data.zh: 必须在全世界紧急加快公正、包容和公平能源转型；
产业、创新和基础设施对于推动经济增长和可持续发展至关重要。

data.en: Industry, innovation and infrastructure are crucial for advancing economic growth and sustainable development.
data.zh: 动员公私伙伴关系和全社会办法是促进对可持续基础设施和工业化投资的关键驱动因素；
为了加快实现可持续城市和社区方面的进展，必须优先考虑负担得起的住房和可持续交通，利用技术促进城市发展，并围绕已证明成功的举措建立协同增效作用。

data.en: In order to accelerate progress towards achieving sustainable cities and communities, it is important to prioritize affordable housing and sustainable transportation, leverage technology for urban development and build synergies around proven successful initiatives.
data.zh: 关于可持续城市和社区的目标11与关于清洁饮水和环境卫生的目标6、关于负担得起的清洁能源的目标7和关于产业、创新和基础设施的目标9具有趋同效应；
科学、技术和创新也有助于弥合数字鸿沟，需要优先考虑为科学、技术和创新创造有利环境，这将需要加强国际知识交流和能力建设合作。

data.en: Enabling environments for science, technology and innovation that also bridge the digital divide need to be prioritized and will require enhanced international knowledge exchange and collaboration for capacity-building.
data.zh: 青年、妇女和最弱势群体积极参与科技创新，对可持续发展至关重要。

data.en: The active participation in science, technology and innovation of young people, women and the most vulnerable populations is crucial for sustainable development.
data.zh: 有与会者提议在下一届科学、技术和创新促进可持续发展目标多利益攸关方论坛期间举办“青年参与科学、技术和创新日”活动；
地方行动是不让任何一个人掉队的承诺的关键。

data.en: Local action is key to achieving the Sustainable Development Goals to leave no one behind.
data.zh: 地方领导人和行为体需要获得权能和资源，以便让目标本地化，并帮助实现《2030年议程》；
需要采取具体行动，应对特殊处境国家面临的资源调动挑战。

data.en: Specific actions are needed to address the resource mobilization challenges faced by countries in special situations.
data.zh: 小岛屿发展中国家面临着独特的挑战。

data.en: Small island developing States face unique challenges.
data.zh: 最不发达国家、内陆发展中国家和许多非洲国家有掉队的危险。

data.en: The least developed countries, landlocked developing countries and many African countries are at risk of being left behind.
data.zh: 各项努力应包括对复苏和建立复原力的关注；
中等收入国家面临着以收入为基础的指标无法反映的挑战和发展差距。

data.en: Middle-income countries faced challenges and development gaps not captured by income-based indicators.
data.zh: 因此，国内生产总值以外的指标对于全面衡量可持续发展、指导政策决定、促进国际合作和确保不让任何一个人掉队至关重要；
数据对于在实现可持续发展目标方面取得进展至关重要。

data.en: Data are essential for progress on the Goals to be achieved.
data.zh: 然而，许多国家难以制作与可持续发展目标相关的数据，因此，需要在数据收集、数据治理和分析能力方面进行大量投资，以确保提供优质、及时和可靠的数据，以推动转型变革；
民间社会伙伴关系是确保实现目标方面的进展回到正轨的关键部分，应确保民间社会团体的参与。

data.en: Civil society partnerships are a critical part of ensuring that the progress towards achieving the Goals gets back on track, and the engagement of civil society groups should be ensured.
data.zh: 国家和国际两级的伙伴关系至关重要；
经社理事会副主席(印度尼西亚)将转型政策和举措的附件作为2023年经社理事会协调部分的创新成果分享，这一成果可以激励各级努力推进《2030年议程》、包括可持续发展目标的执行工作。

data.en: The Vice-President (Indonesia) of the Council shared the annex of transformative policies and initiative, as an innovative outcome of the coordination segment of the 2023 session of the Council that could inspire efforts at all levels to advance implementation of the 2030 Agenda, including the Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 四.

data.en: IV.
data.zh: 克服危机，推动转型以实现可持续发展目标，不让任何一个人掉队

data.en: There was strong agreement among participants that the lack of progress towards the Goals required renewed commitments and transformative action.
data.zh: 与会者对预计在2030年生活在极端贫困中的人数、粮食不安全加剧和与气候有关的灾害增加以及儿童死亡率表示关切。

data.en: Participants voiced concerns about the number of people expected to be living in extreme poverty in 2030, the rise in food insecurity and the increase in climate-related disasters and child mortality.
data.zh: 此外，COVID-19疫情减缓了发展，扩大了发达国家与发展中国家之间的差距。

data.en: In addition, the COVID-19 pandemic had slowed development and increased gaps between developed and developing countries.
data.zh: 冲突和战争导致数以百万计的人口流离失所，价格波动和供应链中断对世界经济的复苏构成威胁。

data.en: Conflicts and wars had led to the displacement of millions of people, and price volatility and the disruption of supply chains threatened the recovery of the world economy.
data.zh: 儿童、土著人民、妇女和女童以及老年人等弱势群体受到这些危机的影响尤为严重。

data.en: Panellists presented key actions needed to address the widening Goals financing gap, geopolitical conflicts and climate change, and to promote collective action to address transboundary challenges.
data.zh: 国际农业援助、改善水管理和有效使用化肥被确定为促进粮食安全的关键措施。

data.en: International aid relating to agriculture, improved water management and efficient use of fertilizers was identified as a key measure for promoting food security.
data.zh: 了解风险的决策和增加对预防和复原力建设的投资至关重要，值得信赖的社会机构和促进透明度和问责制的有效法律框架也同样重要。

data.en: Risk-informed decision-making and increased investments in prevention and resilience-building were crucial, as were trustworthy social institutions and effective legal frameworks that promoted transparency and accountability.
data.zh: 许多国家在制作与可持续发展目标有关数据方面面临困难，因此需要在数据收集、数据治理和分析能力方面进行更多投资，以确保提供优质、及时和可靠的数据。

data.en: Many countries struggled to produce data relevant to the Goals, and more investment was therefore needed in relation to data gathering, data governance and analytical capacity to ensure that high-quality, timely and reliable data were available.
data.zh: 与会者还强调，必须摈弃各自为政的“筒仓式”做法，将危机转化为发展机遇。

data.en: Participants noted that innovative and sustained policies were needed to address such challenges, including the reform of the international financial architecture, the promotion of multi-stakeholder collaboration, and targeted investments in health care and education.
data.zh: 发言者呼吁各国到2025年至少增加5 000亿美元的资金流，并调整《支援最不发达国家多哈行动纲领》。

data.en: States were called upon to ramp up financing flows by at least $500 billion by 2025, and to adapt the Doha Programme of Action for the Least Developed Countries.
data.zh: 与会者还强调，需要促进最佳做法、尊重人权、地方伙伴关系和可持续融资，并需要侧重于通过作出具体承诺和提供时间框架来落实可持续发展目标。

data.en: Participants also emphasized the need to promote best practices, respect for human rights, local partnerships and sustainable finance, and to focus on the implementation of the Goals by providing specific commitments and time frames.
data.zh: 五.

data.en: V.
data.zh: 审查目标6、7、9、11和17的进展情况

data.en: Review of progress on Goals 6, 7, 9, 11 and 17
data.zh: 目标6：清洁饮水和卫生设施

data.en: Participants agreed that water and sanitation must become a top global political priority, recognized as both a global common good and a fundamental right.
data.zh: 由于水作为生命之源的中心地位，以及在目标6上不采取行动的风险增加，对最脆弱群体的影响尤为严重，因此，转变水管理模式和采取更多的协调一致行动，包括定期评估，至关重要。

data.en: Due to the centrality of water as a source of life and the increased risks of inaction in the context of Goal 6, which disproportionately affect the most vulnerable, a paradigm shift in water management and increased, concerted action, including regular stock-taking, were pivotal.
data.zh: 需要有政治意愿和有效的治理，以采取集体水事行动和作出全球承诺，这一点怎么强调都不过分。

data.en: There was an increasingly urgent need to mitigate risks associated with water and sanitation and to develop early warning systems, in particular for countries in special situations and in Africa.
data.zh: 不让任何一个人掉队并满足妇女、儿童和其他弱势群体的需求，包括提供安全和负担得起的月经健康管理至关重要。

data.en: Leaving no one behind and addressing the needs of women, children and other vulnerable groups were of pivotal concern, including the provision of safe and affordable menstrual health management.
data.zh: 与会者指出，地方当局必须以包容性的方式进行决策，并有权采取行动，特别是在农村地区和土著居民中。

data.en: It was noted that local authorities must be engaged in decision-making in an inclusive manner and be empowered to act, in particular in rural areas and among Indigenous populations.
data.zh: 充足的融资，包括创新融资以及有效和负责任地使用关税、税收以及大规模和小额贷款工具至关重要。

data.en: Adequate financing was crucial, including innovative financing and the effective, accountable use of tariffs, taxes and both macro- and microloan tools.
data.zh: 此外，还需要转变思维方式，采用更务实、可扩展和可融资的解决方案，特别是在认识到需要以数据为中心的循证办法和科学验证方面。

data.en: In addition, there was a need for a shift in mindset to more pragmatic, scalable and bankable solutions, in particular in recognizing the need for data-centric, evidence-based approaches and scientific validation.
data.zh: 这种思维的转变，再加上数据和知识共享，将有助于扩大水政策的技术和财政可行性，并带来更有影响力和更长期可持续性的成果。

data.en: The multi-dimensional, transboundary and interdisciplinary context of water required policy coherence and more effective, outcome-based cooperation among countries, stakeholder groups and institutions at all levels.
data.zh: 任命联合国水问题特使、就水问题通过联合国全系统战略以及定期举行全球对话将会得到各国的热烈欢迎。

data.en: The appointment of a United Nations special envoy on water, the adoption of a United Nations system-wide strategy and regular global dialogues on water would be strongly welcomed by countries.
data.zh: 继2023 年成功召开联合国水事会议之后，全球行动和势头应得以继续。

data.en: Global actions and momentum should continue following the success of the United Nations 2023 Water Conference.
data.zh: 目标7：经济适用的清洁能源

data.en: Participants highlighted the urgent need to intensify efforts to ensure universal access to clean and affordable energy and called for action to deliver on the global road map for accelerated action on Goal 7.
data.zh: 负担得起的、可靠的、可持续的现代能源是到2050年实现其他可持续发展目标和净零排放的基础。

data.en: Affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy underpinned the ability to achieve both the other Goals and net zero emissions by 2050.
data.zh: 确保普遍获得清洁和负担得起的电力必须成为各级的一个紧迫政治优先事项，特别是对最不发达国家和撒哈拉以南非洲而言。

data.en: Just, inclusive and equitable energy transitions must be urgently accelerated worldwide.
data.zh: 能源行动还必须确保产生公正和公平的结果，同时在实现净零排放的努力中发挥关键作用。

data.en: Energy action must also ensure just and equitable outcomes as well as fulfil its key role in efforts to achieve net zero emissions.
data.zh: 如果能源部门不深度脱碳，到2050年实现净零排放的目标将很快遥不可及。

data.en: Without deep decarbonization of the energy sector, achieving net zero by 2050 would quickly fall out of reach.
data.zh: 许多与会者表示支持加强公共政策框架，以支持创新、研发和与培养技能和人才有关的能力建设，并将气候和人权考虑纳入其中。

data.en: Many participants expressed support for strengthening public policy frameworks to support innovation, research and development and capacity-building relating to skills and talents, and to integrate climate and human rights considerations.
data.zh: 与会者还呼吁采取果断的全球行动，解决清洁炊事问题，这是一个近年来进展甚微、对妇女和儿童影响特别大的领域。

data.en: Participants noted the critical importance of reversing the trend of decline in international public financial flows in support of clean energy in developing countries and promoting technology transfers.
data.zh: 加强伙伴关系，包括通过能源契约加强伙伴关系，可以增加融资，同时强化当地社区，包括青年、妇女和土著人民的权能。

data.en: Strengthening partnerships, including through energy compacts, could increase financing while also empowering local communities, including young people, women and Indigenous Peoples.
data.zh: 与会者建议，在联合国建立一个能源问题政府间定期对话平台，可大大有助于加强这方面的国际合作。

data.en: It was suggested that a platform for regular intergovernmental dialogue on energy at the United Nations could contribute significantly to strengthening international cooperation in that regard.
data.zh: 目标9：产业、创新和基础设施

data.en: Advances made towards achieving Goal 9 also supported essential systems, such as water, sanitation and transportation, and were pivotal to boosting the overall progress on key Sustainable Development Goal transitions, such as clean energy, health, education, digital transformation and climate action.
data.zh: 得到科技支持的创新是增长的引擎，它推动转型，使各国能够发展经济、提供就业并扩大产品和服务的范围。

data.en: Innovation, supported by science and technology, was an engine of growth that drove transformation and allowed countries to develop their economies, provide employment and expand their range of products and services.
data.zh: 各国需要采取政策、战略和法规，促进向绿色和数字经济的包容性公正转型，并缩小数字鸿沟，包括为此投资于通信基础设施，提高数字素养，以及消除使用数字技术的文化和宗教障碍。

data.en: Countries needed to adopt policies, strategies and regulations that promoted inclusive and just transitions towards green and digital economies and reduced the digital divide, including by investing in communications infrastructure, increasing digital literacy, and addressing cultural and religious barriers to using digital technologies.
data.zh: 政策制定者还应推广支持负责任和合乎道德地使用人工智能的法律框架，并使其劳动力为人工智能驱动的未来的到来做好准备。

data.en: Building partnerships, including by mobilizing public-private partnerships, was critical to promoting investments in sustainable infrastructure and industrialization.
data.zh: 在善政支持下的开放和透明的机构将为发展中国家吸引和管理投资提供有利的环境。

data.en: Open and transparent institutions supported by good governance would provide an enabling environment for developing countries to attract and manage such investments.
data.zh: 需要有更多可融资项目以及透明的项目评估、融资和竞争性采购，以吸引私营部门投资。

data.en: There was a need for a larger pipeline of bankable projects, as well as for transparent project appraisals, financing and competitive procurement in order to attract private sector investments.
data.zh: 公益创新者和从将衍生产品推向市场中获利的私营公司之间需要公平和持续地分享利益。

data.en: Equitable and consistent sharing of benefits was needed between innovators for the public good and private corporations that profited from taking derivative products to market.
data.zh: 积极参与决策的全社会方法，对于实现可持续发展目标9至关重要，应包括对青年人的特殊基础设施需求的考虑。

data.en: International cooperation and a rules-based multilateral system that promoted justice and transparency played a key role in facilitating the sharing of knowledge and technology, building the foresight capacities of countries in order to anticipate sectors that would grow in the future and providing financial and technical assistance and capacity-building.
data.zh: 为投资和创业创造开放环境的公平贸易协定，特别是那些促进和支持中小微型企业的协定，是确保包容、可持续增长和创新的关键。

data.en: Equitable trade agreements that created open environments for investment and entrepreneurship, in particular those that fostered and supported micro-, small and medium-sized enterprises, were key to ensuring inclusive, sustainable growth and innovation.
data.zh: 目标11：可持续城市和社区

data.en: In the light of the accelerating urbanization taking place in developing countries and the fact that there were currently approximately 4 billion urban dwellers around the world, achieving Goal 11 would have a far-reaching impact and was critical to the achievement of the Goals as a whole.
data.zh: 然而，最近的危机对实现目标11的进展产生了负面影响，如果不加强行动，30年内生活在贫民窟的人口可能会增加 20 亿。

data.en: Recent crises had negatively affected progress towards Goal 11, however, posing the risk of an additional 2 billion people living in slums within 30 years if strengthened action were not taken.
data.zh: 鉴于全球只有51.6%的城市居民能够方便地使用公共交通，因此改善使用公共交通的机会对于城市居民获得经济机会至关重要。

data.en: Participants highlighted the experiences of local governments in urban crisis response and the need to strengthen multistakeholder partnerships.
data.zh: 他们指出，可持续发展目标11的实施应从地方一级开始，并建立在包容性、可持续性和负担得起的住房的基础之上。

data.en: They noted that the implementation of Goal 11 should begin at the local level and be based on inclusion, sustainability and affordable housing.
data.zh: 包括青年在内的主要利益攸关方呼吁“重新思考”城市问题，重点关注负担得起的住房、可持续的交通系统、绿色空间的提供情况和所有人的无障碍环境。

data.en: Increasing collaboration between cities, South-South cooperation, and the sharing of technology and best practices were highlighted as key steps to achieving Goal 11, along with harnessing the power of technology in designing evidence-based policies and initiatives for sustainable urban development.
data.zh: 与会者注意到为城市气候治理数字化所做的努力，以及提供衡量城市发展举措在减少城市气候排放和提高抗灾能力等方面影响的工具所做的努力。

data.en: Participants noted efforts to digitalize climate governance for cities and provide tools for measuring the impacts of urban development initiatives in relation to, for example, reducing urban climate emissions and increasing resilience.
data.zh: 目标17：促进目标实现的伙伴关系

data.en: Goal 17: partnerships for the Goals
data.zh: 为应对危机提供资金，投资于可持续发展目标

data.en: Participants drew attention to the fact that, owing to the debt crisis, many countries were allocating an increasingly larger share of their fiscal income to debt service at the expense of the Goals and public services.
data.zh: 此外，正在进行的乌克兰战争正在让一些国家的公共支出的重点转向军事和化石燃料行业。

data.en: Participants called for States to establish a legal framework to prevent the sovereign debt crisis, giving priority to debt cancellation and a new approach to debt sustainability.
data.zh: 仅靠公共部门无法为气候适应和可持续发展目标提供资金；需要动员大规模私人资本，并从根本上重新考虑全球金融架构，包括打击腐败和金融犯罪的措施。

data.en: The public sector alone could not finance climate adaptation and the Goals; massive private capital mobilization and a fundamental reconsideration of the global financial architecture, including measures against corruption and financial crimes, were needed.
data.zh: 应以可复制、快速的方式大规模利用混合融资作为吸引私营部门的机制，各国应重新考虑特别提款权的使用事宜。

data.en: Blended finance should be leveraged at scale with replicability and speed as a mechanism to crowd in the private sector, and countries should reconsider the use of special drawing rights.
data.zh: 科学、技术和创新：引发转型并维持科学驱动的复苏

data.en: Many participants acknowledged the importance of science, technology and innovation for all areas of sustainable development and presented various initiatives that had led to progress on inclusive technology transformation and bridging the digital divide.
data.zh: 需要优先考虑为科学、技术和创新创造有利环境，科学、技术和创新在弥合数字鸿沟，促进包容性和加强合作方面发挥了作用。

data.en: Participants noted that the technological gap between the global North and global South had been widening and that science, technology and innovation must be made accessible to developing countries.
data.zh: 青年、妇女和最弱势群体积极参与科学、技术和创新对可持续发展至关重要，建议在下一次科学、技术和创新促进可持续发展目标多利益攸关方论坛期间，专门用一天举办青年参与科学、技术和创新活动。

data.en: The active participation of youth, women and the most vulnerable populations in science, technology and innovation was crucial for sustainable development, and it was recommended that a day dedicated to youth in science, technology and innovation be organized during the next multi‑stakeholder forum on science, technology and innovation for the Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 弥合数字鸿沟的包容性技术转型还需要更多的协作和跨学科方法，以促进对科学的信任，包括将学术界和政策制定者联系起来的战略方法，这些方法是让科学更易于理解和制定可操作政策的关键。

data.en: An inclusive technology transformation to bridge the digital divide would also require more collaborative and interdisciplinary approaches that fostered trust in science, including strategic approaches to link academia and policymaking, which were essential to more accessible science and actionable policy.
data.zh: 六.

data.en: VI.
data.zh: 专题审查

data.en: Thematic review
data.zh: 来自各区域的讯息

data.en: All the Chairs of the regional forums on sustainable development stressed the need to reform the global financial architecture, since the current system posed unmanageable debt burdens on developing countries, severely limiting their ability to implement their development plans.
data.zh: 其他关键问题包括需要加强国家统计系统，以制定数据驱动的政策，并充分跟踪实现可持续发展目标的进展情况，以及需要确保科学、政策和决策之间的良好衔接，以引领创新。

data.en: The significance of redefining business models to promote renewable energies, just transitions and green and resilient infrastructure was also emphasized, in particular in view of the potential for joint projects on solar energy, desalination and wastewater treatment.
data.zh: 可持续转型的另一个强大驱动力是数字创新，前提是这些创新以人为本并且是绿色的。

data.en: All participants noted that collaboration and partnerships among countries and stakeholders, including civil society, the private sector and young people, were pivotal.
data.zh: 自愿国别评估不仅是一种问责机制，而且是促使各行为体参与加快实现可持续发展目标的工具。

data.en: Voluntary national reviews not only served as an accountability mechanism, but also as a tool for engaging various actors in accelerating progress towards the Goals.
data.zh: 与会者还强调，必须确保弱势群体不会掉队。

data.en: Participants also emphasized the need to ensure that vulnerable groups were not left behind.
data.zh: 此外，与会者指出，自愿国别评估应具有前瞻性，以分类数据和各种包容性进程为基础。

data.en: Furthermore, participants noted that the voluntary national reviews should be forward-looking, based on disaggregated data and inclusive processes.
data.zh: 一些与会者建议，在介绍自愿国别评估报告之前，各国应在区域论坛上介绍其国家可持续发展战略，在此期间，各国政府和利益攸关方将能够分享知识并建立伙伴关系，这将有助于提高报告的质量。

data.en: Some participants suggested that, prior to presenting their voluntary national reviews, countries should introduce their national sustainable development strategies at regional forums, during which Governments and stakeholders would be able to share knowledge and engage in partnerships that would help to improve the quality of the reporting.
data.zh: 与会者还指出，区域合作可以在促进和平、稳定和复原力方面发挥核心作用，这些方面是加快可持续发展目标进展的核心先决条件。

data.en: It was noted that regional cooperation could play a central role in promoting peace, stability and resilience, which were central preconditions for accelerated progress towards achieving the Goals.
data.zh: 自下而上的转变：在地方一级采取行动

data.en: Participants highlighted the need to democratize and localize the approaches to achieving the 2030 Agenda, including by engaging with young people and promoting intergenerational solidarity, in order to achieve the Goals and leave no one behind.
data.zh: 让最弱势群体进行参与，例如与贫民窟居民协会合作，对于为应对实现目标11的挑战而促进变革和影响政策和方案以采取有针对性的行动和编制预算至关重要。

data.en: Involving the most vulnerable, for example by partnering with slum dweller associations, was essential for facilitating change and influencing policies and programmes for targeted actions and budgeting in order to address the challenges to achieving Goal 11.
data.zh: 地方当局通过能力建设和确保《2030年议程》、国家计划和地方计划在可持续发展目标背景下的一致性发挥了关键作用。

data.en: Participants shared various examples of local actions, including initiatives to provide tools and resources for empowering rural communities and efforts to integrate the 2030 Agenda through collaboration between regions and municipalities.
data.zh: 与会者强调了为执行次区域政策克服行政障碍的重要性。

data.en: The importance of overcoming administrative barriers for implementing subregional policies was highlighted.
data.zh: 与会者承认，自愿地方评估为加快地方行动和推进可持续发展目标的地方化提供了独特的机会。

data.en: Participants acknowledged that voluntary local reviews provided unique opportunities to accelerate local action and advance the localization of the Goals.
data.zh: 与会者强调，如果地方评估是自愿国别评估的一个有机组成部分，报告过程将更加有效。

data.en: Multilevel governance, strengthening data ecosystems, multi-stakeholder engagement, capacity-building of local stakeholders and higher levels of financing at the local level were considered critical for effective localization.
data.zh: 与会者还强调，必须采取一个让民间社会、学术界、工商界和青年进行参与的整体政府办法。

data.en: The importance of a whole-of-government approach, involving civil society, academia, business and young people, was also emphasized.
data.zh: 与会者讨论了将承诺转化为行动的紧迫性，并敦促地方当局使其计划与可持续发展目标相一致。

data.en: Participants discussed the urgency of translating commitments into action and urged local authorities to align their plans with the Goals.
data.zh: 他们还敦促各国增强地方当局的权能，以实现可持续发展目标，并调动资源，通过使用当地语言和无障碍语言提高公众认识。

data.en: They also urged States to empower local authorities to deliver on the Goals and mobilize resources to raise public awareness through the use of local languages and accessible language.
data.zh: 小岛屿发展中国家：面对多重冲击，从复苏到复原

data.en: Specific actions were needed to address the resource mobilization challenges faced by small island developing States.
data.zh: 这些行动包括改革国际金融架构和采用多层面脆弱性指数，这将有助于全面评估小岛屿发展中国家的脆弱性，并使国际社会能够在发展筹资决策中考虑到这些脆弱性。

data.en: Such actions included the reform of the international financial architecture and the adoption of the multidimensional vulnerability index, which would allow for a comprehensive assessment of the vulnerabilities of small island developing States and enable the international community to take account of such vulnerabilities in development finance decisions.
data.zh: 这一改革，加上增加赠款融资和债务减免，被认为是解决小岛屿发展中国家面临的长期挑战的关键办法。

data.en: The need for significant investment in capacity-building measures was a recurring theme.
data.zh: 与会者强调了投资于预警系统、数字化转型和人力资本发展的重要性。

data.en: Participants stressed the importance of investing in early warning systems, digital transformation and human capital development.
data.zh: 与会者特别强调提高小岛屿发展中国家抵御各种外部冲击的复原力。

data.en: Special emphasis was placed on improving the resilience of small island developing States against all types of external shocks.
data.zh: 几位与会者强调了加强小岛屿发展中国家数字能力的重要性，因为数字转型被认为是小岛屿发展中国家经济福祉和可持续发展的关键推动因素。

data.en: International cooperation, partnership and inclusivity, underpinned by equity and fairness, were vital for addressing the disproportionate impact of crises on small island developing States and for building the resilience of small island developing States in that regard.
data.zh: 与会者确认青年和妇女在应对这些挑战方面的作用，并确认需要通过教育、领导能力发展和决策增强青年和妇女的权能，因为他们在实现小岛屿发展中国家的可持续发展方面可发挥关键作用。

data.en: The role of young people and women in addressing such challenges was acknowledged, as was the need for young people and women to be empowered through education, leadership development and policymaking, as they had a crucial role in achieving the sustainable development of small island developing States.
data.zh: 克服中等收入国家在推进《2030年议程》方面的挑战

data.en: Participants noted that, although middle-income countries were widely acknowledged as central to achieving the Goals at the global level, they faced diverse challenges and development gaps that were not captured by income-based indicators.
data.zh: 此外，财政限制和高额债务负担阻碍了中等收入国家所需的投资，使其难以从COVID-19大流行中复苏和克服中等收入陷阱，无法实现包容、可持续和强韧增长。

data.en: In addition, fiscal constraints and a high debt burden had impeded the investments needed for middle-income countries to recover from the COVID-19 pandemic and overcome the “middle-income trap” to achieve inclusive, sustainable and resilient growth.
data.zh: 与会者指出，能源和数字转型，包括加强数据收集和分析，是需要得到财政资源和技术能力建设支持的机会。

data.en: Participants called for development cooperation to be better tailored to development needs and priorities, including financing needs, and for more concessional financing, technology transfer, capacity-building and market access, including through updated trade rules.
data.zh: 必须通过债务减免和创新机制等手段解决日益严重的债务脆弱性问题。

data.en: It was necessary to address growing debt vulnerabilities, including through debt relief and innovative mechanisms.
data.zh: 与会者一致认为，要更好地评估发展挑战和脆弱性的多层面性质，并指导政策决定和国际发展合作，国内生产总值以外的衡量标准至关重要。

data.en: There was consensus among participants that measurements that went beyond GDP were critical for better assessment of the multidimensional nature of development challenges and vulnerabilities, and to guide policy decisions and international development cooperation.
data.zh: 启动国内生产总值以外的政府间进程可成为可持续发展目标峰会最重要的成果之一。

data.en: The launch of an intergovernmental process to go beyond GDP could be one of the most significant deliverables of the Sustainable Development Goals Summit.
data.zh: 非洲国家、最不发达国家和内陆发展中国家：力挽狂澜，收复失地，踏上实现可持续发展目标的道路

data.en: Least developed countries, landlocked developing countries, and many African countries were at most risk of being left behind.
data.zh: 因此，摆脱多重危机实现复苏的努力需要侧重于建设复原力和转变这些国家的经济结构。

data.en: Efforts for recovery from the polycrisis therefore needed to focus on building the resilience and transforming the structure of the economies of those countries.
data.zh: 缺乏充足和负担得起的资金是实现可持续发展目标的主要障碍。

data.en: Lack of adequate and affordable financing presented the main impediment to achieving the Goals.
data.zh: 与会者表示支持实施可持续发展目标刺激措施，并支持秘书长关于全面改革国际金融架构，以确保为最需要的国家提供金融解决方案的呼吁。

data.en: Participants expressed their support for the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goal stimulus and the call by the Secretary-General for a complete overhaul of the international financial architecture to ensure that it delivered financial solutions to the countries most in need.
data.zh: 非洲国家的声音也应被纳入关于全球金融架构改革的讨论。

data.en: Voices from African countries should also be included in discussions on reforms of the global financial architecture.
data.zh: 与会者指出，《多哈行动纲领》是一个雄心勃勃的变革性框架，旨在为最不发达国家带来持久的发展成果。

data.en: Panellists recognized the importance of South-South and triangular cooperation as an accelerator for achieving the Goals and emphasized the urgency for including all stakeholders, in particular young people and women, in action-oriented conversations.
data.zh: 与会者强调，不仅要承认国家之间的差异，而且要承认国家内部的差异，确保考虑到各种不同的架构和制度。

data.en: Participants emphasized the importance of acknowledging the differences not only between countries but also within countries, ensuring that the full range of structures and systems were taken into accounted.
data.zh: 若干与会者呼吁将可持续发展目标的实施扩大到所有部门，包括音乐和艺术。

data.en: Several participants called for the implementation of the Goals to be expanded to all sectors, including music and the arts.
data.zh: 主要群体和其他利益攸关方在实现可持续发展目标征途中点的观点：迈向包容性转型

data.en: Perspectives of non-State actors were put forward.
data.zh: 来自非洲、亚洲及太平洋、欧洲以及拉丁美洲和加勒比区域的专题小组成员呼吁采取更可持续、真正包容和以人权为中心的发展方针。

data.en: Panellists from the African, Asian and Pacific, European and Latin American and Caribbean regions called for a more sustainable, genuinely inclusive and human-rights-centric approach to development.
data.zh: 非洲区域在实施可持续发展方面的进展将在很大程度上决定“不让任何一个人掉队”的承诺能否成为现实。

data.en: The progress in the African region towards implementing sustainable development would largely determine whether the commitment to leaving no one behind became a reality.
data.zh: 虽然世界各地许多政府开始了民主改革，并为促进人权和发展做了大量工作，但履行承诺的工作往往仍然停留在表面，因此，并不充分。

data.en: Partnerships at the national and international levels in monitoring, reporting and implementation were crucial.
data.zh: 各国强调民间社会在帮助建立实地落实可持续发展目标的能力方面至关重要，许多国家强调它们计划通过年度论坛在国家一级与利益攸关方团体进行接触，包括通过公私伙伴关系与私营部门进行接触。

data.en: States underscored the critical importance of civil society in helping to create capacities for on-the-ground implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals, with many highlighting their plans to engage with stakeholder groups, including the private sector through public-private partnerships, at the national level through annual forums.
data.zh: 然而，公民参与的空间正在缩小，因为在世界许多地方，对公民社会的威权式限制正在增加。

data.en: Spaces for civic engagement were shrinking, however, as authoritarian restrictions on civil society were on the rise in many parts of the world.
data.zh: 虽然在建立民间社会参与机制方面取得了很大进展，但在世界某些地区，坚持环境正义仍然极其危险。

data.en: Representatives of both States and major groups noted the need to amplify the voices of children and young people and of groups that were disadvantaged and/or experienced discrimination.
data.zh: 由地方社区和弱势群体牵头的基层举措提供了实现可持续性的全面、包容和有效的办法，并根据每种环境的独特条件进行了调整。

data.en: Grass-roots initiatives led by local communities and vulnerable groups offered holistic, inclusive and effective approaches for achieving sustainability, tailored to the unique conditions of each context.
data.zh: 实现可持续发展目标还需要在收集数据以及监测和评估可持续发展目标进展的技术方面进行投资和培训。

data.en: Achieving the Sustainable Development Goals also required investment and training in technologies for gathering data and monitoring and assessing progress towards the Goals.
data.zh: 七．

data.en: VII.
data.zh: 部长级部分开幕

data.en: The President of the Council opened the ministerial segment by stating that, despite the chaos accompanying the COVID-19 pandemic, the war in Ukraine and the recent recording of the hottest day on Earth was not time to panic but time to act.
data.zh: 《2030年议程》必须成为此种行动的路线图，推动利益攸关方和各国开展有意义的变革。

data.en: The 2030 Agenda must be the road map for such action, driving both stakeholders and States towards meaningful change.
data.zh: 虽然在时间上已经到达实现《2030年议程》的中点，但世界离实现17项目标还差得很远。

data.en: Although the midpoint of the 2030 Agenda had been reached in terms of time, the world was nowhere near achieving the 17 Goals.
data.zh: 本论坛是可持续发展目标峰会前的最后一站，中场休息时比赛尚未结束。

data.en: Two youth representatives delivered messages on behalf of youth, remarking that while every person had once been a child, no person could choose when or where to be born.
data.zh: 每个人都有权过上享有尊严、安全、快乐、富足和机会的生活。

data.en: Everyone was entitled to a life of dignity, security, joy, prosperity and opportunity.
data.zh: 面对许多全球性挑战，我们需要关注共同的人性、复苏、复原力、准备充分状态和团结，并着眼于年轻一代和子孙后代。

data.en: In the face of many global challenges, there was a need to focus on mutual humanity, recovery, resilience, preparedness and unity, with an eye on younger and future generations.
data.zh: 不应孤立地考虑青年这一群体，而应将其视为参与建设人人共享的可持续世界的核心群体的一部分。

data.en: The Secretary-General highlighted the lack of progress towards the targets of the Goals.
data.zh: 每个国家都需要兑现《2030年议程》的承诺，记住变革是可能的，让2023年变得有意义。

data.en: Every country needed to deliver on the promises of the 2030 Agenda, remembering that change was possible and making 2023 count.
data.zh: 可持续发展目标峰会上需要提出明确的计划，还要作出承诺，通过雄心勃勃的国家干预措施加强行动，以减少贫困和不平等，同时制定明确的政策、投资计划和伙伴关系，推动在可持续发展目标的重大过渡方面取得进展。

data.en: Clear plans must be presented at the Sustainable Development Goals Summit, along with pledges to strengthen action through ambitious national interventions for reducing poverty and inequality, alongside clear policies, investment plans and partnerships to drive progress across major Goal transitions.
data.zh: 需要制定每年5 000亿美元的可持续发展目标刺激计划，用于可持续发展和气候行动的投资。

data.en: An annual Sustainable Development Goal stimulus of $500 billion was needed for investments in sustainable development and climate action.
data.zh: 还需要改变商业模式、减免债务和扩大对有需要的国家提供的应急资金，只要有足够的政治意愿，这些都可以实现。

data.en: The President of the General Assembly focused on the urgent need for rapid, multilateral and substantive structural change to achieve the Goals.
data.zh: 世界需要根据可持续发展目标调整规则，计算所有外部效应，致力于减少负面外部效应，同时增加正面外部效应，并制定以科学为基础的实施路线图。

data.en: The world needed to align regulations with the Goals, calculate all externalities, aim to reduce negative externalities while increasing the positive, and build a science-based road map of implementation.
data.zh: 全球社区仍处于实现可持续发展目标的活动进程之中，但现在是改变这一活动本身的时候了。

data.en: The global community was still in the game, but the time had come for the game itself to be changed.
data.zh: 为这一改变提供的资金严重不足，需要进行投资来改变发展进程。

data.en: The financing of that change was critically lacking, and investments were needed to change the course of development.
data.zh: 可持续发展目标峰会需要让世界信服，各国将在可持续发展方面做得更好。

data.en: It would be necessary for the Sustainable Development Goals Summit to convince the world that States would do better in sustainable development.
data.zh: 需要遵守不让任何一个人掉队的承诺。

data.en: The Chair of the International Panel on Climate Change stated that limiting climate change was essential for achieving all the Goals.
data.zh: 气候变化是一个威胁乘数；目前出现的复杂威胁只会随着全球气温上升而恶化。

data.en: Climate change was a threat multiplier; the complex threats currently occurring would only worsen with rising global temperatures.
data.zh: 迄今为止的适应努力还不够，大幅度、快速和持续地减少全球温室气体排放量是实现可持续发展的最佳选择。

data.en: Adaptation efforts to date had not been sufficient and deep, rapid and sustained cuts to global greenhouse gas emissions were the best option for sustainable development.
data.zh: 应对气候变化所需的知识和技术已经到位。

data.en: The knowledge and technology required to tackle climate change were already in place.
data.zh: 因此，国际合作、有效的生态系统管理、包容性治理、多样化知识的共享以及利益和负担的分担，现在对于通过当前的选择塑造未来至关重要。

data.en: International cooperation, effective ecosystem stewardship, inclusive governance, the sharing of diverse knowledge, and the sharing of benefits and burdens were therefore now imperative to shape the future through current choices.
data.zh: 八.

data.en: VIII.
data.zh: 自愿评估

data.en: During the ministerial segment of the forum, representatives of 38 countries and, for the first time, of the European Union, presented their voluntary reviews.
data.zh: 发言者展示并强调了在编制自愿评估报告时与包括青年、民间社会、私营部门和残疾人在内的利益攸关方的合作，并表示会致力于加强利益攸关方对可持续发展行动的参与。

data.en: Presenters noted the various challenges that ongoing crises posed to the implementation of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 然而，他们仍然有信心并承诺回到实现可持续发展目标的轨道上来。

data.en: They remained confident and committed, however, to getting back on track towards the achievement of the Goals.
data.zh: 这种承诺使各国能够以积极主动的方式应对挑战。

data.en: That commitment allowed countries to approach challenges in a proactive way.
data.zh: 他们认识到为落实《2030年议程》需要做哪些工作，以及在某些领域已经取得的进展和各国取得进展的途径，这创造了从共享经验中学习的机会。

data.en: The impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic and challenges to recovery remained a major concern among countries because of the setbacks they represented for the achievement of the Goals.
data.zh: 疫情凸显了各国的脆弱性，导致它们重新安排优先事项，调整《2030年议程》执行战略。

data.en: The vulnerabilities of countries had been highlighted by the pandemic, leading countries to reorganize priorities and adjust their 2030 Agenda implementation strategies.
data.zh: 自大流行病以来，各国采取了积极主动的措施增加居民的福利，包括最弱势群体的福利。

data.en: Presenters identified access to financing as one of the most critical elements for countries for accelerating progress towards achieving the Goals.
data.zh: 几位发言者强调，需要重新思考为可持续发展和气候行动供资的方式，以便建立一个融资架构，满足各国的实际需要，并能够有效管理资源，将资源分配到最需要的地方。

data.en: Several presenters emphasized the need to rethink how sustainable development and climate action were financed in order to establish a financing structure that responded to the actual needs of countries and allowed for the effective management of resources, allocating them to where they were most needed.
data.zh: 虽然几位发言者建议改革国际金融架构，但有人也提出了其他解决办法。

data.en: Although several presenters suggested reform of the international financial architecture other solutions were also proposed.
data.zh: 发言者表示，各国考虑了以合作为基础的可以共同应对与筹资和供资有关挑战的不同方式。

data.en: Presenters indicated that countries had considered various ways, based on cooperation, in which to face the challenges related to financing and funding together.
data.zh: 还有人特别呼吁调整损失和损害基金并加强其运作。

data.en: Climate change and environmental protection were key concerns addressed in the reviews.
data.zh: 发言者强调需要采取更有力和全面的气候行动。

data.en: Presenters highlighted the need to deliver strengthened and comprehensive climate action.
data.zh: 许多发言者概述了本国将气候行动纳入应对气候变化的政策和其他措施的方式。

data.en: Many outlined the ways in which they were including climate action in their policies and in other measures to address climate change.
data.zh: 减缓战略、减少温室气体排放、建设气候复原力、重新造林和扩大气候融资是各国重点开展工作的一些领域。

data.en: Mitigation strategies, reduction of greenhouse gas emissions, the building of climate resilience, reforestation and the scaling up of climate finance were some of the areas in which countries were concentrating their efforts.
data.zh: 发言者还指出，必须遵守国际环境承诺，为适应措施提供可靠的资金，并向绿色经济迈进。

data.en: Gender equality and social inclusion were emphasized as significant and cross-cutting issues, linked directly to the 2030 Agenda principle of leaving no one behind.
data.zh: 发言者分享了各国如何努力保障平等和包容，强调将增强妇女权能作为国家政策中的优先事项不仅有助于在实现关于性别平等的目标5，而且有助于在其他可持续发展目标方面取得进展。

data.en: Several presenters noted increasing droughts and the threat of water scarcity as major challenges to ensuring clean water and sanitation and stressed the need for related long-term strategies.
data.zh: 一些发言者分享了经验，并强调指出，改善水的供应、可靠性和质量的行动包括支持建设和维护与水有关的基础设施(特别是在农村地区)，扩大水和环境卫生基础设施，整合水资源管理，建立体制框架，以及制定侧重于增加获得清洁饮水和卫生设施的机会的政策。

data.en: Some shared their experiences and highlighted that actions for improving the supply, reliability and quality of water included support of the construction and maintenance of water-related infrastructure, in particular in rural areas, expanding water and sanitation infrastructure, integrating water resource management, establishing institutional frameworks and designing policies that focused on increasing access to clean water and sanitation.
data.zh: 发言者还认识到水在农业和粮食安全方面的关键作用。

data.en: There was also a special focus in the reviews on the significant progress made in investing in and using renewable energy sources.
data.zh: 尽管对清洁能源作出了明确承诺，但在这方面取得的进展仍不足以实现《2030年议程》的目标。

data.en: Despite a clear commitment to clean energy, the progress made in that regard remained insufficient for accomplishing the targets of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 需要继续把努力重点放在实现公正能源转型上，这就需要投资于可再生能源、可持续能源基础设施，并努力扩大农村和城市地区获得用电的机会。

data.en: Efforts needed to remain focused on achieving a just energy transition, which required investment in renewable energy sources, sustainable energy infrastructure and efforts to expand access to electricity in both rural and urban areas.
data.zh: 一些国家非常重视能源效率本身这一目标，并指出为此目的进行技术转让和能力建设很重要。

data.en: Presenters shared experiences of and approaches to building resilient infrastructure and promoting sustainable industrialization.
data.zh: 很多国家的战略重点是交通运输基础设施，以加强城乡地区两者之间的互联互通，以及建立支持和鼓励工业化和创新的经济特区和工业区。

data.en: Furthermore, presenters emphasized the need to tackle the lack of affordable quality housing as the main challenge to having sustainable and resilient communities.
data.zh: 一些发言者强调，不仅需要提供负担得起的住房，其中必须特别注重支持中低收入者，而且还需要更进一步，必须纳入具体支持，以保障青年和女户主家庭获得住房。

data.en: Some stressed the need not only to provide affordable housing, which would entail a special focus on supporting low- and middle-income earners, but also to go further, which would entail including specific support in order to guarantee housing access to youth and female-headed households.
data.zh: 有发言者提请注意土地利用问题，并建议主要目标不应仅仅是扩大利用，而应是进行适当规划，以便更有效地利用土地。

data.en: Attention was brought to land use, and it was suggested that the main goal should not simply be to expand the use, but to have adequate planning that would lead to more effective land use.
data.zh: 发言者还强调了建设具有灾害抵抗能力的社区的重要性，并强调各国迫切需要加强地方政府和社区的参与。

data.en: Presenters emphasized that having participatory approaches to every Goal was necessary for effectively accelerating progress.
data.zh: 他们还强调，有效的多利益攸关方伙伴关系对于跟进为实施《2030年议程》所作的承诺以及编制和拟订自愿评估报告至关重要。

data.en: They also stressed the critical nature of effective multistakeholder partnerships for following up on the commitments made towards the implementation of the 2030 Agenda and the preparation and elaboration of voluntary reviews.
data.zh: 此外，他们注意到国家间合作对实现可持续发展目标的关键作用，并认识到南北合作和南南合作的特殊和宝贵影响。

data.en: A key message was that technology and innovation were important for addressing climate change and increasing progress on the implementation of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 发言者指出接受数字化转型和利用技术力量实现可持续发展目标的重要性，认为这是一个贯穿各领域的问题。

data.en: Presenters noted, as a cross-cutting issue, the importance of embracing the digital transformation and harnessing the power of technology to achieve the Goals.
data.zh: 技术是在实现几乎每一项目标方面取得进展的最有效工具之一。

data.en: Technology was one of the most effective tools for achieving progress towards almost every Goal.
data.zh: 发言者就技术和创新如何帮助各国在实现可持续发展目标方面取得进展交流了经验。

data.en: Presenters shared experiences as to how technology and innovation had helped countries to make progress towards achieving the Goals.
data.zh: 他们表示，各国一直支持并鼓励技术转让。

data.en: The importance of data for following up on and monitoring progress was underscored by various presenters.
data.zh: 一些发言者提请注意在决策过程中拥有准确和分类数据以及制定满足每个国家的具体情况和需求的适当目标战略的重要性。

data.en: Good governance practices, which were key to addressing the Goals and their targets, were encouraged by countries.
data.zh: 体制机制、流程和工具对于确保适当规划和有效实施实现目标的行动以及监测和评价目标和具体目标至关重要。

data.en: Institutional mechanisms, processes and tools were critical in ensuring proper planning and effective implementation of action to achieve the Goals, as well as in the monitoring and evaluation of other goals and targets.
data.zh: 在采取此类行动的同时，还应制定符合可持续发展目标的有效国家发展计划、提供充足的资金和资源，并确保公共部门具备适当的能力。

data.en: Presenters stressed the need to continue strengthening and establishing new partnerships and avenues for cooperation.
data.zh: 自《2030年议程》通过以来，特别是在到2030年时间过半之际，显然需要共同的承诺和努力。

data.en: Since the adoption of the 2030 Agenda, and in particular at the halfway point to 2030, it had become evident that common commitments and efforts were required.
data.zh: 发言者指出，需要建立更具战略性和更有影响力的伙伴关系，以加快落实可持续发展目标，并强调公私伙伴关系在推动实现这些目标方面发挥的重要作用。

data.en: Presenters noted the need for even more strategic and impactful partnerships for accelerating the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals, and highlighted the important role public-private partnerships played in contributing to progress in achieving them.
data.zh: 各国政府在提供有利于各类合作和伙伴关系的扶持环境方面发挥着关键作用，特别是在让民间社会有意义地参与决策和实施战略方面。

data.en: Governments played a key role in providing a enabling environment conducive to every type of cooperation and partnership, and in particular the meaningful inclusion of civil society in policymaking and implementation strategies.
data.zh: 九．

data.en: IX.
data.zh: 一般性辩论

data.en: The Sustainable Development Goals Summit was seen as a unique opportunity for renewing a shared global commitment and taking action to “rescue” the Goals and implement the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 与会者强调，峰会需要成为一个契机，展现雄心、政治意愿、团结一致、多边合作和多利益攸关方的参与，并采取全社会办法。

data.en: Participants reaffirmed the commitment of their countries to the 2030 Agenda, including the achievement of the Goals.
data.zh: 他们还对《2030年议程》严重偏离轨道深表关切，在大多数情况下，实现可持续发展目标的进展缓慢、停滞甚至倒退。

data.en: They also expressed deep concern about the 2030 Agenda being severely off track, with progress towards achieving the Goals being, in the majority of cases, slow, stalled or even in reverse.
data.zh: 与会者呼吁加大努力，克服冠状病毒病大流行和复苏、冲突和气候变化等阻碍进展的相互关联挑战的影响。

data.en: There were calls for greater efforts to overcome the impacts of interlinked challenges that had impeded progress, including the COVID-19 pandemic and recovery, conflict and climate change.
data.zh: 重申对《2030年议程》的承诺和国际社会的合作行动被认为是加快进展和有效克服当前障碍的关键。

data.en: The Goals remained a key priority, and several participants echoed scientific conclusions that the Goals were still achievable if countries accelerated their collaboration.
data.zh: 《2030年议程》被认为是可持续和包容性政策的共同路线图。

data.en: The 2030 Agenda was recognized as a common road map for sustainable and inclusive policies.
data.zh: 许多国家已将可持续发展目标纳入其国家发展计划和政策。

data.en: Many countries had incorporated the Goals into their national development plans and policies.
data.zh: 几个国家提及了其自愿国别评估报告中强调的落实可持续发展目标的行动，包括促进全球和国家政策一致性的行动以及可持续发展目标在变革性国内政策和战略中的相互联系。

data.en: Strengthening partnerships was highlighted as pivotal to achieving the Goals.
data.zh: 与会者强调，国际合作以及与私营部门的合作至关重要。

data.en: Participants emphasized the critical importance of international cooperation, as well as cooperation with the private sector.
data.zh: 与会者认识到，与私营部门的伙伴关系将有助于促进创新、调动财政资源和实施新方法，从而对全球社会产生重大的积极影响。

data.en: Access to financing was identified as a key challenge to achieving sustainable development.
data.zh: 在发展中国家努力解决债务困境、高利率和财政空间受限等问题之时，在获得负担得起的融资方面，选择有限。

data.en: At a time when developing countries were grappling with issues of debt distress, high interest rates and constrained fiscal space, there were only limited options for affordable access to financing.
data.zh: 因此，许多与会者呼吁增加发展中国家获得融资的机会，并呼吁采取相关行动，以确保稳定的宏观经济基本面，充分执行《第三次发展筹资问题国际会议亚的斯亚贝巴行动议程》，履行官方发展援助承诺，改革国际金融架构，制定融资资格标准，进行债务重组，为气候行动减免债务，以及建立获得创新融资，包括影响力投资的机制。

data.en: It was widely recognized that increased access to concessional financing was pivotal for getting the Sustainable Development Goals back on track.
data.zh: 此外，各国与会者呼吁采取国内生产总值以外的措施，并采用小岛屿发展中国家多层面脆弱性指数来改善发展援助。

data.en: In addition, participants from various countries called for measures beyond GDP, and the application of the multidimensional vulnerability index for small island developing States in order to improve development assistance.
data.zh: 多层面脆弱性指数被认为是在获得优惠资源时考虑不同类型脆弱性的一个重要工具，特别是在应对气候变化的影响方面。

data.en: Many participants expressed support for the Sustainable Development Goal stimulus, which was seen as an important initiative for boosting action on financing.
data.zh: 几位与会者强调，需要加大对特殊处境国家的支持，特别是对最不发达国家、内陆发展中国家和小岛屿发展中国家的支持。

data.en: Several participants highlighted the need for greater support for countries in special situations, in particular for the least developed countries, land-locked developing countries and small island developing States.
data.zh: 与会者还强调了中等收入国家在获得贷款和赠款方面面临的挑战。

data.en: Participants reiterated the pledge of countries to leave no one behind.
data.zh: 消除贫困仍然是一个最高优先事项，粮食安全是另一个重要的讨论议题。

data.en: The eradication of poverty remained a top priority and food security was another critical topic of discussion.
data.zh: 许多与会者指出，饥饿和营养不良是令人关切的主要问题，并强调必须采取综合措施，实现目标2(零饥饿)。

data.en: Many participants noted that hunger and malnutrition were major concerns and emphasized the importance of comprehensive measures for achieving Goal 2 (zero hunger).
data.zh: 一些与会者认可妇女在改善粮食生产和分配方面的关键作用，并特别强调增强妇女权能和促进农业领域的性别平等。

data.en: Many participants referred to gender equality and women’s empowerment in relation to sustainable development.
data.zh: 与会者强调必须消除性别暴力，缩小各部门的性别不平等，增加妇女在决策进程和领导作用中的代表性。

data.en: Participants highlighted the importance of eliminating gender-based violence, narrowing gender inequalities in various sectors and increasing women’s representation in decision-making processes and leadership roles, among other things.
data.zh: 几位与会者还宣布了各自国家为解决儿童和青年权利方面的挑战而作出的承诺和采取的相关举措。

data.en: Several participants also announced the commitments and associated initiatives of their countries for solving challenges regarding the rights of children and young people.
data.zh: 他们强调了投资于优质教育和鼓励社会包容以协助促进儿童福祉和发展工作的重要性。

data.en: Addressing climate action, biodiversity loss and environmental degradation remained an urgent priority.
data.zh: 鉴于气候变化意味着一种生存威胁，弥合气候融资缺口势在必行。

data.en: Given that climate change represented an existential threat, bridging the climate financing gap was imperative.
data.zh: 与会者指出，迫切需要建立一个金融架构，优先为减少灾害风险和气候行动提供易获得的资金。

data.en: Participants noted that a financial architecture that prioritized accessible financing for disaster risk reduction and climate action was urgently needed.
data.zh: 与会者还表示支持布里奇顿倡议，并呼吁损失和损害基金投入运作。

data.en: They also expressed their support for the Bridgetown Initiative and called for the implementation of the loss and damage fund.
data.zh: 与会者还强调了小岛屿发展中国家特有的脆弱性。

data.en: Participants also emphasized the unique vulnerabilities of small island developing States.
data.zh: 很多与会者提供了与气候行动相关的国家经验和计划的具体实例，包括向绿色经济转型、减少碳排放、拥抱公正能源转型和致力于净零排放。

data.en: Many participants provided specific examples of national experiences and plans related to climate action, including transitioning to a green economy, reducing carbon emissions, embracing a just energy transition and committing to net zero.
data.zh: 与会者还指出获得负担得起、可靠、可持续和现代能源的重要性。

data.en: In line with the priorities of the forum, many participants highlighted access to clean water and sanitation as a key priority.
data.zh: 与会者指出，保护水资源对可持续发展至关重要，并强调清洁饮水和卫生设施与人类福祉、经济繁荣和环境可持续性之间的密切联系。

data.en: Participants also encouraged increased investment in science, technology and innovation as a driver for sustainable growth, noting the importance of technology and digital progress for advancing the Sustainable Development Goals and overall development.
data.zh: 与会者还强调，数字化转型是一个关键组成部分，呼吁弥合数字鸿沟，确保平等获得，特别是弱势和边缘化群体平等获得技术和数字素养。

data.en: Digital transformation was also highlighted as a critical component, with calls for the digital divide to be bridged and equal access to technology and digital literacy ensured, in particular for vulnerable and marginalized communities.
data.zh: 多位与会者还强调了技术转让与合作对于帮助发展中国家实现可持续发展目标的重要性。

data.en: The importance of technology transfer and cooperation in helping developing countries achieve the Goals was also highlighted by various participants.
data.zh: 一些与会者还呼吁提高数据收集，包括支持自愿国别评估的数据收集方面的透明度、准确性、及时性、相关性和质量。

data.en: Several participants noted the negative impact of conflict and terrorism on the progress of their countries towards achieving the Goals and emphasized that peace and security were prerequisites for sustainable development, in line with the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 一些与会者指出，平等诉诸法律的机会是实现可持续发展目标的一项关键推动因素。

data.en: Some participants noted that equal access to justice was a critical enabler to achieving the Goals.
