data.zh: 联合国
经济及社会理事会

data.en: 2023 session
data.zh: 议程项目16

data.en: Agenda item 16
data.zh: 以色列占领对包括东耶路撒冷在内 巴勒斯坦被占领土上的巴勒斯坦人民和被占领叙利亚戈兰的阿拉伯居民的生活条件造成的经济和社会影响

data.en: Economic and social repercussions of the Israeli occupation on the living conditions of the Palestinian people in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and the Arab population in the occupied Syrian Golan
data.zh: 2023年7月26日经济及社会理事会决议

data.en: Resolution adopted by the Economic and Social Council on 26 July 2023
data.zh: [根据全体会议审议的一项提案(E/2023/L.34)通过]

data.en: Economic and social repercussions of the Israeli occupation on the living conditions of the Palestinian people in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and the Arab population in the occupied Syrian Golan
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会，

data.en: The Economic and Social Council,
Recalling General Assembly resolutions 77/126 of 12 December 2022 and 77/187 of 14 December 2022,
data.zh: 又回顾其2022年7月22日第2022/22号决议，

data.en: Recalling also its resolution 2022/22 of 22 July 2022,

Guided by the principles of the Charter of the United Nations affirming the inadmissibility of the acquisition of territory by force, and recalling relevant Security Council resolutions, including resolutions 242 (1967) of 22 November 1967, 252 (1968) of 21 May 1968, 338 (1973) of 22 October 1973, 465 (1980) of 1 March 1980, 497 (1981) of 17 December 1981 and 2334 (2016) of 23 December 2016,
data.zh: 回顾大会第十届紧急特别会议各项决议，包括2003年10月21日ES-10/13号、2003年12月8日ES-10/14号、2004年7月20日ES-10/15号和2006年12月15日ES-10/17号决议，

data.en: Recalling the resolutions of the tenth emergency special session of the General Assembly, including resolutions ES-10/13 of 21 October 2003, ES-10/14 of 8 December 2003, ES-10/15 of 20 July 2004 and ES-10/17 of 15 December 2006,
data.zh: 表示注意到由秘书长转递的西亚经济社会委员会关于以色列占领对包括东耶路撒冷在内巴勒斯坦被占领土上的巴勒斯坦人民和被占领叙利亚戈兰的阿拉伯居民生活条件造成的经济和社会影响的报告，

data.en: Taking note of the report of the Economic and Social Commission for Western Asia on the economic and social repercussions of the Israeli occupation on the living conditions of the Palestinian people in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and of the Arab population in the occupied Syrian Golan, as transmitted by the Secretary-General,
data.zh: 重申1949年8月12日《关于战时保护平民之日内瓦公约》 适用于包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦被占领土和以色列自1967年以来占领的其他阿拉伯领土，

data.en: Reaffirming the applicability of the Geneva Convention relative to the Protection of Civilian Persons in Time of War, of 12 August 1949, to the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and other Arab territories occupied by Israel since 1967,
data.zh: 回顾《公民权利和政治权利国际公约》、 《经济、社会、文化权利国际公约》 和《儿童权利公约》， 并重申在包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦被占领土和被占领叙利亚戈兰可适用而且必须遵守这些人权文书，

data.en: Recalling the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights, the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights and the Convention on the Rights of the Child, and affirming that these human rights instruments are applicable and must be respected in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, as well as in the occupied Syrian Golan,
data.zh: 关切地注意到自大会1947年11月29日通过第181(II)号决议至今已有70多年，而且包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦领土自1967年被占领至今已有56年，

data.en: Noting with concern that more than 70 years have passed since the adoption of General Assembly resolution 181 (II) of 29 November 1947 and 56 years since the occupation of the Palestinian territory, including East Jerusalem, in 1967,
data.zh: 在这方面表示注意到巴勒斯坦加入了若干人权条约和核心人道主义法公约以及其他国际条约，

data.en: Taking note, in this regard, of Palestine’s accession to several human rights treaties and the core humanitarian law conventions as well as other international treaties,
data.zh: 又表示注意到大会2012年11月29日第67/19号决议，

data.en: Taking note also of General Assembly resolution 67/19 of 29 November 2012,
data.zh: 强调指出亟需根据安全理事会第242(1967)号、第338(1973)号、1978年3月19日第425(1978)号、2002年3月12日第1397(2002)号、2003年11月19日第1515(2003)号、2004年5月19日第1544(2004)号、2008年12月16日第1850(2008)号和第2334(2016)号决议、土地换和平的原则、《阿拉伯和平倡议》 以及《四方路线图》， 并在遵守以色列政府与巴勒斯坦人民的代表巴勒斯坦解放组织达成的协定的基础上，毫不拖延地结束始于1967年的以色列占领，在所有轨道上实现公正、持久、全面的和平解决，

data.en: Stressing the urgency of achieving without delay an end to the Israeli occupation that began in 1967 and a just, lasting and comprehensive peace settlement on all tracks on the basis of Security Council resolutions 242 (1967), 338 (1973), 425 (1978) of 19 March 1978, 1397 (2002) of 12 March 2002, 1515 (2003) of 19 November 2003, 1544 (2004) of 19 May 2004, 1850 (2008) of 16 December 2008 and 2334 (2016), the principle of land for peace, the Arab Peace Initiative and the Quartet road map, as well as compliance with the agreements reached between the Government of Israel and the Palestine Liberation Organization, the representative of the Palestinian people,
data.zh: 重申外国占领下的人民对其自然资源拥有永久主权的原则，在这方面表示关切占领国以色列和以色列定居者对包括东耶路撒冷在内巴勒斯坦被占领土和被占领叙利亚戈兰的自然资源的开发、危害和用尽，特别是按照国际法的规定属于非法、并且在本报告所述期间令人遗憾地仍在继续的定居点活动所造成的开发、危害和用尽，

data.en: Reaffirming the principle of the permanent sovereignty of peoples under foreign occupation over their natural resources, and expressing concern in that regard about the exploitation, endangerment and depletion of natural resources by Israel, the occupying Power, and Israeli settlers in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and in the occupied Syrian Golan, particularly as a result of settlement activities, which are illegal under international law and which, deplorably, continued during the reporting period,
data.zh: 深信以色列的占领严重阻碍了在包括东耶路撒冷在内巴勒斯坦被占领土和被占领叙利亚戈兰实现环境可持续发展和创造良好经济环境的努力，并表示严重关切由此造成的经济和生活条件恶化，

data.en: Convinced that the Israeli occupation has gravely impeded the efforts to achieve environmentally sustainable development and a sound economic environment in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and in the occupied Syrian Golan, and expressing grave concern about the consequent deterioration of economic and living conditions,
data.zh: 在这方面表示震惊失业率尤其是加沙地带的失业率极高，依然超过40%，青年失业率达到60%，以色列实施的长期关闭和实际上等同于封锁的严厉的经济和流动限制更使失业问题加剧，而且在加沙地带的军事行动对经济和社会基础设施和生活条件造成持续的不良影响，

data.en: Expressing alarm, in this regard, about the extremely high levels of unemployment in the Gaza Strip in particular, which remains at over 40 per cent, with youth unemployment reaching 60 per cent, exacerbated by the prolonged Israeli closures and severe economic and movement restrictions that in effect amount to a blockade, and the continuing negative repercussions of the military operations in the Gaza Strip on economic and social infrastructure and living conditions,
data.zh: 赞扬巴勒斯坦政府尽管遇到许多制约，包括以色列持续占领所施加的种种障碍，但仍为改善巴勒斯坦被占领土的经济及社会状况作出努力，特别是在治理、法治和人权、生计和生产部门、教育和文化、卫生、社会保障、基础设施和供水方面的努力，

data.en: Commending, despite the many constraints, including the obstacles imposed by the ongoing Israeli occupation, the efforts of the Palestinian Government to improve the economic and social situation in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, especially in the areas of governance, the rule of law and human rights, livelihoods and productive sectors, education and culture, health, social protection, infrastructure and water,
data.zh: 强调指出联合国可持续发展合作框架的重要性，该框架旨在除其他外根据巴勒斯坦的国家优先事项加强对巴勒斯坦人民的发展支助和援助并加强机构能力，

data.en: Stressing the importance of the United Nations Sustainable Development Cooperation Framework, which aims, inter alia, at enhancing development support and assistance to the Palestinian people and strengthening institutional capacity in line with Palestinian national priorities,
data.zh: 严重关切以色列违反国际人道主义法和联合国相关决议，在巴勒斯坦被占领土(特别是东耶路撒冷及其周边地区)和被占领叙利亚戈兰加速建造定居点和采取其他相关措施，并强调指出此类非法措施是以色列其他违法违规行为及歧视性政策的主要根由，

data.en: Gravely concerned about the accelerated construction of settlements and implementation of other related measures by Israel in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, particularly in and around occupied East Jerusalem, as well as in the occupied Syrian Golan, in violation of international humanitarian law and relevant United Nations resolutions, and stressing that such illegal measures are main sources of other Israeli violations and discriminatory policies,
data.zh: 鼓励所有国家和国际组织对以色列在包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦被占领土上的所有非法做法和措施，特别是以色列定居点问题，继续积极奉行确保尊重其国际法义务的政策，

data.en: Encouraging all States and international organizations to continue to actively pursue policies to ensure respect for their obligations under international law with regard to all illegal Israeli practices and measures in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, particularly Israeli settlements,
data.zh: 表示注意到调查以色列定居点对巴勒斯坦被占领土包括东耶路撒冷的巴勒斯坦人的公民、政治、经济、社会和文化权利影响的独立国际实况调查团的报告，

data.en: Taking note of the report of the independent international fact-finding mission to investigate the implications of the Israeli settlements on the civil, political, economic, social and cultural rights of the Palestinian people throughout the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem,
data.zh: 表示深为关切在包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦被占领土上发生的特别是以色列非法武装定居者针对巴勒斯坦平民包括儿童以及他们的财产包括家园、历史和宗教场所和农田的暴力、骚扰、挑衅、破坏和煽动行为不断增加，呼吁追究这类非法行为的责任，

data.en: Expressing deep concern about the rising incidence of violence, harassment, provocation, vandalism and incitement in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, in particular by illegal armed Israeli settlers against Palestinian civilians, including children, and their properties, including homes, historic and religious sites and agricultural lands, and calling for accountability for the illegal actions perpetrated in this regard,
data.zh: 严重关切以色列在巴勒斯坦被占领土内，包括在东耶路撒冷及其四周，建造隔离墙及实行相关制度对巴勒斯坦人民的经济和社会状况造成严重影响，从而侵犯了他们的经济和社会权利，包括工作、保健、教育、财产、适当生活水准以及出入和行动自由等权利，

data.en: Gravely concerned by the serious repercussions on the economic and social conditions of the Palestinian people caused by Israel’s construction of the wall and its associated regime inside the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including in and around East Jerusalem, and the resulting violation of their economic and social rights, including the rights to work, to health, to education, to property, to an adequate standard of living and to freedom of access and movement,
data.zh: 在这方面回顾2004年7月9日国际法院对在巴勒斯坦被占领土修建隔离墙的法律后果发表的咨询意见 以及大会ES-10/15号决议，并强调指出需遵守其中规定的各项义务，

data.en: Recalling, in that regard, the advisory opinion rendered on 9 July 2004 by the International Court of Justice on the legal consequences of the construction of a wall in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, and General Assembly resolution ES-10/15, and stressing the need to comply with the obligations mentioned therein,
data.zh: 痛惜所有发生的无辜平民丧生情况以及数十名平民受伤情况，促请各方充分尊重国际法，包括人道主义法和人权法，以保护平民生命，促进人类安全、缓和局势、力行克制，包括克制挑衅言行，以及创造有利于争取和平的稳定环境等，

data.en: Deploring all loss of innocent civilian life and injury to scores of civilians, and calling upon all parties to fully respect international law, including humanitarian and human rights law, including for the protection of civilian life, as well as for the promotion of human security, the de-escalation of the situation, the exercise of restraint, including from provocative actions and rhetoric, and the establishment of a stable environment conducive to the pursuit of peace,
data.zh: 表示严重关切占领国以色列在包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦被占领土上大规模破坏财产，包括越来越多地毁坏住房、经济机构、历史地标、农田和果园，特别是在巴勒斯坦被占领土包括在东耶路撒冷及其周边地区违反国际法建造定居点和隔离墙以及没收土地所造成的广泛破坏，

data.en: Expressing grave concern at the extensive destruction by Israel, the occupying Power, of properties, including the increased demolition of homes, economic institutions, historical landmarks, agricultural lands and orchards, in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, in particular in connection with its construction of settlements and the wall and confiscation of land, contrary to international law, in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including in and around East Jerusalem,
data.zh: 又表示严重关切由于在被占领的东耶路撒冷及周边地区持续实行和不断强化拆毁住房、驱赶居民、取消居住权的政策和进一步采取使该城与其自然的巴勒斯坦环境相隔绝的措施，造成巴勒斯坦人面临的已经十分严峻的社会经济状况严重恶化，使包括贝都因族群在内的巴勒斯坦平民继续被迫流离失所、被剥夺财产，

data.en: Expressing grave concern also over the continuing forced displacement and dispossession of Palestinian civilians, including the Bedouin community, due to the continuing and intensifying policy of home demolitions, evictions and revocation of residency rights in and around occupied East Jerusalem, as well as measures to further isolate the city from its natural Palestinian environs, which have seriously exacerbated the already critical socioeconomic situation being faced by the Palestinian population,
data.zh: 还表示严重关切以色列在包括东耶路撒冷在内的整个巴勒斯坦被占领土上不断开展军事行动并实行关闭及严格限制人员和货物流动、强行关闭过境点、设置检查站和许可证制度的政策，以及由此对巴勒斯坦人民特别是巴勒斯坦难民的社会经济状况产生的不利影响，至今仍构成人道主义危机，

data.en: Expressing grave concern further about ongoing Israeli military operations and policies of closures and severe restrictions on the movement of persons and goods, the imposition of crossing closures, checkpoints and a permit regime throughout the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and the consequent negative impact on the socioeconomic situation of the Palestinian people, in particular the Palestine refugee population, which remains that of a humanitarian crisis,
data.zh: 特别表示严重关切以色列实行的长期关闭和实际上等同于封锁的严厉的经济和行动限制造成加沙地带的持续危机，强调指出这一局面不可持续，正如2016年8月26日联合国国家工作队题为“加沙：2年后”的报告等无数报告所示，在这方面呼吁全面执行安全理事会2009年1月8日第1860(2009)号决议，以确保全面开放各过境点，使包括人道主义援助、商业流动和建筑材料在内的人员和货物得以持续、正常地通行，并强调需要保障所有平民的安全，

data.en: Expressing grave concern, in particular, over the continuing crisis in the Gaza Strip as a result of the prolonged Israeli closures and severe economic and movement restrictions that in effect amount to a blockade, stressing that the situation is unsustainable, as reflected in numerous reports, including the report of 26 August 2016 of the United Nations country team, entitled “Gaza: two years after”, and calling in that regard for the full implementation of Security Council resolution 1860 (2009) of 8 January 2009 with a view to ensuring the full opening of the border crossings for the sustained and regular movement of persons and goods, including humanitarian aid, commercial flows and construction materials, and emphasizing the need for security for all civilian populations,
data.zh: 痛惜加沙地带及周边地区在2014年7月和8月发生冲突，造成平民伤亡，其中有包括儿童、妇女和老人在内的数千名巴勒斯坦平民死伤，并给数千栋住房以及包括学校、医院、供水、卫生和电力网络在内的重要民用基础设施、经济、工业和农业财产、公共机构、宗教场所以及联合国学校和设施造成广泛破坏或损坏，致使数十万平民在境内流离失所，以及这方面的任何违反国际法包括人道主义法和人权法的行为，

data.en: Deploring the conflict in and around the Gaza Strip in July and August 2014 and the civilian casualties caused, including the killing of and injury to thousands of Palestinian civilians, including children, women and the elderly, as well as the widespread destruction of or damage to thousands of homes and vital civilian infrastructure, including schools, hospitals, water, sanitation and electricity networks, economic, industrial and agricultural properties, public institutions, religious sites and United Nations schools and facilities, as well as the internal displacement of hundreds of thousands of civilians, and any violations of international law, including humanitarian and human rights law, in this regard,
data.zh: 严重关切2014年7月和8月、2008年12月至2009年1月和2012年11月期间的军事行动对经济状况、社会服务的提供以及巴勒斯坦平民人口包括巴勒斯坦难民的社会、人道主义和物质生活状况造成长期、广泛的负面影响，

data.en: Gravely concerned about the consequent prolonged and extensive negative impact of the military operations of July and August 2014, as well as the military operations between December 2008 and January 2009 and of November 2012, on economic conditions, the provision of social services and the social, humanitarian and physical living conditions of the Palestinian civilian population, including the Palestine refugee population,
data.zh: 在这方面回顾联合国的有关报告，包括经济及社会理事会、西亚经济社会委员会以及人权理事会的报告，

data.en: Recalling, in that regard, the relevant United Nations reports, including those of the Economic and Social Council, the Economic and Social Commission for Western Asia and the Human Rights Council,
data.zh: 表示深为关切占领国以色列的这种普遍破坏和妨碍重建进程的行径对人道主义危机持续加深的加沙地带巴勒斯坦平民的社会经济和人道主义状况的短期和长期不利影响，在这方面呼吁在捐助国的援助下，立即在加沙地带加快并完成重建进程，包括支付2014年10月12日举行的主题为重建加沙的巴勒斯坦问题开罗国际会议上认捐的资金，

data.en: Expressing deep concern about the short- and long-term detrimental impact of such widespread destruction and the hampering of the reconstruction process, by Israel, the occupying Power, on the socioeconomic and humanitarian conditions of the Palestinian civilian population in the Gaza Strip, where the humanitarian crisis continues to deepen, and calling in that regard for the immediate acceleration and fulfilment of the reconstruction process in the Gaza Strip with the assistance of the donor countries, including the disbursement of funds pledged at the Cairo International Conference on Palestine: Reconstructing Gaza, held on 12 October 2014,
data.zh: 严重关切根据联合国和专门机构的各种报告，在包括东耶路撒冷在内巴勒斯坦被占领土上，长期关闭边界造成大量依赖援助，失业率极高，普遍贫困，存在包括粮食没有保障在内的严重人道主义困难，巴勒斯坦人特别是儿童中与健康有关的问题增加，包括营养不良情况严重，

data.en: Gravely concerned about various reports of the United Nations and specialized agencies regarding the substantial aid dependency caused by prolonged border closures, inordinate rates of unemployment, widespread poverty and severe humanitarian hardships, including food insecurity and rising health-related problems, including high levels of malnutrition, among the Palestinian people, especially children, in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem,
data.zh: 表示严重关切包括儿童、妇女及和平示威者在内的平民伤亡情况，强调必须依照国际人道主义法保护巴勒斯坦平民人口，

data.en: Expressing grave concern at the deaths of and injuries caused to civilians, including children, women and peaceful demonstrators, and emphasizing that the Palestinian civilian population must be protected in accordance with international humanitarian law,
data.zh: 强调所有平民的安全和福祉的重要性，并呼吁停止包括所有恐怖、挑衅、煽动和破坏在内的一切暴力行为，以及所有发射火箭的行为，

data.en: Emphasizing the importance of the safety and well-being of all civilians, and calling for the cessation of all acts of violence, including all acts of terror, provocation, incitement and destruction, and all firing of rockets,
data.zh: 表示深为关切数千名巴勒斯坦人，包括很多儿童和妇女，继续被关押在以色列监狱或拘留中心，那里的恶劣条件损害他们的安康，包括卫生条件差、单独监禁、过度使用包括对儿童使用行政拘留手段、缺乏适当的医疗服务且普遍得不到医治(包括有生命危险的患病囚犯)、不准家属探访和剥夺适当法律程序，又深为关切巴勒斯坦囚犯和被拘留者受到的任何虐待和骚扰以及所有关于酷刑的报道，

data.en: Expressing deep concern that thousands of Palestinians, including many children and women, continue to be held in Israeli prisons or detention centres under harsh conditions, including unhygienic conditions, solitary confinement, excessive use of administrative detention, including of children, lack of proper medical care and widespread medical neglect, including for ill prisoners, with the risk of fatal consequences, and denial of family visits and of due process, that impair their well-being, and expressing deep concern also about any ill-treatment and harassment of Palestinian prisoners and detainees and all reports of torture,
data.zh: 意识到迫切需要重建和发展包括东耶路撒冷在内巴勒斯坦被占领土的经济和社会基础设施，以及迫切需要应对巴勒斯坦人民面临的人道主义危机，包括为此确保不受阻碍地提供人道主义援助，人员和货物持续、正常地进出加沙地带，

data.en: Conscious of the urgent need for the reconstruction and development of the economic and social infrastructure of the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, as well as the urgent need to address the humanitarian crisis facing the Palestinian people, including by ensuring the unimpeded provision of humanitarian assistance and the sustained and regular flow of persons and goods into and out of the Gaza Strip,
data.zh: 认识到巴勒斯坦政府正在国际支持下努力改革、发展和加强其机构和基础设施，强调尽管以色列的持续占领造成障碍，仍需要维护和进一步发展巴勒斯坦的机构和基础设施，在这方面赞扬持续努力通过执行《巴勒斯坦国家政策议程：国家优先事项、政策和政策干预措施》(2017-2022)等方式建立一个独立的巴勒斯坦国的体制，

data.en: Recognizing the efforts being undertaken by the Palestinian Government, with international support, to reform, develop and strengthen its institutions and infrastructure, emphasizing the need to preserve and further develop Palestinian institutions and infrastructure, despite the obstacles presented by the ongoing Israeli occupation, and commending in this regard the ongoing efforts to develop the institutions of an independent Palestinian State, including through the implementation of the Palestinian National Policy Agenda: National Priorities, Policies and Policy Interventions (2017–2022),
data.zh: 表示关切世界银行、国际货币基金组织、联合国和协调对巴勒斯坦人提供国际援助特设联络委员会等国际机构对建国准备情况的积极评价确认取得的重大成就由于巴勒斯坦政府当前面临的不稳定局面和财政危机所造成的负面影响以及依然缺乏可信的政治前景而面临风险，

data.en: Expressing concern about the risks posed to the significant achievements made, as confirmed by the positive assessments made by international institutions regarding readiness for statehood, including by the World Bank, the International Monetary Fund, the United Nations and the Ad Hoc Liaison Committee for the Coordination of the International Assistance to Palestinians, owing to the negative impact of ongoing instability and the financial crisis being faced by the Palestinian Government and the continued absence of a credible political horizon,
data.zh: 在这方面赞扬联合国、专门机构和捐助界按照巴勒斯坦国家发展和立国计划，目前为支持巴勒斯坦人民的经济和社会发展所开展的重要工作以及在人道主义领域提供的关键援助，

data.en: Commending, in that regard, the important work being done by the United Nations, the specialized agencies and the donor community in support of the economic and social development of the Palestinian people in line with their national development and State-building plan, as well as the vital assistance being provided in the humanitarian field,
data.zh: 申明需要支持巴勒斯坦全国共识政府对西岸和加沙地带、各个领域、以及通过其在加沙各过境点的存在，全面行使政府职责，支持巴勒斯坦民族和解，并强调需要尊重和维护包括东耶路撒冷在内的巴勒斯坦被占领土的领土完整和统一，

data.en: Affirming the need to support the Palestinian Government of national consensus in its assumption of full government responsibilities in both the West Bank and the Gaza Strip, in all fields, as well as through its presence at Gaza’s crossing points, and Palestinian national reconciliation, and emphasizing the need for the respect and preservation of the territorial integrity and unity of the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem,
data.zh: 促请双方与四方合作，履行其根据路线图承担的义务，

data.en: Calling upon both parties to fulfil their obligations under the road map in cooperation with the Quartet,
data.zh: 意识到在被占领状态下难以实现发展和促进健康的经济、社会和环境条件，只有在和平与稳定的环境下才能最好地促进发展和这些条件，

data.en: Decides to include the item entitled “Economic and social repercussions of the Israeli occupation on the living conditions of the Palestinian people in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem, and the Arab population in the occupied Syrian Golan” in the agenda of its 2024 session.

data.zh: 联合国各次主要会议和首脑会议成果的执行情况 及后续行动：《支援最不发达国家多哈行动纲领》执行工作的审查和协调

data.en: Implementation of and follow-up to major United Nations conferences and summits: review and coordination of the implementation of the Doha Programme of Action for the Least Developed Countries
data.zh: 理事会副主席葆拉·纳瓦埃斯(智利)在非正式协商基础上提出的决议草案

data.en: Draft resolution submitted by the Vice-President of the Council, Paula Narváez (Chile), on the basis of informal consultations
data.zh: 《2022-2031十年期支援最不发达国家多哈行动纲领》

data.en: Doha Programme of Action for the Least Developed Countries for the decade 2022–2031
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会，

data.en: The Economic and Social Council,
data.zh: 回顾2022年3月17日在纽约举行的第五次联合国最不发达国家问题会议第一期会议通过并经大会2022年4月1日第76/258号决议核可的《支援最不发达国家多哈行动纲领》，以及2023年3月5至9日在多哈举行的第五次会议第二期会议通过的《多哈政治宣言》， 其中国家元首和政府首脑及各国代表作出坚定承诺，在未来十年执行《多哈行动纲领》，包括《行动纲领》的六个优先领域，

data.en: Recalling the Doha Programme of Action for the Least Developed Countries, adopted during the first part of the Fifth United Nations Conference on the Least Developed Countries, held in New York on 17 March 2022, and endorsed by the General Assembly in its resolution 76/258 of 1 April 2022, and the Doha Political Declaration, adopted during the second part of the Fifth Conference, held in Doha, from 5 to 9 March 2023, in which the Heads of State and Government and representatives of States strongly committed themselves to the implementation of the Doha Programme of Action throughout the coming decade, including its six priority areas,
data.zh: 又回顾国家元首和政府首脑及各国代表作出坚定承诺，推动实现《多哈行动纲领》的具体交付产品，包括建立库存制度或现金转移等替代手段的可行性，同时考虑到可能的经济影响和风险、在线大学或其他同等平台、国际投资支持中心、可持续的毕业支持机制以及针对最不发达国家的减轻多种灾害危机和建设韧性的综合措施，

data.en: Recalling also the strong commitment of the Heads of State and Government and representatives of States to advancing the concrete deliverables of the Doha Programme of Action with respect to the feasibility of a system of stockholding or alternative means, such as cash transfers, taking into account possible economic implications and risks, an online university or other equivalent platforms, an international investment support centre, a sustainable graduation support facility, and comprehensive multi-hazard crisis mitigation and resilience-building measures for least developed countries,
data.zh: 还回顾在执行伊斯坦布尔《2011-2020十年期支援最不发达国家行动纲领》 方面取得的进展，以及在实现既定目标和具体目标方面未取得预期进展之处，

data.en: Recalling further the progress achieved in the implementation of the Istanbul Programme of Action for the Least Developed Countries for the Decade 2011–2020, as well as where it fell short of achieving desired progress in the set goals and targets,
data.zh: 重申《多哈行动纲领》是最不发达国家及其发展伙伴基于下列总体目标而重新作出并加强的新一代承诺：从冠状病毒病(COVID-19)疫情中实现快速、可持续和包容性恢复，建立抵御未来冲击的韧性，消除极端贫困，促进从非正规就业向正规就业过渡以加强劳动力市场，促使最不发达国家从该类别毕业，便利获得可持续和创新融资，解决国家内部和国家之间的不平等，利用科学、技术和创新的力量，把技术驱动的创业纳入主流，实现结构转型并实现可持续发展目标，为此采取扩大和雄心勃勃的执行手段，为最不发达国家建立尽可能广泛的多利益攸关方伙伴关系联盟提供多方面支持，以振兴促进可持续发展的全球伙伴关系，

data.en: Reaffirming that the Doha Programme of Action is a new generation of renewed and strengthened commitments by the least developed countries and their development partners grounded in the overarching goals of achieving rapid, sustainable and inclusive recovery from the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic, building resilience against future shocks, eradicating extreme poverty, strengthening labour markets by promoting the transition from informal to formal employment, enabling graduation from the least developed country category, facilitating access to sustainable and innovative financing, addressing inequalities, within and among countries, leveraging the power of science, technology and innovation, mainstreaming tech-driven entrepreneurship, bringing about structural transformation and achieving the Sustainable Development Goals, through a reinvigorated global partnership for sustainable development based on scaled-up and ambitious means of implementation and diverse support for the least developed countries in forging the widest possible coalition of multi-stakeholder partnerships,
data.zh: 回顾《2030年可持续发展议程》、 《第三次发展筹资问题国际会议亚的斯亚贝巴行动议程》、 《巴黎协定》、 《2015-2030年仙台减少灾害风险框架》 和联合国住房与可持续城市发展会议(人居三)在基多通过的《新城市议程》，

data.en: Recalling the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, the Addis Ababa Action Agenda of the Third International Conference on Financing for Development, the Paris Agreement, the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction 2015–2030 and the New Urban Agenda adopted in Quito by the United Nations Conference on Housing and Sustainable Urban Development (Habitat III),
data.zh: 欢迎《2015-2030年仙台减少灾害风险框架》中期审查高级别会议的政治宣言，

data.en: Welcoming the political declaration of the high-level meeting on the midterm review of the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction 2015–2030,
data.zh: 期待2024年举行的未来峰会，

data.en: Looking forward to the Summit of the Future in 2024,
data.zh: 回顾其关于《2022-2031十年期支援最不发达国家行动纲领》的2022年7月22日第2022/19号决议，

data.en: Recalling its resolution 2022/19 of 22 July 2022 on the programme of action for the least developed countries for the decade 2022–2031,
data.zh: 又回顾其关于发展政策委员会第二十五届会议报告的2023年6月7日第2023/10号决议，

data.en: Recalling also its resolution 2023/10 of 7 June 2023 on the report of the Committee for Development Policy on its twenty-fifth session,
data.zh: 还回顾大会关于从最不发达国家名单毕业国家的平稳过渡的2004年12月20日第59/209号和2012年12月21日第67/221号决议，

data.en: Recalling further General Assembly resolutions 59/209 of 20 December 2004 and 67/221 of 21 December 2012 on a smooth transition for countries graduating from the list of least developed countries,
data.zh: 回顾2022年6月12日至17日在日内瓦举行的世界贸易组织第十二次部长级会议及其通过的部长宣言，以及2021年10月3日至7日在巴巴多斯举行的联合国贸易和发展会议第十五届会议及其通过的《布里奇敦协定》，

data.en: Recalling the Twelfth Ministerial Conference of the World Trade Organization, held in Geneva from 12 to 17 June 2022, and the adoption of its ministerial declaration, as well as the fifteenth session of the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development, held in Barbados from 3 to 7 October 2021, at which the Bridgetown Covenant was adopted,
data.zh: 又回顾大会2020年4月2日关于全球团结抗击冠状病毒病(COVID-19)的第74/270号决议、2020年4月20日关于开展国际合作确保全球获得应对冠状病毒病的药品、疫苗和医疗设备的第74/274号决议以及2021年12月16日关于确保所有国家以公平、负担得起、及时和普遍方式获得疫苗应对冠状病毒病疫情的第76/175号决议，

data.en: Recalling also General Assembly resolutions 74/270 of 2 April 2020 on global solidarity to fight COVID-19, 74/274 of 20 April 2020 on international cooperation to ensure global access to medicines, vaccines and medical equipment to face COVID-19 and 76/175 of 16 December 2021 on ensuring equitable, affordable, timely and universal access for all countries to vaccines in response to the COVID‑19 pandemic,
data.zh: 认识到最不发达国家由于卫生系统脆弱、获得疫苗机会有限、接种疫苗速度缓慢、社会保障制度覆盖不足、财政和其他资源紧缺以及易受外部冲击而受到冠状病毒病疫情的不利影响的严重打击，

data.en: Recognizing that the least developed countries have been severely hit by the adverse impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic owing to the fragility of their health systems, limited access to vaccines and the slow pace of vaccinations, limited coverage of their social protection systems, limited financial and other resources, and vulnerability to external shocks,
data.zh: 又认识到冠状病毒病疫情、冲突和气候变化的多重广泛影响导致粮食安全、能源安全、全球贸易和市场稳定恶化，使到2030年实现可持续发展目标的可行性面临巨大风险，

data.en: Recognizing also that the multiple and widespread impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic, conflicts and climate change have brought about a deterioration in the situation of food security, energy security, global trade and market stability, which is putting the very viability of achieving the Sustainable Development Goals by 2030 at great risk,
data.zh: 还认识到移民在减轻冠状病毒病疫情对原籍国和目的地国影响方面的积极作用和贡献，关切地注意到冠状病毒病疫情对来自最不发达国家的移民工人和难民，包括在低薪非正规经济部门工作的移民工人和难民造成重大社会经济后果，又关切地注意到2023年许多国家的汇款增长可能放缓，重点指出促进更快、更安全、更廉价的汇款并将移民汇款的交易成本降至3%以下，包括采用数字解决方案，促进数字和金融包容性，加快移民获得交易账户的速度，将对千百万严重依赖移民汇款的民众产生积极影响，

data.en: Recognizing further the positive role and contributions of migrants in mitigating the effects of the COVID-19 pandemic in both their countries of origin and destination, noting with concern the significant socioeconomic consequences that the COVID-19 pandemic has had on migrant workers and refugees from least developed countries, including those in the low-wage informal economy, and noting with concern also that the growth rate of remittances is likely to slow down in 2023 in many countries, highlighting that promoting faster, safer and cheaper remittances and reducing to less than 3 per cent the transaction costs of migrant remittances, including by adopting digital solutions and promoting digital and financial inclusion and accelerating access to transaction accounts for migrants, will have positive impacts on the millions of people who depend heavily on them,
data.zh: 欢迎《2022年最不发达国家部长级宣言》，

data.zh: 协调、方案和其他问题：长期支助海地方案

data.en: Coordination, programme and other questions: long-term programme of support for Haiti
data.zh: 2023年7月26日经济及社会理事会决议

data.en: Resolution adopted by the Economic and Social Council on 26 July 2023
data.zh: [根据全体会议审议的一项提案(E/2023/L.25)通过]

data.en: Ad Hoc Advisory Group on Haiti
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会，

data.en: The Economic and Social Council,

data.zh: 深为关切海地的复杂和多方面危机，着重指出严重的粮食不安全和营养不良状况以及霍乱再发现象，

data.en: Deeply concerned about the complex and multifaceted crisis in Haiti, and underlining high levels of food insecurity and malnutrition as well as the resurgence of cholera,
data.zh: 认识到需要采取紧急措施恢复安全，为此解决暴力的结构性原因，例如不平等、极端贫困、高失业率、侵犯人权、有罪不罚、腐败和公共机构薄弱等问题，并为重建民主体制创造有利条件，

data.en: Recognizing the need for urgent measures to restore security by addressing the structural causes of violence, such as inequalities, extreme poverty, high unemployment, human rights violations, impunity, corruption and weak public institutions, and by creating favourable conditions for the re-establishment of democratic institutions,
data.zh: 强调迫切需要为联合国及合作伙伴在2023年海地人道主义应急计划中发出的7.199亿美元的空前呼吁提供充足资金，以满足最紧迫的人道主义和保护需求，包括粮食安全、紧急生计援助和农业部门投资，从而保障海地最脆弱人群的复原力，

data.en: Requests the Ad Hoc Advisory Group on Haiti to submit a report on its work, with recommendations, as appropriate, to the Economic and Social Council for its consideration at its 2024 session.
data.zh: 第45次全体会议

data.en: 45th plenary meeting

可持续发展高级别政治论坛

data.en: High-level political forum on sustainable development
data.zh: 由经济及社会理事会主持召开

data.en: Convened under the auspices of the Economic and Social Council

data.zh: 加快冠状病毒病(COVID-19)疫后复苏和在各级  全面落实《2030年可持续发展议程》

data.en: Accelerating the recovery from the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) and the full implementation of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development at all levels
data.zh: 由经济及社会理事会各职司委员会以及其他政府间机构和论坛提交的材料汇总

data.en: Synthesis of submissions by functional commissions of the Economic and Social Council and other intergovernmental bodies and forums
data.zh: 摘要

data.en: Summary
data.zh: 尽管在持续的全球危机中遇到许多挫折，但经济及社会理事会各职司委员会和其他政府间机构和论坛今年提交的报告有证据表明，在应对冠状病毒病(COVID-19)疫情的多边合作有可能扭转负面趋势，并使世界回到推进《2030年可持续发展议程》的轨道上。

data.en: Despite many setbacks amid ongoing global crises, the 2023 submissions by the functional commissions of the Economic and Social Council and other intergovernmental bodies and forums reflect evidence that multilateral cooperation in response to the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic has the potential to reverse negative trends and put the world back on track to advance the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development.
data.zh: 为制定短期紧急措施而需要立即开展的合作努力已让位于注重长期战略规划和评估，以了解如何弥合差距、减少不平等现象和抓住机会之窗进行变革。

data.en: The immediate collaborative efforts that were required to enact short-term emergency measures have given way to a focus on longer-term strategic planning and assessments of how to bridge gaps, reduce inequalities and seize windows of opportunity for transformative change.
data.zh: 在《2030年议程》实施的中期，政府间论坛和其他机构的工作反映了对加快实现可持续发展目标多个具体目标的途径有了更深入的理解，转向以科学为基础的基于复原力的系统思维，并利用围绕具体目标的联系方法，这些方法的相互联系、协同作用和权衡得到了明确界定。a

data.en: At the midpoint of the implementation of the 2030 Agenda, the work of intergovernmental forums and other bodies reflects a deeper understanding of pathways to accelerate progress towards multiple targets of the Sustainable Development Goals; there is a shift to resilience-based systems thinking that is grounded in science, and a utilization of nexus approaches to the targets, with well-defined interlinkages, synergies and trade-offs.a
data.zh: 本综合报告简要概述了2023年审查的一组目标的进展、挑战和COVID-19疫情对这组目标执行工作的影响，包括变革行动取得成功和迫切需要支持的选定领域，b 随后介绍了从疫情中复苏的行动实例，这些行动也加快了实现多个目标和具体目标的进展，对《2030年议程》执行中期的情况进行了全面评估，并就前进方向提出了建议。

data.en: a
data.zh: 2023年版《全球可持续发展报告》和秘书长关于实现可持续发展目标进展情况的特别报告对这些问题进行了更深入的探讨。

data.en: b
data.zh: 目标6(清洁饮水和卫生设施)；目标7(经济适用的清洁能源)；目标9(产业、创新和基础设施)；目标11(可持续城市和社区)；以及目标17(促进目标实现的伙伴关系)。

data.en: Goal 6 (Clean water and sanitation); Goal 7 (Affordable and clean energy); Goal 9 (Industry, innovation and infrastructure); Goal 11 (Sustainable cities and communities; and Goal 17 (Partnerships for the Goals).
data.zh: 一.

data.en: I.
data.zh: 导言

data.en: The high-level political forum on sustainable development provides a central platform for follow-up and review at the global level of progress towards the implementation of General Assembly resolution 70/1, entitled “Transforming our world: the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development”.
data.zh: 根据《2030年议程》第82段，该论坛促进经验交流，包括交流成功经验、挑战和教训。

data.en: In line with paragraph 82 of the 2030 Agenda, the forum facilitates the sharing of experiences, including successes, challenges and lessons learned.
data.zh: 论坛还为后续工作提供政治领导、指导和建议，并促进全系统可持续发展政策的统一和协调。

data.en: The contributions of the intergovernmental bodies do not suggest a formal reporting link to the forum or modify the mandate or governance of any entity.
data.zh: 所有提交的材料全文可查阅论坛网站。

data.en: The integral texts of all submissions received are available on the forum’s website.
data.zh: 二.

data.en: II.
data.zh: 冠状病毒病(COVID-19)疫情对2023年所审查可持续发展目标执行情况的影响

data.en: The COVID-19 pandemic has had a severe impact on the implementation of Goals 6, 7, 9, 11 and 17.
data.zh: 经验教训表明，必须利用新的倡议和伙伴关系，通过在会员国、发展伙伴和利益攸关方之间建立新的联系，促进复苏和加强多边主义。

data.en: The experiences and lessons learned show that new initiatives and partnerships must be used to leverage recovery and strengthen multilateralism by forging new connections among Member States, development partners and stakeholders.
data.zh: 还需要推动政治意愿，通过金融改革、数字化以弥补数据差距，以及能力建设来支持那些最落后者，实现公正的过渡。

data.en: There is also a push for political will to support those furthest behind through financial reforms, digitalization to bridge data gaps, and capacity-building for a just transition.
data.zh: 目标6.

data.en: Goal 6.
data.zh: 为所有人提供水和环境卫生并对其进行可持续管理

data.en: Safely managed drinking water, sanitation and hygiene services are vital to human health and interlinked with efforts to address climate change, food insecurity, disease pandemics, biodiversity loss, extreme poverty and inequalities.
data.zh: 水对于可持续发展的许多其他方面至关重要，但由于人口迅速增长、城市化以及农业、工业和能源部门日益增加的压力，水的需求不断增加，水正受到威胁。

data.en: Water is fundamental to many other aspects of sustainable development and is under threat owing to rising demand due to rapid population growth, urbanization and increasing pressure from agriculture, industry and the energy sector.
data.zh: 气候变化引发的洪水和干旱是对水资源供应的最严重威胁之一，而水资源供应反过来又对饮用和卫生清洁水的充足供应构成威胁。

data.en: There are still 2 billion people who lack access to safe drinking water and 3.6 billion people who lack access to safe sanitation services.
data.zh: 超过17亿人——大多数在发展中国家——目前生活在用水量超过补给量的河流流域。

data.en: Over 1.7 billion people – mostly in developing countries – currently live in river basins where water use exceeds recharge.
data.zh: 几十年来的滥用、管理不善以及淡水和地下水供应的过度开采和污染加剧了水资源紧张，并使与水有关的生态系统恶化。

data.en: Decades of misuse, poor management and the overextraction and contamination of freshwater and groundwater supplies have exacerbated water stress and deteriorated water-related ecosystems.
data.zh: 危险化学品和废物、塑料和微塑料也对提供清洁水和卫生设施构成重大挑战。

data.en: The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted the importance of ensuring access to water, sanitation and hygiene services for all to protect health and welfare, as well as the need to expand access for women and girls to adequate, safe and clean water and sanitation facilities, including for menstrual health and hygiene, especially in disaster relief and humanitarian emergencies.
data.zh: 用水量增加，而供水公司收入下降，使供水系统为每个人提供用水的能力受到限制。

data.en: Water consumption increased, while water utility revenues fell, straining systems’ capacity to provide access for everyone.
data.zh: 农村居民、残疾人、难民、移民和流离失所者以及生活在最不发达国家的人获得水、环卫和个人卫生服务的权利的实现特别缓慢。

data.en: The right to water, sanitation and hygiene services has been particularly slow to materialize for rural residents, persons with disabilities, refugees, migrants and displaced persons, and people living in the least developed countries.
data.zh: 缺乏安全饮用水和适当的卫生设施，导致在减少疾病负担方面进展缓慢，特别是在农村和城市地区最贫穷人口中。

data.en: The United Nations 2023 Water Conference held in March was the first conference on water convened by the United Nations in nearly half a century, and the Water Action Agenda that emerged, comprising all water-related voluntary commitments to accelerate progress, highlighted the urgent need for partnerships and increased cooperation.
data.zh: 为了实现可持续和公平的水分配，以满足所有需求，改善水资源管理的全球平均执行率需要翻一番，水基础设施的复原力必须得到加强。

data.en: To achieve sustainable and equitable distribution of water to meet all needs, the average global implementation rate of improved water resources management needs to double, and the resilience of water infrastructure must be enhanced.
data.zh: 在全球一级达成的与水有关的协定必须通过全面、了解风险的水治理和管理得到充分执行，以建立社会、经济和环境的复原力。

data.en: Water-related agreements made at the global level must be fully implemented through holistic, risk-informed water governance and management to build resilience for societies, economies and the environment.
data.zh: 与其他环境和发展协定、议程和进程相结合至关重要。

data.en: Community-level projects in reforestation and agroforestry, integrated with environmental policy instruments, such as carbon credits and schemes involving payment for environmental services that support alternative development measures, have contributed to progress towards Goal 6 and other targets related to sustainable livelihoods and environmental protection.
data.zh: 科学、技术和创新也可大大有助于克服在实现目标6方面持续存在的挑战，重点是安全用水和卫生设施的分配和提供、水资源综合管理、前沿技术的使用，以及解决该部门的不平等问题，特别是性别不平等问题。

data.en: Science, technology and innovation can also contribute significantly to overcoming persistent challenges in delivering on Goal 6, with a focus on the distribution and delivery of safe water and sanitation, integrated water resource management, use of frontier technologies and addressing inequalities in the sector, notably in relation to gender.
data.zh: 水资源保护和管理的贸易政策和措施可促进商品、服务和技术的开发和应用，包括与耐气候作物、滴灌或其他灌溉以及水资源保护和储存系统有关的商品、服务和技术。

data.en: Trade policies and measures for water conservation and management can facilitate the development and deployment of goods, services and technologies, including those related to climate-resistant crops, drip or other irrigation systems, and water conservation and storage systems.
data.zh: 消除不必要的贸易壁垒可大力促进贸易、金融、投资和获取技术，并可有助于降低成本和减少受气候引起的冲击的风险。

data.en: The removal of unnecessary barriers to trade could be a “force multiplier” for trade, finance, investment and access to technologies and could help to reduce costs and exposure to climate-induced shocks.
data.zh: 目标7.

data.en: Goal 7.
data.zh: 确保人人获得负担得起的、可靠和可持续的现代能源

data.en: While the world continues to advance towards sustainable energy targets, the current pace of progress is insufficient to achieve Goal 7 by 2030.
data.zh: 数亿人仍然无法获得电力，在获得现代可持续能源方面仍然存在巨大差距，将最弱势群体进一步抛在后面。

data.en: Hundreds of millions of people still lack access to electricity, and huge disparities in access to modern sustainable energy persist, leaving the most vulnerable even further behind.
data.zh: 虽然可再生能源在疫情期间表现出非凡的复原力，但近年来电气化的步伐放缓，疫情对家庭收入的影响使亚洲和非洲约9 000万人负担不起基本能源服务，而他们以前享有这些服务。

data.en: Energy was critical to the success of COVID-19 response strategies, powering hospitals and vaccine cold chains while also enabling activities, such as schooling and work, to move online.
data.zh: 但这次疫情暴露了世界范围内在获得可靠能源和卫生保健方面的严重不平等，特别是在农村和城郊地区，并突出表明必须扩大获得清洁、高效能源的机会，以帮助人们减轻这种健康危机的影响，以及极端天气事件和气候变化的影响。

data.en: More recently, instability in global energy prices due to political conflict have exacerbated challenges related to financing the clean energy transition, weakened or reversed advances already made, and cast uncertainty over the direction of energy investments.
data.zh: 许多国家政府继续支持化石燃料投资，一些国家政府表示越来越有兴趣转向核能，以促进经济发展和工业化。

data.en: Slow progress towards clean cooking solutions, rising costs of clean cooking fuels and lack of access to electricity keep the health of approximately one third of the world’s population at risk, owing to reliance on traditional use of biomass fuel from forests for their daily energy needs, in particular cooking and heating.
data.zh: 与不可持续的木炭生产有关的毁林威胁着完整森林的更广泛的社会经济效益。

data.en: Deforestation associated with unsustainable charcoal production threatens the broader socioeconomic benefits of intact forests.
data.zh: 必须加强使用生物能源的可持续标准，更可持续的能源将有助于减少对木炭的需求。

data.en: Improvements in energy efficiency will need to accelerate to reach the climate goal of reducing greenhouse gas emissions.
data.zh: 空调和制冷在全球电力需求中占有相当大的比例，且比例不断增加；要实现能源和气候目标，就需要继续提供政策支持，并为清洁和可再生能源大规模动员公共和私人资本，特别是在发展中国家。

data.en: Air conditioning and refrigeration represent a substantial and increasing percentage of global electricity demand; achieving both energy and climate goals will require continued policy support and a massive mobilization of public and private capital for clean and renewable energy, especially in developing countries.
data.zh: 已批准新的供资窗口，以评估替代技术和设备的能效，同时逐步减少氢氟碳化合物；提供机会了解采用节能替代品的好处；查明障碍并制定解决方案，以采用更高效的制冷、空调和热泵设备；并处理受控物质的处置问题，同时进行国民核算，以制定一项管理计划，包括具有成本效益的销毁计划。

data.en: New funding windows have been approved to assess the energy efficiency of replacement technologies and equipment while phasing down hydrofluorocarbons; provide opportunities to understand the benefits of adopting energy-efficient alternatives; identify barriers and develop solutions for the adoption of more efficient refrigeration, air-conditioning and heat-pump equipment; and address the disposal of controlled substances, with national accounting to develop a plan for their management, including cost-effective destruction.
data.zh: 目标9.

data.en: Goal 9.
data.zh: 建造具备灾害抵御能力的基础设施，促进具有包容性的可持续工业化，推动创新

data.en: Industrial policies have been central to the development trajectory of countries that have managed to advance on a path of structural transformation.
data.zh: 应对COVID-19疫情凸显了工业化、技术创新和弹性基础设施在建设更美好未来和实现可持续发展目标方面的重要性。

data.en: In 2021, global manufacturing rebounded from the pandemic, although the recovery remains incomplete and uneven.
data.zh: 工业部门多样化和基础设施强大的经济体——包括公用事业、运输和信息通信技术——遭受的破坏较小，恢复较快。

data.en: Economies with a diversified industrial sector and strong infrastructure – including utility services, transport and information and communications technology (ICT) – sustained less damage and are experiencing faster recovery.
data.zh: 在最不发达国家，复苏缓慢且不太确定，三分之一的制造业就业受到负面影响。

data.en: In the least developed countries, recovery has been sluggish and less certain, with a negative impact on nearly one in three manufacturing jobs.
data.zh: 妇女、青年和中低技能工人遭受的损失最大。

data.en: Women, young people and low- and middle-skilled workers suffered the most losses.
data.zh: 总体来说，高技术产业表现较好，复苏较快，有力地证明了技术创新对实现目标9的重要性。

data.en: Technologies and innovation for cleaner, more productive and competitive industrial production can catalyse economic growth and structural transformation while also addressing the existential threat posed by climate change.
data.zh: 国家政策对于准备和创造这些绿色机会窗口至关重要，但许多国家需要开展国际合作，以支持和协助制定和执行针对具体部门的战略。

data.en: A services-led approach to development can help countries to leapfrog and transform their economies.
data.zh: 运输和物流、金融服务、信通技术以及商业和专业服务是相互关联的部门，这些部门合在一起可以直接促进经济增长和发展，增加产出、贸易和就业的份额。

data.en: Transport and logistics, financial services, ICT, and business and professional services are interconnected sectors that, together, can contribute directly to economic growth and development, with an increasing share of output, trade and jobs.
data.zh: 这些部门通过使所有公司更具竞争力并将其与全球价值链和数字创新联系起来而间接做出贡献，还可以通过刺激有利于小企业(包括由妇女和青年领导的小企业)的包容性增长来使社会更加平等。

data.en: In spite of steady growth in the numbers of Internet users, the digital divide persists in several key dimensions.
data.zh: 虽然世界人口的63%已联网，但最不发达国家的互联网用户仍然只占其人口的27%。

data.en: Although 63 per cent of the world’s population is connected, the least developed countries still only count 27 per cent of their populations as Internet users.
data.zh: 在不同的数字化领域建立伙伴关系和合作，包括技术共享，对于连接偏远和服务不足的人口至关重要。

data.en: Partnering and cooperation in different areas of digitalization, including technology-sharing, are crucial for connecting remote and underserved populations.
data.zh: 目标11.

data.en: Goal 11.
data.zh: 建设包容、安全、有灾害抵御能力及可持续的城市和人类住区

data.en: Today, more than half the world’s population lives in cities.
data.zh: 到2050年，估计十分之七的人可能生活在城市地区。

data.en: By 2050, an estimated 7 out of 10 people will likely live in urban areas.
data.zh: 如果规划和管理得当，城市发展可以是可持续的，可以产生包容性繁荣。

data.en: If planned and managed well, urban development can be sustainable and can generate inclusive prosperity.
data.zh: 然而，快速和规划不善的城市化带来了许多挑战，包括经济适用房短缺，公共交通和基本服务等基础设施不足，开放空间有限，空气污染达到不安全程度，气候和灾害风险增加。

data.en: However, rapid and poorly planned urbanization leads to many challenges, including a shortage of affordable housing; insufficient infrastructure, such as public transportation and basic services; limited open spaces; unsafe levels of air pollution; and increased climate and disaster risk.
data.zh: 城市还产生了大量的固体和液体废物，最终进入垃圾填埋场，湿地和海洋。

data.en: The COVID-19 pandemic had a profound impact on sustainable urban development, negatively affecting access to quality education, health-care systems, decent employment opportunities and housing.
data.zh: 疫情削弱了地方和国家政府执行目标11的能力，并加深了贫穷和不平等。

data.en: It diminished local and national government capacities to implement Goal 11 and deepened poverty and inequality.
data.zh: 先前存在的结构性缺陷和数据缺口加剧了这次疫情的影响，并损害了监测和应对能力。

data.en: Pre-existing structural deficits and data gaps exacerbated the pandemic’s impacts and compromised monitoring and response capabilities.
data.zh: 房地产和住房对许多人来说已负担不起，住房成本超过收入。

data.en: Real estate and housing have become unaffordable for many, with the cost of housing outstripping incomes.
data.zh: 住房金融化目前正在破坏目标11的实现，同时产生负面的人权结果，包括强迫驱逐、家庭流离失所和非正规住区的增长。

data.en: The inequalities exposed by the pandemic and other cascading crises highlight the importance of sustainable urban development.
data.zh: 与《新城市议程》相一致的系统、综合和包容性的城市规划和治理方法有助于城市应对各种问题，包括易受气候变化影响、非协商式治理和社会经济机会不足。

data.en: Systemic, integrated and inclusive approaches to urban planning and governance aligned with the New Urban Agenda help cities to respond to various issues, including vulnerability to climate change, non-consultative governance and insufficient socioeconomic opportunities.
data.zh: 以社区为基础的青年支助措施可以满足他们在教育和就业方面的需要，并减少吸毒、犯罪和暴力等风险因素，包括通过提供体育和娱乐设施及方案等办法。

data.en: As the global population continues to grow, in particular in urban areas, safeguarding the water-providing capacity and other contributions of forests has become more important in efforts to meeting the demands of urban populations, as many of the world’s largest cities and communities rely on forested areas for a significant portion of their drinking water and for reducing risks and building resilience to natural disasters.
data.zh: 城市和城郊地区的土地和生态系统恢复可以加强城市和周边空间的复原力，政府当局和地方社区之间的公私伙伴关系可以促进社会进步。

data.en: Land and ecosystem restoration of urban and peri-urban areas can strengthen the resilience of cities and surrounding spaces, and public-private partnerships between government authorities and local communities can promote social progress.
data.zh: 目标17.

data.en: Goal 17.
data.zh: 加强执行手段，重振可持续发展全球伙伴关系

data.en: Despite a record-high level of ODA and a strong rebound in global foreign direct investment and remittance flows, many developing countries are struggling economically.
data.zh: 目前的高通胀和高利率、债务负担、过高的资本成本、相互竞争的优先事项和有限的财政空间等环境，正在阻止私人融资投资于结构性绿色经济转型。

data.en: The current environment of high inflation and interest rates, debt burdens, exorbitant cost of capital, competing priorities and limited fiscal space is prohibiting investment of private finance in a structural green economic transformation.
data.zh: 疫情、经济冲击、冲突和与气候有关的灾害带来的综合压力正在削弱许多国家的应对能力和投资于复苏的能力；对更多人道主义援助和短期官方发展援助的迫切需要，从长期发展与和平的投资中抽走了资源。

data.en: The pandemic exposed and intensified inequality among and within countries.
data.zh: 多年的进展正在丧失，最贫穷和最脆弱的群体受到的影响尤为严重，往往削弱了发展行为体之间的信任。

data.en: Years of progress are being lost, and the poorest and most vulnerable people are being disproportionately affected, which often erodes trust among development actors.
data.zh: 国际金融和债务架构需要全面转型，以避免“两级”COVID-19复苏，并为社会、卫生、环境以及和平与安全等领域的全球危机找到持久解决方案。

data.en: International cooperation must be urgently scaled up, with significantly more investment in data and statistics, knowledge transfer and capacity-building through North-South, South-South and triangular cooperation; technology transfer between developed and developing countries, including building local capacity and capability to operate, maintain and adapt them to the local context; and financial mechanisms that promote the flow of financial assistance from high-income countries and investment from the private sector to developing countries.
data.zh: 促进国际合作以实现充分和生产性就业及人人有体面工作，是克服不平等现象，并在地方、国家、区域和国际各级动员青年、青年领导和以青年为重点的组织及其他民间社会组织参与的一个途径。

data.en: The context for development cooperation on digital issues remains challenging and is evolving quickly.
data.zh: 疫情迫使数据收集创新，使用新工具进行调查联系，调整共享行政数据的模式以促进信息收集，并增加使用大数据进行深入分析。

data.en: The pandemic forced innovation in data collection, with new tools being used to make contact for surveys, adjust modalities for sharing administrative data to facilitate information-gathering, and increase use of big data for insights.
data.zh: 与私营和公共部门以及与国际伙伴建立的新的数据伙伴关系正在促进这些转变。

data.en: Policymakers and civil servants are encouraged to continue to improve digital competencies, which are foundational for successfully implementing digital transformation in government and creating an enabling environment for digital transformation in society through improved digital governance.
data.zh: 目前正在协商的《全球数字契约》可以提供协同和互补的机会，汇集有关信息社会发展的进展和前景的证据、观点、期望和关切。

data.en: The COVID-19 crisis underlined the importance of multilateralism and spurred an increase in partnerships between Governments, local authorities, the private sector, civil society and other stakeholders.
data.zh: 许多政府间机构和论坛报告说，整个联合国系统，包括各区域委员会、驻地协调员和国家工作队、科学机构和多方利益攸关方平台之间的协调与合作有所加强。

data.en: Many intergovernmental bodies and forums reported increased coordination and cooperation across the United Nations system, including among regional commissions, resident coordinators and country teams, scientific bodies and multi-stakeholder platforms.
data.zh: 在许多国家，公众越来越多地参与决策进程，以此作为实现可持续和包容性复苏的一种手段。

data.en: Public participation in decision-making processes is on the rise in many countries as a means of enabling a sustainable and inclusive recovery.
data.zh: 三.

data.en: III.
data.zh: 加快进展的转型行动取得成功的领域

data.en: The rapid development of better forecasting, monitoring and early warning systems based on advanced deeply integrated earth observation systems, drones and data from in situ sensors is crucial to the preparation of responses to the floods and droughts that have become more frequent owing to climate change, and has enabled early disaster threat prediction.
data.zh: 新的传感器和水管理系统还可以大大减少城市地区旧配水网络的水量损失，并可防止洪水和缺水。

data.en: Payments for ecosystem and environmental services and schemes have been gaining traction to foster the restoration of riparian forests, with important benefits for improving the management of water resources.
data.zh: 许多国家已采取主动行动，增加其森林产品的数量和价值，通过立法、政策、战略和计划，促进木材和非木材森林产品的销售，并促进了可持续森林生产证书和有助于改善生计的生物经济价值链，包括通过建设妇女、青年、土著人民和当地社区的能力。

data.en: Renewable energy capacity growth has made impressive progress in the power sector.
data.zh: 在过去十年中，可再生能源的产能增长了130%，而不可再生能源仅增长了24%。

data.en: Over the past decade, renewables capacity increased by 130 per cent, while non-renewables only grew by 24 per cent.
data.zh: 风力发电亦取得显著增长，于2010年至2021年期间，风力发电装置增加逾四倍。

data.en: Wind power also experienced significant growth, and wind installations increased more than fourfold between 2010 and 2021.
data.zh: 就装机容量而言，水电仍然是最大的可再生能源。

data.en: Hydropower remains the largest renewable power source in terms of installed capacity.
data.zh: 2021年，可再生能源成本继续下降，原因是供应链挑战和大宗商品价格上涨尚未对项目成本产生全面影响。

data.en: Countries are increasingly making commitments to achieve net zero emissions by 2050.
data.zh: 加上新的和更新的国家自主贡献，目前和已宣布的净零承诺预计到2030年将减少约20%的排放量。

data.en: A shift from voluntary to mandatory sustainability reporting in the private sector and the creation of the International Sustainability Standards Board have promoted harmonization of sustainability reporting and collaboration through regional partnerships to facilitate the exchange of good practices in the implementation of sustainability reporting standards.
data.zh: 四.

data.en: IV.
data.zh: 亟需支持的领域

data.en: The expansion of social protection systems in response to the COVID-19 crisis protected many people from falling into poverty.
data.zh: 扩大覆盖面需要额外的财政资源，这迫使各国优化利用其国内资金。

data.en: Expansion in coverage required additional financial resources, which compelled countries to optimize the use of their national financing.
data.zh: 从这场疫情复苏为有关国家提供了一个政策窗口，使它们能够在建立普遍、充分、全面和可持续的社会保护制度方面取得进展，从而解决社会保护覆盖面方面的重大差距。

data.en: Efforts to accelerate digitalization helped to respond to short-term needs resulting from the pandemic, while building resilience and improving access to services.
data.zh: 通过加强技术共享合作以及为数字基础设施和负担得起的电信调动财政资源来弥合数字鸿沟，对于连接偏远地区和得不到充分服务的人口至关重要。

data.en: Realizing gender equality and the empowerment of women and girls remains an urgent priority.
data.zh: 需要在恢复就业计划中努力将性别观点纳入主流，重点是缩小就业方面的性别差距，实现同工同酬，并通过税收激励、培训和改善妇女工作条件，促进妇女进入和保留在男性占主导地位的战略部门，包括信息和通信技术部门和能源部门。

data.en: Legal frameworks and economic incentives must both be reoriented to ensure universal access to clean drinking water, sanitation and hygiene and to build more resilient and sustainable food systems.
data.zh: 必须改变激励措施，迫使私营部门尽自己的一份力量，为穷国和富国提供获得技术和创新的机会。

data.en: Incentives must change so that the private sector is compelled do its part to provide access to technology and innovation to poor and rich countries alike.
data.zh: 这将需要长期的资金和新的机制来规范公共和私营部门如何合作。

data.en: This will require long-term financing and novel mechanisms to regulate how the public and private sectors work together.
data.zh: 可持续性报告基础设施薄弱的发展中国家需要得到支持，以建设颁布和执行基本法规的机构能力。

data.en: Priority attention should be given to elements of the Doha Programme of Action for the Least Developed Countries that enable least developed countries to expand productive capacities for sustainable development.
data.zh: 这需要在六个政策领域采取协调行动：建设发展治理能力；制定促进技术升级和结构转型的产业和部门政策；建立有利的宏观经济和金融框架；在社会成果和生产能力之间建立积极的协同作用；制定环境政策，减少气候和其他环境风险，并利用脱碳带来的机会；并提供充分的国际支持，使最不发达国家融入全球经济。

data.en: The North-South divide in science, technology and innovation is widening, with developed countries leading innovation and production for many frontier technologies that are directly relevant to countries in the global South.
data.zh: 需要在各级协调努力，以有效消除障碍，以便更容易和更广泛地获得可持续技术。

data.en: Coordinated efforts at all levels are required in order to effectively remove barriers and make access to sustainable technologies easier and more widespread.
data.zh: 迫切需要加强国际资金流动，战略性地利用公共资金，利用优惠资金降低投资风险，并动员更多私人资本投入气候解决方案，以增加清洁能源投资和提高能源效率。

data.en: Projections of fiscal austerity measures affecting 85 per cent of the world population are of grave concern.
data.zh: 必须优先考虑为可持续发展筹资的财政措施和政策，包括加强税收制度的累进性质和加强征税的机构能力；打击避税和逃税以及非法资金流动；打击贪污；重新定位公共开支；财政透明、强大的公民空间、表达自由和对公共支出的监督；更好地将发展筹资与各国的人权义务结合起来，最大限度地利用现有资源促进经济、社会和文化权利。

data.en: The process and speed of providing debt relief to developing countries must be urgently improved, beginning with establishing a country-owned macro fiscal framework, including an economic recovery strategy and realistic fiscal inputs.
data.zh: 主权债务重组需要全面改革，并就框架的关键参数，包括截止日期和处理的可比性达成共识。

data.en: Sovereign debt restructuring needs comprehensive reforms, with consensus on key parameters of the framework, including cut-off dates and comparability of treatment.
data.zh: 全球主权债务圆桌会议是朝着更可预测的债务重组方法迈出的第一步，这种方法可能涉及新的法定机构，如独立小组和国际破产法院。

data.en: The Global Sovereign Debt Round Table is a first step towards a more predictable approach to debt restructuring that could involve new statutory bodies, such as an independent panel and an international bankruptcy court.
data.zh: 为了改善债务减免，利益攸关方应商定一个包括私营部门的进程，并以一国自主的宏观财政框架为基础，促进信任和创造性的解决办法，包括以复苏为基础的工具。

data.en: Support and financing for national statistical systems are also urgently needed to strengthen analytical capacity and allow countries to better respond to new data challenges.
data.zh: 五.

data.en: V.
data.zh: 从冠状病毒病(COVID-19)疫情中复苏的行动，加速沿着变革途径取得进展

data.en: The many negative impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic have imposed new ways of thinking and opened up new opportunities on many fronts.
data.zh: 治理、经济和金融、科学和技术、个人和集体行动以及能力建设等领域的复苏行动有可能在多个交叉的切入点上加快进展。

data.en: Overall, the high level of recognition and support for the rights and needs of women, children, Indigenous Peoples, migrants and internally displaced persons, refugees, persons with disabilities and other vulnerable groups reflects that the overarching principle of leaving no one behind underpins these priorities for action.
data.zh: 此外，还更加注重最不发达国家、内陆发展中国家和小岛屿发展中国家的需要，以确保这些国家在复苏努力中不会继续落后。

data.en: In addition, there is greater focus on the needs of least developed countries, landlocked developing countries and small island developing States to ensure that these countries do not continue to lag behind in recovery efforts.
data.zh: 促进人类福祉和能力的社会保护

data.en: The pandemic has also drawn attention to the need to harness the synergies between care, livelihoods and the environment through investments in jobs for women in public employment; improvements in pay and working conditions for care workers; enhanced social infrastructure, including through the use and repurposing of vacant facilities for essential services; and protecting women’s businesses against disasters and future pandemics.
data.zh: 采取措施促进妇女参与国家和地方复苏工作并发挥领导作用，以及增加她们在政治职位中的存在，对于实现所有可持续发展目标至关重要。

data.en: New and innovative approaches to drug prevention and treatment and related health and social services have been developed and some health systems have introduced or expanded e-health platforms and procedures to prevent drug abuse and provide medications, counselling and consultations, including telemedicine.
data.zh: 这些创新可能会在未来带来新的治疗策略。

data.en: As a result of COVID-19, national statistics offices abruptly halted in-person data collection in almost all countries, while data demand for policymaking and to inform the general public reached a new high.
data.zh: 移动电话数据、卫星图像和公民生成的数据等非传统来源以及网络或电话访谈或混合模式访谈等新的数据收集模式被用来填补数据空白。

data.en: Non-traditional sources, such as mobile telephone data, satellite imagery and citizen-generated data, along with new modes of data collection, such as web- or telephone-based or mix-mode interviews have been used to fill data gaps.
data.zh: 这些举措为更好地了解COVID-19危机对健康、就业、移民、暴力侵害妇女和一系列其他问题的原因和影响提供了所需的数据，全球统计界正在探索如何应用过去收集的知识和信息，以提供更好的数据，用于在未来几年保护和改善人类生活。

data.en: Such initiatives have provided the data needed to better understand the cause and effects of the COVID-19 crisis on health, jobs, migration, violence against women and a range of other issues and the global statistical community is exploring how the knowledge and information gathered from the past can be applied to provide better data that can be used to protect and improve human lives in the years ahead.
data.zh: 随着数字化趋势的发展，信通技术基础设施的发展以及科学、技术和创新的应用，如果这些技术力量得到负责任、包容性和符合道德的管理，似乎有希望在多个方面加速进步。

data.en: With the trend towards digitalization, the development of infrastructure for ICT, and application of science, technology and innovation, there appear to be promising opportunities to accelerate progress on multiple fronts, if those technological forces are managed responsibly, inclusively and ethically.
data.zh: 实现能源脱碳和普及的公正过渡

data.en: The concept of a just transition has expanded and diversified beyond the concerns of addressing job losses related to the shift to clean energy; broader issues of global climate justice, inequalities in consumption and emissions patterns and productive and financial capacities, and common but differentiated responsibilities are all relevant.
data.zh: 全球公正的过渡要求各国履行其气候承诺，并确保在这样做时，它们不会通过制造贸易壁垒或将较贫穷国家排除在与扩大新产品市场相关的机会之外而进一步落后。

data.en: Developing countries face significantly greater challenges and competing demands in securing a just transition.
data.zh: 对于在能源获取方面存在重大差距的国家——80%以上缺乏能源获取的人生活在撒哈拉以南非洲——以及对温室气体排放的增量微不足道的国家，确保人人获得负担得起、可靠和现代的能源服务，并确保能源供应与发展需要相称的目标(例如，支持经济发展和人类福祉的基础设施)，与放弃将化石燃料作为能源来源的目标相比，其重要性不能居于次要地位。

data.en: International mechanisms are needed for investments in sustainable energy infrastructure, clean energy and energy security, including measures for sustainable extraction and use of critical minerals.
data.zh: 过渡战略必须反映全球和区域供应链的结构，让整个供应链的相关工人和利益攸关方参与对话和决策。

data.en: To accelerate the energy transition, successful policies and initiatives driven by science, technology and innovation must focus on the use, scaling-up, development and production of green and renewable energy technologies.
data.zh: 创造一个扶持性环境，特别是在发展中国家，需要通过财政赠款、补贴和税收减免激励国内公司采用和生产绿色技术，并扩大服务以支持这些活动。

data.en: Creating an enabling environment, especially in developing countries, involves incentivizing domestic firms to adopt and produce green technologies through financial grants, subsidies and tax reliefs and extending services to support these activities.
data.zh: 绿色采购改革包括召集、交流信息、组织计划和行动以及与私营部门和非政府伙伴建立网络的国家协调机制，这些改革可以密切协调，提高对技术发展的认识，提供必要的技术教育和技能发展培训，并提高企业应用绿色技术的能力。

data.en: Green procurement reforms that include national coordination mechanisms to convene, exchange information, organize plans and actions and network with the private sector and non‑governmental partners can work in close coordination to raise awareness of technological development, provide necessary technical education and skills development training and increase firms’ capacity for applying green technologies.
data.zh: 围绕相互关联的问题开展创新，促进包容性和公正的经济

data.en: Science, technology and innovation strategies have an impact across critical sectors, such as agriculture, energy, environment, health, infrastructure development, mining, security and water.
data.zh: 处于数字化转型早期阶段的国家正在发现可再生能源技术以及可持续生产和消费前沿技术的增长机会。

data.en: Countries in the early stages of digital transition are discovering opportunities for growth in renewable energy technologies and frontier technologies for sustainable production and consumption.
data.zh: 以水为中心的联系办法成功地利用技术，通过太阳能慢速过滤系统在农村地区生产清洁水，同时提高公众卫生意识，促进发展当地工业、工程、采购和建筑能力，以加强水和卫生部门。

data.en: Some governments are undertaking economic and social reforms that provide direct support to investment in research, development and innovation to modernize existing industries, implement green innovation and increase inclusivity, for example by using retrofitting technologies to improve water and energy efficiency, promoting green industrialization, and creating an artificial intelligence institute for advanced manufacturing and new materials.
data.zh: 作为一项影响力很大的举措，3月举行的2023年联合国水事会议提出了以科学为基础的全球水资源评估，这将为应对水资源的供应、使用和质量方面的挑战提供一个知识基础和可行的解决方案，并满足社会和环境需要、投资机会和能力发展。

data.en: The global transition to low-carbon economies can be used strategically as an opportunity to reduce dependency on fossil fuel- and pollution-intensive exports, make production processes more efficient and advance structural transformation, avoiding the inequality-perpetuating traps of commodity dependence.
data.zh: 然而，必须解决发展中国家在利用这些机会方面面临的制约因素，包括生产和财政能力方面的制约因素，以及世界其他地区转型的影响。

data.en: As countries pick up the pace of their climate change mitigation strategies, the concept of a just transition must be applied to ensure that developed countries do not transfer the burden of the transition onto developing countries.
data.zh: 政策措施的制定方式有可能使发展中国家的中小企业处于不利地位。

data.en: There is a risk that policy measures are designed in ways that place small- and medium-sized enterprises in developing countries at a disadvantage.
data.zh: 与此同时，在气候行动中，发展中国家拥有开发具有全球意义的技术、产品和市场的关键资产。

data.en: Increasingly complex standards and reporting requirements should not constitute barriers to trade, excluding developing countries from effective participation in emerging value chains jeopardizing their current exports and further widening the technological divide.
data.zh: 然而，可持续性报告有助于重新分配财政资源用于可持续发展，特别是在最贫穷的国家，因为金融资本提供者越来越需要非金融信息，以加强其投资决策，降低其借贷和投资活动的风险。

data.en: New systems of technology co-development are needed that acknowledge the contribution of developing country markets in securing commercially viable scale for new technologies and enable the pooling of financial, human, technical and other resources and intellectual property rights, in a system of co-ownership of such intellectual property.
data.zh: 越来越多的妇女参与国际贸易，这为其他妇女开辟了新的经济机会，并转化为企业生产力和竞争力的提高、整体经济增长和所有人生计的改善。

data.en: More women are participating in international trade, which opens new economic opportunities for other women and translates into greater productivity and competitiveness for businesses, overall economic growth and improved livelihoods for all.
data.zh: 促进生物多样性和健康的基于自然的方法

data.en: The designation of the forest sector as an essential service provider has been common to all regions during the COVID-19 pandemic, which helped to keep most forest industries open and contributed to minimizing the negative impacts of measures to curb the spread of the disease.
data.zh: 事实证明，加大力度促进以森林为基础的可持续社会和经济活动，包括开发非木材森林产品、生态旅游和保护野生动植物，在制止和扭转毁林、支持生计、保护文化和保障森林周围人民健康方面具有倍增效应，还可能减少导致可能爆发人畜共患疾病的风险。

data.en: The integration of sustainable forest management and forest industries in recovery and build-back-better strategies from the pandemic also contributes to climate change mitigation and adaptation and combating loss of biodiversity and ecosystem services.
data.zh: 欧洲、北美和拉丁美洲国家似乎提供了一种高效率和有效的一体化办法，以加强森林在可持续发展中的作用和贡献。

data.en: Countries in Europe, North America and Latin America appear to offer an efficient and effective integration approach for enhancing the role and contribution of forests in sustainable development.
data.zh: 各区域的一个共同做法是利用数字技术进行通信、监视和监测、提供线上服务和电子商务。

data.en: A common practice in all regions has been the use of digital technology for communication, surveillance and monitoring, provision of online services and e-commerce.
data.zh: 在一些地区，开发了线上森林旅游，以提高对森林重要性的认识，并培养对疫情后生态旅游活动的兴趣。

data.en: The adoption of the Kunming-Montreal global biodiversity framework constitutes an ambitious commitment by the global community to accelerate actions that can transform the relationship between people and nature and enhance prevention of future pandemics.
data.zh: 它包括承诺以有效、及时和易于获取的方式，大幅度和逐步增加来自所有来源的财政资源，包括国内、国际、公共和私人资源。

data.en: Advancing the One Health approach will help prevent, detect, better prepare for and respond to crises. This collaborative, multi-sectoral and interdisciplinary approach addresses the inequities of global health by sustainably balancing and optimizing the health of people, animals, ecosystems and the wider environment, thereby reducing the risk of zoonotic disease emergence associated with international wildlife trade.
data.zh: 该方法也有助于提高对生物多样性丧失的驱动因素及其与传染病和非传染性疾病的出现和传播之间的联系的认识，并在现有最佳科学基础上优先考虑投资于自然和与人类健康有关的生态系统服务的重要性。

data.en: There has been progress made in including Indigenous Peoples in newly developed United Nations Sustainable Development Cooperation Frameworks and COVID-19 socioeconomic response plans, but inclusion of Indigenous Peoples in United Nations country programming consultations and development is uneven and a lack of disaggregated data perpetuates their invisibility.
data.zh: 土著人民是传统知识的主要管理者，他们参与编写共同国家评估和可持续发展合作框架对于有效协商十分重要。

data.en: Indigenous Peoples are the primary stewards of traditional knowledge, and their participation in the preparation of common country assessments, as well as the Sustainable Development Cooperation Frameworks, is important for effective consultation.
data.zh: 六.

data.en: VI.
data.zh: 《2030年可持续发展议程》执行中期形势评估

data.en: Against the background of the COVID-19 pandemic and within the respective areas addressed by their intergovernmental bodies, relevant entities offered their assessment of the situation at the midpoint of the implementation of the 2030 Agenda, emphasizing that the poorest and most vulnerable have been deeply affected by the pandemic, and efforts to eradicate poverty, end discrimination and reduce inequalities have been sidelined at a time when heightened policymaking should be intent on focusing on the most marginalized and disadvantaged.
data.zh: 需要做更多的工作，以增强人民作为可持续发展的积极推动者的权能，加强公众参与，保护个人、社会运动和基层组织免受抵制和压迫。

data.en: More needs to be done to empower people as active agents of sustainable development, reinforce public participation and protect individuals, social movements and grass-roots organizations from pushback and oppression.
data.zh: 对保持和平以及防止不稳定和冲突至关重要的信任已被恐惧和不确定性所削弱。

data.en: Aside from the impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic, the climate and conflict crises are causing upheaval and increasing calls for change.
data.zh: 2022年，因冲突、暴力和灾害而流离失所的人数达到近6 000万人，创下新的历史纪录。

data.en: The number of people living in displacement as a result of conflict, violence and disasters reached nearly 60 million people in 2022, marking a new historic record.
data.zh: 不信任、被排斥在决策之外、极端个人主义，加上全球疫情的后遗症，都削弱了社会凝聚力。

data.en: Mistrust, exclusion from decision-making and hyperindividualism combined with the after-effects of a global pandemic have all weakened social cohesion.
data.zh: 在经济不确定的时刻，对流动人口的态度变得更加两极分化。

data.en: Attitudes towards mobile populations become more polarized in moments of economic uncertainty.
data.zh: 全世界针对移民的仇外心理和歧视事件有所增加。

data.en: The compounded effects of the pandemic, climate change and conflict have reversed gender equality gains.
data.zh: 没有一个国家充分实现性别平等和增强妇女和女童权能，许多妇女和女童在其一生中遭受侵犯人权、多重和交叉形式的歧视、性暴力和性别暴力、脆弱性和边缘化。

data.en: No country has fully achieved gender equality and the empowerment of women and girls and many women and girls experience violations of their human rights, multiple and intersecting forms of discrimination, sexual and gender-based violence, vulnerability and marginalization throughout their life course.
data.zh: 在粮食安全和营养不良方面，男女之间先前存在的不平等加剧了，与男性相比，面临粮食不安全的女性增加了1.5亿，这一数字在2021年是2018年的8.4倍。

data.en: Pre-existing inequalities between men and women have been exacerbated in terms of food security and malnutrition, as underscored by the fact that 150 million more women face food insecurity compared to men, which is 8.4 times more in 2021 than in 2018.
data.zh: 此外，与男子和男童相比，生活在极端贫困中的妇女和女童多2 500万。

data.en: Furthermore, 25 million more women and girls live in extreme poverty compared to men and boys.
data.zh: 在此背景下，必须优先考虑促进性别平等、具有气候抗御力的可持续粮食方案，这些方案也要针对弱势妇女、残疾妇女和女童以及农村地区的妇女和女童。

data.en: In the post-pandemic period, there may be funding shortages and diversion of resources away from important initiatives, including those relating to drug prevention and treatment and related health and social services, alternative development and law enforcement.
data.zh: 应根据国内法律框架和国际文书和承诺规定的义务，采取适当措施，防止非法贩毒和非法贩运枪支。

data.en: Appropriate measures should be taken to prevent illicit drug trafficking and illicit trafficking in firearms, consistent with domestic legal frameworks and obligations under international instruments and commitments.
data.zh: 必须做更多的工作来加强预防犯罪，使刑事司法系统更加有效、负责、透明、包容和反应迅速，特别是通过促进数字化、多边合作和多利益攸关方伙伴关系，并特别关注发展中国家的技术和能力建设需要。

data.en: Progress towards economic recovery is also uneven.
data.zh: 大多数发展中国家的就业市场复苏缓慢，最不发达国家受到COVID-19疫情以及相关经济危机和环境灾难的严重影响。

data.en: Most developing countries have seen a slow recovery in the job market and least developed countries have been significantly affected by the COVID-19 pandemic, as well as related economic crises and environmental disasters.
data.zh: 对一些国家来说，债务可持续性岌岌可危，因为它们还面临着经济单一、结构转型困难和依赖外部援助等挑战。

data.en: Debt sustainability is at stake for some countries as they also grapple with the challenges of an undiversified economy, difficulties in moving towards structural transformation and dependency on external assistance.
data.zh: 人们担心，建议毕业的国家的情况总体恶化，可能会阻碍它们取得进展。

data.en: Because the financing gap for the Sustainable Development Goals has widened, primarily in the countries already furthest behind, efforts must be made now to move beyond official development assistance, mobilize domestic resources, facilitate access to concessional finance and develop inclusive partnerships can be supported by South-South and triangular cooperation and engagement with the private sector and multilateral development banks.
data.zh: 令人鼓舞的是，许多国家制定了综合国家筹资框架，以根据包容性和负责任的治理和协调制度、加强国家能力和公共财政管理、将筹资战略与国家发展优先事项挂钩以及确保强有力的监测等原则实现可持续发展优先事项。

data.en: With so many setbacks and uncertainties in recent years, crisis governance is becoming the new normal.
data.zh: 日益严重的自然灾害和气候变化的其他后果、生物多样性丧失、砍伐森林、土地退化、不可持续的消费和生产做法、日益严重的不平等、侵犯人权行为、冲突和腐败，都是人们熟悉的挑战，它们继续阻挠可持续发展的进展。

data.en: The changes wrought by ongoing or worsening environmental, social and economic instability in the coming years will require that effective short-term humanitarian relief measures are balanced with and underpinned by long-term planning, strategic thinking and foresight that results in a rapid upgrade of risk management in government and its integration into Sustainable Development Goal-related coordination mechanisms, such as centres of government or other piloting structures.
data.zh: 提高对森林、海洋和其他生态系统及其所支持的生命的社会、经济和环境惠益的认识，对于利用各种避免生态灾难的努力至关重要。

data.en: Social policies and action have a key role to play in addressing the immediate effects of socioeconomic crises and in the design of recovery strategies.
data.zh: 因此，应培训公职人员对不同问题采用不同的治理办法，根据情况的需要混合使用各种办法并在各种办法之间进行转换。

data.en: Different governance approaches are needed to address different problems, mixing approaches and switching between them according to the requirements of the situation.
data.zh: 如果政府将过多注意力集中在被称为危机的问题上，并采取相关的预算支出和监管紧急措施，议会和包括民间社会、工商界和学术界在内的社会利益攸关方应加强和组织其作为抗衡力量的作用，助力各级政府保持长远视角和承担责任，并不偏离实现可持续发展目标的轨道。

data.en: Developing countries, in particular least developed countries and small island developing States, face challenging financial situations that severely limit their capacity to ensure economic recovery and invest in climate resilience.
data.zh: 为避免不可持续的债务负担和气候脆弱性的加剧，必须使经济和公共财政能够抵御气候变化。

data.en: Climate-proofing the economy and public finances is necessary to avoid unsustainable debt burdens and increasing climate vulnerability.
data.zh: 在这方面，需要承认发达国家的气候债务。

data.en: In this context, there needs to be recognition of the climate debt of developed countries.
data.zh: 100. 投资于小企业至关重要，因为它们构成了推动最不发达国家贸易主导型发展的沉默的大多数，目前正在采取举措，围绕青年、性别、绿色和数字连通性、创新和新伙伴关系等战略优先事项，以解决结构性障碍，加强执行手段，包括促进性别平等的公共采购和改善进入数字经济的机会。

data.en: 100. It will be critical to invest in the small businesses that constitute a silent majority that drive trade-led development in least developed countries, and initiatives are under way with strategic priorities around youth, gender, green and digital connectivity, innovation and new partnerships to address structural barriers and strengthen means of implementation, including gender-responsive public procurement and improving access to the digital economy.
data.zh: 101. 这场疫情有可能彻底破坏本已举步维艰的国家统计系统，并唤醒人们认识到需要加强统计和信通技术基础。

data.en: 101. The pandemic threatened to completely undermine national statistical systems that were already struggling and provided a wake-up call to the need for stronger statistical and ICT foundations.
data.zh: 例如，为了了解病毒的影响，公共卫生当局需要及时的分类死亡统计数据。

data.en: In seeking to understand the impact of the virus, for example, public health authorities needed timely and disaggregated death statistics.
data.zh: 大多数国家仍然没有每月死亡率数据。

data.en: Monthly mortality data are still not available in a majority of countries.
data.zh: 此外，许多国家仍然缺乏远程开展日常工作的信通技术基础设施，许多国家、特别是最需要的国家削减了用于统计活动的国内外资金。

data.en: Moreover, many countries still lack the ICT infrastructure to carry out their daily work remotely and domestic and external funding for statistical activities has been cut back in many countries, particularly those that need it most.
data.zh: 这场危机正在帮助塑造官方统计创新的未来，各国正在探索新的数据来源，实现信通技术基础设施的现代化，并吸取关于全面包容性数据重要性的经验教训。

data.en: The crisis is helping to shape the future of innovation in official statistics, with countries exploring new data sources, modernizing ICT infrastructure and taking lessons learned on the importance of fully inclusive data going forward.
data.zh: 此外，政府机构、学术机构、地方政府、私营企业和民间社会组织为收集决策所急需的数据而结成的伙伴关系有助于培养新的想法和资源，并提高所收集数据的包容性、及时性和利用率。

data.en: In addition, the partnerships formed among government agencies, academic institutions, local governments, private businesses and civil society organizations to collect urgently needed data for policymaking helped to foster new ideas and resources, as well as increase the inclusivity, timeliness and utilization of the data collected.
data.zh: 102. 发展中国家的国家统计局需要得到其政府和国际社会的支持，以确保他们能够培养技能并拥有足够的资源来编制官方统计数据，这些数据是实现可持续发展目标的数字政策的关键投入。

data.en: 102. National statistical offices in developing countries need the support of their governments and the international community to ensure that they can build skills and have sufficient resources to produce official statistics that are key inputs to digital policies for achieving the Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 衡量信通技术促进发展伙伴关系的知识和能力建设资源也提供给发展中国家的国家统计局、监管机构和决策者。

data.en: The knowledge and capacity-building resources of the Partnership on Measuring ICT for Development are also available to national statistical offices, regulators and policymakers from developing countries.
data.zh: 七.

data.en: VII.
data.zh: 关于加快冠状病毒病(COVID-19)疫后复苏和在各级全面落实《2030年可持续发展议程》的若干建议

data.en: Selected recommendations for accelerating recovery from the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic and the full implementation of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development at all levels
data.zh: 103. 经济及社会理事会各职司委员会和其他政府间机构和论坛在提交的文件中提出了下列加快复苏的建议。
