data.zh: 儿基会人道主义行动年度报告

data.en: Annual report on UNICEF humanitarian action
data.zh: 摘要

data.en: Summary
data.zh: 2022年，人道主义需求继续大幅增长，约有2.74亿人因冲突、气候变化、各种灾害和公共卫生突发事件及其复合影响而需要援助。

data.en: Humanitarian needs continued to grow significantly in 2022, with approximately 274 million people requiring assistance because of conflict, climate change, disasters and public health emergencies and their compounding effects.
data.zh: 本报告介绍了儿童的人道主义状况，以及儿基会如何在地方、区域和全球层面与合作伙伴一起拯救生命、保护童年并确保儿童权利得到维护。

data.en: The present report describes the humanitarian situation of children and how UNICEF engaged with partners at the local, regional and global levels to save lives, protect childhoods and ensure that children’s rights were upheld.
data.zh: 本报告还提供了与关于儿基会的群组牵头机构/共同牵头机构作用的第二次评价（CLARE II）有关的管理回应行动的最新执行情况。

data.en: It also provides a progress update on the implementation of the management response actions linked to the second evaluation of the UNICEF role as cluster lead/co-lead agency (CLARE II).
data.zh: 供审议的决定草案要点载于第十节。
说明：本文件全文由儿基会负责处理。

data.en: Note: The present document was processed in its entirety by UNICEF.
data.zh: 概述

data.en: Overview
data.zh: 2022年，气候变化和冲突使许多儿童的生活状况恶化。

data.en: Climate change and conflict shaped many children’s lives for the worse in 2022.
data.zh: 洪水、风暴、干旱、战争、地方和区域冲突以及其他形式的暴力对儿童的安全、儿童的健康和暴露于传染病的风险、儿童的营养状况、儿童的受教育机会、儿童的环境和获得安全饮用水的机会以及儿童留在自己家里和社区的能力都产生了负面影响。

data.en: Flooding, storms, drought, war, local and regional conflict and other forms of violence negatively impacted children’s safety; their health and exposure to communicable diseases; their nutritional status; their access to education; their environment and access to safe water; and their ability to stay in their homes and communities.
data.zh: 儿基会通过与各国政府和其他伙伴合作履行其任务，能够抗衡上述力量，因而在人道主义环境中取得了以下成果：

data.en: Delivering on its mandate by working with Governments and other partners, UNICEF was able to be a counterweight to the forces described above, achieving the following results in humanitarian settings:
data.zh: 为3940万人提供清洁用水和卫生设施；

data.en: Clean water and sanitation for 39.4 million people;
data.zh: 为2720万名6个月至15岁的儿童接种麻疹疫苗；

data.en: Measles vaccinations for 27.2 million children aged 6 months to 15 years;
data.zh: 为严重消瘦和其他形式的严重急性营养不良提供早期检测和治疗服务，惠及1.146亿名5岁以下儿童；

data.en: Services for the early detection and treatment of severe wasting and other forms of severe acute malnutrition benefiting 114.6 million children under 5 years of age;
data.zh: 为1860万名儿童提供受教育机会；

data.en: Access to education for 18.6 million children;
data.zh: 为1260万名儿童和家庭提供基于社区的精神卫生和社会心理支持服务，并为880万名儿童和妇女提供旨在预防性别暴力和支持幸存者的干预措施；

data.en: Community-based mental health and psychosocial support services for 12.6 million children and families, and interventions designed to prevent gender-based violence and support survivors for 8.8 million children and women;
data.zh: 为4920万名儿童和成人 提供了安全而便捷的渠道，以报告向受影响人口提供援助的人道主义、发展、保护和/或其他人员的性剥削和性虐待行为；

data.en: Access of 49.2 million children and adults to a safe and accessible channel to report sexual exploitation and abuse by humanitarian, development, protection and/or other personnel who provide assistance to affected populations;
data.zh: 为280万户家庭提供人道主义现金援助；

data.en: Humanitarian cash assistance for 2.8 million households;
data.zh: 领导或共同领导营养、教育和水、环境卫生和个人卫生（水卫项目）人道主义群组以及儿童保护责任领域；

data.en: Leadership or co-leadership of the nutrition, education and water, sanitation and hygiene (WASH) humanitarian clusters and the child protection area of responsibility;
data.zh: 交付了价值8.639亿美元的用品（不包括2019冠状病毒病疫苗），以防范或应对紧急情况。

data.en: Delivery of $863.9 million worth of supplies (excluding COVID-19 vaccines) in preparation for or in response to emergencies.
data.zh: 儿基会在2022年人道主义行动造福儿童呼吁中收到了42.5亿美元的人道主义资金。

data.en: UNICEF received $4.25 billion in humanitarian funding against the 2022 Humanitarian Action for Children appeal.
data.zh: 该呼吁在2021年12月启动时，呼吁筹集94亿美元，但到2022年底，总需求已升至117.4亿美元。

data.en: At its launch in December 2021, the appeal called for $9.4 billion but, by the end of 2022, the total requirement had risen to $11.74 billion.
data.zh: 尽管存在严重的制约因素，包括冲突各方的行为、对人道主义工作者的干涉和威胁、迅速扩大的需求和大量资金被指定用途，儿基会还是取得了成果，并加强了成为儿童的更好合作伙伴的能力。

data.en: Despite critical constraints, including the conduct of parties to conflict, interference and threats to humanitarian workers, rapidly expanding needs and heavy earmarking of funding, UNICEF was able to achieve results and strengthen its capacity to be a better partner for children.
data.zh: 这意味着加强全球伙伴关系；扩大与作为社会变革者的青少年的合作；在将残疾儿童纳入人道主义应对计划和在其人道主义行动中促进性别平等方面取得进展；促进预见性行动和防范工作；为对民众和社区以及儿基会的气候足迹有影响的人道主义行动的可持续性投资和创新开辟道路。

data.en: This meant enhancing global partnerships; expanding work with adolescents and youth as changemakers in their societies; making progress on including children with disabilities in humanitarian response plans and in fostering gender equality in its humanitarian action; promoting anticipatory action and preparedness; and laying out a pathway for investment and innovation in sustainability in humanitarian action that is impactful for people and communities and for the organization’s climate footprint.
data.zh: 儿基会还在执行CLARE II评价的主要建议方面取得了进展。

data.en: UNICEF also advanced on key recommendations of the CLARE II evaluation.
data.zh: 展望未来，儿基会将深化其对影响儿童的气候变化和气候事件的应对措施，并将牵头开展预防饥荒的多部门应对措施，以预防、发现和治疗儿童消瘦。

data.en: Looking ahead, UNICEF will deepen its response to climate change and climatic events that impact children, and will lead a multisectoral response to famine prevention to prevent, detect and treat child wasting.
data.zh: 儿基会将继续促进包容和性别平等；增强群组领导能力；完善对突发公共卫生事件的应对措施；发展其预见性行动实践；并呼吁灵活供资——所有这些都是为了更好地维护生活在人道主义危机中的儿童的权利。

data.en: UNICEF will continue to foster inclusion and gender equity; enhance cluster leadership capacity; refine its response to public health emergencies; evolve its anticipatory action practices; and call for flexible funding – all to better uphold the rights of children living through humanitarian crises.
data.zh: 导言

data.en: Introduction
data.zh: 洪水滔天

data.en: The deluge
data.zh: 气候变化和冲突对数百万儿童来说意味着真实的洪灾：洪水和暴力浪潮、流离失所、泥石流和干旱、饥饿和痛苦。

data.en: Climate change and conflict have meant for millions of children a literal deluge: waves of flooding and violence, displacement, mudslides and drought, hunger and distress.
data.zh: 气候变化和冲突还破坏了各国政府和社区在改善儿童福祉方面取得的进展，包括在实现可持续发展目标方面取得的全球进展，可持续发展目标的承诺将于2030年到期，现在仅剩下短短七年时间。

data.en: They have also undermined progress by Governments and communities in improving child well-being, including global progress towards achieving the Sustainable Development Goals, whose promises come due in 2030, just seven short years away.
data.zh: 这份关于儿基会人道主义行动的年度报告揭示了这些危机在2022年是如何影响儿童权利的。

data.en: This annual report on UNICEF humanitarian action shows how these crises impinged upon children’s rights in 2022.
data.zh: 本报告突出强调了许多人道主义危机中一些需要关注的危机。

data.en: It spotlights some of the (many) humanitarian crises that required attention.
data.zh: 概述中提供了2022年为儿童取得的总体结果。

data.en: Overall results for children in 2022 are provided in the overview.
data.zh: 本报告的其余部分列举了指示性的例子，说明儿基会、各国政府和数以千计的其他合作伙伴如何在地方、区域和全球层面努力成为与时代环境势均力敌的力量：拯救生命、恢复和尊重童年、增强社区权能和保护儿童的未来。

data.en: The remainder of the report provides indicative examples of how UNICEF, Governments and thousands of other partners worked locally, regionally and globally to be an equal and opposite force to the circumstances of the time: saving lives, restoring and honouring childhoods, empowering communities and protecting children’s futures.
data.zh: 2022年的人道主义局势

data.en: The humanitarian situation in 2022
data.zh: 总体而言，2022年儿童的人道主义状况不同于前几年（疫情年代），其不同之处更多在于规模而非实质。

data.en: Broadly speaking, the humanitarian situation of children in 2022 differed from that of the previous few years (the ‘pandemic years’) in ways more linked to scale than to substance.
data.zh: 2022年10月，英国《金融时报》在一篇社论中为当前时代重新定义了“多重危机”（polycrisis）一词， 恰当地反映了这一年中冲突、气候、能源、经济和其他挑战的混合特点。

data.en: The term ‘polycrisis’, re-coined for the current era in an editorial in The Financial Times in October 2022, aptly captured the mix of conflict, climate, energy, economic and other challenges that characterized the year.
data.zh: “更多”的故事

data.en: A story of ‘more’
data.zh: 2022年，总共约有2.74亿人需要人道主义援助，而2021年为2.35亿人。

data.en: Altogether, approximately 274 million people required humanitarian assistance in 2022, up from 235 million in 2021.
data.zh: 尽管这一数字高得令人震惊，但仍少于预计2023年需要此类援助的3.39亿人。

data.en: However shockingly high, this is nonetheless fewer than the 339 million people who are expected to require such assistance in 2023.
data.zh: 2022年的人道主义故事是一个“更多”的故事：更多的流离失所（全球创纪录的1.03亿人流离失所）； 霍乱和冠状病毒疾病（2019冠状病毒病）等流行病造成了更多的死亡； 由于更多的干旱和其他因素，更多的儿童面临消瘦的风险； 更多的洪水（例如，乍得的降雨量创30年新高，巴基斯坦三分之一的地区被淹）；更多的儿童生活在多维贫困中。

data.en: The humanitarian story of 2022 was one of ‘more’: more displacement (a record 103 million people displaced globally); more mortality from such epidemics as cholera and the coronavirus disease (COVID-19); more children at risk of wasting owing to more drought and other factors; more flooding (e.g., rainfall in Chad at a 30-year high, one third of Pakistan under water); and more children living in multidimensional poverty.
data.zh: 冲突和暴力继续助长人们在2022年产生的大部分人道主义需求，影响到儿基会派驻人员的所有地区的数百万儿童，例如在埃塞俄比亚，北部的一场蔓延的冲突只是威胁数百万人的多个相互重叠的危险之一；在也门，冲突已经持续了8年多。

data.en: Conflict and violence continued to drive much of the humanitarian need that people experienced in 2022, affecting millions of children in all regions where UNICEF is present, such as in Ethiopia, where a sprawling conflict in the north is only one of multiple, overlapping hazards that put millions at risk; and in Yemen, where conflict has endured for more than eight years.
data.zh: 乌克兰战争在2022年催生了一个充满痛苦和需求的全球生态系统（并持续到2023年），首先是乌克兰境内和许多人寻求避难的国家里有2730万人（包括710万名儿童）需要援助。

data.en: The war in Ukraine spawned an entire global ecosystem of suffering and need in 2022 (and ongoing into 2023), starting with the 27.3 million people (including 7.1 million children) who required assistance both within Ukraine and in the countries where many sought refuge.
data.zh: 作为副产品，这场冲突还对全球数百万人产生了灾难性影响，战争是造成他们饥饿的主要因素，因为粮食运输减少（例如，战前乌克兰小麦和种子油的出口量分别占全球的13.4%和40.4%）； 他们越来越买不起食物，甚至无法获得食物； 而且燃料价格上涨。

data.en: This conflict has also had, as a biproduct, a disastrous effect on many millions of people globally, for whom the war has been a central factor in hunger brought about by diminished food shipments (pre-war, for example, Ukraine had supplied 13.4 per cent of global wheat exports and 40.4 per cent of global seed oil exports); increasing unaffordability – tipping into unavailability – of food; and higher fuel prices.
data.zh: 这些情况增加了全球贫困家庭和儿童的数量 ，加剧了儿童的饥饿，使现有的全球营养危机变得更加严重。

data.en: These circumstances increased the number of families and children living in poverty globally and deepened children’s hunger, making an existing global nutrition crisis worse.
data.zh: 截至2022年底，全球共有6000万名儿童面临严重营养不良的风险， 比2021年高出27%。

data.en: All told, 60 million children globally were at risk of being acutely malnourished by the end of 2022, 27 per cent more than in 2021.
data.zh: 2022年，全球有数亿人遭受了气候变化的不利影响。

data.en: Hundreds of millions of people globally experienced the adverse effects of climate change in 2022.
data.zh: 与气候相关的灾害和条件造成或恶化了很大一部分人道主义需求，每天迫使26900多名儿童背井离乡，并造成健康和营养、教育、保护和参与方面的各种危机。

data.en: Climate-related disasters and conditions either caused or worsened a substantial portion of humanitarian need, uprooted more than 26,900 children each day and caused crises in health and nutrition, education, protection and participation.
data.zh: 乌克兰战争也导致了欧洲大陆人口大规模流动，这是自二战以来欧洲最大的一次人口流动。

data.en: The war in Ukraine also caused a great ebb and flow of people on the European continent, one that surpassed anything seen there since the Second World War.
data.zh: 记录显示，2022年2月24日至9月初，乌克兰有1230万人出国，550多万人回国。

data.en: Between 24 February and early September 2022, 12.3 million movements out of the country were recorded, along with more than 5.5 million movements back into the country.
data.zh: 截至2022年底，约790万乌克兰难民入境其他欧洲国家。

data.en: Around 7.9 million refugees from Ukraine were recorded in other European countries by the end of 2022.
data.zh: 截至2022年12月初，乌克兰有590万境内流离失所者，其中三分之二以上是妇女。

data.en: And as of early December 2022, there were 5.9 million people internally displaced, more than two thirds of them women.
data.zh: 在世界各地，成人继续在战争和冲突中伤害儿童。

data.en: Globally, adults continued to harm children in the context of war and conflict.
data.zh: 2021年是有完整数据的最近一年，联合国核实了23982起严重侵害儿童的事件，影响到19165名儿童（13633名男童，5242名女童，290名性别不明的儿童）。

data.en: In 2021, the most recent year for which complete data are available, the United Nations verified 23,982 grave violations against children, affecting 19,165 children (13,633 boys, 5,242 girls, 290 sex unknown).
data.zh: 2022年，人道主义准入（民众获得服务，人道主义行为者接触需要援助的人）在许多地方都被证明充满挑战性，与前几年并无不同。

data.en: Humanitarian access (of people to services, and of humanitarian actors to those who required assistance) proved challenging in many places in 2022, not unlike previous years.
data.zh: 截至2022年10月，30多个国家存在高度至极度人道主义准入限制。

data.en: More than 30 countries recorded high to extreme access constraints through October 2022.
data.zh: 厄立特里亚、埃塞俄比亚、缅甸和也门这4个国家被归类为存在极度人道主义准入限制的国家；包括阿富汗、布基纳法索、马里、索马里、南苏丹、阿拉伯叙利亚共和国和乌克兰在内的17个国家被归类为存在非常高人道主义准入限制的国家。

data.en: Four countries – Eritrea, Ethiopia, Myanmar and Yemen – were classified as having extreme access constraints; 17 countries – among them Afghanistan, Burkina Faso, Mali, Somalia, South Sudan, the Syrian Arab Republic and Ukraine – were classified as having very high access constraints.
data.zh: 最后，三大全球顶头风——地缘政治、经济和环境——预计将左右未来几年，事实上也将影响本世纪20年代的剩余时间 ，对儿童，特别是已经生活在人道主义危机中或易受人道主义危机影响的儿童的生活产生深远影响。

data.en: Finally, three global headwinds – geopolitical, economic and environmental – are expected to shape the coming years and, in fact, the remainder of the 2020s, with a profound impact on the lives of children, and especially those already living in, or vulnerable to, humanitarian crises.
data.zh: 儿基会2022年的人道主义响应行动

data.en: UNICEF humanitarian response in 2022
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会在128个方案国共应对了442起新的或正在发生的人道主义危机，而2021年在153个国家共应对了455起危机。

data.en: UNICEF responded to a total of 442 new or ongoing humanitarian crises in 128 programme countries in 2022, compared with 455 crises in 153 countries in 2021.
data.zh: 相关应对措施均符合《人道主义行动造福儿童的核心承诺》。

data.en: Responses were aligned with the Core Commitments for Children in Humanitarian Action.
data.zh: 被定为3级紧急情况的危机包括在阿富汗、埃塞俄比亚、非洲之角（2022年9月从2级升为3级）、乌克兰和也门的危机，以及2019冠状病毒病危机（至2022年7月1日）。

data.en: Crises designated as Level 3 emergencies included those in Afghanistan, Ethiopia, the Horn of Africa (elevated from Level 2 to Level 3 in September 2022), Ukraine and Yemen, as well as COVID-19 (until 1 July 2022).
data.zh: 2级紧急情况包括在海地、马达加斯加、莫桑比克、缅甸、巴基斯坦、萨赫勒地区、乌干达和乌克兰难民外流国的紧急情况。

data.en: Level 2 emergencies included those in Haiti, Madagascar, Mozambique, Myanmar, Pakistan, the Sahel region, Uganda and the Ukraine refugee outflow countries.
data.zh: 冲突各方的行为趋势令人深感关切，影响到平民和民用基础设施以及援助人员，也决定了儿基会的应对措施。

data.en: The UNICEF response was shaped by deeply concerning trends in the conduct of parties to conflict, affecting civilians and civilian infrastructure as well as aid workers.
data.zh: 缺乏对国际人道主义法和人道主义准入的尊重不仅导致需求增加，还阻碍了对人道主义需求的响应，并阻碍了对平民，特别是对儿童的保护。

data.en: Lack of respect for international humanitarian law and humanitarian access not only led to growing needs, but also hampered the response to humanitarian needs and hindered the protection of civilians, in particular children.
data.zh: 持续违反国际人道主义法的行为妨碍了援助人员的行动能力，同时针对他们的干涉、威胁和暴力行为也有所增加。

data.en: Persistent violations of international humanitarian law impeded the ability of aid workers to operate, while interference, threats and violence against them increased.
data.zh: 随着2022年需要援助的人员大幅增加，国际人道主义援助和资金捉襟见肘，缺乏灵活性，无法满足日益增长的需求，也无法快速扩大和调整人道主义应对措施。

data.en: With the significant increase in people in need in 2022, international humanitarian assistance and financing were stretched and lacked the flexibility to keep up with the growing needs and allow rapid scale-up and adaptation of humanitarian responses.
data.zh: 不成比例的专用资金和援助条件（尽管世界人道主义峰会承诺灵活供资），以及制裁和反恐措施造成的不利后果，仍然是持续全年的重大挑战。

data.en: Disproportionately earmarked funding and aid conditionalities (despite the World Humanitarian Summit commitments to flexible funding), along with the adverse consequences of sanctions and counterterrorism measures, remained significant challenges throughout the year.
data.zh: 尽管面临这些限制，儿基会仍然保持了稳定的人道主义存在，得以确保在发生紧急情况时及时部署人员，做出快速反应。

data.en: Despite these constraints, UNICEF maintained a steady humanitarian presence and was able to ensure timely deployment of personnel at the onset of emergencies for a rapid response.
data.zh: 儿基会人道主义行动人力资源战略包括从直接支助向长期人员配置需求的过渡，以及缩减战略。

data.en: The UNICEF human resources strategy for humanitarian action covers the transition from immediate support to longer-term staffing needs, as well as a scale-down strategy.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会通过内外部快速增援机制共进行了709次部署。

data.en: A total of 709 deployments were made from both internal and external surge structures in 2022.
data.zh: 内部增援机制向39个国家提供了支持，其中22名应急小组成员进行了55次部署，另有359名工作人员进行了386次部署。

data.en: Internal surge mechanisms provided support to 39 countries, with 22 Emergency Response Team members carrying out 55 deployments and another 359 staff members undertaking 386 deployments.
data.zh: 儿基会还受益于通过外部快速增援机制向61个国家办事处、区域办事处和总部办事处进行的268次部署（198次通过备用伙伴机制部署，70次通过快速反应小组部署）。

data.en: UNICEF also benefited from 268 deployments via external surge mechanisms to 61 country, regional and headquarters offices (198 deployments through the standby partner mechanism, 70 through the Rapid Response Team).
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会与世界卫生组织、各国政府和其他合作伙伴合作，为受突发公共卫生事件影响的儿童和家庭提供了一系列服务和支持，包括在人道主义环境中。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF, working with the World Health Organization, Governments and other partners, provided an array of services and support for children and families affected by public health emergencies, including in humanitarian settings.
data.zh: 共有142个国家办事处对疫情或其他突发公共卫生事件作出响应，其中包括埃博拉病毒病和马尔堡病毒病疫情；霍乱疫情，包括在持续的人道主义危机中发生的霍乱疫情（截至2022年底，高达30个国家暴发了霍乱，这是前所未有的）；麻疹疫情；以及三起国际关注的突发公共卫生事件（2019冠状病毒病、猴痘和脊髓灰质炎）。

data.en: A total of 142 country offices responded to outbreaks or other public health emergencies, among them outbreaks of Ebola virus disease and Marburg virus disease; cholera outbreaks, including in ongoing humanitarian crises (an unprecedented 30 countries had experienced cholera outbreaks by the end of 2022); measles outbreaks; and three public health emergencies of international concern (COVID-19, mpox and polio).
data.zh: 区域和国家办事处提出的为公共卫生应急响应提供初步支持的所有请求都在48小时内得到了总部的协助。

data.en: All requests from regional and country offices for initial support for a public health emergency response received headquarters assistance within 48 hours.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会供应司向处于紧急情况中的儿童提供了创纪录的救生用品——为应对140个国家的紧急情况提供了价值超过8.639亿美元的用品（包括用于应对2019冠状病毒病的用品，但不包括2019冠状病毒病疫苗），其中57.4%用于2级和3级紧急情况，其余42.6%用于其他紧急情况。阿富汗和乌克兰收到的紧急用品价值最高。从全球来看，营养品是最大的紧急商品类别之一，价值1.27亿美元。

data.en: The UNICEF Supply Division delivered a record level of life-saving supplies to children in emergencies in 2022 – more than $863.9 million worth of supplies (including supplies for the COVID-19 response, but excluding COVID-19 vaccines) for emergencies in 140 countries, with 57.4 per cent going to Level 2 and Level 3 emergencies and the remaining 42.6 per cent going to other emergencies. Afghanistan and Ukraine received the highest value of emergency supplies. Globally, nutrition supplies were one of the largest emergency commodity groups, valued at $127 million.
data.zh: 儿基会克服了供应链上日益增加的压力、不断上涨的运费和运输瓶颈，通过与合作伙伴协作和优化其全球网络的仓库运作，确保了各类用品的及时交付。

data.en: Overcoming increasing pressure on supply chains, rising freight costs and bottlenecks, UNICEF ensured the timely delivery of supplies by collaborating with partners and by optimizing warehouse operations across its global network.
data.zh: 供应司还与国家办事处合作，在当地预先储备用品，并建设准备和应对能力，包括应对突发公共卫生事件的能力。

data.en: The Supply Division also worked with country offices to pre-position supplies locally and build capacity for preparedness and response, including for public health emergencies.
data.zh: 供应司通过向包括阿富汗、巴基斯坦和乌克兰在内的17个紧急地点进行59次紧急部署，提供了直接支持。

data.en: The Division provided direct support through 59 emergency deployments to 17 emergency locations, including Afghanistan, Pakistan and Ukraine.
data.zh: 2022年，在从印度尼西亚的救灾到阿富汗和乌克兰的冲突应对等人道主义背景下，儿基会扩大了年轻人的声音和行动。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF amplified young people’s voices and actions in humanitarian contexts – from disaster response in Indonesia to conflict responses in Afghanistan and Ukraine.
data.zh: 儿基会通过各类方案使89个国家的1600多万青少年参与其中，其中超过34万人参与了人道主义行动。

data.en: The organization engaged more than 16 million adolescents in 89 countries through UNICEF programmes, with more than 340,000 of them engaged in humanitarian action.
data.zh: 青少年表达和创新工具包——在安全空间和儿童保护、教育、精神卫生和社会心理支持倡议中实施——为30多个国家的90多万名青少年提供了支持。

data.en: The Adolescent Kit for Expression and Innovation – implemented in safe spaces and in child protection, education and mental health and psychosocial support initiatives – supported more than 900,000 adolescents in more than 30 countries.
data.zh: 2022年，在发出“人道主义行动造福儿童”呼吁的国家办事处中，有65%的办事处将残疾儿童系统地纳入其应对工作，而2021年这一比例为55%。

data.en: Sixty-five per cent of country offices with a Humanitarian Action for Children appeal systematically included children with disabilities in their response efforts in 2022, compared with 55 per cent in 2021.
data.zh: 推动这一进展的是正在进行的将残疾儿童纳入备灾、需求评估和数据收集进程的努力，以及对跨部门方案编制的重视。

data.en: This progress was driven by the ongoing inclusion of children with disabilities in preparedness, needs assessment and data-collection processes and by an emphasis on cross-sectoral programming.
data.zh: 例如，儿基会侧重于加强全纳教育国家系统，并将其与水卫项目以及营养服务联系起来。

data.en: UNICEF focused on strengthening national systems for inclusive education and linking them to WASH and nutrition services, for example.
data.zh: 儿基会还提供辅助技术，努力保护残疾儿童免受暴力和剥削，并促进他们参与社区决策。

data.en: UNICEF also provided assistive technology and worked to protect children with disabilities from violence and exploitation and to foster their participation in decision-making in their communities.
data.zh: 儿基会通过将关键内容纳入自身的人道主义学习框架、推出包容残疾的人道主义行动工具包，以及通过简短的提示单、实用工具和能力建设包提供关于如何将残疾儿童纳入人道主义应急行动的业务指南，加强了其在包容残疾的人道主义行动方面的机构能力。

data.en: UNICEF enhanced its institutional capacity for disability-inclusive humanitarian action by integrating critical content into the agency’s humanitarian learning framework and by rolling out the Disability-Inclusive Humanitarian Action Tool Kit, and operational guidance on including children with disabilities in humanitarian response through short tip sheets, practical tools and capacity-building packages.
data.zh: 儿基会继续领导机构间努力，加强将残疾问题纳入人道主义需求概览和人道主义应对计划，取得了实质性进展，特别是在数据收集和使用方面。

data.en: UNICEF continued to lead inter-agency efforts to strengthen disability inclusion in humanitarian needs overviews and humanitarian response plans, resulting in substantial progress, particularly on collection and use of data.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会针对每个3级紧急情况部署了多名区域性别平等问题顾问、一名性别平等应急小组专家或一名紧急情况中的性别平等专家。

data.en: UNICEF deployed regional gender advisers, a gender emergency response team specialist or a gender in emergencies specialist to every Level 3 emergency in 2022.
data.zh: 这有助于确保儿基会的应对工作在性别平等承诺的指导下进行。

data.en: This helped to ensure that gender commitments guided the organization’s response.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会在人道主义应急行动中加大了防止性剥削和性虐待的力度。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF scaled up efforts on the protection from sexual exploitation and abuse during its humanitarian responses.
data.zh: 做出人道主义响应的国家办事处中，有89%充分建立了性剥削和性虐待报告系统，并确保向合作伙伴提供能力建设支持。

data.en: Eighty-nine percent of country offices with a humanitarian response had sexual exploitation and abuse reporting systems fully in place and have ensured capacity-building support to their partners.
data.zh: 在儿基会的所有方案和行动中，防止性剥削和性虐待的保护和应对系统，包括基于社区的举报渠道，都得到了扩大。

data.en: Protection from sexual exploitation and abuse and response systems, including community-based reporting channels, were scaled up throughout UNICEF programmes and operations.
data.zh: 因此，2022年，在80个制定了人道主义应对措施的国家方案中，至少向3170万名儿童和成人提供了性剥削和性虐待举报渠道。

data.en: As a result, at least 31.7 million children and adults in 80 country programmes with a humanitarian response were provided access to sexual exploitation and abuse reporting channels in 2022.
data.zh: 作为对以幸存者为中心的方针的承诺的一部分，儿基会向人道主义国家工作队和机构间防止性剥削和性虐待协调员和网络提供培训，以推广《联合国关于向性剥削和性虐待受害者提供援助的规程》。

data.en: As part of the commitment to a survivor-centred approach, UNICEF provided training to humanitarian country teams and inter-agency on protection from sexual exploitation and abuse coordinators and networks to roll out the United Nations Protocol on the Provision of Assistance to Victims of Sexual Exploitation and Abuse.
data.zh: 儿基会还支持机构间人道主义系统生成数据和证据，以跟踪和监测旨在防止性剥削和性虐待的集体保护的结果，并随时为干预措施提供信息。

data.en: UNICEF also supported the inter-agency humanitarian systems to generate data and evidence to track and monitor collective protection from sexual exploitation and abuse results and inform interventions over time.
data.zh: 2022年，人道主义行动支出共计50亿美元，占所有支出的63%。

data.en: A total of $5 billion was spent on humanitarian action in 2022, or 63 per cent of all expenses.
data.zh: 阿富汗、乌克兰、也门、黎巴嫩和埃塞俄比亚的国家办事处的人道主义支出总额最高（按降序排列）。

data.en: The country offices with the highest overall humanitarian expenses (in descending order) were Afghanistan, Ukraine, Yemen, Lebanon and Ethiopia.
data.zh: 在乌克兰和委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国，95%以上的国家一级支出被列为人道主义支出。

data.en: In Ukraine and Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of), more than 95 per cent of country-level expenses were classified as humanitarian expenses.
data.zh: 2022年实现的主要成果

data.en: Key outcomes achieved in 2022
data.zh: 上文第2段提供了与儿基会工作的各个方案编制领域相关的人道主义背景下的最佳成果。

data.en: Top-line results in humanitarian settings linked to the various programming areas of UNICEF work are provided in paragraph 2 above.
data.zh: 本节通过《2023年人道主义行动造福儿童呼吁：气候危机、冲突和流离失所》中阐述的视角，介绍儿基会在这一年中对若干严重人道主义危机的应对工作和所取得的成果。

data.en: This section describes UNICEF responses and results in several critical humanitarian crises during the year, through the lens laid out in the 2023 Humanitarian Action for Children appeal: the climate crisis, conflict and displacement.
data.zh: 所提供的例子是指示性的，并非详尽无遗。

data.en: The examples provided are indicative and not exhaustive.
data.zh: 《2022年全球人道主义行动年度成果报告》中提供了更全面的成果说明，2023年“人道主义行动造福儿童”呼吁提供了关于儿基会全球应对工作的深入信息。

data.en: A more comprehensive accounting of results is provided in the 2022 Global Annual Results Report on humanitarian action, and in-depth information on UNICEF responses globally can be found in the 2023 Humanitarian Action for Children appeal.
data.zh: 气候危机是一场儿童权利危机——儿基会2022年的应对工作

data.en: The climate crisis is a child rights crisis – UNICEF response in 2022
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会与国际机构和非政府组织、国家和地方组织以及各国政府一道，加大力度，满足受气候和其他灾害影响的弱势人群的迫切需求。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF was among the international agencies and non-governmental organizations, national and local organizations and Governments that stepped up the response to the acute needs of vulnerable people impacted by climate and other disasters.
data.zh: 以下例子是为了说明在单一背景下产生的需求的范围和规模，而不是因为在这些地方，个人遭受的痛苦是独一无二的——不幸的是，事实并非如此。

data.en: The examples below are provided because of the scope and scale of the needs engendered across a single context – not because the individual suffering was unique in these places, because unfortunately it was not.
data.zh: 在这些应对措施和其他应对措施中，气候事件造成的人道主义需求往往叠加在与冲突、流离失所或长期贫困相关的现有脆弱性之上，下文所述的应对措施和结果是对其他正在进行的人道主义和发展努力的补充。

data.en: In these and other responses, the humanitarian needs caused by the climate event were often layered over existing vulnerabilities linked to conflict, displacement or chronic poverty, and the responses and results described below were in addition to other ongoing humanitarian and development efforts.
data.zh: 干旱和营养危机

data.en: Drought and nutrition crisis
data.zh: 2022年，许多儿童在反复发生的干旱或严重干旱深刻感受到了气候变化，以及由此带来的饥饿和营养不良。

data.en: Many children experienced climate change in 2022 through recurrent or severe drought, and through this, hunger and malnutrition.
data.zh: 在非洲之角，包括2020万名儿童在内的3630万人遭受了过去40年来最严重的干旱危机的影响，2300万人面临粮食无保障的危机。

data.en: In the Horn of Africa, 36.3 million people, including 20.2 million children, have been affected by the worst drought crisis of the past 40 years, with 23 million people experiencing crisis levels of food insecurity.
data.zh: 抗击这场由干旱引发的营养危机需要密集的协作和协调，才能提供救灾和救生服务。

data.en: Combating this drought-driven nutrition crisis has taken intensive collaboration and coordination to provide relief and life-saving services.
data.zh: 例如，在索马里，儿基会与世界粮食计划署合作，在16个难以到达的地区扩大了营养服务，同时加快为需求最大的儿童和家庭采购即食治疗性食品。

data.en: In Somalia, for example, UNICEF worked with the World Food Programme to scale up nutrition services in 16 hard-to-reach districts, while also accelerating procurement of ready-to-use therapeutic food for children and families with the greatest needs.
data.zh: 结果，有1080852名6至59个月大的儿童因消瘦接受了治疗性护理和治疗。

data.en: As a result, 1,080,852 children aged 6 to 59 months were admitted for therapeutic care and treatment for wasting.
data.zh: 在索马里采取的方法与整个地区的努力相呼应，这些努力利用了多种伙伴关系（与各国政府、国际非政府组织伙伴、私营部门和民间社会组织的伙伴关系），其目的是向受影响的人提供更多的综合服务。

data.en: The approach in Somalia echoes efforts throughout the region, which have drawn on a multiplicity of partnerships – with Governments, international non-governmental organization partners, the private sector and civil society organizations – and whose aim is to expand the delivery of integrated services to affected people.
data.zh: 布基纳法索是萨赫勒中部地区经历了包括气候因素（干旱和洪水）以及冲突动乱在内的多层面危机的几个国家之一。

data.en: Burkina Faso is one of several countries in the central Sahel region that have experienced a multilayered crisis encompassing climate factors (drought and flooding) along with the upheaval of conflict.
data.zh: 为了应对那里的营养危机，儿基会参与了许多涉及国家和国际非政府组织的业务伙伴关系，参与了各类社区平台，以便在最不安全的地区提供预防性和治疗性护理。

data.en: To combat the nutrition crisis there, UNICEF engaged, for both preventive and curative care in the most insecure areas, in operational partnerships involving numerous national and international non-governmental organizations along with community platforms.
data.zh: 共有107289名6至59个月大的严重消瘦儿童入院接受了治疗，其中有17500名儿童在社区一级使用简易方法检测和治疗消瘦。

data.en: A total of 107,289 children aged 6 to 59 months with severe wasting were admitted for treatment. Of these children, 17,500 were reached specifically using simplified approaches for detecting and treating wasting at the community level.
data.zh: 这种方法扩大了方案编制的覆盖范围（无论是由于需求的规模，还是由于获取方面的挑战而要求的）并提高了应对工作的效率。

data.en: Such approaches extend the reach of programming (whether required due to scale of need, or challenges in access) and the efficiency of the response.
data.zh: 总体而言，在布基纳法索，儿基会实现了在2022年为152510名严重消瘦儿童提供服务这一原定目标的70%。

data.en: Overall, in Burkina Faso, UNICEF reached 70 per cent of its 2022 planned target of 152,510 children experiencing severe wasting.
data.zh: 按照环球计划标准，方案执行率良好，恢复率为91.5%，死亡率为2.8%，违约率为5.8%。

data.en: Programme performance rates were good according to Sphere standards, with a recovery rate of 91.5 per cent, a mortality rate of 2.8 per cent and a default rate of 5.8 per cent.
data.zh: 洪灾

data.en: Flooding
data.zh: 2022年，洪水和干旱一起催生了广泛的与气候相关的人道主义需求。

data.en: Flooding joined drought in generating extensive climate-linked humanitarian needs in 2022.
data.zh: 一个最明显的例子是在巴基斯坦，那里史无前例的暴雨和随后的洪水催生了2060万人的人道主义需求，其中包括960万名儿童。

data.en: One of the starkest examples of this was in Pakistan, where epochal rains and subsequent flooding created humanitarian needs for 20.6 million people, including 9.6 million children.
data.zh: 公共和社区供水系统和卫生设施受损，意味着儿童和家庭不得不饮用被污染的水，并面临感染霍乱、腹泻、登革热和疟疾等水媒和病媒传播疾病的风险。

data.en: Damage to public and communal water supply systems and sanitation facilities meant that children and families had to drink contaminated water and risk exposure to such water-borne and vector-borne diseases as cholera, diarrhoea, dengue and malaria.
data.zh: 约有630万人需要立即得到水卫项目服务。

data.en: Around 6.3 million people needed immediate WASH services.
data.zh: 在儿基会的支持下，120万人通过储水罐和安装水过滤设备获得了安全饮用水。

data.en: Through UNICEF support, 1.2 million people gained access to safe drinking water through water tanks and the installation of water filtration plants.
data.zh: 向627904人传达了卫生宣传信息，并向120万人提供了经期卫生用品、肥皂和其他与水卫项目有关的非食品类物品。

data.en: Hygiene- promotion messages reached 627,904 people, and menstrual hygiene kits, soap and other WASH-related non-food items were provided to 1.2 million people.
data.zh: 此外，儿基会对受洪灾影响地区的925392名儿童进行了营养不良筛查。

data.en: Additionally, UNICEF screened 925,392 children in flood-affected districts for malnutrition.
data.zh: 其中，68857名患有严重消瘦症的儿童（30590名男童和38267名女童）登记接受了儿基会支助的治疗。

data.en: Of these, 68,857 children (30,590 boys and 38,267 girls) with severe wasting were enrolled for treatment that was supported by UNICEF.
data.zh: 儿基会还支持为150万人提供初级保健服务，为1091951名儿童接种麻疹疫苗，建立近1000个临时学习中心，为124461名儿童提供受教育机会。

data.en: The organization also supported primary health-care services for 1.5 million people, the immunization of 1,091,951 children against measles and the establishment of nearly 1,000 temporary learning centres and education access for 124,461 children.
data.zh: 此外，266048名儿童和照料者获得了精神卫生和社会心理支持。

data.en: Additionally, 266,048 children and caregivers were provided with access to mental health and psychosocial support.
data.zh: 作为巴基斯坦整体应对措施的一部分，儿童早期发展方法被纳入初级保健、水卫项目和教育支持的主流。

data.en: As part of an holistic response in Pakistan, early childhood development approaches were mainstreamed into primary health care, WASH and education support.
data.zh: 例如，为女性卫生工作者和新生儿准备的资料袋中包括了儿童早期发展和育儿信息，202个儿童早期发展资料袋使临时学习中心（主要在信德省）的10100名儿童受益。

data.en: For example, early childhood development and parenting information was included in kits for lady health workers and newborns, and 202 early childhood development kits benefited 10,100 children in temporary learning centres (primarily in Sindh Province).
data.zh: 巴基斯坦“好东西互联网”数字平台的“一线工作者资源”部分为一线工作者提供了儿童早期发展资源。

data.en: The ‘Resources for Frontline Workers’ section of the digital platform Internet of Good Things Pakistan provided early childhood development resources to front-line workers.
data.zh: 在全球范围内，儿基会将继续通过确保有利的政策环境、促进幼儿获得服务、支持父母和照料者以及建设一线工作者的能力，在人道主义行动中优先考虑儿童早期发展并使之系统化。

data.en: Globally, UNICEF will continue to prioritize and systematize early childhood development in humanitarian action by ensuring enabling policy environments, fostering access to services for young children, supporting parents and caregivers and building the capacity of front-line workers.
data.zh: 2023年，儿基会将改善儿童早期发展方面的部门协调，并推动实施紧急情况下的营养和儿童发展全球战略。

data.en: In 2023, UNICEF is improving sectoral coordination for early childhood development and promoting a global strategy for nutrition and child development in emergencies.
data.zh: 儿基会除了利用其遍布全球的实地办事处和派驻人员，直接为拯救和改善受气候事件影响的儿童的生活做出贡献外，还影响了各国政府和人道主义界理解儿童所面临的气候风险和为有效应对做准备的方式。

data.en: In addition to leveraging its global field presence to contribute directly to saving and improving the lives of children impacted by climatic events, UNICEF influenced the way Governments and the humanitarian community understand the climate risks children face and prepare for effective responses.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会儿童气候风险指数在安提瓜和巴布达、柬埔寨、肯尼亚和索马里等试点国家推广到次国家一级。

data.en: The UNICEF Children’s Climate Risk Index was extended in 2022 to the subnational level in the pilot countries of Antigua and Barbuda, Cambodia, Kenya and Somalia.
data.zh: 在次国家一级对这一工具进行调整，对于了解哪些儿童面临最大风险至关重要，其主要挑战包括获取关于儿童脆弱性的最新地方数据，特别是各国之间可比较的数据。

data.en: Key challenges for the subnational adaptation of this tool – crucial for understanding which children are at greatest risk – include accessing up-to-date local-level data on children’s vulnerability, in particular data that are comparable across countries.
data.zh: 为了克服这一障碍，儿基会正在探索建立外部科学伙伴关系，以开发新的方法来使用地球观测数据，扩充地面观测数据源。

data.en: To overcome this obstacle, UNICEF is exploring external scientific partnerships to develop novel ways to use earth observation data to augment on-the-ground sources.
data.zh: 在全球层面，儿基会影响了2022年11月《联合国气候变化框架公约》第二十七届缔约方大会的核心讨论和谈判，重申了投资于气候适应和建设儿童、青年及其社区复原力的重要性。

data.en: At the global level, UNICEF influenced core discussions and negotiations at the twenty-seventh session of the Conference of the Parties of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change in November 2022, reiterating the importance of investing in climate adaptation and building resilience among children, young people and their communities.
data.zh: 儿基会的一个优先事项

data.en: A priority for UNICEF
data.zh: 实质上，儿基会在2022年已将气候行动提升为全组织的一个优先事项，并在全球范围内加快应对人道主义背景下气候变化的影响。

data.en: In essence, UNICEF elevated climate action as a priority across the organization in 2022, and is accelerating the response to the effects of climate change in humanitarian contexts globally.
data.zh: 儿基会正在围绕三大支柱——有弹性和可持续的服务、审视儿基会的环境足迹、加强年轻人对危机解决方案的发言权和参与度——制定一项气候行动计划。

data.en: UNICEF is developing a climate action plan anchored around three pillars: resilient and sustainable services; looking at the organization’s environmental footprint; and enhancing the voice and engagement of young people around solutions to the crisis.
data.zh: 围绕第三支柱开展工作的一个例子是，2022年在10个国家招募了青年气候活动家，领导气候行动和减灾工作，并动员社区和同龄人参与。

data.en: One example of the work around the third pillar is the recruitment in 2022 of young climate activists in 10 countries to lead climate action and disaster risk reduction efforts and mobilize their communities and peers.
data.zh: 投资于儿基会气候行动计划，可以为儿基会和处于危机中的社区带来气候红利。

data.en: Investment in the organization’s climate action plan can pay climate dividends for UNICEF and for communities in crisis.
data.zh: 儿基会于2022年启动了设立内部循环贷款基金的工作，旨在推动资本投资进入可持续的长期系统，逐步淘汰短期的碳密集型应急行动。

data.en: UNICEF initiated work in 2022 to create an internal revolving loan fund designed to push capital investments into sustainable long-term systems, phasing out short-term, carbon-intensive emergency operations.
data.zh: 在脆弱环境中提前投资于可持续水基础设施，不仅可以为需要此类系统的社区提供持久救济，而且有证据表明，从长远来看，由此产生的节约也可以为儿基会节省资金，同时支持投资者享有红利。

data.en: Not only could earlier investment in sustainable water infrastructure in fragile contexts provide lasting relief to communities that need such systems, but evidence shows that the savings generated could also save UNICEF money in the long term, while supporting dividends to investors.
data.zh: 这一将可持续性纳入人道主义响应的承诺已经以“三赢”的方式惠及儿童。

data.en: This commitment to integrate sustainability into humanitarian response is already reaching children in ‘win-win-win’ ways.
data.zh: 2022年在巴基斯坦、塞拉利昂和乌干达启动的“游戏项目”证明了这一点。

data.en: Project Play, launched in Pakistan, Sierra Leone and Uganda in 2022, shows how.
data.zh: 这项倡议向患有消瘦症的儿童提供由回收的即食治疗性食品盒制成的游戏材料。

data.en: This initiative provides play materials made from recycled ready-to-use therapeutic food boxes to children suffering from wasting.
data.zh: 对于营养不良的儿童来说，缺乏营养会影响他们的身体和大脑，并会阻碍重要的认知能力发展。

data.en: For malnourished children, the lack of nutrients affects both their bodies and their brains, and can halt crucial cognitive development.
data.zh: 有了玩具和玩耍的机会，孩子们的大脑可以开始和身体一起恢复，照料者也对玩耍的重要性有了新的认识。

data.en: With toys and play opportunities, children’s brains can begin to recover along with their bodies, and caregivers gain new awareness of the importance of play.
data.zh: “游戏项目”也是儿基会为创造更加绿色的明天做出贡献的一种方式，而更加绿色的明天属于今天接受救生支持的孩子们。

data.en: Project Play is also a way for UNICEF to contribute to a greener tomorrow that will be inhabited by the children receiving life-saving support today.
data.zh: 冲突导致人道主义需求——儿基会2022年的应对工作

data.en: Conflict leads to humanitarian needs – UNICEF response in 2022
data.zh: 儿童权利在2022年受到冲突的诸多负面影响，只有儿基会与合作伙伴（在实地一级、国家、区域或全球平台）为满足这些儿童的需求和维护儿童权利而合作的诸多方式才能与之相提并论。

data.en: The many ways children’s rights were negatively impacted by conflict in 2022 were only matched by the many ways UNICEF collaborated with partners (at the field level, nationally, regionally or on global platforms) to meet these children’s needs and uphold their rights.
data.zh: 在冲突和暴力环境中，一个主要目标是保护儿童。

data.en: A primary goal in settings of conflict and violence is protecting children.
data.zh: 例如，在乌克兰，战争爆发后，儿基会支助的精神卫生和心理社会干预措施惠及2978598名儿童和照料者，帮助他们克服战争和流离失所带来的痛苦。

data.en: In Ukraine, for example, after the outbreak of war, UNICEF-supported mental health and psychosocial interventions reached 2,978,598 children and caregivers to help them to deal with the distressing effects of war and displacement.
data.zh: 此外，108080名儿童及其家庭受益于个案管理和社会支持服务转介，352103名妇女和儿童获得了儿基会支助的性别暴力预防、风险缓解和应对服务。

data.en: In addition, 108,080 children and their families benefited from case management and referral to social support services, and 352,103 women and children were reached by UNICEF-supported gender-based violence prevention, risk mitigation and response services.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会支持的18个区域的70个多学科流动小组也向930067名受益人提供了综合服务。

data.en: Seventy UNICEF-supported multidisciplinary mobile teams in 18 regions also reached 930,067 beneficiaries with integrated services in 2022.
data.zh: 在接触到的人中，有38852人（9313名儿童和29539名成人）被转介到专门服务机构（卫生、社会和法律机构）。

data.en: Among those reached, 38,852 (9,313 children and 29,539 adults) were referred to specialized services (health, social and legal institutions).
data.zh: 巴勒斯坦国的儿童生活在旷日持久的保护危机中，其特点是持续占领造成了心理上的痛苦和创伤——所有这些都植根于经济机会少、政治格局分裂，以及充斥着2019冠状病毒病疫情和乌克兰战争影响的环境中。

data.en: Children in the State of Palestine live in a protracted protection crisis characterized by an ongoing occupation that has created psychological distress and trauma – all embedded in an environment of low economic opportunity, a divided political landscape and the impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic and the war in Ukraine.
data.zh: 为了满足长期的保护需求和应对2022年8月加沙地带敌对行动的升级，儿基会及其合作伙伴提供了一系列服务。

data.en: To respond to chronic protection needs and to the escalation of hostilities in the Gaza Strip in August 2022, UNICEF and its partners provided an array of services.
data.zh: 加沙地带局势升级期间，约8300名儿童获得了儿童保护服务，1430多名儿童获得了个案管理和转介。

data.en: Around 8,300 children were reached with child protection services during the escalation in the Gaza Strip, and more than 1,430 children received individual case management and referrals.
data.zh: 相关努力延伸至对照料者的教育领域，2420名照料者（72%为妇女）参加了侧重于积极育儿、如何保护其子女以及加强家庭能力以防止家庭暴力的课程。

data.en: Efforts extended to education of caregivers, with 2,420 caregivers (72 per cent women) attending sessions focused on positive parenting and how to protect their children and strengthen family capacity to prevent violence at home.
data.zh: 自2022年9月以来，重大社会动荡和与帮派有关的暴力事件困扰着海地，显示了暴力和冲突对儿童形成的另一层面威胁。

data.en: The major social unrest and gang-related violence that have gripped Haiti since September 2022 show another dimension of how violence and strife threaten children.
data.zh: 同其他地方一样，海地的人道主义局势不是单方面的，儿童福祉面临的威胁是相互关联的。

data.en: As is true elsewhere, the humanitarian situation in Haiti is not one-dimensional, and threats to children’s well-being are interlinked.
data.zh: 例如，在海地，除了上述社会暴力之外，燃料严重短缺限制了公用事业和基本服务，包括水和医疗保健。

data.en: In Haiti, for example, in addition to the societal violence noted above, severe fuel shortages restricted utilities and the delivery of basic services, including water and health care.
data.zh: 2022年10月，近48%的人口被认为严重缺乏粮食安全。

data.en: Nearly 48 per cent of the population was considered acutely food insecure in October 2022.
data.zh: 当月海地的霍乱疫情在这一动乱和混乱局面中暴发，加剧了对儿童的现有威胁，因为儿童占所有霍乱病例的40%。

data.en: The cholera outbreak that began in the country that month bubbled out of this upheaval and disruption and compounded existing threats to children, who made up 40 per cent of all cholera cases.
data.zh: 儿基会的应对措施包括实施一项快速反应小组战略，并利用混合小组（包括来自非政府组织的水卫项目工作人员和来自卫生部的护士）来实施有针对性的病例区干预办法，以遏制疫情。

data.en: The UNICEF response included a rapid response team strategy and the use of mixed teams (including WASH staff from non-governmental organizations and nurses from the Ministry of Health) to implement the case-area targeted intervention approach to stemming the outbreak.
data.zh: 在交付霍乱用品和检测试剂盒后，海地86000多人的需求得到了满足。

data.en: Delivery of cholera supplies and kits helped to meet the needs of more than 86,000 people in Haiti.
data.zh: 运水卡车向目前居住在太阳城或从太阳城流离失所的22000多人提供了50万升水。太阳城位于太子港大都市区内，这里报告了第一批确诊病例，无独有偶，这里也是帮派暴力的爆发地之一。

data.en: Water trucking provided half a million litres of water to more than 22,000 people currently living in or displaced from Cité Soleil – the commune within the greater Port-au-Prince metropolitan area that reported the first confirmed cases, and not incidentally also one of the flashpoints for gang violence.
data.zh: 儿基会通过其非政府医疗合作伙伴，支持将超过355个霍乱疑似病例转诊到治疗中心或口服补液点，并向卫生部门和治疗中心提供了关键用品。

data.en: Through its non-governmental medical partners, UNICEF supported the referral of more than 355 suspected cases of cholera to treatment centres or oral rehydration points, and delivered critical supplies to health departments and treatment centres.
data.zh: 儿基会参与了霍乱疫苗接种活动，在西部省和中部省的80个乡镇为164万1岁以上的人口接种口服霍乱疫苗。

data.en: UNICEF was integral to a cholera vaccination campaign targeting 1.64 million people over 1 year of age for oral cholera vaccine in 80 communes in the Ouest and Centre departments.
data.zh: 儿基会的工作重点为疫苗分发、废弃物管理和通信。

data.en: UNICEF focused on vaccine distribution, waste management and communication.
data.zh: 截至2022年12月底，已有近100万人接种了霍乱疫苗（占目标的61%）。

data.en: By the end of December 2022, nearly 1 million people had been vaccinated against cholera (61 per cent of the target).
data.zh: 2022年，全球霍乱应对工作得到加强，儿基会提供的社区应对包数量远远超过2021年，并在海地、黎巴嫩、马拉维、阿拉伯叙利亚共和国等疫情严重的国家实施了全面应对措施。

data.en: Globally, cholera response efforts intensified in 2022, with UNICEF supplying community response kits in far greater numbers than in 2021 and providing a comprehensive response in countries with severe epidemics, among them Haiti, Lebanon, Malawi, the Syrian Arab Republic and others.
data.zh: 人道主义援助准入

data.en: Humanitarian access
data.zh: 所有类型的冲突环境都可能使人道主义援助难以送达民众。

data.en: All types of conflict settings can be those where humanitarian access to populations is challenged.
data.zh: 儿基会在2022年继续支持国家办事处，向它们提供政策咨询、量身定制的能力建设举措和专门的国家支持，所有这些都是为了建立和维持及时、公平和不受阻碍的人道主义援助准入，帮助生活在复杂和高威胁环境中的民众。

data.en: UNICEF continued to support its country offices in 2022 with policy advice, tailored capacity-building initiatives and dedicated country support – all designed to establish and sustain timely, equitable and unimpeded humanitarian access to people living in complex and high-threat environments.
data.zh: 儿基会分发了《人道主义准入实地手册》和《儿基会与非国家武装行为体接触准则》，并推出了关于人道主义援助准入的面对面深入培训。

data.en: UNICEF disseminated the Humanitarian Access Field Manual and the Guidelines for UNICEF Engagement with Armed Non-State Actors, and rolled out in-person, in-depth training on humanitarian access.
data.zh: 十多个儿基会国家办事处（阿富汗、哥伦比亚、海地、缅甸、索马里、苏丹和委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国等）在人道主义援助准入和相关人道主义政策问题上得到了儿基会总部的专门支持。

data.en: More than a dozen UNICEF country offices (Afghanistan, Colombia, Haiti, Myanmar, Somalia, Sudan and Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of), among others) received dedicated support on humanitarian access and related humanitarian policy issues from UNICEF headquarters.
data.zh: 由此在缅甸和索马里制定了准入战略和工作计划，以及在阿富汗制定了与事实上的当局沟通的接触战略。

data.en: This resulted in the creation of access strategies and workplans in Myanmar and Somalia, and an engagement strategy with the de facto authorities in Afghanistan.
data.zh: 2022年，在全球范围内，儿基会与联合国会员国一道，并在安全理事会、大会、经济及社会理事会和机构间常设委员会(IASC)等联合国论坛上倡导在12个令人关切的局势中加强对受武装冲突影响的儿童、妇女和平民的保护。

data.en: Globally, UNICEF advocated to strengthen protection of children, women and civilians affected by armed conflict in 12 situations of concern in 2022 with United Nations Member States and in such United Nations forums as the Security Council, the General Assembly, the Economic and Social Council and the Inter-Agency Standing Committee (IASC).
data.zh: 创纪录的儿童流离失所：无人想要的纪录——儿基会2022年的应对工作

data.en: Record child displacements: a record nobody wants – UNICEF response in 2022
data.zh: 针对流离失所和移徙儿童的全球应对措施是儿基会人道主义响应中的一大重点，其重要性日益增加。

data.en: A global response for displaced and migrant children represents a large and growing focus of the UNICEF humanitarian response.
data.zh: 流离失所现象与上述气候和冲突的压力密切相关。

data.en: The displacement phenomenon is intricately linked to the pressures of climate and conflict noted above.
data.zh: 儿基会满足迫在眉睫的人道主义需求，倡导采取对儿童问题有敏感认识的难民和移徙应对措施，以拯救生命，保护儿童权利，并加强对包容性国家制度的利用，为背井离乡的儿童提供持久解决方案。

data.en: UNICEF meets immediate humanitarian needs and advocates for child-responsive refugee and migration responses that save lives, protect children’s rights and strengthen access to inclusive national systems and durable solutions for children who have been uprooted.
data.zh: 例如，2022年在埃塞俄比亚，儿基会帮助社会保护系统提高对儿童问题的敏感认识，并与埃塞俄比亚政府合作，向31453名受冲突影响的境内流离失所者提供现金转移，以改善粮食安全和满足其他需求。

data.en: For instance, in Ethiopia in 2022, UNICEF helped to strengthen the child-sensitivity of the social protection system and collaborated with the Government to provide cash transfers to 31,453 conflict-affected internally displaced people to improve food security and meet other needs.
data.zh: 建立战略伙伴关系，帮助流动儿童

data.en: Strategic partnerships for children on the move
data.zh: 2023年初，儿基会与联合国难民事务高级专员公署启动了一个具有里程碑意义的战略伙伴关系，以推进两个组织的合作和共同努力。

data.en: UNICEF launched a landmark strategic partnership with the Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees in early 2023 to advance cooperation and the joint efforts of both organizations.
data.zh: 此外，儿基会还是多方利益攸关方PROSPECTS伙伴关系中的主要成员，该伙伴关系由荷兰政府资助，旨在寻找方法支持和有意义地接触被迫流离失所的年轻人和收容社区。

data.en: Additionally, UNICEF is a key player in the multi-stakeholder PROSPECTS partnership, which is funded by the Government of the Netherlands and is designed to find ways to support and meaningfully engage forcibly displaced young people and host communities.
data.zh: 这一伙伴关系为埃及、埃塞俄比亚、肯尼亚、伊拉克、约旦、黎巴嫩、苏丹和乌干达被迫流离失所的年轻人提供了边学边赚和系统性地参与的机会。

data.en: This partnership opened opportunities for learning-to-earning and the systematic participation of forcibly displaced young people in Egypt, Ethiopia, Kenya, Iraq, Jordan, Lebanon, the Sudan and Uganda.
data.zh: 儿基会还与青年难民领导的全球难民青年网络签署了有史以来的第一份协议，以支持在被迫流离失所的情况下采取帮助难民青年的地方行动。

data.en: UNICEF also signed its first-ever agreement with the youth refugee-led Global Refugee Youth Network to support local action with refugee youth in forcibly displaced contexts.
data.zh: 其他与青年有关的伙伴关系包括与联合国儿童和青年主要群体以及流动青年研究金计划的伙伴关系，该计划为有才华和热情的流动青年以及在获得传统实习和边学边赚机会方面面临障碍的青年难民提供了一条途径，通过与儿基会和其他人道主义组织合作掌握实用技能。

data.en: Other youth-related partnerships included those with the United Nations Major Group for Children and Youth and the Youth on the Move Fellowship Programme, which provides a pathway for talented and passionate youth on the move and young refugees who face obstacles in accessing traditional internships and learning-to-earning opportunities to gain practical skills through work with UNICEF and other humanitarian organizations.
data.zh: 加强机构业绩

data.en: Strengthening organizational performance
data.zh: 对受影响的人口负责，并采取更加本地化的人道主义应对措施

data.en: Accountability to affected populations and a more localized humanitarian response
data.zh: 2021年1月至2022年12月，五个区域的受影响人口问责专家向54个国家办事处提供了技术支持。

data.en: Specialists in accountability to affected populations in five regions provided technical support to 54 country offices between January 2021 and December 2022.
data.zh: 除了这一区域能力之外，儿基会还为应对阿富汗危机、非洲之角干旱紧急情况和乌克兰战争提供了大量支持。

data.en: Beyond this regional capacity, substantial support was also provided to the responses to the crises in Afghanistan, the Horn of Africa drought emergency and the war in Ukraine.
data.zh: 所有这些工作都以儿基会关于对受影响人口负责的新战略为指导。

data.en: All these efforts were guided by a new UNICEF strategy on accountability to affected populations.
data.zh: 反馈机制是量身定制的，以满足遭遇人道主义紧急情况的人的具体需求。

data.en: Feedback mechanisms were tailored to the specific needs of people experiencing humanitarian emergencies.
data.zh: 例如，在缅甸，儿基会的合作伙伴被要求将对受影响人口负责的措施纳入方案协议。

data.en: In Myanmar, for example, UNICEF partners were required to incorporate measures for accountability to affected populations into their programme agreements.
data.zh: 儿基会建立了一个在线反馈监测平台（按年龄、性别、地点和干预部门分列分类），2022年有18个合作伙伴利用该平台报告了3290份反馈。

data.en: UNICEF established an online platform for monitoring feedback (disaggregated by age, gender, location and sector of intervention), with 18 partners making use of the platform to report 3,290 submissions of feedback in 2022.
data.zh: 根据收到的反馈，儿基会改进了向社区提供的基本水卫项目、保健、营养和其他服务。

data.en: The feedback received led to improvements in provision of essential WASH, health, nutrition and other services to communities.
data.zh: 在内部，这些反馈有助于儿基会的各方案和业务小组调整服务提供机制。

data.en: Internally, the feedback helped UNICEF programme and operations teams to adapt their service delivery mechanisms.
data.zh: 与国家和地方合作伙伴的密切合作仍然是儿基会在2022年的一个优先事项，15亿美元的现金已转移给各级合作伙伴用于人道主义应急。

data.en: Close collaboration with national and local partners remained a priority in 2022 and $1.5 billion in cash was transferred to partners at all levels for humanitarian response.
data.zh: 其中，共有4.825亿美元用于国家政府应急响应人员，5.692亿美元（39.2%）用于地方行为体， 超过了25%的大协议目标。

data.en: Of this, a total of $482.5 million went to national government responders, and $569.2 million ( 39.2 per cent) went to local actors, exceeding the Grand Bargain target of 25 per cent.
data.zh: 儿基会继续参与全球和机构间努力，推动人道主义应急工作本地化，共同主持机构间常设委员会本地化工作队，并发挥全球群组领导作用。

data.en: UNICEF remained engaged in global and inter-agency efforts to further the localization of humanitarian response, co-chairing the IASC Task Force on Localization and leveraging its global cluster leadership role.
data.zh: 儿基会还继续倡导提升妇女和女童领导的地方组织的参与程度。

data.en: UNICEF also continued championing greater engagement of local organizations led by women and girls.
data.zh: 2022年，转给执行伙伴的人道主义资金的7.7%流向了647个地方妇女组织。

data.en: In 2022, 7.7 per cent of the humanitarian funding that was transferred to implementing partners went to 647 local women’s organizations.
data.zh: 旨在加强人道主义-发展-和平关系的方案编制

data.en: Programming to strengthen the humanitarian–development–peace nexus
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会开始要求国家办事处在制定新的国家合作方案时考虑人道主义、发展和建设和平层面，以直接回应2021年《对儿基会将人道主义方案编制与发展方案编制联系起来这一工作的形成性评价》。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF began requiring country offices to consider humanitarian, development and peacebuilding dimensions when developing new country programmes of cooperation, in direct response to the 2021 formative evaluation of UNICEF work to link humanitarian and development programming.
data.zh: 儿基会还修订了关于人道主义、发展与和平关系的程序，并正在制定一个全球建设和平框架，将于2023年推出。

data.en: UNICEF also revised its Procedure on Humanitarian, Development and Peace Nexus and is in the process of developing a global peacebuilding framework, to be launched in 2023.
data.zh: 2022年，在多个重要的国家背景下，关系方案编制方法取得了明显的进展。

data.en: Progress in nexus programming approaches was visible in 2022 in several critical country contexts.
data.zh: 例如，在莫桑比克，儿基会制定了社区恢复和复原计划（2022-2024年），这是一个面向北部的以儿童为中心的方法，将新的莫桑比克国家方案与人道主义应急需求联系起来。

data.en: In Mozambique, for example, UNICEF developed the Community Recovery and Resilience Plan (2022–24) – A child focused approach to the north, to connect the new Mozambique country programme to humanitarian response needs.
data.zh: 该计划与政府的计划相一致。

data.en: The Plan is aligned with government plans.
data.zh: 在萨赫勒地区，一个与德国联邦经济合作与发展部、世界粮食计划署和联合国难民事务高级专员公署组成的联合特派团侧重于在脆弱的环境中（包括在被迫流离失所的环境中）落实人道主义-发展-和平关系。

data.en: In the Sahel region, a joint mission with the German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development, the World Food Programme and the Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees focused on operationalizing the humanitarian-development-peace nexus in fragile contexts, including those of forced displacement.
data.zh: 喀麦隆、海地、利比亚、斯里兰卡和委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国的新国家方案文件都强调了人道主义-发展-和平方法。

data.en: New country programme documents for Cameroon, Haiti, Libya, Sri Lanka and Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of) all emphasized a humanitarian-development-peace approach.
data.zh: 2022年，在对冲突有敏感认识的方案拟订和促进社会凝聚力与和平方面达到组织基准的儿基会国家办事处的百分比分别为23%和29%；比例低的部分原因可能是根据修订后的指标报告不足。

data.en: In 2022, the percentages of UNICEF country offices that met organizational benchmarks on conflict-sensitive programming and on contributions to social cohesion and peace were 23 per cent and 29 per cent, respectively; these low percentages are likely partly due to underreporting against a revised indicator.
data.zh: 然而，在儿基会正在实施由联合国秘书长建设和平基金支助的项目的国家，业绩尤其强劲。

data.en: Performance has, however, been particularly strong in countries where UNICEF is implementing projects supported by the United Nations Secretary-General’s Peacebuilding Fund.
data.zh: 例如，为了减少布基纳法索和科特迪瓦边境地区村庄人口的共同脆弱性，儿基会与联合国开发计划署合作，领导了一个跨境建设和平基金项目。

data.en: For example, to reduce the common vulnerabilities of the population in the villages situated in border areas between Burkina Faso and Côte d’Ivoire, UNICEF led a cross-border Peacebuilding Fund project in partnership with the United Nations Development Programme.
data.zh: 15至24岁的青少年因此获得了水卫项目以及儿童保护服务。

data.en: Adolescents and young people aged 15 to 24 years were provided with WASH and child protection services.
data.zh: 针对边境两侧不同族裔群体的青少年制定了专门干预措施，其中包括代际对话和生活技能培训、青年和平大使和U-Reporter记者培训。

data.en: Dedicated interventions targeting adolescents and youth of diverse ethnic groups on both sides of the border encompassed intergenerational dialogue and life skills training, young peace ambassadors and training to be U-Reporters.
data.zh: 在监测社区动态和新出现的冲突以及帮助在社区内建立信心和信任方面，儿基会分区办事处的工作人员起到了特别的帮助作用。

data.en: Staff from the UNICEF zonal offices were particularly helpful in monitoring community dynamics and emerging conflicts and helping to build confidence and trust within communities.
data.zh: 管理层对CLARE II评价的最新回应

data.en: Update on the management response to the CLARE II evaluation
data.zh: 在关于儿基会的群组牵头机构/共同牵头机构作用的第二次评价（CLARE II）中，评估了儿基会在几个机构间群组和责任领域的领导作用。

data.en: The lead role of UNICEF in several inter-agency clusters and areas of responsibility was assessed in the second evaluation of the UNICEF role as cluster lead/co-lead agency (CLARE II).
data.zh: 管理层对这一评价的回应（E/ICEF/2022/20）包括35项行动。

data.en: The management response to this evaluation (E/ICEF/2022/20) included 35 actions.
data.zh: 这些行动可以大致划入以下几个方面：(a) 资金和人员配备；(b) 将问责制纳入主流；(c) 政策和机构间参与。

data.en: These can broadly be broken down into the following areas: (a) funding and staffing; (b) mainstreaming accountabilities; and (c) policy and inter-agency engagement.
data.zh: 儿基会在管理层回应中概述的行动方面取得了进展。

data.en: UNICEF has made progress on the actions outlined in the management response.
data.zh: 主要挑战包括儿基会的分散性和倡议的多重性，儿基会正在通过确保相关倡议之间加强内部协调来解决这两个问题。

data.en: Key challenges have included the decentralized nature of UNICEF and the multiplicity of initiatives, and these are both being addressed by ensuring as much internal alignment across related initiatives as possible.
data.zh: 紧急方案办公室征聘了一名宣传专家，人力资源司征聘了一名专注于群组的专职工作人员，这将有助于应对这些挑战。

data.en: The recruitment of an advocacy expert within the Office of Emergency Programmes and a dedicated cluster-focused staff member in the Division of Human Resources is helping to address these challenges.
data.zh: 专职人力资源工作人员正在侧重于落实与人员配备有关的建议（建议1和2），71%的活动已经启动。

data.en: The dedicated human resources staff member is focusing on recommendations pertaining to staffing (under recommendations 1 and 2), with 71 per cent of activities already initiated.
data.zh: 值得注意的是，作为对建议1(a)的回应，儿基会于2022年7月底完成了国家群组人员配备的摸底和分析，揭示了需要紧急采取纠正行动的3级和2级紧急状态国家中的关键差距。

data.en: Notably, in response to recommendation 1 (a), mapping and analysis of country cluster staffing were completed at the end of July 2022, illuminating critical gaps in Level 3 and Level 2 emergency countries that required urgent corrective action.
data.zh: 儿基会因此拨付了410万美元的全球人道主义专题资金，用于解决埃塞俄比亚、莫桑比克、尼日尔、索马里、南苏丹、巴勒斯坦国和也门的重大协调差距。

data.en: As a result, $4.1 million in global humanitarian thematic funding was allocated to address critical coordination gaps in Ethiopia, Mozambique, Niger, Somalia, South Sudan, State of Palestine and Yemen.
data.zh: 2023年，儿基会将继续利用这一灵活的供资方式，优先满足国家一级的群组协调需求和费用。

data.en: In 2023, UNICEF will continue to leverage this flexible funding and prioritize supporting cluster coordination needs and costs at the country level.
data.zh: 旨在加强群组牵头机构问责制的行动有一半以上正在进行，包括定期分析群组协调业绩监测结果和制定反映群组牵头机构问责制的关键业绩指标。

data.en: More than half of the actions aimed at reinforcing cluster lead agency (CLA) accountability are under way, including the regular analysis of cluster coordination performance monitoring results and the development of key performance indicators that reflect CLA accountability.
data.zh: 在更新后的儿基会问责制度中，已经确定了需要发展群组牵头机构问责制的领域，目前正在将群组牵头机构问责制纳入关键角色的主流。

data.en: Areas where CLA accountabilities need to be developed in the updated UNICEF accountability system have been identified and the mainstreaming of CLA accountabilities into key roles is under way.
data.zh: 针对建议1(b)，儿基会已开始将工作人员和合作伙伴的协调培训纳入主流，以进一步加强群组牵头机构迅速部署合适工作人员的能力，并提高协调工作人员的素质。

data.en: In response to recommendation 1 (b), UNICEF has begun to mainstream coordination training for staff and partners to further strengthen CLA ability to deploy the right staff rapidly and improve the quality of coordination staff.
data.zh: 这也增强了组织能力，以支持国家行为体发挥领导作用，并为群组做出有意义的贡献——与儿基会的本地化承诺相一致。

data.en: This also enhances organizational capacity to support national actors to take up leadership roles and meaningfully contribute to the cluster, aligned with the UNICEF commitment to localization.
data.zh: 儿基会在Agora学习平台上创建了一个人道主义协调学习频道，以英文、法文和西班牙文公开提供大量关于信息管理的在线学习内容。

data.en: A humanitarian coordination learning channel was created on the Agora learning platform, making a substantial body of online learning content on information management publicly available in English, French and Spanish.
data.zh: 目前正在开发关于群组协调的更多电子学习课程。

data.en: Further e-learning on cluster coordination is being developed.
data.zh: 儿基会在2022年还启动了推动关键政策承诺的工作，包括保护的核心地位、对受影响人口的问责、人道主义与发展的关系、本地化、减少性别暴力风险和包容残疾，并为儿基会国家办事处制定了关于实施减少性别暴力风险行动的指南。

data.en: Work to enable advances on key policy commitments, including the centrality of protection, accountability to affected populations, the humanitarian-development nexus, localization, gender-based violence risk mitigation and disability inclusion, was also initiated in 2022 with the development of guidance for UNICEF country offices on implementing gender-based violence risk mitigation action.
data.zh: 这项工作将落实建议1(e)。

data.en: This work will address recommendation 1 (e).
data.zh: 机构间一级的努力由于其协商性质，可能需要花费更多的时间。

data.en: Efforts at the inter-agency level may require more time due to their consultative nature.
data.zh: 儿基会已经开始与联合国人道主义事务协调厅、全球群组协调小组和其他机构间常设委员会合作伙伴的管理层进行讨论。

data.en: UNICEF has already initiated discussions with management in the United Nations Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs, the Global Cluster Coordination Group and other IASC partners.
data.zh: 对需要更新的机构间常设委员会群组指导领域进行分析已被确定为一个优先事项，同时还需要根据关系方法制定群组过渡指南（分别为建议3(a)和3(b)）。

data.en: The analysis of areas of IASC cluster guidance that need updating has been identified as a priority, together with the need to produce guidance on cluster transition in keeping with the nexus approach (recommendations 3 (a) and 3 (b), respectively).
data.zh: 为完成这项工作而进行的顾问征聘应于2023年第一季度完成。

data.en: Recruitment of the consultants to conduct this work should be completed in the first quarter of 2023.
data.zh: 为人道主义行动调动资源

data.en: Resource mobilization for humanitarian action
data.zh: 儿基会2021年12月发出的2022年“人道主义行动造福儿童”初步呼吁要求筹集94亿美元，以帮助145个国家和地区的1.908亿名贫困儿童。

data.en: The initial 2022 Humanitarian Action for Children appeal, issued in December 2021, requested $9.4 billion to assist 190.8 million children in need in 145 countries and territories.
data.zh: 截至2022年底，由于新出现的危机或不断恶化的危机，包括乌克兰战争、巴基斯坦洪水、非洲之角干旱和其他不断恶化的持久性儿童紧急状况， 以及需要加快公平地获得2019冠状病毒病检测工具、治疗药物和疫苗，人道主义需求总额已增至117.4亿美元。

data.en: By the end of 2022, the total humanitarian requirement had risen to $11.74 billion owing to new or deteriorating crises, including the war in Ukraine, floods in Pakistan, drought in the Horn of Africa and other worsening protracted emergencies for children, in addition to the need to accelerate equitable access to COVID-19 tests, treatments and vaccines.
data.zh: 此外，儿基会还为吉布提和斯里兰卡发出了新的呼吁，使呼吁总数达到55项。

data.en: New appeals were also created for Djibouti and Sri Lanka, bringing the total number of appeals to 55.
data.zh: 截至2022年12月31日，通过2022年呼吁已收到42.5亿美元的人道主义资金 ，比通过2021年呼吁收到的29.6亿美元增加了43%。

data.en: As at 31 December 2022, $4.25 billion had been received in humanitarian funding for the 2022 appeal, a 43 per cent increase compared with the $2.96 billion received in 2021 for the 2021 appeal.
data.zh: 公共部门资金仍然是2022年收到的主要资金来源，为31.6亿美元（比2021年增加29%）。

data.en: Public sector funding continued to be the primary source of funding received in 2022, at $3.16 billion (a 29 per cent increase compared with 2021).
data.zh: 与2021年相比，私营部门资金翻了一番，达到10.9亿美元。

data.en: Private sector funding doubled as compared to 2021, reaching $1.09 billion.
data.zh: 图1

data.en: Figure I
data.zh: 2022年紧急资金十大捐助伙伴（单位：百万美元）

data.en: Top 10 partners for emergency funding, 2022 (in millions of United States dollars)
data.zh: 令人关切的是，公共和私营部门资金被大量指定用于少数紧急呼吁。2022年呼吁收到的资金中有64%被指定用于四项呼吁：乌克兰和难民外流；获取COVID-19工具加速计划；叙利亚难民收容国；阿富汗。

data.en: Of concern was the heavy earmarking of both public and private funds for a few emergency appeals, with 64 per cent of the funding received for the 2022 appeal earmarked for four appeals: Ukraine and Refugee Outflow; Access to COVID-19 Tools Accelerator; Syrian Refugee-hosting countries; and Afghanistan.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会继续呼吁为人道主义行动提供优质资金，2022年对儿基会的灵活人道主义专题捐款大幅增加。

data.en: UNICEF continued calling for quality funding for humanitarian action in 2022, and flexible humanitarian thematic contributions to the organization increased significantly in 2022.
data.zh: 专题人道主义资金（国家、区域和全球）达到9.28亿美元，与2021年相比翻了一番，主要原因是私营部门捐助者提供了所有专题资金的92%，以及他们承诺支持关于乌克兰和难民外流以及获取COVID-19工具加速计划的呼吁。

data.en: Thematic humanitarian funds (country, regional and global) reached $928 million, doubling compared with 2021 primarily due to private sector donors, who provided 92 per cent of all thematic funding, and their commitment to support the Ukraine and Refugee Outflow and Access to COVID-19 Tools Accelerator appeals.
data.zh: 2022年，从合作伙伴处收到的多年期资金达到11.3亿美元，包括公共和私营部门的专题和非专题资金。

data.en: In 2022, multi-year funding received from partners reached $1.13 billion, and included public and private sector thematic and non-thematic funding.
data.zh: 这远远超过了2021年收到的4.227亿美元。

data.en: This far surpassed the $422.7 million received in 2021.
data.zh: 2022年，公共部门合作伙伴提供了2.606亿美元的多年期资金，仍比疫情前的水平低39%，比2021年低24%。

data.en: In 2022, public sector partners provided $260.6 million in multi-year funding, still about 39 per cent less than pre-pandemic levels and 24 per cent less than in 2021.
data.zh: 除核心资源外，全球人道主义专题资金是最灵活的资源类型。

data.en: Global humanitarian thematic funding is the most flexible type of resource aside from core resources.
data.zh: 这类资金在2022年增加了两倍多，达到1.198亿美元。

data.en: This type of funding more than tripled in 2022, reaching $119.8 million.
data.zh: 全球人道主义专题资金为儿基会在非洲之角和萨赫勒国家的应对行动做出了贡献；确保及时应对了海地、阿拉伯叙利亚共和国和乌干达的霍乱疫情；并为儿基会应对东亚和太平洋以及拉丁美洲和加勒比地区的自然灾害及时提供了资金，弥补了重大缺口。

data.en: Global humanitarian thematic funding contributed to the UNICEF response in the Horn of Africa and Sahel countries; ensured timely response to cholera outbreaks in Haiti, the Syrian Arab Republic and Uganda; and provided UNICEF responses to natural disasters in the East Asia and the Pacific and Latin America and Caribbean regions with timely funding to cover critical gaps.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会仍然是中央应急基金（CERF）资金的最大接受者，收到1.972亿美元，用于40次紧急情况。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF remained the top recipient of funding from the Central Emergency Response Fund, receiving $197.2 million for 40 emergencies.
data.zh: 在刚果民主共和国、尼日利亚、南苏丹、苏丹、乌克兰和也门，与冲突和气候相关危机相关的应对措施都从中央应急基金获得了1000多万美元。

data.en: Responses linked to conflict and climate-related crises in Democratic Republic of the Congo, Nigeria, South Sudan, the Sudan, Ukraine and Yemen all received more than $10 million from the Central Emergency Response Fund.
data.zh: 中央应急基金还为那些因非洲之角的干旱或因武装冲突、干旱和经济动荡等因素共同造成的粮食不安全的国家提供了拯救生命的救济。

data.en: The Central Emergency Response Fund also contributed to life-saving relief in countries experiencing food insecurity caused by the drought in the Horn of Africa or by a combination of armed conflict, drought and economic turmoil.
data.zh: 国家集合基金在2021年将4610万美元拨付给12个国家，2022年则下降，只拨付了2620万美元给7个国家 。

data.en: Allocations of country-based pooled funds decreased from $46.1 million to 12 countries in 2021 to $26.2 million to 7 countries in 2022.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会从国际金融机构获得2.224亿美元资金，用于支持发出“人道主义行动造福儿童”呼吁的国家。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF received $222.4 million in funding from international financial institutions to support countries with Humanitarian Action for Children appeals.
data.zh: 其中，220万美元为紧急资金。

data.en: Of this, $2.2 million was emergency funding.
data.zh: 2022年，有2.439亿美元的核心资源用于支持人道主义方案。

data.en: In 2022, $243.9 million in core resources supported humanitarian programmes.
data.zh: 此外，这些资金通过儿基会紧急方案基金贷款机制的拨款促进了人道主义应急工作，该机制在危机发生后48小时内将资源快速送达受影响国家。

data.en: Additionally, these funds contributed to the humanitarian response via allocations from the UNICEF Emergency Programme Fund loan mechanism, which fast-tracks resources to affected countries within 48 hours of a crisis.
data.zh: 2022年，儿基会通过该基金向31个国家提供了6410万美元，比2021年增加了36%。

data.en: In 2022, UNICEF provided $64.1 million to 31 countries through this fund, a 36 per cent increase compared with 2021.

data.zh: 战略优先事项

data.en: Strategic priorities
data.zh: 儿基会将继续响应因气候事件而遭遇人道主义危机的儿童和家庭的需求，并在发展和人道主义方案编制中建设抵御此类冲击的能力。

data.en: UNICEF will continue to respond to children and families experiencing humanitarian crises owing to climatic events and build resilience to such shocks in development and humanitarian programming.
data.zh: 儿基会的干预措施主要集中在以下几个方面：(a) 在其全球行动中推广气候变化适应模式；(b) 代表儿童进行宣传并参与政策制定；以及(c) 优先考虑适应气候的预见性行动和防范工作，以确保采取及时、有效和具有成本效益的行动来拯救生命和建设韧性。

data.en: UNICEF interventions focus on: (a) scaling up climate change adaptation models in its global operations; (b) advocacy on behalf of children and engaging in policy development; and (c) prioritizing climate-adaptive anticipatory action and preparedness efforts to ensure timely, effective and cost-efficient actions to save lives and build resilience.
data.zh: 儿基会和合作伙伴还将加强与天气相关的儿童流离失所热点地区的数据，以便能够预测和做好准备，使相关服务能够抵御冲击，并在灾害发生之前、期间和之后帮助最脆弱的人群。

data.en: UNICEF and partners are also strengthening data on hotspots for weather-related displacements of children to be able to predict and prepare so that services are shock-responsive and able to reach the most vulnerable people before, during and after disaster strikes.
data.zh: 儿基会承诺领导一项紧急的、综合的、多部门的预防饥荒应对工作，以减少遭受最严重消瘦的儿童数量，让更多的儿童得到治疗。

data.en: UNICEF commits to leading an urgent, integrated and multisectoral response to famine prevention so that fewer children experience the worst forms of wasting and a greater number of those that do receive treatment.
data.zh: 儿基会于2022年9月启动的“消除消瘦刻不容缓”加速计划提供了一条途径，以期在2022年10月至2023年9月期间，通过一揽子基本干预措施帮助超过2600万名儿童和妇女，以促进儿童消瘦的早期预防、检测和治疗。

data.en: The No Time to Waste acceleration plan, which UNICEF launched in September 2022, provides a pathway to reaching more than 26 million children and women between October 2022 and September 2023 with a package of essential interventions to promote early prevention, detection and treatment of child wasting.
data.zh: 正如关于性别平等和增强妇女和女童权能的机构间人道主义评价所强调的那样，仍然需要大力加强人道主义行动中的性别平等意识，涉及的问题从性别平等分析、妇女和女童有意义地参与方案编制和协调，到制定更有针对性、促进性别平等的干预措施。

data.en: As the Inter-Agency Humanitarian Evaluation on Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women and Girls highlights, gender in humanitarian action still needs significant strengthening, with issues ranging from gender analysis and meaningful engagement of women and girls in programming and coordination to more targeted, gender-responsive interventions.
data.zh: 儿基会的一个整体优先事项是在人道主义防范、应对和恢复行动中促进性别平等和包容。

data.en: A UNICEF corporate priority is to foster gender equity and inclusion in humanitarian preparedness, response and recovery action.
data.zh: 性别平等分析现在是儿基会人道主义行动的一个强制性组成部分，儿基会已承诺进行更加注重公平的数据收集和分类。

data.en: Gender analysis is now a mandatory component of UNICEF humanitarian action, and UNICEF has committed to more equity-focused data collection and disaggregation.
data.zh: 在全球层面，2022年，儿基会支持并赞同联合国促进性别平等和增强妇女权能署（妇女署）成为机构间常设委员会负责人小组的成员，这将在这一机构间小组内提升妇女、女童和性别平等等问题的地位。

data.en: At the global level, in 2022, UNICEF supported and endorsed the membership of United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN-Women) in the IASC Principals Group, which will elevate women, girls and gender equality within this inter-agency group.
data.zh: 残疾儿童受到人道主义紧急情况的影响尤为严重，在获得人道主义援助方面面临的障碍更大。

data.en: Children with disabilities are disproportionately impacted by humanitarian emergencies and face steeper hurdles accessing humanitarian assistance.
data.zh: 儿基会概述了一项2023年的综合计划，以促进将残疾问题纳入其应急准备和应对工作。

data.en: UNICEF has outlined a comprehensive plan for 2023 to promote disability inclusion in its emergency preparedness and response.
data.zh: 该计划优先考虑机构间合作以及与地方残疾人组织和私营部门接触，以确保有效实施兼顾残疾人的人道主义行动。

data.en: The plan prioritizes inter-agency collaboration and engagement with local organizations of persons with disabilities and the private sector to ensure the effective implementation of disability-inclusive humanitarian action.
data.zh: 该计划包括传播“兼顾残疾人的人道主义行动”工具包，并在从事应急准备和应对工作的工作人员中发展相关的专门知识。

data.en: The plan includes the dissemination of the tool kit on Disability Inclusive Humanitarian Action and the development of related expertise among staff working in emergency preparedness and response.
data.zh: 儿基会期望进一步将残疾问题纳入整个人道主义-发展关系方面的工作，例如，在应急准备过程中和应对流动儿童时加强残疾问题的纳入。

data.en: UNICEF expects to further integrate disability inclusion into its work across the humanitarian-development nexus, for example, by strengthening disability inclusion in emergency preparedness processes and in response to children on the move.
data.zh: 加强群组领导能力也是今后的一个战略重点（见上文第59-64段）。

data.en: Enhancing cluster leadership capacity is also a strategic priority going forward (see paragraphs 59–64 above).
data.zh: 自1980年以来，每年向世界卫生组织报告的疾病暴发数量增加了两倍多。

data.en: The annual number of disease outbreaks reported to the World Health Organization has increased more than threefold since 1980.
data.zh: 人道主义危机和气候事件（例如，人口流离失所以及水卫项目和医疗卫生基础设施遭到破坏）加剧了霍乱传播的风险。

data.en: Humanitarian crises and climatic events heighten the risk of cholera transmission, for example, owing to population displacement and the destruction of WASH and health infrastructure.
data.zh: 全球系统已不堪重负，导致防范和应对多重霍乱疫情的能力不足——从而造成进一步传播的风险。

data.en: Global systems are overwhelmed. This is leading to insufficient capacity to prepare for and respond to the multiple cholera outbreaks – thereby creating a risk of further spread.
data.zh: 应对这种突发公共卫生事件时，需要采取以社区为中心的全社会方法。

data.en: Such public health emergencies require a whole-of-society response, with communities at the centre.
data.zh: 儿基会正在制定一项全球突发公共卫生事件防范和应对战略行动计划，作为世界卫生组织工作的补充，并为重振全球卫生架构提供支持。

data.en: UNICEF is building a global strategic plan of action for public health emergency preparedness and response that is complementary to the work of the World Health Organization and supports a reinvigorated global health architecture.
data.zh: 增强儿基会实地工作人员和合作伙伴的能力，使他们能够在复杂的紧急情况下留下来提供援助，并接触最难到达地区的最弱势儿童，这是儿基会的一项核心承诺。

data.en: Empowering UNICEF staff and partners in the field to stay and deliver in complex emergencies and to access the most vulnerable children in the hardest-to-reach areas is a core commitment of the organization.
data.zh: 儿基会将采取三管齐下的办法：就新出现的问题制定和实施人道主义政策和指南；加强伙伴关系，最大限度地发挥协同作用和互补性；继续高度重视支持儿基会外地办事处留下来提供援助，包括参与人道主义准入相关能力建设工作的国家工作人员，同时也更加重视外地办事处一级的工作人员——在人道主义准入问题上，他们往往处于第一线。

data.en: UNICEF will pursue a three-pronged approach: developing and implementing humanitarian policies and guidance on emerging issues; strengthening partnerships to maximize synergies and complementarities; and maintaining an intensive focus on supporting UNICEF field offices to stay and deliver, including national staff in humanitarian access-related capacity-building efforts, while also increasing the focus on staff at the field office level, who are often on the front line when it comes to access.
data.zh: 准入限制清单、行为体摸底调查和随后制定的准入战略都需要反映地方而不是全国性的实际情况和细微差别（例如，阿富汗和缅甸），这需要加强外地办事处一级的能力。

data.en: Access constraints inventories, mapping of actors and subsequent access strategies need to reflect the realities and granularities of local rather than country-wide contexts (e.g., Afghanistan and Myanmar), and this requires capacity at the field office level.
data.zh: 儿基会将继续优先考虑风险指引型人道主义和发展关系方案编制，作为实现儿基会《2022-2025年战略计划》成果的业务变革战略（见上文第56-58段）。

data.en: UNICEF will continue to prioritize risk-informed humanitarian and development nexus programming as an operational change strategy for achieving results in the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025 (see paragraphs 56–58 above).
data.zh: 2023年的一个关键优先事项是在机构间合作、预测、预先供资和确保做好更为充分的准备等方面，加大儿基会采取预见性行动的力度。

data.en: A key priority in 2023 is to increase UNICEF efforts on anticipatory action, in relation to inter-agency collaboration, forecasting, pre-financing and ensuring better readiness.
data.zh: 儿基会将加强技能和知识，掌握必要的技术专长，以实施关键的预见性行动干预。

data.en: Skills and knowledge will be strengthened with the required technical expertise to implement key anticipatory action interventions.
data.zh: 由于预见性行动的触发因素基于预测，因此这种行动与使用“无遗憾”的人道主义响应方法密切相关。

data.en: As triggers for anticipatory action are based on forecasts, such action is closely linked to using a no-regrets approach to humanitarian response.
data.zh: 2022年，预见性行动在儿基会内部和机构间一级赢得了关注，令许多儿童和家庭的生活得到改善。

data.en: Anticipatory action gained traction in 2022 within UNICEF and at the inter-agency level, and led to improvements in the lives of children and families.
data.zh: 然而，预见性行动需要有预见性资金来支持。

data.en: Nevertheless, anticipatory action requires anticipatory funding.
data.zh: 无限制和灵活的供资对于应对人道主义危机至关重要。

data.en: Unrestricted and flexible funding is critical to responding to humanitarian crises.
data.zh: 儿基会将继续改进关于其人道主义应对工作、预见性行动的益处、总体准备情况，以及全球人道主义专题资金等供资模式如何提供支持的报告和信息共享。

data.en: UNICEF will continue to improve reporting and information-sharing on its humanitarian response and the benefits of anticipatory action, preparedness in general, and how funding modalities such as global humanitarian thematic funding can provide support.
data.zh: 结论

data.en: Conclusion
data.zh: 人道主义危机中的儿童要想享有权利，还面临着巨大挑战；这些挑战相互关联，而且旷日持久。

data.en: The challenges to children in humanitarian crises being able to enjoy their rights are substantial; they are interlinked; and they are enduring.
data.zh: 如果说2022年反映了人道主义响应方面的未来形态，那么它也表明了儿基会如何挺身而出，应对复杂的情况，并将儿童始终置于富有远见、前瞻性的人道主义行动的中心。

data.en: If 2022 reflected the shape of the future in this regard, it also showed how UNICEF could rise to meet these circumstances and keep children at the centre of a visionary and forward-thinking humanitarian action.

data.en: These include emergencies in Bangladesh, Chad, Haiti, Lebanon, Mali and Nigeria and in those countries hosting refugees from the Syrian Arab Republic and Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of).
data.zh: 人道主义资金包括支持儿基会人道主义响应的其他资源——应急以及其他类型的资金。

data.en: Humanitarian funding includes other resources – emergency and other types of funding that support UNICEF humanitarian response.
data.zh: 这一大幅增长归功于向全球人道主义专题资金捐款的新合作伙伴：德国联邦外交部、儿基会瑞士和列支敦士登委员会、瑞典，以及美国儿基会基金和荷兰的捐款增加、儿基会国家办事处的私营部门筹资增加。

data.en: This significant increase was made possible thanks to new partners who contributed to global humanitarian thematic funding: the German Federal Foreign Office, the Committee for UNICEF Switzerland and Liechtenstein, and Sweden, as well as increases in contributions from the United States Fund for UNICEF and the Netherlands and from private sector fundraising by UNICEF country offices.
data.zh: 这7个国家是指阿富汗、刚果民主共和国、尼日利亚、巴勒斯坦国、叙利亚阿拉伯共和国、乌克兰和也门。

data.en: Afghanistan, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Nigeria, the State of Palestine, the Syrian Arab Republic, Ukraine and Yemen.
data.zh: 尽管2022年来自国际金融机构的人道主义资金有所减少，但这些机构对儿基会的总体支持水平有所增加。

data.en: Though humanitarian funding from international financial institutions decreased in 2022, the overall level of support from these institutions to UNICEF increased.
