data.zh: 欧洲经济委员会2022-2023期间工作总结

data.en: Summary of the work of the Economic Commission for Europe, 2022–2023
data.zh: 摘要

data.en: Summary
data.zh: 尽管在一些领域取得了进展，并对2030年可持续发展议程作出了持续的政治承诺，但可持续发展目标的实施仍面临持续的挑战。

data.en: Despite progress in some areas and the continued political commitment to the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals is facing sustained challenges.
data.zh: 在2019冠状病毒病(COVID-19)大流行疫情后，乌克兰战争及经济前景恶化为支持可持续发展的政策制定创造了更复杂及困难的环境。

data.en: After the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic, the war in Ukraine and the worsening of the economic outlook have created a more complex and difficult context to navigate for policymaking in support of sustainable development.
data.zh: 在这些不利情况下，欧洲经济委员会(欧洲经委会)继续帮助其成员国在其授权工作领域推动可持续发展目标的执行。

data.en: In these adverse circumstances, the Economic Commission for Europe (ECE) has continued to help its member States to advance the implementation of the Goals in its mandated areas of work.
data.zh: 数字化转型正在塑造新的现实，但也改变了对推进可持续发展的看法。

data.en: The digital transformation is shaping new realities, but also shifting perspectives on the advancement of sustainable development.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会正在适应不断变化的世界，并协助其成员国利用数字化带来的机遇。

data.en: ECE is adapting to a changing world and assisting its member States in taking advantage of the opportunities created by digitalization.
data.zh: 加快脱碳工作的紧迫性正在增加。

data.en: The urgency of accelerating decarbonization efforts is mounting.
data.zh: 环境压力仍然过大，正在对健康产生有害后果。

data.en: Environmental pressures remain excessive and are having detrimental consequences for health.
data.zh: 向绿色经济和更可持续的自然资源管理过渡是实现可持续发展目标的核心，其影响超越国界，也超越区域界限。

data.en: The transition to a green economy and more sustainable management of natural resources is central to the implementation of the Goals, with implications that transcend national boundaries, but also regional limits.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会提供了一套相关的规范性产出，越来越多的行为体接受这些产出，包括在本区域以外。

data.en: ECE offers a set of relevant normative outputs, which are finding increased acceptance, including beyond the region.
data.zh: 推进2030年议程需要地方、国家和区域各级多个行为体的贡献，这些行为体面临不同类型的问题，并提供不同的行动和调动资源的能力。欧洲经委会越来越多地致力于寻求各种各样的参与。

data.en: Advancing the 2030 Agenda requires the contribution of multiple actors, at the local, national and regional levels, who are confronted by different types of problems and offer different capacities to act and mobilize resources. Seeking this varied engagement is playing an increased role in the work of ECE.
data.zh: 一.

data.en: I.
data.zh: 导言

data.en: Despite progress in some areas and the continued political commitment to the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals is facing sustained challenges.
data.zh: 在2019冠状病毒病(COVID-19)大流行疫情后，乌克兰战争及经济前景恶化为支持可持续发展的政策制定创造了更复杂及困难的环境。

data.en: After the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic, the war in Ukraine and the worsening of the economic outlook have created a more complex and difficult context to navigate for policymaking in support of sustainable development.
data.zh: 在过去一年中，粮食和能源价格上涨导致生活水平下降，对人口中最弱势群体的打击最大，同时凸显现有系统的脆弱性和加强抵御冲击能力的必要性。

data.en: The negative effects of climate change are becoming increasingly visible.
data.zh: 加快脱碳努力的紧迫性正在增加，但也越来越需要消除不断变化的天气模式的不利直接后果。

data.en: The urgency of accelerating decarbonization efforts is mounting, but there is also a growing need to address the adverse immediate consequences of changing weather patterns.
data.zh: 环境压力仍然过大，对健康和粮食系统造成了有害后果。

data.en: Environmental pressures remain excessive and are having detrimental consequences for health and food systems.
data.zh: 人口老龄化是一个具有多重影响的长期趋势，需要持续的政策关注。

data.en: In these adverse circumstances, the Economic Commission for Europe (ECE) has continued to support its member States to advance the implementation of the Goals in its mandated areas of work.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会还向乌克兰和其他直接受战争影响的国家提供援助，不仅是为了满足眼前的需要，而且也是为了促进未来的重建。

data.en: The urgency of the tasks ahead and the constraints on resources underline the need to identify transformative approaches that can be taken to accelerate considerably the implementation of the Goals.
data.zh: 数字化转型正在塑造新的现实，但也在改变对推进可持续发展的看法。

data.en: The digital transformation is shaping new realities, but also shifting perspectives on the advancement of sustainable development.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会正在适应不断变化的世界，并协助其成员国利用数字化带来的机遇。

data.en: ECE is adapting to a changing world and assisting its member States in taking advantage of the opportunities created by digitalization.
data.zh: 二.

data.en: II.
data.zh: 推进本区域执行《2030年可持续发展议程》

data.en: The picture that emerges from the 2023 progress report on the Goals prepared by ECE shows that, at the halfway point to 2030, a substantial acceleration in the implementation of the Goals is required.
data.zh: 根据所有区域委员会共享的方法编写的这份年度研究报告显示，根据目前的趋势，本区域到2030年将仅实现可持续发展目标的21项具体目标，低于2022年实现的26项具体目标。

data.en: This annual study, which was prepared based on a methodology shared by all regional commissions, shows that, on the basis of current trends, the region would achieve only 21 of the targets of the Goals by 2030, down from 26 targets in 2022.
data.zh: 有79项具体目标需要加快进展，高于之前的需要加快进展的64项具体目标。

data.en: For 79 of the targets, progress needs to be accelerated, up from 64 targets.
data.zh: 与上一次评估一样，15项具体目标需要扭转目前的趋势。

data.en: As in the previous assessment, current trends need to be reversed for 15 of the targets.
data.zh: 数据可用性有所改善，因为与2022年相比，覆盖的具体目标增加了10个。

data.en: Data availability has improved, as it was possible to cover 10 more targets than in 2022.
data.zh: 然而，数据仍不足以评估其中54个具体目标。

data.en: This assessment shows, to a large extent, the initial impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, as data collected in 2020 are available for 125 of the 156 indicators used.
data.zh: 然而，该报告并未反映2022年出现的挑战性情况，尤其是乌克兰战争对多项可持续发展指标的负面影响以及经济环境的整体恶化。

data.en: Reducing environmental footprints continues to be a challenge for sustainable development, with implications that extend beyond the region.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会在以下两个方面发挥关键作用：(a) 定期审查和评估环境状况；(b) 趋势以及就如何应对已查明的挑战以支持2030年议程向其成员国提供指导。

data.en: ECE plays a key role in: (a) regularly reviewing and assessing the status and trends of the environment; and (b) providing guidance to its member States on how to address identified challenges in support of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 第七次泛欧环境评估表明，虽然在某些地区的环境保护方面取得了进展，但仍然存在重大缺陷，对人的健康和环境构成威胁。

data.en: The seventh pan-European environmental assessment showed that while progress has been achieved in terms of environmental protection in certain areas, significant shortcomings remain and pose a threat to the health of both people and the environment.
data.zh: 它们与空气和水的质量、废物和化学品管理、水和卫生服务以及总体材料足迹有关。

data.en: The costs of environmental damage are staggering.
data.zh: 2022年12月发表的关于对空气污染不作为的代价的新研究显示，在近一半的欧洲经委会国家中，目前环境空气污染对健康和生态系统造成的经济损失相当于国内生产总值的5%以上。

data.en: New research on the costs of inaction on air pollution published in December 2022 revealed that in nearly half of ECE countries, the current monetary damage costs to health and ecosystems owing to ambient air pollution are equivalent to over 5 per cent of gross domestic product (GDP).
data.zh: 至少有6个国家的损失超过国内生产总值的10%。

data.en: Air pollution is a transboundary phenomenon that needs to be addressed through multilateral cooperation.
data.zh: 在各国根据《远距离越境空气污染公约》做出的具有约束力的减排承诺的支持下，减排措施每年可节省数十亿美元的损害费用。

data.en: Reduction measures, supported by binding emission reduction commitments made by countries under the Convention on Long-range Transboundary Air Pollution, save billions of dollars in damage costs each year.
data.zh: 在履行现有的国家减排义务和《公约》议定书中规定的现行排放限值的支持下，预计到2030年期间，本区域因空气污染而造成的经济损失将比2020年至少减少14%。

data.en: However, a report on the effectiveness of international cooperation on cleaner air prepared within the framework of the Convention on Long-range Transboundary Air Pollution and issued in late 2022 (ECE/EB.AIR/2022/3) showed that there is still much work to do.
data.zh: 尽管根据《关于减少酸化、富营养化和地面臭氧议定书》(《哥德堡议定书》)，主要污染物的排放量已大幅减少，但如果不加强措施，预计空气污染将对健康、生态系统和粮食生产造成持续损害。

data.en: Despite significant reductions in emissions of major pollutants under the Protocol to Abate Acidification, Eutrophication and Ground-level Ozone (Gothenburg Protocol), sustained damage from air pollution to health, ecosystems and food production can be expected in the absence of strengthened measures.
data.zh: 该报告由本区域的主要科学家和决策者在过去三年中编写，呼吁在农业、能源、运输和航运等部门进一步采取有针对性的减排措施，并在饮食和供暖等领域进行广泛的社会变革。

data.en: Nitrogen emissions are a particular concern.
data.zh: 长期以来，农业中化肥的大量使用以及粪肥的生产和利用导致大量的氮被排放到空气中，并释放到水中和土地上。

data.en: The massive use of fertilizers and the production and utilization of manure in agriculture over an extended period have led to significant amounts of nitrogen being emitted into the air and released into water and on land.
data.zh: 燃烧化石燃料是氮排放的另一个来源。

data.en: Burning of fossil fuels is another source of nitrogen emissions.
data.zh: 这些氮排放的可怕后果包括空气、土壤和水污染，这可能损害人类健康，威胁森林和河流的生物多样性，并导致沿海和海洋污染，从而加剧气候变化的影响。

data.en: Among the dire consequences of these nitrogen emissions are air, soil and water pollution, which can damage human health, threaten the biodiversity of forests and rivers and lead to coastal and marine pollution, thus exacerbating the effects of climate change.
data.zh: 2022年10月，根据《远距离越境空气污染公约》发布的一份报告显示，生态系统对大气中的氮污染比以前认为的更为敏感。

data.en: Scarce water resources are threatened by rising demand, pollution and climate impacts, such as drought and flooding.
data.zh: 共享水资源方面的合作是促进可持续发展和适应气候变化的重要工具。

data.en: Cooperation on shared water resources is a vital tool for promoting sustainable development and climate change adaptation.
data.zh: 2022年，大约80个国家聚集一堂，庆祝《跨界水道和国际湖泊保护和利用公约》30年来取得的成就，该公约现在是一项对促进全世界水合作具有重大意义的全球性文书。

data.en: In 2022, some 80 countries gathered to celebrate 30 years of achievements of the Convention on the Protection and Use of Transboundary Watercourses and International Lakes, which is now a global instrument with great significance for promoting water cooperation worldwide.
data.zh: 2022年，喀麦隆成为《公约》第四十七个缔约国。

data.en: In 2022, Cameroon became the forty-seventh party to the Convention.
data.zh: 20多个国家正在加入过程中。

data.en: Addressing biodiversity threats requires action at all levels.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会出版了关于发展国家生物多样性监测系统的最新准则。

data.en: ECE has published updated guidelines for developing national biodiversity monitoring systems.
data.zh: 该准则就如何制定保护和可持续利用生物多样性的计划和战略向各国提供咨询意见，同时将生物多样性保护目标纳入各部门的主流。

data.en: The guidelines offer advice to countries on how to develop plans and strategies for the conservation and sustainable use of biodiversity, while mainstreaming biodiversity conservation objectives across sectors.
data.zh: 此外，准则还就如何评估实现政策目标的进展和保护措施的有效性提出了建议。

data.en: In addition, they provide recommendations on how to assess progress in achieving policy targets and the effectiveness of conservation measures.
data.zh: 目标是尽量减少生物多样性丧失和生态系统退化造成的健康、环境和社会经济风险，同时尽量扩大生物多样性和生态系统的惠益。

data.en: The goals are to minimize health, environmental and socioeconomic risks resulting from biodiversity loss and ecosystem degradation, while maximizing the benefits of biodiversity and ecosystems.
data.zh: 准则将支持实施可持续发展目标和2022年12月通过的昆明-蒙特利尔全球生物多样性框架。

data.en: Besides developing norms and providing policy advice, ECE has supported stronger action on critical environmental issues in the region to align economic development with the green and low-carbon transition.
data.zh: “欧洲环境”进程的秘书处设在欧洲经委会，该进程促进绿色经济政策和承诺。

data.en: The Environment for Europe process, whose secretariat is hosted by ECE, facilitates green economy policies and commitments.
data.zh: 它为应对环境挑战、改善环境治理、促进环境和跨部门合作以及国家间信息共享提供了一个独特的泛欧平台。

data.en: At the ninth “Environment for Europe” Ministerial Conference, held in Nicosia from 5 to 7 October 2022, government delegations from 53 States Members of the United Nations, as well as many other stakeholders, agreed that new sustainable infrastructure should promote resource efficiency to reduce long-term environmental impacts.
data.zh: 应促进创新、基于自然的解决方案以及与私营部门的合作。

data.en: Innovation, nature-based solutions and cooperation with the private sector should be fostered.
data.zh: 各国承诺支持减少旅游业的水和能源使用以及温室气体排放的努力，特别是在高影响分部门(包括游轮、航空和住宿)，并承诺支持生命周期办法，支持生产和消费中的资源效率和预防废物产生。

data.en: In this context, the Pan-European Strategic Framework for Greening the Economy, through the Batumi Initiative on Green Economy for mobilizing voluntary commitments and sharing positive experiences, offered new opportunities for action.
data.zh: 在会议之前各方提出了67项新的承诺，证实了对《巴统绿色经济倡议》的持续浓厚兴趣。

data.en: The continued strong interest in the Batumi Initiative on Green Economy was confirmed as 67 new commitments were submitted prior to the Conference.
data.zh: 新的承诺包括侧重于将循环经济原则应用于不同部门的行动，如旅游业和基础设施发展，以及改善可持续发展教育，包括与绿色和循环经济相关的技能。

data.en: The Convention on Access to Information, Public Participation in Decision-making and Access to Justice in Environmental Matters (Aarhus Convention) and its Protocol on Pollutant Release and Transfer Registers are central components of environmental governance in the region.
data.zh: 在过去的一年里，各方重申了对保护享有清洁、健康和可持续环境的人权的承诺，并在这方面作出了更多承诺。

data.en: A number of areas and activities were of particular significance.
data.zh: 对作为循环经济、化学品管理、塑料污染以及报告处理污染的国际协定和进程等各个领域的有用决策工具的污染物释放和转移登记册进行了宣传。

data.en: Pollutant release and transfer registers were promoted as useful tools for decision-making in various areas, such as the circular economy, chemicals management, plastic pollution and reporting on international agreements and processes dealing with pollution.
data.zh: 在日益数字化的背景下，电子信息工具正得到越来越多地使用。

data.en: Greater protection of environmental defenders through a rapid response mechanism has also been fostered.
data.zh: 奥胡斯公约缔约方会议选举米歇尔·福斯特为首任环境维权者问题特别报告员，这是一个具有里程碑意义的事件。

data.en: The election of Michel Forst by the Meeting of the Parties to the Aarhus Convention as the first Special Rapporteur on environmental defenders was a landmark event.
data.zh: 特别报告员努力保护任何因寻求行使《奥胡斯公约》规定的权利而遭受或即将受到惩罚、迫害或骚扰威胁的人。

data.en: In the face of climate-related shocks and stresses, building resilient energy systems is essential.
data.zh: 这需要优先考虑能源效率，能源系统数字化，加速燃料转换，有效和可持续地管理资源，并利用低碳和零碳技术。

data.en: This requires prioritizing energy efficiency, digitalizing the energy system, accelerating fuel switching, managing resources effectively and sustainably, and deploying low- and zero-carbon technologies.
data.zh: 为了确保过渡的公平性和社会接受度，政策必须侧重于减轻预期的社会冲击，并为受影响社区提供保护措施。

data.en: A massive shift from fossil fuels to renewable energy sources is necessary, along with investments to increase the electric grid capacity, to achieve carbon neutrality by 2050.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会碳中和工具包估计，本区域将需要投资12.3万亿美元，以在2020年至2050年期间提高能力，从而实现这一目标。

data.en: The ECE Carbon Neutrality Toolkit estimates that the region would need to invest $12.3 trillion to increase the capacity between 2020 and 2050 in order to achieve this goal.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会编制的欧洲、北美和中亚碳中和路线图提供了向低碳能源系统过渡和加强区域合作的途径。

data.en: Climate action requires a complete shift in the paradigm of unabated use of natural resources.
data.zh: 如今，只有不到10%的原材料被回收利用。

data.en: Today, less than 10 per cent of materials consumed are recycled.
data.zh: 从1970年到2017年，全球矿物开采量增加了两倍多，达到每年920亿吨。

data.en: Between 1970 and 2017, the extraction of minerals worldwide more than tripled, reaching 92 billion tons annually.
data.zh: 如果目前的趋势继续下去，到2060年，世界每年将需要1 900亿吨原材料。

data.en: If current trends continue, the world would require 190 billion tons of materials per annum by 2060.
data.zh: 新的联合国资源管理系统于2022年10月获得资源管理专家组批准，为国家、行业、金融界和民间社会提供了一种管理资源的新方式。

data.en: The United Nations Resource Management System will help to move away from a linear and unsustainable extractive approach towards a responsible and balanced one.
data.zh: 联合国资源管理系统作为自然资源综合管理的统一框架，以全球公认的联合国资源框架分类为基础，该框架分类纳入了一种通过环境-社会-经济可行性、技术可行性和估计数置信度这三重视角来评估资源的独特方法。

data.en: The System, as a unifying framework for the integrated management of natural resources, is based on the globally accepted United Nations Framework Classification for Resources, which has incorporated a unique methodology for assessing resources through the triple lens of environmental-social-economic viability, technical feasibility and degree of confidence in estimates.
data.zh: 核准联合国资源框架分类欧洲指南将便利利益攸关方就原材料储存和流动作出决策。

data.en: The shift to clean energy depends on the availability of critical raw materials, such as lithium, nickel, copper, cobalt, manganese, graphite and rare earth elements.
data.zh: 可持续的资源管理框架，如联合国资源框架分类和联合国资源管理系统，可以促进这些矿物的负责任的开采、加工和回收。

data.en: Hydrogen can make an important contribution to a low-carbon and resilient energy system that provides access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all.
data.zh: 可持续能源委员会在2022年9月举行的第三十一届会议上讨论了氢的术语、分类和分类法，并决定通过制定具体规范，将联合国资源框架分类扩展至氢。

data.en: The Committee on Sustainable Energy, at its thirty-first session, held in September 2022, discussed the terminology, classification and taxonomy for hydrogen, and decided that the United Nations Framework Classification for Resources should be extended to hydrogen through the development of particular specifications.
data.zh: 虽然温室气体排放是关键标准，但也应考虑其他经济和社会问题，使用联合国资源框架分类将有助于解决这些问题。

data.en: The post-war reconstruction of Ukraine will give offer an opportunity to make improvements to the local extractive and energy sectors so that they are compatible with the requirements of the green economy.
data.zh: 该国在许多关键原材料方面拥有巨大资源潜力，实施联合国资源框架分类和联合国资源管理系统将确保在进行这些原材料的生产、提炼和使用，以及至关重要的再利用和再循环时都将认真关注环境、经济和社会因素。

data.en: The country has significant resource potential for many critical raw materials and the implementation of the United Nations Framework Classification for Resources and the United Nations Resource Management System will ensure that the production, refining and use and, crucially, reuse and recycling of these materials will involve paying careful attention to environmental, economic and social considerations.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会正在这些领域协助该国。

data.en: As we enter an age of rising climate volatility and uncertainty, natural disasters are increasing in frequency and reverberating more violently, and thus pre-emptive and strategic planning will be increasingly necessary.
data.zh: 应采取预防性措施，克服提供援助的官僚作风，加强多边合作，并使边境援助规程具有灵活性和适应性。

data.en: Anticipatory measures should be adopted to overcome the bureaucracy involved in providing aid, to strengthen multilateral cooperation and instil flexibility and adaptability into aid protocols at borders.
data.zh: 为了解决这些问题，欧洲经委会通过联合国贸易便利与电子商务中心，与人道主义事务协调厅和进口和清关联合工作组合作，提出了一套简化和统一跨界贸易和行政程序的建议，以便利救灾货物和服务的交付。

data.en: The recommendations underscore the need for the simplification and harmonization of border processes in disaster scenarios and detail a number of solutions to achieve this.
data.zh: 其中包括设立“一站式服务点”，即多个机构负责接收和处理救济物品和人员的实际地点。

data.en: They include the creation of “one-stop shops”, which would be physical locations where multiple agencies are responsible for the arrival and processing of relief items and personnel.
data.zh: 这些地点将作为救灾工作中所有主要利益攸关方的联络点，提高合格援助行为体登记和救济物资移交的处理效率。

data.en: Road safety is a key development issue that costs developing countries between 2 per cent and 5 per cent of GDP every year.
data.zh: 2022年6月30日和7月1日，大会主席召开了关于改善全球道路安全的第一次高级别会议，会上国际社会承诺到2030年将道路伤亡人数减半。

data.en: The first high-level meeting on improving global road safety, held on 30 June and 1 July 2022 and convened by the President of the General Assembly, enshrined the commitment of the international community to halve road deaths and injuries by 2030.
data.zh: 联合国秘书长鼓励联合国所有会员国加入由欧洲经委会管理的联合国道路安全公约，联合国道路安全基金秘书处也设在欧洲经委会。

data.en: The Secretary-General of the United Nations encouraged all States Members of the United Nations to accede to the United Nations road safety conventions administered by ECE, which also houses the secretariat of the United Nations Road Safety Fund.
data.zh: 在会上，16个合作伙伴向联合国道路安全基金认捐了1 500多万美元，用于资助2022-2025年期间中低收入国家的项目。

data.en: At the meeting, 16 partners pledged over $15 million to the United Nations Road Safety Fund to finance projects in low- and middle-income countries in the period 2022–2025.
data.zh: 迄今为止，该基金已在全世界30个国家资助了25个影响力大的项目，但仍需要更多的资源。

data.en: The implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals has an important local dimension that is being increasingly recognized.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会促进了地方当局的参与，以支持它们努力应对可持续性挑战。

data.en: ECE has fostered the engagement of local authorities to support them in their efforts to address sustainability challenges.
data.zh: 第二届市长论坛于2022年4月举行，主题是“从COVID-19大流行疫情中恢复，同时推进可持续发展目标的实施”。

data.en: The second Forum of Mayors was held under the theme “Recovering from the COVID-19 pandemic while advancing the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals” in April 2022.
data.zh: 来自欧洲经委会区域内外44个城市的市长和副市长分享了他们在寻找以人为本的解决方案方面的经验，这些解决方案以确保成功实施2030年议程的方式，在满足其公民的需求和愿望的同时，防范灾害并应对气候变化的挑战。

data.en: ECE has elaborated the “Guidelines for the development of voluntary local reviews in the ECE region”, which provide cities with a standardized approach to localizing the Goals and to reviewing the implementation of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 这些准则得到在线培训的支持，将在本区域众多城市进行测试。

data.en: Urban-centred activities are a central component of ECE assistance to the Government of Ukraine.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会正在制定关于乌克兰住区(领土)综合恢复的“UN4Kharkiv和UN4Mykolaiv”举措，其目的是支持城市规划以促进近期重建工作。

data.en: ECE is developing the “UN4Kharkiv and UN4Mykolaiv” initiative, on integrated rehabilitation of settlements (territories) in Ukraine, which aims to support urban planning for immediate reconstruction efforts.
data.zh: 该举措包括在哈尔科夫市和尼古拉耶夫市制定城市重建计划的两个项目。

data.en: The initiative includes two projects on the development of urban reconstruction plans in the cities of Kharkiv and Mykolaiv.
data.zh: 这些计划将成为乌克兰其他城镇重建的蓝图。

data.en: Education for sustainable development is of critical importance in advancing the implementation of the 2030 Agenda, by increasing awareness of critical environmental issues and contributing to behavioural choices that lead to overall lower environmental impacts.
data.zh: 2022年10月5日，在第九届“欧洲环境”部长级会议框架内，在尼科西亚举行了第三次教育和环境部长高级别会议，通过了《尼科西亚教育促进可持续发展部长级声明》。

data.en: The third high-level meeting of education and environment ministries, which was held in Nicosia on 5 October 2022 within the framework of the ninth “Environment for Europe” Ministerial Conference, adopted the Nicosia Ministerial Statement on Education for Sustainable Development.
data.zh: 会议还通过了一个新的《2030年前教育促进可持续发展战略》执行框架，其重点是教育在应对我们这个星球和社会目前面临的前所未有的挑战方面应发挥的特殊作用。

data.en: A new framework for the implementation of the Strategy for Education for Sustainable Development up to 2030, focusing on the special role that education should play in addressing the unprecedented challenges currently faced by our planet and societies, was also adopted.
data.zh: 该框架强调青年作为变革的催化剂在创造更美好和有复原力的未来方面发挥的核心作用，并强调必须积极增强青年的权能，让他们参与制定和执行可持续发展政策和做法。

data.en: Amid heightened levels of uncertainty, the global demographic transformation is a trend that can be projected with confidence.
data.zh: 如今，欧洲经委会区域每六人中就有一人年龄超过65岁；到2050年，这一比例将达到四分之一。

data.en: Today, one in six people in the ECE region are over the age of 65; by 2050 this will be the case for one in four.
data.zh: 在2022年6月16日和17日于罗马举行的第五次老龄问题部长级会议上，部长们申明本区域集体致力于开展更密切的合作，以实现任何年龄的人都能过上最充实的生活。

data.en: Ministers at the fifth Ministerial Conference on Ageing, held in Rome on 16 and 17 June 2022, affirmed the region’s collective commitment for even closer cooperation to achieve a world in which everyone, of any age, can live their life to the fullest.
data.zh: 在《罗马宣言》的框架内，他们承诺致力于到2027年实现三个政策目标：促进积极健康的晚年生活；确保可以获得长期照护，并对照护者和家庭提供支持；以及将老龄问题纳入主流，以推动建立一个不分年龄人人共享的社会。

data.en: The period since the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic has been marked by slow progress in achieving gender equality in the ECE region and by pushbacks in parts of the region.
data.zh: 鉴于妇女平等参与和领导公共生活的重要性，在促进性别平等标准倡议取得成功后，欧洲经委会成员国责成秘书处设立一个促进性别平等标准专家组。

data.en: Given the importance of women’s equal participation and leadership in public life and following the success of the Gender Responsive Standards Initiative, member States of ECE tasked the secretariat with establishing a Team of Specialists on Gender-Responsive Standards.
data.zh: 该专家组的主要重点是为实现可持续发展目标5制定标准和技术法规。

data.en: Advancing the 2030 Agenda requires the engagement of all stakeholders, including through broad platforms for the mobilization of efforts and exchange of experiences.
data.zh: 在本区域陷入多重危机之际，2023年举行的欧洲经济委员会区域可持续发展区域论坛汇聚了1 000多名与会者，以扩大可持续发展目标的行动。

data.en: As the region finds itself mired in multiple crises, the Regional Forum on Sustainable Development for the Economic Commission for Europe Region, held in 2023, brought together over 1,000 participants to scale up action for the Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 区域论坛的核心是同行学习圆桌会议，这为广大利益攸关方提供了一个机会，就2023年可持续发展问题高级别政治论坛将审查的目标(即目标6、7、9、11和17)分享政策专门知识、咨询意见和分析。

data.en: At the centre of the Regional Forum were the peer learning round tables, which were an opportunity for a wide variety of stakeholders to share policy expertise, advice and analyses of the Goals to be reviewed at the high-level political forum on sustainable development in 2023, namely Goals 6, 7, 9, 11 and 17.
data.zh: 讨论强调了可对可持续发展目标进展产生重大影响的转型领域。

data.en: Discussions emphasized transformational areas, which can have a significant impact on progress with regard to the Goals.
data.zh: 青年和民间社会的代表强调了公平和包容性在推动可持续发展方面的重要性，以及青年和民间社会行为体在推动进步方面的关键作用。

data.en: Representatives of youth and civil society underlined the importance of equity and inclusivity in the drive for sustainable development, but also the crucial role of young people and civil society actors in driving progress.
data.zh: 三.

data.en: III.
data.zh: 加强《2030年可持续发展议程》的执行手段

data.en: A.
data.zh: 数据和统计

data.en: The rapid change in technology, including artificial intelligence and machine learning, and the use of data analytics and data science have created new opportunities for statistical offices.
data.zh: 使用新的数据来源可以提高编制统计数据的速度和效率以及统计数据的质量。

data.en: The use of new data sources can increase the speed and efficiency of production and the quality of statistics.
data.zh: 然而，要获得这些往往为私人所有的新资源，就需要有法律依据和新的方法、技能和技术。

data.en: However, obtaining access to these new sources, which are often privately owned, requires a legal basis and new methodologies, skills and technology.
data.zh: 它还带来了确保数据质量和保密性的挑战。

data.en: It also poses the challenge of ensuring data quality and confidentiality.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会一直在这一不断变化的环境中发展其统计工作，处理一系列新出现的问题，这些问题包括与私营数据提供者合作和使用机器学习和其他先进技术等各种问题。

data.en: While censuses underpin statistical work, they are complex and expensive to perform, which calls for detailed planning.
data.zh: 2023年1月，欧洲经委会启动了一个多年项目，为定于2030年进行的下一轮人口普查提供国际公认的指导和建议。

data.en: In January 2023, ECE launched a multi‑year project to produce internationally agreed guidance and advice for conducting the next round of censuses, scheduled for 2030.
data.zh: 在过去十年中，普查信息的收集方式发生了根本性变化，因此必须更新指导，以利用新方法并适应不断变化的需求。

data.en: The past decade has seen a fundamental shift in the way that census information is collected, hence the importance of updating guidance to harness new methods and adapt to changing needs.
data.zh: 预计将于2025年发布一套更新的建议。

data.en: Integrated, relevant, timely and easily accessible data are fundamental for assessing progress towards environmental targets and informed decision-making.
data.zh: 第九届“欧洲环境”部长级会议认识到，利用现代化工具和技术，获得各种信息来源和可靠、最新、高质量的数据和统计资料，对于应对当前和新出现的需求和挑战至关重要。

data.en: The ninth “Environment for Europe” Ministerial Conference recognized the crucial importance of having access to diverse information sources and reliable, up-to-date, quality data and statistics, by using modern tools and techniques, to address both current and emerging needs and challenges.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会积极参与支持各种努力，以确保建立适当的监测方案、数据和信息管理系统，并辅之以评估和报告程序。

data.en: Over the past year, ECE has continued to assist countries in enhancing their environmental monitoring and information systems and in producing high-quality and comparable data and statistics by applying revised ECE environmental indicators, in particular under the Working Group on Environmental Monitoring and Assessment and the Joint Task Force on Environmental Statistics and Indicators.
data.zh: 经修订的指标将支持成员国改进决策和衡量进展情况，包括在新出现的专题和与环境有关的人类健康问题方面。

data.en: ECE has been collecting data and information on forest and forest products in an increasingly detailed way.
data.zh: 这种持续的监测有助于查明能使森林地区处于危险之中的对自然和人为威胁的脆弱性。

data.en: This continued monitoring helps to identify vulnerability to natural and human-caused threats that could put forest areas at risk.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会的数据可用于更好地了解气候变化、火灾、虫害和恶劣天气对森林的影响。

data.en: ECE data may be used to better understand the impact of climate change, fires, pests and severe weather on forests.
data.zh: 2022年，欧洲经委会启动了泛欧数据收集进程的下一个周期；这一收集工作是关于本区域森林以及可持续森林管理的环境、社会和经济层面的主要信息来源。

data.en: In 2022, ECE launched the next cycle of the pan‑European data collection process; the collection represents a primary source of information on forests and the environmental, social and economic dimensions of sustainable forest management in the region.
data.zh: 将首次通过数字在线平台收集公开数据，这些数据将有助于在欧洲经委会区域执行气候议程。

data.en: The role that wood-based construction could play in reducing carbon emissions has attracted increased attention in the ECE region in recent years.
data.zh: 与此同时，建筑用工程木制品贸易激增。

data.en: At the same time, there has been a surge in the trade of engineered wood products for construction.
data.zh: 这些产品的数据收集工作于2023年初开始，将有助于更好地了解森林产品的级联使用及其所固存的碳，从而支持区域应对气候变化的行动。

data.en: B.
data.zh: 财务

data.en: The lingering effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, public support provided to offset the impact of higher food and energy prices, increased borrowing costs and a deteriorating economic outlook are putting public finances under pressure in parts of the region.
data.zh: 在这种情况下，为发展目的调动私人资源就变得更加重要。

data.en: In these circumstances, mobilizing private resources for developmental purposes becomes even more critical.
data.zh: 公私伙伴关系是基础设施项目投资的一种筹资机制，不仅可以调动资源，而且还可以产生额外的效益。

data.en: Public-private partnerships are a financing mechanism for investments in infrastructure projects that not only mobilize resources but can also have additional benefits.
data.zh: 然而，建立一个具有重大发展影响的公私伙伴关系项目面临许多挑战，需要具备一些条件。

data.en: To address these challenges, ECE built on its long-standing expertise acquired through its public-private partnership for the Sustainable Development Goals approach and launched a practical, user-friendly evaluation methodology, the Public-Private Partnerships and Infrastructure Evaluation and Rating System.
data.zh: 这一方法有助于各国政府建立公私伙伴关系，并以符合第三次发展筹资问题国际会议《亚的斯亚贝巴行动议程》的方式最大限度地扩大其发展影响，从而推动可持续发展目标的实现。

data.en: This methodology helps governments to set up public-private partnerships and maximize their developmental impacts in a way that is consistent with the Addis Ababa Action Agenda of the Third International Conference on Financing for Development and leads to the advancement of the Goals.
data.zh: 该方法使政府能够对所有类型的基础设施项目的发展影响进行全面的事前和事后定量和定性评估，而不论其规模和采购条件如何。

data.en: The Public-Private Partnerships and Infrastructure Evaluation and Rating System is complemented by detailed guidelines on promoting circular economy in public-private partnerships for the Sustainable Development Goals (ECE/CECI/ WP/PPP/2022/4).
data.zh: 该准则提供了实际的行业实例和政策选择，以确保公私伙伴关系基础设施项目支持向循环经济过渡。

data.en: The ECE regional forum on climate initiatives to finance climate action and the Sustainable Development Goals, held in Geneva on 17 October 2022, focused on improving sustainable management and financing for the critical raw materials required for the low-carbon transition.
data.zh: 论坛强调了为目标远大的气候项目提供定向融资的颠覆性潜力，以及欧洲经委会工具在减轻环境、社会和道德风险方面的关键作用。

data.en: The forum underlined the transformative potential of targeted financing for ambitious climate projects and the key role of ECE tools in mitigating environmental, social and ethical risks.
data.zh: 论坛讨论了整个区域的投资项目，最终形成了30个高影响力的气候行动项目，涵盖了扩大可再生能源的部署、能源储存、关键原材料、废物和数字化等领域。

data.en: Investment projects across the region were discussed, resulting in a portfolio of 30 high-impact climate action projects, covering such areas as scaling up the deployment of renewable sources of energy, energy storage, critical raw materials, waste and digitalization.
data.zh: 其中10个项目作为联合国气候融资举措简编的一部分在联合国气候变化框架公约缔约方会议第二十七届会议上提出。

data.en: Insufficient financing limits the ability to effectively address the challenges cities face.
data.zh: 这些挑战包括气候变化的后果、生物多样性丧失的影响、空气污染、废物管理、人口老龄化和移民等等。

data.en: They include, among others, the consequences of climate change, implications of biodiversity loss, air pollution, waste management, ageing populations and migration.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会编写了《创新融资做法简编》，用作培训材料，以支持欧洲经委会区域众多城市的能力建设活动。

data.en: C.
data.zh: 贸易

data.en: Trade plays a key role in increasing prosperity and lifting people out of poverty, while advancing sustainable development.
data.zh: 与此同时，不可持续的贸易模式继续导致温室气体排放，耗尽地球的自然资源，从而加剧了气候变化、生物多样性丧失和污染的三重全球危机。

data.en: To help reduce these environmental pressures, ECE has stepped up its efforts to mainstream circularity considerations in its trade-related work.
data.zh: 题为“加快循环经济转型：利用贸易和经济合作力量的政策选择”的政策简报讨论了在扩大循环经济方面的一般性挑战和具体部门的挑战，重点是经济转型国家的需要。

data.en: The ECE Team of Specialists on Environmental, Social and Governance Traceability of Sustainable Value Chains in the Circular Economy has developed solutions enabling environmental, social and governance traceability throughout international supply chains, using digital standards, including United Nations Centre for Trade Facilitation and Electronic Business e-business standards for tracing environmental, social and governance performance.
data.zh: 在服装和皮革部门取得成就后，小组的任务扩大到其他领域，如农业食品和采掘业以及关键原材料部门。

data.en: In the area of regulatory cooperation, recent achievements include the revision of “recommendation T: standards and regulations for sustainable development” of the Recommendations on Regulatory Cooperation and Standardization Policies, which calls on regulators to maintain current levels of safety in the transition to circularity.
data.zh: 该建议为考虑有关促进循环产品的技术法规对供应链活动的影响提供了一个实用的、基于风险的方法。

data.en: Standards are powerful tools for facilitating trade.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会继续更新其旨在改善端到端供应链活动(从收获到零售)的100多项自愿农业质量标准。

data.en: ECE continued to update its suite of over 100 voluntary agricultural quality standards, which are aimed at improving end-to-end supply chain activities (from harvest to retail outlets).
data.zh: 此外，欧洲经委会《减少处理水果和蔬菜过程中的粮食损失良好做法守则》就如何减少新鲜水果和蔬菜供应链中的损失和浪费提供了实用指导，有助于防止粮食损失和浪费。

data.en: In addition, the ECE Code of Good Practice for Reducing Food Loss in Handling Fruit and Vegetables helps prevent food loss and waste, by offering practical guidance on how to reduce loss and waste in fresh fruit and vegetable supply chains.
data.zh: 《守则》中有分别关于生产商、贸易商、运输商和零售商的章节，为该行业的所有参与者提供资源，以支持循环经济转型。

data.en: Through the activities of its Steering Committee on Trade Capacity and Standards, ECE builds capacities in countries with economies in transition, helping them better integrate in the world economy.
data.zh: 2022年，欧洲经委会完成了一项关于乌兹别克斯坦贸易监管和程序障碍的研究，其中提出了一系列建议，为该国政府在加入世界贸易组织背景下的贸易发展议程提供支持。

data.en: In 2022, ECE concluded a study on regulatory and procedural barriers to trade in Uzbekistan, which offers a series of recommendations to support the Government’s trade development agenda in the context of its accession to the World Trade Organization.
data.zh: 目前正在筹备在土库曼斯坦开展一项类似的研究。

data.en: ECE is also helping countries to implement the Agreement on Trade Facilitation of the World Trade Organization.
data.zh: 最近的举措包括加强吉尔吉斯斯坦贸易便利化理事会的能力，以及向经济和商务部提供技术援助，以制定2021-2025年期间国家贸易便利化路线图。

data.en: Recent initiatives have included strengthening the capacity of the Trade Facilitation Council of Kyrgyzstan and the provision of technical assistance to the Ministry of Economy and Commerce to develop a national trade facilitation road map for the period 2021–2025.
data.zh: 通过联合国中亚经济体特别方案提供了进一步的支助。

data.en: Trade in forest products is playing an increased role in the transition to a circular economy.
data.zh: 例如，欧洲经委会除了正在进行的森林产品贸易分析外，还努力促进跟踪木材废料、回收纸和回收纸浆的全球贸易。

data.en: For example, ECE, in addition to its ongoing analysis of forest products trade, works to facilitate the tracking of global trade in wood waste, paper for recycling and recovered pulp.
data.zh: 《森林和林业委员会的森林产品年度市场审查和预测：森林产品生产和贸易》等年度报告所载的数据和预测支持这些目标。

data.en: D.
data.zh: 创新

data.en: Innovation drives structural transformation and can provide answers to critical sustainability challenges.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会通过其创新促进可持续发展审查方案，帮助各国调动更多资源并提高资源使用的成效，从而改善其创新业绩。

data.en: ECE, through its programme of Innovation for Sustainable Development Reviews, helps countries to improve their innovation performance by mobilizing more resources and increasing the effectiveness of their use.
data.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦创新促进可持续发展审查支持2022-2030年国家创新战略的实施。

data.en: The Innovation for Sustainable Development Review of Uzbekistan supported the implementation of the national innovation strategy for the period 2022–2030.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会还协助摩尔多瓦共和国执行其创新促进可持续发展审查的建议，包括制定创新和技术转让路线图。

data.en: ECE is also assisting the Republic of Moldova in implementing the recommendations of its Innovation for Sustainable Development Reviews, including through the development of a road map on innovation and technology transfer.
data.zh: 在中亚和高加索国家为创新利益攸关方举办了一些区域培训讲习班。

data.en: In November 2022, ECE launched the Transformative Innovation Network, a large-scale joint initiative with the Federal Agency for Disruptive Innovation of Germany.
data.zh: 该网络汇集了公共和私营部门的利益攸关方，利用变革性创新促进可持续发展，并特别侧重政府在促进创新方面的催化作用。

data.en: The Network brings together public and private sector stakeholders to harness transformative innovation for sustainable development, with a particular emphasis on the catalytic role of the Government in fostering innovation.
data.zh: 总体重点是变革性创新，包括突破性和颠覆性创新，这些创新是多重和相辅相成的创新过程的结果，给我们消费、生产或创造社会价值的方式带来了根本性的变化。

data.en: E.
data.zh: 技术合作

data.en: The ECE Technical Cooperation Strategy provides the overall framework for technical cooperation.
data.zh: 该战略反映了为制定综合解决办法与驻地协调员制度和联合国国家工作队在该区域联合国方案国的协作。

data.en: The Strategy reflects collaboration with the resident coordinator system and United Nations country teams in United Nations programme countries in the region to develop integrated solutions.
data.zh: 除其他目标外，欧洲经委会的活动力求提高各国执行欧洲经委会法律文书、规范、标准和条例的能力，同时建立广泛的利益攸关者网络来参与这些活动。

data.en: The war in Ukraine has reverberated across the region’s food, energy and finance systems.
data.zh: 根据可持续发展目标联合基金的发展应急模式，欧洲经委会在乌克兰推广创新技术和适应性农业做法，并在格鲁吉亚农村地区推广能效举措。

data.en: Under a Joint Sustainable Development Goals Fund development emergency modality, ECE promoted innovative technologies and adaptive agricultural practices in Ukraine and energy efficiency initiatives in rural areas of Georgia.
data.zh: 应乌克兰政府的请求，欧洲经委会调整了技术合作经常方案的部分目标，以满足城市重建规划、能源、贸易便利化、运输和公私伙伴关系等领域的需求。

data.en: Throughout the region, ECE has carried out a number of projects in support of sustainable development.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会在改善成员国道路安全和实现国际运输现代化的努力中达到了重要的里程碑，协助制定国家战略并进行相关分析。

data.en: It has reached significant milestones in its efforts to improve road safety and modernize international transportation in its member States, assisting in the development of national strategies and carrying out related analyses.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会制定了安全和有效关闭阿尔巴尼亚和塞尔维亚矿场的指导方针，并在乌兹别克斯坦开展了一个关于区块链技术的试点项目，以促进棉花价值链的尽职调查和可持续性。

data.en: ECE supports United Nations country teams in the region in integrating environment and climate change into their programming cycle.
data.zh: 此外，与森林有关的问题和城市绿化正在得到更多的政策关注。

data.en: In addition, forest-related issues and urban greening are receiving increased policy attention.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会通过在中亚(吉尔吉斯斯坦和乌兹别克斯坦)以及摩尔多瓦共和国的技术合作，支持这些领域的努力。

data.en: ECE supported efforts in these areas through technical cooperation in Central Asia (Kyrgyzstan and Uzbekistan) as well as in the Republic of Moldova.
data.zh: 四.

data.en: IV.
data.zh: 聚焦数字化

data.en: Digitalization is creating a new context for policy action and overhauling economic sectors that are key for decarbonization.
data.zh: 疫情加速了正在进行的数字化转型进程，这将对经济和社会产生深远影响。

data.en: The pandemic accelerated the ongoing process of digital transformation, which will have profound economic and social implications.
data.zh: 在整个欧洲经委会区域，各国政府正在扩大将数字技术作为扩大繁荣、加强复原力和推进绿色转型的更广泛努力的一部分进行推广的举措。

data.en: Across the ECE region, governments are upscaling initiatives to promote digital technologies as part of broader efforts to increase prosperity, bolster resilience and advance the green transition.
data.zh: 2023年4月18日至19日举行的欧洲经济委员会第七十届会议特别关注数字和绿色转型促进可持续发展。

data.en: The seventieth session of the Economic Commission for Europe, held on 18 and 19 April 2023, put a special focus on digital and green transformations for sustainable development.
data.zh: 它为欧洲经委会关于这些专题的工作提供了新的动力，以现有的举措为基础，并利用数字化的潜力来交付其在多个活动领域的任务。

data.en: Digitalization provides opportunities to improve the management of natural resources and safeguard the environment.
data.zh: 然而，如果不以可持续的方式实施，它也会对环境和人类健康产生重大的不利影响，例如对硬件或电力的需求不断增长造成的影响。

data.en: However, it can also have significant adverse impacts on the environment and human health, for example as a result of the growing demand for hardware or electricity, if not implemented in a sustainable manner.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会通过促进能源效率、使用可再生能源以及转向循环和绿色经济等方式，支持绿化数字未来的活动。

data.en: Digital innovations can help address existing energy challenges, optimize energy use, reduce carbon footprints and facilitate the transition to more sustainable and resilient energy systems.
data.zh: 作为其可持续能源工作的一部分，欧洲经委会强调了使用大数据和高级分析来优化建筑物在整个生命周期中所使用能源的益处。

data.en: As part of its work on sustainable energy, ECE has highlighted the benefits of using big data and advanced analytics to optimize the energy used by buildings over a lifetime.
data.zh: 提高效率有助于减少能源贫困。

data.en: The digitalization of energy systems is, however, a complex process with multiple interdependencies across borders, sectors and actors.
data.zh: 必须考虑系统安全要求、个人隐私风险和潜在干扰；为此，采取了适当的预防和纠正措施。

data.en: The development of renewable energy requires significantly improved infrastructure and will increase the demand for critical raw materials, which are also necessary for electric vehicles and digital equipment.
data.zh: 在满足这一需求时适用循环原则将减少对资源的需求。

data.en: The application of circular principles in meeting this demand would reduce the need for resources.
data.zh: 数字技术可用于追踪材料，并将整个产品生命周期的利益攸关方汇集在一起，从而促进循环方法。

data.en: Digital technologies can be used to trace materials and bring together stakeholders across the life cycle of products, thus facilitating circular approaches.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会制定了多种工具，以支持其成员国努力确保关键原材料的有韧性、可持续和合乎道德的供应，以过渡到净零经济。

data.en: ECE is shaping the regulatory framework for inland transport in line with technological and social developments.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会正在领导自动化和联网车辆的规范性工作，这是未来移动性的关键领域。

data.en: It is leading normative work on automated and connected vehicles, which is a critical area for the future of mobility.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会制定了多个相关领域，如网络安全、软件更新和数据存储的法规和技术规定。

data.en: Existing normative instruments have evolved to take advantage of the opportunities created by digitalization.
data.zh: 《关于国际公路货运通行证制度下国际货运海关公约》利用国际公认的标准海关文件，即国际公路运输通关证，提供了一个国际公认的便利过境货物的跨界运输的程序。

data.en: The Customs Convention on the International Transport of Goods under Cover of TIR Carnets provides an internationally recognized procedure to facilitate the cross-border transportation of goods in transit using a standard, internationally recognized customs document, the TIR carnet.
data.zh: 2021年作出了法律变更，以创建eTIR程序，2022年，《国际公路货运公约》秘书处完成了eTIR国际系统的开发，并开始与国家海关系统互联。

data.en: So far, Azerbaijan, Georgia, Uzbekistan and the International Road Transport Union have finalized the interconnection with the eTIR international system and passed the mandatory conformance tests.
data.zh: 2023年，《国际公路货运公约》秘书处计划将国家海关系统与eTIR国际系统的互联互通扩大到77个缔约方中尽可能多的缔约方，特别是连接中亚和中东国家的走廊沿线。

data.en: In 2023, the TIR secretariat plans to expand the interconnection of national customs systems with the eTIR international system to as many of the 77 contracting parties as possible, particularly along the corridors connecting countries in Central Asia and the Middle East.
data.zh: 这一扩展将提高《国际公路货运公约》系统在多式联运方面的总体竞争力，从而降低成本和时间。

data.en: Digitalization offers significant opportunities to facilitate the movement of goods across borders, reducing costs and delivery times.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会通过其附属机构——联合国贸易便利与电子商务中心——为多式联运供应链的信息流数字化制定了一套新的标准，这一标准为加强各种运输方式信息流的互操作性提供了独特的基础。

data.en: Digitalization is critical in collating and making accessible environmental information.
data.zh: 第九届“欧洲环境”部长级会议发布了关于在欧洲和中亚建立共享环境信息系统的最新审查报告。

data.en: The ninth “Environment for Europe” Ministerial Conference saw the launch of the latest review report on the establishment of the Shared Environmental Information System in Europe and Central Asia.
data.zh: 虽然已经建立了国家系统，但仍然存在差距。

data.en: While national systems are in place, there are remaining gaps.
data.zh: 在国家一级建立的系统根据商定的关键原则组织环境信息，创建在线平台，向多个用户提供环境信息以改善决策。

data.en: The systems established at the national level organize environmental information according to agreed key principles to create online platforms that make environmental information available to multiple users for improved decision-making.
data.zh: 这些系统有助于定期进行环境评估，监测和报告多边环境协定和2030年可持续发展议程的进展情况。

data.en: They facilitate regular environmental assessments, monitoring and reporting on progress regarding multilateral environmental agreements and the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development.
data.zh: 这一证据为健全的决策提供了基础。

data.en: Initiatives to develop or upgrade pollutant release and transfer registers, as integrated data portals, have drawn particular attention, as part of efforts to establish coherent digital systems supporting work on environmental matters.
data.zh: 污染物排放和转移登记册中关于污染和废物的数据与其他环境、健康和社会经济数据的整合，为用户提供了重要的背景资料，并促进了数据的可比性，以便进行基准衡量和环境绩效评估。

data.en: The integration of pollutant release and transfer register data on pollution and waste with other environmental, health and socioeconomic data provides users with important context and facilitates data comparability for benchmarking and environmental performance evaluation.
data.zh: 污染物排放和转移登记系统的数字化还使政府能够提高数据质量，并更快地提供数据，以支持决策。

data.en: Recommendations on more effective use of electronic information tools under the Aarhus Convention have assisted governments in developing, maintaining, upgrading and using nationwide digital environmental information systems and supporting the early identification of risks.
data.zh: 通过产品数据库、数字产品护照、生态标签、能源效率和生态审计计划以及环境产品声明等方式，正将这些工具用于提高公众对产品信息的认识。

data.en: These tools are being used to raise public awareness of product information, including through product databases, digital product passports, eco-labelling, energy efficiency and eco-auditing schemes and environmental product declarations.
data.zh: 此外，它们还有助于公众了解有关向绿色经济过渡、绿色采购和可持续利用自然资源的良好做法和准则，并促进就可持续发展目标各项指标和其他相关国际和国家具体目标提出报告。

data.en: Digital technologies have shifted perspectives on the management of natural resources and created relevant opportunities for the exchange of information.
data.zh: 近年来，森林在推动减缓和适应气候变化、全球生物多样性框架和向循环经济过渡方面占据了中心位置。

data.en: To address the demand for information and support policymakers in their efforts to sustainably manage forests and the forest industry, ECE launched INForest in 2021.
data.zh: 这一专门平台在一个地点传播和分析欧洲经委会关于森林的所有数据，并提供关于森林状况和利用情况的精心编写的全面概览。

data.en: This dedicated platform disseminates and analyses all ECE data on forests in a single place and provides a curated and comprehensive overview of the status and use of forests.
data.zh: 通过从分散的来源收集数据和信息并以可访问的格式呈现，INForest提高了认识，并支持循证决策。

data.en: By gathering data and information from scattered sources and presenting them in an accessible format, INForest builds awareness and supports evidence-based policymaking.
data.zh: 2022年，欧洲经委会扩大了这一受欢迎的平台上的数据范围，并开始围绕这一工具开发综合信息系统。

data.en: Technology and digitalization are reshaping land administration by enabling land-related data to be stored, processed and analysed more efficiently and accurately.
data.zh: 这使得土地信息，包括财产边界、所有权和土地使用能够得到更好地管理。

data.en: This allows for better management of land information, including property boundaries, ownership rights and land use.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会与联合国粮食及农业组织和国际测量师联合会合作，编写了一份题为“数字化转型与土地管理：欧洲经委会区域内外的可持续做法”的研究，并举办了土地管理数字化网络研讨会。

data.en: Smart cities rely on digital technologies to optimize the delivery of public services, improve the management of natural resources, reduce pollution and traffic congestion and lower the environmental footprint of buildings.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会参加了“共建可持续智慧城市”倡议，这是一个倡导支持向智能城市过渡的公共政策的全球平台。

data.en: ECE is part of the United for Smart Sustainable Cities initiative, a global platform that advocates for public policies that support the transition to smart cities.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会与国际电信联盟一起制定了一套关键绩效指标，并对这些指标进行了改进，以更好地反映可持续发展目标。

data.en: Together with the International Telecommunication Union, it developed a set of key performance indicators, which have been refined to better reflect the Sustainable Development Goals.
data.zh: 在过去一年中，欧洲经委会协助阿拉木图(哈萨克斯坦)和第比利斯地方政府以及圣马力诺政府通过应用这些关键业绩指标和编写附有政策建议的智能可持续城市概况，制定关于可持续住房和城市发展的循证政策。

data.en: New forms of collaboration, which are based on the pooling of information, are made possible by digital technologies.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会启动了国际运输基础设施观测站，这是一个网络平台，载有各种运输基础设施网络的数据，包括欧洲、亚洲、中东、西地中海和北非的公路、铁路、内陆水道、港口、机场、多式联运码头、物流中心和过境点。

data.en: The Observatory, which currently hosts geographic information system transport network data from 79 States Members of the United Nations, operates as a virtual marketplace for financing transport infrastructure by providing an electronic interface between four user groups: governments, multilateral development banks, regional cooperation organizations and the wider public.
data.zh: 将采取分阶段办法扩大观测站的地理范围，预计到2024年将有另外27个联合国会员国加入。

data.en: A phased approach will be taken to expand the geographical scope of the Observatory, with a further 27 States Members of the United Nations expected to join by 2024.
data.zh: 五.

data.en: V.
data.zh: 利用可持续发展伙伴关系

data.en: Strong partnerships are an important contributor to the successful delivery of ECE mandates and advancement of the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 多年来，欧洲经委会一直与其他实体成功合作。

data.en: Over many years, ECE has worked successfully in partnership with other entities.
data.zh: 联合行动的领域包括知识生成和与其他行为体的交流、规范性工作成果和标准的传播以及能力建设倡议等。

data.en: Peer learning and the exchange of experiences are among the key objectives of partnerships.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会与其他组织合作举行了多次政策辩论，讨论贸易、创新和投资的交叉领域的紧迫可持续发展问题，包括在2022年举行的世界贸易组织部长级会议以及世界贸易组织公共论坛和贸易与环境周上。

data.en: As part of its overall efforts to promote the circular economy, ECE launched “Circular STEP”, a stakeholder engagement platform for policy dialogue.
data.zh: 它使欧洲经委会区域内外的不同利益攸关方汇聚一堂，通过经验分享、能力建设和分析活动支持循环经济过渡。

data.en: It brings together different stakeholders from the ECE region and beyond to support the circular economy transition through experience-sharing, capacity-building and analytical activities.
data.zh: 除政府代表外，“循环步骤”还吸引了私营部门、学术界、民间社会和其他利益攸关方参与。

data.en: In addition to government representatives, “Circular STEP” engages the private sector, academia, civil society and other stakeholders.
data.zh: 为了进一步利用这一广泛平台的影响，“循环步骤”还促进与其他联合国倡议的伙伴关系，包括“一个地球”网络和可持续粮食体系专题联盟。

data.en: In the area of environment, ECE has created an extensive range of partnerships with key organizations operating in this area.
data.zh: 在过去一年中，与欧洲环境署、联合国环境规划署、世界卫生组织、经济合作与发展组织、欧洲航天局以及环境监测和评估领域的其他伙伴继续就一系列问题开展合作。

data.en: With water stress on the rise in shared river basins and aquifers, over 30 governments and organizations have decided to join forces to push for greater cross-border water cooperation.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会是跨界水合作联盟的成员，该联盟是一个多利益攸关方伙伴关系，致力于强调合作管理共有水资源对于水安全和可持续发展的至关重要性。

data.en: Target 12 of the Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework adopted at the fifteenth meeting of the Conference of the Parties to the Convention on Biodiversity highlights the importance of urban trees and forests.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会与地方可持续发展协会(宜可城)合作，进一步采取行动，支持地方和国家两级的城市树木和森林。

data.en: ECE partnered with Local Governments for Sustainability (ICLEI) to further action in support of urban trees and forests at the local and national levels.
data.zh: 这有助于欧洲经委会通过其“城市植树挑战”倡议开展城市林业工作，迄今已在近80个城市种植了1 300万棵树，并与整个区域的地方和国家当局进行了接触。

data.en: ECE partnered with the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations, Forest Europe, the European Environment Agency and the European Forest Institute Integrate Network to establish an informal cooperation facilitation network on forest-related work.
data.zh: 该举措旨在支持信息交流和加强合作。

data.en: The initiative seeks to support information exchange and strengthen cooperation.
data.zh: 与联合国开发计划署在城市绿化行动和森林总体规划方面建立的伙伴关系力求帮助制止荒漠化和景观退化，同时促进可持续发展和恢复咸海等大片退化地区。

data.en: More broadly, ECE plays a leading role in regional cooperation among United Nations organizations in Europe and Central Asia.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会执行秘书担任欧洲和中亚区域合作平台副主席，该平台是促进该区域联合国实体之间合作和联合活动的核心机制。

data.en: The Executive Secretary of ECE serves as Vice-Chair of the Regional Collaborative Platform for Europe and Central Asia, the central mechanism for fostering cooperation and joint activities among United Nations entities in the region.
data.zh: 区域合作平台通过其多机构专题联盟，将其活动重点放在以下交叉问题上：性别平等；青少年和青年；社会保护；人口大规模流动、流离失所和复原力；环境和气候变化；可持续粮食体系；数字化转型；以及数据和统计。

data.en: Through its multi-agency issue-based coalitions, the Regional Collaborative Platform focuses its activities on the cross-cutting issues of gender equality; adolescents and youth; social protection; large movements of people, displacement and resilience; environment and climate change; sustainable food systems; digital transformation; and data and statistics.
data.zh: 通过联合政策分析和咨询、次区域和区域两级的机构间方案、能力建设举措、提高公众认识运动和知识管理系统等方式，向联合国国家工作队提供联合支助。

data.en: Joined-up support is provided to United Nations country teams, for instance through joint policy analysis and advice, inter-agency programmes at the subregional and regional levels, capacity-building initiatives, public awareness campaigns and knowledge management systems.
data.zh: 六.

data.en: VI.
data.zh: 结论

data.en: In a world and a region experiencing significant turbulence, but also facing unresolved challenges, the role that the 2030 Agenda plays in providing a sense of direction and a rallying point for the efforts of multiple actors has acquired new relevance.
data.zh: 旨在识别风险并在风险演变为不利后果之前加以解决的《2030年可持续发展议程》的预防导向，为应对这些充满挑战性的时期提供了重要指导。

data.en: The transition to a green economy and the more sustainable management of natural resources is central to the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals, with implications that transcend national boundaries, but also regional limits.
data.zh: 欧洲经委会提供了一套相关的规范性产出，越来越多的人接受这些产出，包括在该区域以外。

data.en: ECE offers a set of relevant normative outputs, which are finding increased acceptance, including beyond the region.
data.zh: 鉴于具有环境影响的行动具有跨界性质，加强和扩大国际合作仍然至关重要。

data.en: Given the transboundary dimensions of actions with environmental impacts, strengthening and broadening international cooperation remain critical.
data.zh: 这包括确保向最需要支持的国家提供适当支持，以促进可持续性。

data.en: Integrated approaches are the most valuable, not only because they are more resource-effective in addressing problems, but also because they help to identify gaps and the potential downside effects of policy interventions.
data.zh: 因此，广泛合作和强有力的伙伴关系至关重要，包括就未来可能发生的情况形成共同看法。

data.en: Broad collaboration and strong partnerships are therefore critical, including to develop a shared view of what the future may hold.
data.zh: 推进2030年议程需要地方、国家和区域各级多个行为体的贡献，这些行为体面临不同类型的问题，并提供不同的行动和调动资源的能力。

data.en: Advancing the 2030 Agenda requires the engagement and contribution of multiple actors, at the local, national and regional levels, who are confronted by different types of problems and bring different capacities to act and mobilize resources.
data.zh: 这些考虑因素在欧洲经委会的工作中发挥着越来越大的作用。

data.zh: 2023年7月25日经济及社会理事会决议

data.en: Resolution adopted by the Economic and Social Council on 25 July 2023
data.zh: [根据欧洲经济委员会的建议(E/2023/15/Add.1)通过]

data.en: United Nations Resource Management System Principles and Requirements
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会，

data.en: The Economic and Social Council,
data.zh: 注意到欧洲经济委员会在2023年4月18日和19日于日内瓦举行的第七十届会议上，在本决议所附H (70)号决定中，核可了2022年4月14日通过的《联合国资源管理系统原则和要求》， 建议广泛传播《原则和要求》，请联合国会员国、国际组织和各区域委员会考虑是否可以采取适当措施，确保在全世界适用《原则和要求》，提议经济及社会理事会建议在全世界适用《原则和要求》，并指出这一提议不涉及经费问题，

data.en: Noting that, at its seventieth session, held in Geneva on 18 and 19 April 2023, the Economic Commission for Europe, in its decision H (70), annexed to the present resolution, endorsed the United Nations Resource Management System Principles and Requirements of 14 April 2022, recommended that the Principles and Requirements be disseminated widely, invited States Members of the United Nations, international organizations and the regional commissions to consider the possibility of taking appropriate measures to ensure the application of the Principles and Requirements worldwide, and proposed to the Economic and Social Council that it recommend the application of the Principles and Requirements worldwide, and noting that this proposal does not have financial implications,
data.zh: 决定请联合国会员国、国际组织和各区域委员会考虑是否可以采取适当措施，确保在全世界适用《联合国资源管理系统原则和要求》。

data.en: Decides to invite States Members of the United Nations, international organizations and the regional commissions to consider the possibility of taking appropriate measures to ensure the application of the United Nations Resource Management System Principles and Requirements worldwide.
data.zh: 第43次全体会议

data.en: 43rd plenary meeting
25 July 2023
