data.en: Agenda item 17
data.zh: 非政府组织

data.en: Non-governmental organizations
data.zh: 2023年3月30日委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国常驻联合国代表团临时代办给经济及社会理事会主席的信

data.en: Letter dated 30 March 2023 from the Chargé d’affaires a.i. of the Permanent Mission of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela to the United Nations addressed to the President of the Economic and Social Council
data.zh: 谨此向担任联合国经济及社会理事会主席的阁下致函，以提及2023年3月22日在日内瓦人权理事会第五十二届会议框架内发生的又一起令人遗憾的事件。

data.en: I have the honour to address you, in your capacity as President of the Economic and Social Council of the United Nations, to refer to yet another regretful episode that took place on 22 March 2023, within the framework of the fifty-second session of the Human Rights Council, in Geneva.
data.zh: 当时正在审议涉及委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国的议程项目，一个具有经济及社会理事会咨商地位、称作“联合国观察组织”的非政府组织发言，当时的发言代表是委内瑞拉反对派一位知名成员，他与该非政府组织不存在任何从属关系，自己还承认是我国的逃犯，他在潜逃之前曾被控犯有严重罪行，包括腐败、破坏稳定、公开暴力、攻击危害公民安全和叛乱等罪行，所有这些行为都造成了经济和人员损失。

data.en: At that time, during the consideration of agenda items concerning the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela, the floor was given to the non-governmental organization known as “United Nations Watch”, which holds consultative status at the Economic and Social Council, and which was represented then by a well-known member of the Venezuelan opposition, who has no affiliation whatsoever to the non-governmental organization (NGO) in question, and who is also a self-confessed fugitive from justice in our country after having been indicted for the commission of serious crimes, including acts of corruption, destabilization, public violence, attacks against civil security and rebellion, among others, all of which resulted in both economic and human losses.
data.zh: 毋庸赘言，这是某些个人和(或)包括非政府组织在内的某些实体又一次登场表演，他们在某些情况下甚至与本组织一些会员国的政府串通，继续相当有系统地企图滥用联合国的名义以牟取私利或推进自私的本国利益，同时企图为了政治目的将本组织当作武器来对付其自身的会员国。

data.en: This was, needless to say, yet another episode of the continued and rather systematic attempts of certain individuals and/or entities, including NGOs, in some instances even with the complicity of a number of Governments of States Members of our Organization, to misuse the name of the United Nations either for personal gain or for advancing selfish national interests, while weaponizing the Organization, for political purposes, against its very own Member States.
data.zh: 此人不仅在2023年3月22日人权理事会会议期间使用不当言辞，而且其言论还充满了对合法、合宪、通过民主选举产生的委内瑞拉当局的攻击，其依据是针对我国的虚假和毫无根据的指控。这些指控不仅公然违反《联合国宪章》所载宗旨和原则以及经济及社会理事会1996年7月25日关于联合国与非政府组织之间的咨商关系的第1996/31号决议的规定，而且削弱人权理事会的工作及其体制，同时还迫使人权理事会不得不面临与其前身机构同样的命运。

data.en: Not only was the language used by the individual in reference during the Human Rights Council session on 22 March 2023 improper, but his remarks were also filled with attacks against the legitimate, constitutional and democr atically elected authorities of Venezuela, on the basis of false and baseless accusations against our country, which, apart from representing a flagrant violation both of the purposes and principles enshrined in the Charter of the United Nations and of the provisions of Economic and Social Council resolution 1996/31 of 25 July 1996, which governs the consultative relationship between the United Nations and non-governmental organizations, weakens the work of the Human Rights Council and its institutionality, while condemning it to having the same fate as its predecessor body.
data.zh: 此外，最重要的是要指出这绝不是孤立事件，而是一系列反复发生的系统性事件中的又一次故伎重演。

data.en: In addition, it is of utmost importance to note that this is in no way an isolated episode, but rather another one in a list of recurrent episodes of a systematic nature.
data.zh: 例如，正如本信附件所载当时提交给经济及社会理事会主席的信中所示，早在2021年3月就有一起涉及同一非政府组织的类似事件受到了谴责(见附件)。

data.en: For instance, a similar episode, involving this very same NGO, was denounced back in March 2021, according to the attached letter, which was submitted then to the President of the Economic and Social Council (see annex).
data.zh: 我们怎么强调也不过分的是，这种情况不仅是对委内瑞拉的攻击，也是对整个人权理事会的攻击，它既完全无助于就与人权有关的重要问题持续展开相互尊重和建设性的对话，也无助于推进经济及社会理事会的工作，同时它还危害允许非政府组织参与本组织各种活动的特权和精神。

data.en: This situation, we cannot overemphasize, represents an attack not only against Venezuela, but against the Human Rights Council as a whole, and contributes in no way to either maintaining a respectful and constructive dialogue on questions as important as those related to human rights, or advancing the work of the Economic and Social Council, while, in addition, jeopardizing the prerogatives and spirit under which NGOs are allowed to participate in different activities of the Organization.
data.zh: 也许这是一个最好的例子，说明非政府组织在经济及社会理事会的咨商地位是如何被一些此类实体(特别是“联合国观察组织”)一再误用和滥用于推进破坏稳定的政治目的。

data.en: It represents, perhaps, one of the best examples of how the consultative status of these organizations before the Economic and Social Council is being repeatedly both misused and abused by some such entities, most notably by “United Nations Watch”, for the purpose of advancing political agendas of destabilization.
data.zh: 在这方面，值得回顾第1996/31号决议第1至3段作出的如下规定：
非政府组织处理的事项“应属经济及社会理事会及其附属机关主管范围”；
“该组织的之目的和宗旨应与《联合国宪章》之精神、宗旨和原则相符合”；
“该组织应承允按照其本身目的和宗旨及其本身主管的事务和活动之性质和范围，支助联合国之工作，并促进对联合国原则和活动的认识”。

data.en: That “the organization shall undertake to support the work of the United Nations and to promote knowledge of its principles and activities, in accordance with its own aims and purposes and the nature and scope of its competence and activities”.
data.zh: 委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国承认并特别重视民间社会和包括非政府组织在内的基层运动对联合国工作的贡献。

data.en: The Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela recognizes and attaches particular importance to the contributions of civil society and grass-roots movements in general, including NGOs, to the work of the United Nations.
data.zh: 然而，我们必须警惕有人对这一崇高形象的误用和滥用及其对本组织政府间性质的潜在影响，特别是例如此类情况——某些非政府组织以所谓捍卫人权为幌子，在正式会议上进行政治宣传，包括使用不当和不尊重的言辞，最终削弱人权理事会的职权范围和影响力。

data.en: Yet we must warn about the misuse and abuse of this noble figure and its potential impact on the intergovernmental nature of our Organization, particularly in those instances in which, under false pretences of alleged defence of human rights, the conduct of certain NGOs ends up weakening the scope and influence of the Human Rights Council as a result of their use of political propaganda in official meetings, including with inappropriate and disrespectful language.
data.zh: 我国政府认为，像人权理事会这样重要的论坛被声誉不佳和有公开犯罪记录的个人或实体居心不良地利用，是令人愤慨的，它们只会想方设法推进与本组织创始《宪章》所预见的目标或真正的人权精神背道而驰的目的，企图破坏对人权理事会机制的信任，并破坏在联合国与委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国持续对话和加强合作的框架内取得的进展，所有这一切都违背了给予它们的咨商地位和期望它们发挥的作用。

data.en: For our Government, it is outrageous that forums as important as the Human Rights Council are used, not precisely in good faith, by either individuals or entities of dubious reputation and with open criminal records, which only seek to advance purposes contrary to those foreseen in the very founding Charter of our Organization or to the true spirit of human rights, in an attempt to undermine both the confidence in the mechanisms of the Human Rights Council and the progress achieved within the framework of the continued dialogue and strengthened cooperation between the United Nations and the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela, all of it in violation of the consultative status granted upon them and the role expected of them.
data.zh: 因此，在这方面值得回顾同样载于经济及社会理事会第1996/31号决议的其他内容和规定，特别是第55和57段所载的内容和规定：

data.en: Organizations granted consultative status by the Council and those on the Roster shall conform at all times to the principles governing the establishment and nature of their consultative relations with the Council.
data.zh: 理事会非政府组织委员会根据非政府组织依下文第61(c)段的规定所提报告及其他有关资料，定期审查该类组织的活动时，应断定各组织遵行关于咨商地位原则与对理事会工作所作贡献的程度，并可建议理事会停止或撤销未满足本决议所载咨商地位条件的各组织的咨商地位。”

data.en: The consultative status of non-governmental organizations with the Economic and Social Council and the listing of those on the Roster shall be suspended up to three years or withdrawn in the following cases:
data.zh: “(a) 倘任何组织显然直接或通过其分支机构或为其利益行事的代表滥用其咨商地位，从事违背《联合国宪章》的宗旨和原则的一类行为，包括对联合国会员国从事不符合这些宗旨和原则的无事实根据或出于政治动机的行为；

data.en: “(a) If an organization, either directly or through its affiliates or representatives acting on its behalf, clearly abuses its status by engaging in a pattern of acts contrary to the purposes and principles of the Charter of the United Nations including unsubstantiated or politically motivated acts against Member States of the United Nations incompatible with those purposes and principles;
data.zh: “(b) 有确凿证据表明受非法毒品交易、洗钱或非法军火交易等国际公认的犯罪活动所得收益影响者；

data.en: “(b) If there exists substantiated evidence of influence from proceeds resulting from internationally recognized criminal activities such as the illicit drugs trade, money-laundering or the illegal arms trade;
data.zh: “(c) 倘任何组织在此前三年期内对联合国，特别是对理事会或其所属各委员会或其他附属机关的工作未作出任何积极或有效贡献。”

data.en: “(c) If, within the preceding three years, an organization did not make any positive or effective contribution to the work of the United Nations and, in particular, of the Council or its commissions or other subsidiary organs.”
data.zh: 鉴于上述情况，并考虑到该组织参加各种联合国实体的政治动机，至关重要的是经济及社会理事会应行使其权力，迅速有效地处理这一令人关切的情况，这也是为何委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国谨通过阁下促请理事会和非政府组织委员会紧急全面审查称作“联合国观察组织”的非政府组织的挑衅行为，该组织无疑一再公然违反关于其在经济及社会理事会的咨商地位的原则以及《联合国宪章》的精神和文字，展开审查的目的是根据第1996/31号决议的规定和其他有关规范和准则，停止该组织的咨商地位，作为一劳永逸地有效纠正这种情况并避免为今后树立不良先例的一种具体手段。

data.en: In the light of the above, and taking into account the politically motivated nature of its participation in different entities of the United Nations, it is of utmost importance that the Economic and Social Council exercise its authority to promptly and effectively address this concerning situation, which is why the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela respectfully calls on that body, through you, as well as on the Committee on Non-Governmental Organizations, to urgently initiate a comprehensive review of the defiant conduct of the NGO known as “United Nations Watch”, which has unquestionably and repetitively violated in a flagrant manner the principles governing its consultative status before the Economic and Social Council, as well as the spirit and letter of the Charter of the United Nations, with a view to suspending its consultative status, on the basis of the provisions of resolution 1996/31 and other relevant norms and guidelines, as a concrete means to effectively redress once and for all this situation and avoid it setting a negative precedent for the future.
data.zh: 谨请进行斡旋，将本信作为经济及社会理事会议程项目17下的文件分发为荷。

data.en: I respectfully request your good offices to have the present letter issued as a document of the Economic and Social Council, under agenda item 17.
data.zh: 2023年3月30日委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国常驻联合国代表团临时代办给经济及社会理事会主席的信的附件

data.en: Annex to the letter dated 30 March 2023 from the Chargé d’affaires a.i. of the Permanent Mission of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela to the United Nations addressed to the President of the Economic and Social Council
data.zh: 2021年3月29日委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国常驻联合国代表给经济及社会理事会2021年届会主席的信

data.en: Letter dated 29 March 2021 from the Permanent Representative of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela to the United Nations addressed to the President of the Economic and Social Council at its 2021 session
data.zh: 谨此向担任联合国经济及社会理事会主席的阁下致函，以提及2021年3月10日和11日在日内瓦人权理事会第四十六届会议框架内发生的一起令人遗憾的事件。

data.en: I have the honour to address you, in your capacity as President of the Economic and Social Council of the United Nations, to refer to a regretful episode that took place on 10 and 11 March 2021, within the framework of the forty-sixth session of the Human Rights Council, in Geneva.
data.zh: 当时正在人权理事会第29和30次会议上审议涉及委内瑞拉的议程项目，两名据称来自具有经济及社会理事会咨商地位的“联合国观察组织”的代表在发言时使用了不适合这一论坛场合的言辞，随即被人权理事会主席指出，他们在发言中专门对这一庄严机构的正式成员国委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国进行毫无根据的卑劣指控，而且是在大会于2019年10月17日刚举行最近一次选举之后。

data.en: At that time, during the consideration of agenda items concerning Venezuela, at the 29th and 30th meetings of the Human Rights Council, two alleged representatives from the non-governmental organization known as “United Nations Watch”, which maintains consultative status at the Economic and Social Council, took the floor and, while using language inappropriate for that forum, as pointed out by the President of the Human Rights Council immediately after, dedicated their statements to making scurrilous and baseless accusations against the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela, a full member of that august body, following its most recent election by the General Assembly on 17 October 2019.
data.zh: 毋庸赘言，这是企图利用联合国的名义牟取私利，同时将本组织当作武器来对付合法、正当、合宪和通过民主选举产生的委内瑞拉当局。

data.en: This was, needless to say, an attempt to use the name of the United Nations for personal gain, while weaponizing the Organization against the lawful, legitimate, constitutional and democratically elected authorities of Venezuela.
data.zh: 本信提到的个人(他们实际上只不过是以积极推动美国对我国进行军事入侵而闻名的两个委内瑞拉人)的言论，既没有推动就与人权有关的重要问题保持相互尊重和建设性的对话，也没有推动经济及社会理事会的工作，同时，这也显然不符合《联合国宪章》所载的宗旨和原则。

data.en: The remarks of the individuals in reference, who are in reality nothing more than two Venezuelan individuals well known for actively promoting a United States military invasion against their own nation, contribute in no way to either maintaining a respectful and constructive dialogue on questions as important as those related to human rights, or advancing the work of the Economic and Social Council, while, in addition, constituting a clear lack of adherence to the purposes and principles enshrined in the Charter of the United Nations.
data.zh: 相反，他们的言论旨在推进其个人鼓吹战争的意图，这肯定超出了允许非政府组织参与本组织各种不同活动的职权、特权和精神，也是这些组织在经济及社会理事会的咨商地位如何被误用和滥用的一个例子。

data.en: Their remarks, instead, were aimed at advancing their own personal and warmongering agendas, which certainly goes beyond the capacities, prerogatives and spirit under which NGOs are allowed to participate in different activities of the Organization and is an example of how the consultative status of these organizations before the Economic and Social Council can be both misused and abused.
data.zh: 在这方面，值得回顾经济及社会理事会1996年7月25日关于联合国与非政府组织之间咨商关系的第1996/31号决议第1至3段作出的如下规定：
非政府组织处理的事项“应属经济及社会理事会及其附属机关主管范围”；
“该组织的之目的和宗旨应与《联合国宪章》之精神、宗旨和原则相符合”；
“该组织应承允按照其本身目的和宗旨及其本身主管的事务和活动之性质和范围，支助联合国之工作，并促进对联合国原则和活动的认识”。

data.en: That “the organization shall undertake to support the work of the United Nations and to promote knowledge of its principles and activities, in accordance with its own aims and purposes and the nature and scope of its competence and activities”.
data.zh: 外国政府的代理人伪装成非政府组织代表，明显带着侵犯性的动机出现在各种联合国论坛上，这违反了处理人权问题时必须秉承的客观性、公正性、非选择性、非对抗性和非政治化原则，而且破坏了对不同联合国机构的信任，根本无助于营造建设性对话与合作的环境。

data.en: The presentation of agents of foreign Governments with clear aggressive motivations before different United Nations forums, disguised as representatives of NGOs, goes against the principles of objectivity, impartiality, non-selectivity, non‑confrontation and non-politicization under which human rights must be addressed and, far from contributing to fostering an environment of constructive dialogue and cooperation, undermines trust in different United Nations bodies.
data.zh: 委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国承认并特别重视民间社会和基层运动对联合国工作的贡献。

data.en: The Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela recognizes and attaches particular importance to the contributions of civil society and grass-roots movements to the work of the United Nations.
data.zh: 然而，我们必须警惕有人对这一崇高形象的误用和滥用及其对本组织政府间性质的潜在影响，特别是例如此类情况——某些非政府组织以所谓捍卫人权为幌子，在正式会议上宣扬战争，包括使用不当和不尊重的言辞，最终削弱人权理事会的职权范围和影响力。

data.en: Yet we must warn about the misuse and abuse of this noble figure and its potential impact on the intergovernmental nature of our Organization, particularly in those instances in which, under false pretences of alleged defence of human rights, the conduct of certain NGOs ends up weakening the scope and influence of the Human Rights Council as a result of their use of war propaganda in official meetings, including with inappropriate and disrespectful language.
data.zh: 我国政府认为，像人权理事会这样重要的论坛被用来推进鼓动战争的目的，是令人愤慨的，这完全不符合和违背人权和《宪章》的宗旨。

data.en: For our Government, it is outrageous that forums as important as the Human Rights Council are used for advancing warmongering purposes, which are totally incompatible with and contrary to both human rights and the very tenets of the Charter.
data.zh: 更糟糕的是，正如随信附上供参考的文件和档案所示，一个名为“联合国观察组织”的非政府组织和另一个名为“世界工程师协会”的非政府组织有着众所周知的误用和滥用其经济及社会理事会咨商地位的记录，它们不仅对委内瑞拉，还对其他联合国会员国进行系统性的攻击。

data.en: Far worse is the fact that the NGO known as “United Nations Watch”, together with another NGO known as “Ingénieurs du monde”, have a well-known record of misuse and abuse of their consultative status at the Economic and Social Council, as demonstrated in the documents and files attached herewith for ease of reference, with systematic attacks not only against Venezuela, but also against other States Members of the Organization.
data.zh: 因此，在这方面，值得回顾经济及社会理事会第1996/31号决议所载的其他内容和规定，特别是第55和57段所载的内容和规定：

data.en: Organizations granted consultative status by the Council and those on the Roster shall conform at all times to the principles governing the establishment and nature of their consultative relations with the Council.
data.zh: 理事会非政府组织委员会根据非政府组织依下文第61(c)段的规定所提报告及其他有关资料，定期审查该类组织的活动时，应断定各组织遵行关于咨商地位原则与对理事会工作所作贡献的程度，并可建议理事会停止或撤销未满足本决议所载咨商地位条件的各组织的咨商地位。”

data.en: The consultative status of non-governmental organizations with the Economic and Social Council and the listing of those on the Roster shall be suspended up to three years or withdrawn in the following cases:
data.zh: “(a) 倘任何组织显然直接或通过其分支机构或为其利益行事的代表滥用其咨商地位，从事违背《联合国宪章》的宗旨和原则的一类行为，包括对联合国会员国从事不符合这些宗旨和原则的无事实根据或出于政治动机的行为；

data.en: “(a) If an organization, either directly or through its affiliates or representatives acting on its behalf, clearly abuses its status by engaging in a pattern of acts contrary to the purposes and principles of the Charter of the United Nations including unsubstantiated or politically motivated acts against Member States of the United Nations incompatible with those purposes and principles;
data.zh: “(b) 有确凿证据表明受非法毒品交易、洗钱或非法军火交易等国际公认的犯罪活动所得收益影响者；

data.en: “(b) If there exists substantiated evidence of influence from proceeds resulting from internationally recognized criminal activities such as the illicit drugs trade, money-laundering or the illegal arms trade;
data.zh: “(c) 倘任何组织在此前三年期内对联合国，特别是对理事会或其所属各委员会或其他附属机关的工作未作出任何积极或有效贡献。”

data.en: “(c) If, within the preceding three years, an organization did not make any positive or effective contribution to the work of the United Nations and, in particular, of the Council or its commissions or other subsidiary organs.”
data.zh: 鉴于上述情况，至关重要的是经济及社会理事会应行使其权力，迅速有效地处理这一令人关切的情况，这也是为何委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国谨通过阁下促请理事会和非政府组织委员会紧急全面审查称为“联合国观察组织”和“世界工程师协会”的非政府组织的最近行为，它们明确和蓄意地违反关于其在经济及社会理事会的咨商地位的原则以及《联合国宪章》的精神和文字，展开审查的目的是根据第1996/31号决议的规定和其他有关规范和准则，停止它们的咨商地位，作为一劳永逸地有效纠正这种情况并避免为今后树立不良先例的一种具体手段。

data.en: In the light of the above, it is of utmost importance that the Economic and Social Council exercise its authority to promptly and effectively address this concerning situation, which is why the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela respectfully calls on that body, through you, as well as on the Committee on Non-Governmental Organizations, to urgently initiate a comprehensive review of the latest conduct of the NGOs known as “United Nations Watch” and “Ingénieurs du monde”, which have violated in a clear and deliberate manner the principles governing their consultative status before the Economic and Social Council, as well as the spirit and letter of the Charter of the United Nations, with a view to suspending their consultative status, on the basis of the provisions of resolution 1996/31 and other relevant norms and guidelines, as a concrete means to redress this situation and avoid it setting a negative precedent for the future.
data.zh: 委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国常驻联合国代表大使 塞缪尔·蒙卡达(签名)

data.en: (Signed) Samuel Moncada Ambassador Permanent Representative of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela to the United Nations
data.zh: 联合国

data.en: United Nations
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会

data.en: Economic and Social Council
data.zh: 联合国儿童基金会

data.en: United Nations Children’s Fund
data.zh: 执行局

data.en: Executive Board
data.zh: 2023年第一届常会

data.en: First regular session 2023

data.zh: 临时议程* 项目7

data.en: Item 7 of the provisional agenda*
data.zh: 衡量性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰问题处理进展并为战略、政策和程序提供信息的衡量标准和指标的最新情况

data.en: Update on metrics and indicators used to measure progress on tackling sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment and inform strategies, policies and procedures
data.zh: 摘要

data.en: Summary
data.zh: 本报告是根据执行局第2022/6号决定提交的，该决定“请儿基会提供最新资料，说明性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰问题处理进展的衡量标准以及关于性剥削、性虐待、性骚扰的综合成果和资源框架指标与联合国系统发展方面业务活动四年度全面政策审查的相关指标以及联合国发展系统其他机构的相关指标的一致性，并确保利用这些衡量标准和指标以及随后分析获得的数据，包括指控数据，系统地为各项战略、政策和程序提供信息”。

data.en: The present report is submitted pursuant to Executive Board decision 2022/6, which “requests an update from UNICEF on metrics used to measure progress on tackling sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment and how integrated results and resources framework indicators on sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment have aligned with relevant indicators of the quadrennial comprehensive policy review of operational activities for development of the United Nations system and those of other United Nations development system agencies and ensure that data obtained, including on allegations, using these metrics and indicators and subsequent analysis, systematically inform strategies, policies and procedures”.
data.zh: 本报告介绍了儿基会衡量标准和指标制定工作的最新情况，这些标准和指标用于衡量在处理性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰问题方面取得的进展，并为各项战略、政策和程序提供信息。

data.en: The report provides an update on the work of UNICEF to develop metrics and indicators used to measure progress on tackling sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment and inform strategies, policies and procedures.
data.zh: 概述

data.en: Overview
data.zh: 本报告提供儿基会目前用以衡量不正当性行为(性剥削和性虐待以及性骚扰) 处理进展的最新衡量标准。

data.en: The present report provides an update on the metrics that UNICEF currently uses to measure progress on addressing sexual misconduct (sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment).
data.zh: 关于儿基会《2022-2025年战略计划》综合成果和资源框架中的指标，本报告叙述：
《儿基会防止和应对性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰战略》的内容；
《战略》与衡量标准的一致性；
衡量标准与联合国系统发展方面业务活动四年度全面政策审查(四年度全面政策审查)和相关联合国监测框架的衡量标准的一致性；
儿基会衡量标准与联合国开发计划署(开发署)、联合国人口基金(人口基金)、联合国项目事务署(项目署)和联合国促进性别平等和增强妇女权能署(妇女署)采用的衡量标准的相似性；
儿基会的衡量标准和指控如何为有关不正当性行为的战略、政策和程序，包括行动计划提供信息。

data.en: How UNICEF metrics and allegations inform strategies, policies and procedures pertaining to sexual misconduct, including action plans.
data.zh: 本报告补充儿基会在其2021年四年度全面政策审查说明“关于联合国系统发展方面业务活动四年度全面政策审查执行情况的报告”(UNICEF/2022/EB/9)和“儿基会2022-2025年战略计划成果和资源综合框架”(E/ICEF/2021/25/Add.1)中提供的信息。

data.en: The present report complements the information provided by UNICEF in its 2021 QCPR narrative, “Report on the implementation of the quadrennial comprehensive policy review of operational activities for development of the United Nations system” (UNICEF/2022/EB/9) and the “Integrated Results and Resources Framework of the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025” (IRRF) (E/ICEF/2021/25/Add.1).
data.zh: 本文件载有通过其他现有的单独报告向执行局报告的衡量标准的信息，包括关于儿基会战略计划执行情况、关于防止性剥削和性虐待及组织文化努力、关于道德操守以及关于内部审计和调查的信息。

data.en: The present document includes information on metrics that are reported on to the Board through other existing, separate reports, including on implementation of the UNICEF Strategic Plan (IRRF), on prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse and organizational culture efforts, on ethics, and on internal audit and investigations.
data.zh: 特别是，将在2023年年会上提供关于儿基会工作的实质性信息和衡量标准进展情况、儿基会总部一级关于预防和应对性剥削和性虐待的行动计划以及更广泛的性骚扰进展情况。

data.en: In particular, substantive information about the work of UNICEF and progress on the metrics, the organization’s headquarters-level action plan on preventing and responding to sexual exploitation and abuse, and progress on sexual harassment more broadly, will be provided at the annual session of 2023.
data.zh: 本报告通篇提及联合国系统其他实体与儿基会指标类似的领域，以突出对接和一致的领域。

data.en: Throughout the present report, references are included to areas where other United Nations system entities have similar indicators to those of UNICEF, in an effort to highlight areas of alignment and coherence.
data.zh: 总体而言，儿基会有一系列衡量标准，利用不同的核查手段、工具和机制，跟踪全球、区域和国家在防止性剥削和性虐待方面取得的进展。

data.en: Overall, UNICEF has a range of metrics in place to track progress on prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse at global, regional and country levels, using different means of verification, tools and mechanisms.
data.zh: 根据联合国机构间努力，儿基会正在加大对国家一级数据的系统利用，为行动提供信息，特别是在围绕对受影响群体的问责、基于社区的机制和保护援助的方案干预措施方面。

data.en: In line with United Nations inter-agency efforts, UNICEF is increasingly using country-level data more systematically to inform action, and particularly in terms of programmatic interventions around accountability to affected populations, community-based mechanisms and protection assistance.
data.zh: 在性骚扰方面，也制定了衡量标准，但仍有空间进一步系统化，并协调本组织的数据收集、分析和使用。

data.en: With respect to sexual harassment, metrics are also in place, however, there is room to further systematize and coordinate data collection, analysis and use within the organization.
data.zh: 联合国系统行政首长协调理事会(行政首长协调会)处理联合国系统各组织性骚扰问题工作队的工作，特别是关于改进联合国系统性骚扰报告工作的年度调查问卷的工作，有助于将儿基会与联合国其他实体进行比较，并指出需要取得进一步进展的领域。

data.en: The work of the United Nations System Chief Executives Board for Coordination (CEB) Task Force on Addressing Sexual Harassment within the organizations of the United Nations system, particularly on the annual questionnaire on improved reporting of sexual harassment in the United Nations system, has been useful in benchmarking UNICEF against other United Nations entities and in indicating areas for further progress to be made.
data.zh: 二.

data.en: II.
data.zh: 儿童基金会《防止和应对性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰战略(2019年)》的目标

data.en: Goals of the UNICEF Strategy to Prevent and Respond to Sexual Exploitation and Abuse and Sexual Harassment (2019)
data.zh: 这项《战略》于2019年通过，旨在帮助落实儿基会关于不正当性行为的独立审查的建议。

data.en: The Strategy was adopted in 2019 to help fulfil recommendations of UNICEF independent reviews concerning sexual misconduct.
data.zh: 《战略》围绕以下五个要素制定，每个要素都用不同但相辅相成的指标进行衡量：
通过问责、预防和性别平等建设零容忍组织文化；
以幸存者为中心的高质量反应；
安全可信的举报机制；
快速可信的调查和制裁；
合作伙伴参与打击性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰。

data.en: A.
data.zh: 零容忍组织文化
组织问责。

data.en: Organizational accountability.
data.zh: 关于性剥削和性虐待，儿基会通过儿基会总部和国家一级的防止性剥削和性虐待行动计划来衡量组织问责。

data.en: On sexual exploitation and abuse, UNICEF measures organizational accountability through UNICEF headquarters and country-level action plans on protection from sexual exploitation and abuse.
data.zh: 在总部一级，儿基会采用联合国关于改进联合国对性剥削和性虐待应对特别协调员办公室提供的模板，该模板体现了以幸存者为中心的办法。

data.en: At the headquarters level, UNICEF uses the template provided by the United Nations Office of the Special Coordinator on improving the United Nations response to sexual exploitation and abuse, which embodies a survivor-centred approach.
data.zh: 该模板和儿基会将政策和实体监督作为一项成果。

data.en: The template and UNICEF include policy and entity oversight as an outcome.
data.zh: 这些行动计划对联合国监测框架指标3.6.11作出贡献。

data.en: These action plans contribute to the United Nations monitoring framework indicator 3.6.11.
data.zh: 关于对处理性骚扰的问责，儿基会主管管理事务的副执行主任办公室是负责协调性骚扰应对工作的全面问责办公室。

data.en: With respect to accountability for addressing sexual harassment, the office of the UNICEF Deputy Executive Director, Management, is the overall accountable office for coordination of sexual harassment efforts.
data.zh: 行政首长协调会2022年关于改进联合国系统性骚扰报告的调查问卷是这一领域持续监测的一个关键工具。

data.en: The 2022 CEB questionnaire on improved reporting of sexual harassment in the United Nations system is a key tool for ongoing monitoring in this area.
data.zh: 儿基会《2022-2025年性别平等行动计划》含有涉及工作人员性别均等的指标，可对鼓励报告性骚扰和采取预防行动产生积极影响。

data.en: The UNICEF Gender Action Plan, 2022–2025 includes indicators related to gender parity in staffing, which can have a positive impact on encouraging reporting of sexual harassment as well as preventive actions.
data.zh: 儿基会将继续按照执行局的要求，向执行局报告为处理性骚扰问题而采取的行动，以推进联合国监测框架指标3.6.
领导问责。

data.en: Leadership accountability.
data.zh: 儿基会根据联合国共同模板，通过国家行动计划(成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.5的一项内容)，衡量在防止性剥削和性虐待方面的领导问责。

data.en: UNICEF measures leadership accountability for protection from sexual exploitation and abuse through country action plans (an element of IRRF indicator E.3.5), based on common United Nations templates.
data.zh: 这些模板涵盖了在地方一级执行的《战略》的各个领域。

data.en: The templates cover each area of the Strategy, as executed at the local level.
data.zh: 儿基会的理解是，开发署、项目署、人口基金和妇女署都采用类似的指标。

data.en: UNICEF understands that UNDP, UNOPS, UNFPA and UN-Women all employ a similar indicator.
data.zh: 国家一级的类似计划将有助于联合国国家工作队防止性剥削和性虐待的行动计划，并采用联合国监测框架指标3.6.10进行衡量。

data.en: Similar plans at a country level will contribute to United Nations country team protection from sexual exploitation and abuse action plans, measured by the United Nations monitoring framework indicator 3.6.10.
data.zh: 儿基会将监测处理性骚扰的领导能力作为其《2022-2024年行动计划》的一部分，以响应最近认证的性别平等经济红利，推动联合国监测框架指标3.6.
个人问责。

data.en: Individual accountability.
data.zh: 儿基会通过达到心理安全和信任基准的办事处数目来衡量对个人问责的看法(成果和资源综合框架指标E.4.4)。

data.en: UNICEF measures perceptions of individual accountability through the number of offices that meet benchmarks for psychological safety and trust (IRRF indicator E.4.4).
data.zh: 心理安全是畅所欲言文化的基本要求，在这种文化中，所有员工都能够报告可能的不当行为而无需担心遭到报复。

data.en: Psychological safety is a fundamental requirement for a speak-up culture, and one where reporting possible misconduct is practiced by all employees without fear of retaliation.
data.zh: 儿基会为防止和应对性剥削和性虐待而采用的总部一级行动计划模板(由联合国监测框架指标3.6.14衡量)，也要求作为业绩管理的一部分对工作人员进行安全保障评估。

data.en: The headquarters-level action plan template used by UNICEF for preventing and responding to sexual exploitation and abuse, measured by the United Nations monitoring framework indicator 3.6.14, also requires staff to be assessed on safeguarding as part of performance management.
data.zh: 儿基会《战略》中预防努力的特点是保障每个办事处的风险登记和管理(按成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.4衡量)、培训以及内外部沟通。

data.en: Prevention efforts in the UNICEF Strategy feature safeguarding risk registration and management at every office (measured by IRRF indicator E.3.4), training, and internal and external communications.
data.zh: 项目署和开发署有类似的指标。

data.en: UNOPS and UNDP have similar indicators.
data.zh: 对于性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰，儿基会衡量性别平等方面的领导培训(成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.5的一项内容)，以及办事处一级使工作人员行为符合儿基会核心价值观的举措(成果和资源综合框架指标E.5.2)。

data.en: For both sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment, UNICEF measures leadership training on gender equality (an element of IRRF indicator E.3.5), and initiatives at the office-level to align staff behaviours with UNICEF core values (IRRF indicator E.5.2).
data.zh: 儿基会2022-2024年(性别平等证据和数据)行动计划呼吁采用应对性骚扰问题的社会和行为改变战略。

data.en: The UNICEF 2022–2024 EDGE Action Plan calls for employment of social and behavioural change strategies addressing sexual harassment.
data.zh: 项目署和开发署有相关的提高认识指标。

data.en: UNOPS and UNDP have related awareness-raising indicators.
data.zh: 关于防止性剥削和性虐待，伙伴能力至关重要；成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.5的一项内容是，民间社会伙伴被评估具有充分或中等能力的比例。

data.en: With respect to protection from sexual exploitation and abuse, partner capacity is vital; the proportion of civil society partners assessed at full or medium capacity is an element of IRRF indicator E.3.5.
data.zh: 项目署有一个与评估合作伙伴能力有关的指标。

data.en: UNOPS has a related indicator pertaining to assessment of partner capacity.
data.zh: 性别平等，包括人员编制的性别平衡，被视为防止不正当性行为的保护措施。

data.en: Gender equality, including gender balance in staffing, is considered protective against sexual misconduct.
data.zh: 儿基会将监测其各级女性工作人员的比例(对成果和资源综合框架指标E.4.1和儿基会性别平等行动计划指标H5.2的贡献)。

data.en: UNICEF will monitor the percentage of its female staff at each level (IRFF indicator E.4.1 and a contributor to the UNICEF Gender Action Plan indicator H5.2).
data.zh: 这一指标对应联合国四年度全面政策审查监测框架指标3.6.6-3.6.

data.en: B.
data.zh: 以幸存者为中心的高质量应对

data.en: A quality response that is survivor-centred
data.zh: 关于性剥削和性虐待，儿基会根据《联合国受害者援助规程》制定了应对程序。

data.en: With respect to sexual exploitation and abuse, UNICEF establishes response procedures in accordance with the United Nations Victims Assistance Protocol.
data.zh: 儿基会成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.5包含一个衡量国家办事处根据《规程》建立和执行程序的程度的要素。

data.en: UNICEF IRRF indicator E.3.5 includes an element that measures the extent to which country offices have established and implemented procedures in accordance with the Protocol.
data.zh: 开发署和项目署有类似的指标。

data.en: UNDP and UNOPS have similar indicators.
data.zh: 受害者援助机制的存在是儿基会使用的联合国行动计划模板的一部分，并反映在联合国监测框架指标3.6.

data.en: The existence of victim assistance mechanisms is part of the United Nations template action plan used by UNICEF, and captured by United Nations monitoring framework indicator 3.6.11.
data.zh: 关于性骚扰受害者援助，儿基会通过一种或多种现有支持工具向受害者提供支持，包括临时工作安排、改变报告关系、灵活工作安排或远程工作、提供工作人员咨询服务、推荐寻求个人或联合国医护人员的医疗支持、或在调查之前对被控行为人实行行政休假。

data.en: With respect to victim assistance related to sexual harassment, UNICEF has supported them with one or a combination of the available support tools, including interim work arrangements, change of reporting lines, flexible work arrangements or remote work, provision of staff counselling service, referral recommendations to seek medical support by personal or United Nations medical practitioners, or putting alleged perpetrators on administrative leave pending investigations.
data.zh: 如有需要，将对安全情况进行审查，以确定潜在的重复风险或报告后风险。

data.en: Where needed, a review of the security situation applies for potential repeat or post-reporting risks.
data.zh: 提供支持的方式分为两种，一种是持续措施，一种是在过程的所有阶段根据需要提供支持。

data.en: Support is provided either as continuous measures or as needed at any or all stages of the process.
data.zh: 另外，一项关键措施是向受害者提供关于程序和所涉步骤的明确解释和充分信息；儿基会采用敏感和了解创伤情况的面谈技巧。

data.en: Further, a key measure is that victims are provided clear explanations and full information on the process and involved steps themselves; and UNICEF applies sensitive and trauma-informed interviewing techniques.
data.zh: 但是，需要作出更大努力，确定如何最好地确保在性骚扰调查过程中和过程之后有一个安全、有利的环境并提供更好的受害者支持。

data.en: C.
data.zh: 安全可信的报告机制

data.en: Reporting mechanisms that are safe and trusted
data.zh: 在防止性剥削和性虐待方面，外部(社区)报告渠道十分重要。

data.en: With respect to protection from sexual exploitation and abuse, external (community) reporting channels are important.
data.zh: 成果和资源综合框架指标3.1.8衡量儿基会设有国家办事处的每个国家有报告性剥削和性虐待儿童和成人人数的安全、无障碍渠道。

data.en: IRRF indicator 3.1.8 measures the number of children and adults, within each country where UNICEF has a country office, who have access to a safe and accessible channel to report sexual exploitation and abuse.
data.zh: 关于不当行为的内部报告，综合框架指标E.3.5包含一项内容，即建立内部和伙伴报告机制以及提供报告程序培训。

data.en: For internal reporting of misconduct, IRRF indicator E.3.5 includes an element for establishment of internal and partner reporting mechanisms, and training on associated reporting procedures.
data.zh: 项目署和开发署有类似的指标。

data.en: UNOPS and UNDP have similar incident-reporting indicators.
data.zh: 内外部事件报告机制的存在以及对报告人的保护，也是联合国监测框架指标3.6.11所反映的联合国行动计划模板的一部分，并对联合国国家工作队报告机制指标3.6.13作出贡献。

data.en: The existence of internal and external incident reporting mechanisms, with whistle-blower protection, is also part of the United Nations template action plan captured by United Nations monitoring framework indicator 3.6.11, and contributes to the United Nations country team reporting mechanism indicator 3.6.13.
data.zh: 已经建立性骚扰以及其他形式的人际不当行为的内部事件报告机制。

data.en: Internal incident reporting mechanisms for sexual harassment, as well as other forms of interpersonal misconduct, have been established.
data.zh: 对不当行为报告机制的信任度通过成果和资源综合框架指标E.4.4中与心理安全安保有关的组织基准来衡量。

data.en: Trust in the mechanisms for reporting misconduct is measured by organizational benchmarks related to psychological safety and security in IRRF indicator E.4.4.
data.zh: 过去几年，向儿基会内部审计和调查办公室提出的潜在不当行为指控大幅增加，这可能表明儿基会工作人员和合作伙伴对报告机制的认识和信任有所提高。

data.en: D
data.zh: 快速可信的调查和制裁

data.en: Swift and credible investigations and sanctions
data.zh: 对所有不当性行为案件规定了调查优先次序、纪律时间目标和合理、有记录的结果。

data.en: Investigative prioritization, disciplinary time targets and reasoned, recorded outcomes are prescribed for all sexual misconduct cases.
data.zh: 这是儿基会使用的联合国防止性剥削和性虐待模板行动计划的一部分，并对联合国监测框架指标3.6.11作出贡献。

data.en: They are part of the United Nations template action plan for protection from sexual exploitation and abuse, used by UNICEF, and contribute to the United Nations monitoring framework indicator 3.6.11.
data.zh: 项目署目前有一个处理问责应对的指标。

data.en: UNOPS currently has an indicator addressing accountability response.
data.zh: 合作伙伴参与打击性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰

data.en: Engaging partners in the fight against sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment
data.zh: 关于保护工作人员不受性剥削和性虐待，儿基会衡量被评估具有充分或中等能力的民间社会伙伴的比例(成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.5的一项内容)。

data.en: With respect to protection from sexual exploitation and abuse, UNICEF measures the proportion of civil society partners assessed at full or medium capacity (an element of IRRF indicator E.3.5).
data.zh: 项目署有一个与评估合作伙伴能力有关的指标。

data.en: UNOPS has a related indicator pertaining to assessment of partner capacity.
data.zh: 儿基会参与处理性骚扰的合作伙伴一般是机构间伙伴，其衡量标准通过联合国监测框架衡量。

data.en: UNICEF partners engaged in addressing sexual harassment are generally inter-agency partners, whose metrics are measured through the United Nations monitoring framework.
data.zh: 三.

data.en: III.
data.zh: 防止性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰指标如何为战略、政策和程序提供信息

data.en: How prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment indicators inform strategies, policies and procedures
data.zh: 如上所述，儿基会《防止和应对性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰战略》有若干与其执行有关的指标，使本组织能够定期监测实现《战略》目标的进展情况

data.en: As noted above, the UNICEF Strategy to Prevent and Respond to Sexual Exploitation and Abuse and Sexual Harassment has several indicators associated with its implementation, allowing the organization to monitor progress towards the Strategy’s goals on a regular basis.
data.zh: 设定时限的行动计划实施儿基会《防止和应对性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰战略》的诸多方面。

data.en: Time-bound action plans operationalize most aspects of the UNICEF Strategy to Prevent and Respond to Sexual Exploitation and Abuse and Sexual Harassment.
data.zh: 行动计划的制定和报告(通常每年一次)为评估《战略》的执行情况提供了机会。

data.en: The creation and reporting of action plans (often annually) present an opportunity to assess the status of implementation of the Strategy.
data.zh: 国家一级的行动计划以国家一级收集的数据或活动为依据，并作相应调整。

data.en: The country-level action plans are informed by data collected or activities at country level and adjusted accordingly.
data.zh: 同样，全球一级的行动计划是综合考虑国家一级行动计划的关键数据点、目标和方法制定的。

data.en: Similarly, global-level action plans are developed based on aggregation of key data points, targets, and approaches from country-level action plans.
data.zh: 通过这种方式，为实现本组织各级防止和应对性剥削和性虐待工作的纵向一致性作出了努力。

data.en: In this way, there is an effort towards vertical coherence in the sexual exploitation and abuse work across different levels of the organization.
data.zh: 附件二说明了这一进程。

data.en: The process is depicted in annex II.
data.zh: 为了进行监督，儿基会的行政管理和全球牵头部门可以使用指标核查手段，还可以访问报告事件的数据，以对可能的影响进行监测。

data.en: To exercise oversight, UNICEF executive management and global leads have access to the means of verification of the indicators. They also have access to reported incident data to monitor possible impact.
data.zh: 在国家一级，国家管理小组将定期审查关于防止性剥削和性虐待的数据，并确定和实施对方案干预措施、外联工作和受害者援助活动的任何必要变动。

data.en: At country level, country management teams are expected to periodically review data on prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse, and identify and implement any necessary changes to programmatic interventions, outreach efforts, and victim assistance activities.
data.zh: 关于性骚扰数据，儿基会内部审计和调查办公室在提交执行局的年度总报告中报告了所报告的性骚扰指控。

data.en: With respect to sexual harassment data, the UNICEF Office of Internal Audit and Investigations reports on reported allegations of sexual harassment as part of its overall annual report to the Executive Board.
data.zh: 在机构间一级，行政首长协调会关于改进联合国系统性骚扰报告工作的年度调查问卷提供了一个机会，可以与联合国系统其他实体分享儿基会关于性骚扰报告的数据，了解儿基会与联合国其他基金和方案的比较情况，并共同讨论在防止和应对性骚扰方面的进一步统一努力。

data.en: At the inter-agency level, the annual CEB questionnaire on improved reporting of sexual harassment in the United Nations system serves as an opportunity to share UNICEF data on sexual harassment reporting with other United Nations system entities, learn how UNICEF compares to other United Nations funds and programmes, and jointly discuss further harmonization efforts with respect to sexual harassment prevention and response.
data.zh: 通过2022年的性别平等证据和数据认证进程，以及与持续执行工作场所性别歧视、性骚扰、骚扰和滥用权力问题独立工作队2019年报告中的建议有关的其他努力，儿基会确定需要加大力度，更系统地使用性骚扰指标，为围绕性骚扰预防和应对采取的行动提供信息。

data.en: Through the EDGE certification process in 2022, and other efforts related to ongoing implementation of the recommendations of the 2019 report of the Independent Task Force on Workplace Gender-Discrimination, Sexual Harassment, Harassment and Abuse of Authority, UNICEF has identified the need to make greater efforts to use sexual harassment metrics more systematically to inform actions around sexual harassment prevention and response.
data.zh: 儿基会的政策和程序必须定期接受强制性审查。

data.en: UNICEF policies and procedures are subject to periodic mandatory review.
data.zh: 审查将针对报告的监管问题和风险，包括指标方面的进展情况。

data.en: At the time of review, reported regulatory concerns and risks are reviewed, including progress on indicators.
data.zh: 2020年关于违禁行为(包括性骚扰和其他形式的不当行为)的政策定于2023年进行审查。

data.en: The 2020 policy on prohibited conduct (which includes sexual harassment, among other forms of misconduct) is scheduled for review in 2023.
data.zh: 不同的指标以不同的方式用于为决策提供信息。

data.en: Different indicators are used in different ways to inform decision-making.
data.zh: 例如，劳动力中的性别均等可以对报告性剥削和性虐待以及性骚扰作出贡献。

data.en: For example, gender parity in the workforce can be a facilitating factor for reporting on sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment.
data.zh: 性别均等作为一项关键业绩指标列入办公室仪表板，并在全球范围内对各级人员编制进行跟踪。

data.en: Gender parity is included in office dashboards as a key performance indicator, and is tracked globally for each level of staffing.
data.zh: 根据需要执行特别措施，以加强两性均等，即提高女性工作人员的代表性。

data.en: Special measures are implemented as needed to increase gender parity, i.e., the representation of female staff.
data.zh: 总体而言，儿基会有一套合理的衡量标准来衡量性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰方面的进展，并通过防止性剥削和性虐待、组织文化、道德操守以及内部审计和调查等各个领域的不同现有报告向执行局报告。

data.en: Overall, UNICEF has a reasonable set of metrics to measure progress on sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment, and these are reported to the Executive Board through different, existing reports in respective areas, such as prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse, organizational culture, ethics, and internal audit and investigations.
data.zh: 还可以加大努力，确保进一步利用所收集的数据，为各级的政策和方案拟订提供信息。

data.en: Additional efforts can be made to ensure further use of the data collected, to inform policies and programming, at all levels.
data.zh: 围绕与防止性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰有关数据开展的机构间努力，有助于儿基会将自身与联合国系统其他实体进行比较，并在相关情况下调整衡量标准。

data.en: Inter-agency efforts around data related to prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment have been useful to allow UNICEF to benchmark itself against other United Nations system entities, and align metrics where relevant.
data.zh: 各机构继续在国家和全球两级进行协调和统一。

data.en: Efforts at further harmonization and alignment continue across agencies, at country and global levels.
data.zh: 附件一

data.en: Annex I
data.zh: 性剥削、性虐待和性骚扰衡量标准

data.en: Metrics on sexual exploitation and abuse and sexual harassment
data.zh: 指标名称

data.en: Indicator name
data.zh: 联合国系统发展方面业务活动四年度全面政策审查(四年度全面政策审查)监测框架参考(如有)

data.en: Quadrennial comprehensive policy review of operational activities for development of the United Nations system (QCPR) monitoring framework reference (if any)
data.zh: 其他联合国实体参考/调整(如有)

data.en: Other United Nations entity reference/alignment (if any)
data.zh: 儿基会制定总部一级的防止和应对性剥削和性虐待行动计划(体现以幸存者为中心的办法)

data.en: Template of United Nations Headquarters-level action plan on preventing and responding to sexual exploitation and abuse
data.zh: 儿基会国家办事处防止性剥削和性虐待行动计划(儿基会2022-2025年战略计划成果和资源综合框架指标E.3.5的一部分)

data.en: UNICEF country-office protection from sexual exploitation and abuse action plans (part of the Integrated Results and Resources Framework of the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025 (IRRF) indicator E.3.5)
data.zh: 10 (对联合国国家工作队行动计划作出贡献)

data.en: 3.6.10 (contribution to United Nations country team action plans)
data.zh: 联合国开发计划署(开发署)、联合国项目事务署(项目署)、联合国人口基金(人口基金)和联合国促进性别平等和增强妇女权能署(妇女署)。

data.en: United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), United Nations Office for Project Services (UNOPS), United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA) and United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN-Women).
data.zh: 采用联合国共同模板

data.en: Common United Nations template used
data.zh: 与报告性骚扰有关的多项指标，包括与性别、权力差异、问责、结案、时限等有关的指标

data.en: Multiple indicators related to reporting on sexual harassment, including related to gender, power differentials, accountability, case closure, timelines, etc.
data.zh: 联合国系统行政首长协调理事会全体成员

data.en: All members of the United Nations System Chief Executives Board for Coordination
data.zh: 达到与心理安全和信任有关的组织基准的办事处比例(成果和资源综合框架E.4.4.)

data.en: Percentage of offices that meet organizational benchmarks related to psychological safety and trust (IRRF E.4.4)
data.zh: 达到与心理安全和信任有关的组织基准的办事处比例(成果和资源综合框架E.3.4)

data.en: Percentage of offices that meet organizational benchmarks for addressing safeguarding risks (IRRF E.3.4)
data.zh: 为使工作人员行为进一步符合儿基会核心价值观而推出举措和开展运动的办事处比例(儿基会成果和资源综合框架E.5.2)

data.en: Percentage of offices that roll out initiatives and campaigns to further align staff behaviours with UNICEF core values (IRRF E.5.2)
data.zh: 对3.6.14作出贡献

data.en: 3.6.14 contributor
data.zh: 项目署、开发署(提高工作人员认识)

data.en: UNOPS, UNDP (personnel awareness-raising)
data.zh: 各级女性工作人员比例(成果和资源综合框架指标E.4.1、H.5.2)

data.en: Percentage of female staff at each level (IRRF E.4.1, H.5.2)
data.zh: 根据《联合国关于向性剥削和性虐待受害人提供援助的规程》建立和执行应对程序(成果和资源综合框架E.3.5；儿基会总部防止和应对性剥削和性虐待行动计划模板)

data.en: Establishment and implementation of response procedures in accordance with the United Nations Protocol on the Provision of Assistance to Victims of Sexual Exploitation and Abuse (IRRF E.3.5; UNICEF headquarters-level action plan on preventing and responding to sexual exploitation and abuse)

data.en: Other indicators in the IRRF also support organizational accountability, such as the number of internal and external audit opinions outstanding for more than 18 months (E.3.2 and E.3.3).

data.en: Annual Report of the Executive Director
data.zh: 副秘书长兼联合国促进性别平等和增强妇女权能署执行主任关于《2022-2025年战略计划》进展情况的报告

data.en: Report of the Under-Secretary-General/Executive Director of the United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women on progress made on the Strategic Plan 2022-2025
data.zh: 摘要

data.en: Summary
data.zh: 本报告是向妇女署执行局提交的首份关于与联合国系统内外主要伙伴协作执行妇女署《2022-2025年战略计划》及其对落实《2030年可持续发展议程》和执行《北京宣言》和《行动纲要》所作贡献的报告。

data.en: This is the first report to the UN-Women Executive Board on the implementation of the UN-Women Strategic Plan 2022–2025 and its contribution to achieving the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development and implementing the Beijing Declaration and Platform for Action, in collaboration with key partners within and beyond the United Nations system.
data.zh: 报告重点介绍了早期成果，并展示了第一年执行工作的积极进展，包括在妇女署与联合国其他机构、基金和方案共有的共同指标和互补指标方面的进展。

data.en: The report highlights early results and shows positive progress in the first year of implementation, including on the common and complementary indicators the Entity shares with other United Nations agencies, funds and programmes.
data.zh: 该报告附有多个附件，包括2022年新推出的展示所取得成果详情的透明度门户网站，以及关于联合国系统发展方面业务活动四年度全面政策审查执行情况的附件。

data.en: The report is accompanied by various annexes, including the newly-launched Transparency Portal that showcases the details of results achieved in 2022, and an annex on the implementation of the quadrennial comprehensive policy review of operational activities for development of the United Nations system.
data.zh: 决定草案要点见第六节。

data.en: Elements of a draft decision are presented in Section VI.
data.zh: 导言

data.en: Introduction
data.zh: 2022年出现了多重危机，冠状病毒病(COVID-19)大流行加剧了结构性不平等，突发紧急情况和旷日持久的冲突导致暴力侵害妇女行为增加，人道主义需求上升，在这种背景下，性别平等和妇女权利继续面临威胁。

data.en: Gender equality and women’s rights faced continued threats in 2022, in a poly-crisis context marked by the structural inequalities exacerbated by the COVID-19 pandemic, increasing violence against women and escalating humanitarian needs linked to sudden onset emergencies and protracted conflicts.
data.zh: 反对性别平等的现象(常被称为“逆流”)虽不是新现象，但其力量和可见度都在增长，导致世界各地妇女和女童的权利发生急剧逆转。

data.en: Opposition to gender equality, often referred to as “backlash”, while not new, has grown in strength and visibility, causing drastic reversals of women’s and girl’s rights around the world.
data.zh: 全球和平与安全状况的恶化以及更广泛的背景给方案的交付带来了巨大挑战，使许多全球目标和承诺的进展出现倒退。

data.en: The deteriorating global peace and security and broader context presents immense challenges for programme delivery, reversing progress across many global goals and commitments.
data.zh: 虽然推进性别平等的全球规范框架及其在国家一级的落实工作(包括借助联合国系统的协调努力)取得了良好进展，但最新数据表明，世界尚未走上到2030年实现性别平等的轨道。

data.en: While good progress has been made in global normative frameworks to advance gender equality and operationalise them at country levels, including through United Nations system coordination efforts, latest figures indicate the world is not on track to achieve gender equality by 2030.
data.zh: 超过25%的可持续发展目标性别指标与2030年具体目标相去甚远，实现性别平等可能需要286年。

data.en: Over 25 per cent of the SDGs’ gender indicators are far from 2030 targets and it could take 286 years to achieve gender equality.
data.zh: 尽管性别数据在重振可持续发展目标方面具有巨大潜力，但目前已有的数据只占监测可持续发展目标性别平等方面所需数据的一半。

data.en: Despite the overwhelming potential of gender data to reinvigorate the SDGs, only half the data needed to monitor the gender equality dimensions of the SDGs are currently available.
data.zh: 这些欠缺导致妇女和女童的可见度降低，阻碍了所有可持续发展目标方面的进展，因此必须加以弥补。

data.en: These gaps must be addressed, as they render women and girls invisible, hindering progress across all the SDGs.
data.zh: 在此背景下，妇女署开始实施其2022-2025年战略计划。该计划旨在应对这些迅速演变、新出现和相互关联的挑战以及性别平等的结构性障碍。

data.en: Against this backdrop UN-Women commenced implementation of its Strategic Plan 2022-2025, designed to address these rapidly-evolving, emerging and inter-connected challenges as well as the structural barriers to gender equality.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署总共支出5.403亿美元，支持100个国家和地区采取综合办法为妇女和女童交付成果，该办法由促进四个影响领域的七项系统性成果构成。

data.en: In 2022, the Entity supported 100 countries and territories with total expenditures of $540.3 million to deliver results for women and girls through an integrated approach encompassing seven systemic outcomes contributing to four impact areas.
data.zh: 这项工作的累积效果包括有助于使性别平等和增强妇女权能成为国家和国际优先事项，并在妇女权利在全球受到抵制的情况下促进伙伴关系和筹资，以推进性别平等和增强妇女权能。

data.en: This work cumulatively contributed to keeping gender equality and women’s empowerment a national and international priority and facilitating partnerships and financing for its advancement in the face of the global pushback on women’s rights.
data.zh: 在治理和参与公共生活领域，女性担任国家元首或政府首脑的比例略有增加，从2021年的26个国家增加到2022年的31个国家。

data.en: In the area of governance and participation in public life, women saw a slight increase in representation as Heads of State or government, from 26 countries in 2021 to 31 in 2022.
data.zh: 妇女署利用其三重授权加快进展，包括创建各种平台，如联合国大会女性国家元首和政府首脑平台，该平台努力为影响参与性治理和领导的复杂挑战寻找包容性解决方案。

data.en: UN-Women leveraged its triple mandate to accelerate progress, including through the creation of platforms such as the United Nations General Assembly Platform of Women Heads of State and Government, which works to identify inclusive solutions to complex challenges affecting participatory governance and leadership.
data.zh: 在国家一级，妇女署支持通过、修正和(或)执行法律、政策、计划和预算，促成在6个区域通过或修正了157项推进性别平等和增强妇女权能的法律。

data.en: At the country level, UN-Women supported the adoption, amendment and/or implementation of laws, policies, plans and budgets, leading to 157 laws adopted or amended to advance gender equality and women’s empowerment across six regions.
data.zh: 在妇女署的支持下，86 000多名妇女和女童加强了参与公共生活和发挥领导力的能力。

data.en: Over 86,000 women and girls strengthened their capacities to participate in public life and exercise leadership with UN-Women’s support.
data.zh: 在增强妇女经济权能方面，转变照护经济的努力获得了势头。

data.en: On women’s economic empowerment, efforts towards transforming the care economy gained momentum.
data.zh: 妇女署支持26个国家的政府大规模解决照护基础设施和服务的筹资问题，扩大了获得照护服务的渠道，促进了妇女参与和重新获得有酬就业。

data.en: The Entity supported governments to tackle the issue of financing for care infrastructure and services at scale across 26 countries resulting in an expansion of access to care services and facilitating women’s participation and re-entry into paid employment.
data.zh: 妇女署帮助建立了15个促进性别平等的国家社会保障制度，缩小了性别差距，加强了COVID-19疫情的应对和疫后恢复工作。

data.en: UN-Women helped build 15 gender-responsive national social protection systems that reduced gender gaps and strengthened COVID-19 response and recovery efforts.
data.zh: 此外，妇女署与拉丁美洲和加勒比经济委员会(拉加经委会)和阿根廷政府合作，向30个国家政府提供支持，并争取到17个联合国实体、14个政府间组织和众多民间社会组织的支持，最终通过了将获得照护确立为一项人权的《布宜诺斯艾利斯承诺》。

data.en: Moreover, in partnership with Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean (ECLAC) and the Government of Argentina, UN-Women supported 30 governments and rallied support from 17 United Nations entities, 14 inter-governmental organizations and numerous civil society organisations, culminating in the adoption of the Buenos Aires Commitment establishing care as a human right.
data.zh: 妇女署加紧努力制止暴力侵害妇女行为，与合作伙伴一道改变社会规范，防止暴力，并增加幸存者获得全面、多部门服务的渠道。

data.en: The Entity intensified efforts to end violence against women working alongside partners to change social norms, prevent violence, and increase survivors’ access to comprehensive, multisectoral services.
data.zh: 妇女署在41个国家与868个国家政府、国家以下各级政府、民间社会组织和私营机构合作，加强提供基本服务、商品和(或)资源，以制止暴力侵害妇女行为，20个国家的280多万妇女通过妇女署支持的平台和方案获得了信息、商品、资源和(或)服务。

data.en: Across 41 countries, UN-Women worked with 868 national and sub-national governments, civil society organisations and private institutions to strengthen the provision of essential services, goods and/or resources to end violence against women, and over 2.8 million women across 20 countries gained access to information, goods, resources and/or services through UN-Women-supported platforms and programmes.
data.zh: 通过“平等的一代”性别暴力问题行动联盟和争取气候公正女权行动联盟以及联合国制止暴力侵害妇女行为信托基金(联合国信托基金)，开展了预防和消除交叉形式的暴力行为的工作，包括在气候变化和数字环境背景下开展工作。

data.en: Efforts to prevent and address intersecting forms of violence, including in the context of climate change and the digital landscape, were operationalized through the Generation Equality Action Coalitions on Gender-based Violence and on Feminist Action for Climate Justice, as well as the UN Trust Fund to End Violence against Women (UN Trust Fund).
data.zh: 妇女署预防和应对冲突、危机和灾害以及建设和平的工作显著增加。

data.en: UN-Women’s work to prevent and respond to conflicts, crises and disasters and to build peace has grown significantly.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署因参与过40多个危机环境并在加强和维持对执行人道主义行动的性别平等承诺的问责方面发挥重要协调作用，成为了机构间常设委员会的正式成员。

data.en: In 2022 the Entity became a full member of the Inter-Agency Standing Committee (IASC) in recognition of its engagement in more than 40 crisis settings and its vital coordination role strengthening and maintaining accountability towards the implementation of gender commitments governing humanitarian operations.
data.zh: 妇女署加强了伙伴关系，就性别平等和保护问题提供技术援助，帮助联合国系统更广泛的人道主义行动有效地为妇女和女童提供服务。

data.en: UN-Women strengthened partnerships to provide technical assistance on gender and protection issues, helping the United Nations system’s broader humanitarian footprint deliver effectively for women and girls.
data.zh: 通过妇女署的业务部门，向800000多名妇女和女童提供了服务和信息，减少了她们使用消极应对策略来满足紧急救生需求的情况。

data.en: Through the Entity’s operational arm, services and information were delivered to over 800,000 women and girls, reducing their use of negative coping mechanisms to meet urgent, lifesaving needs.
data.zh: 妇女署共支持1 330个妇女组织参与人道主义机制以及难民协调和应对机制，推动共同的“本地化”议程和对受影响人口负责。

data.en: UN-Women supported a total of 1330 women’s organizations to participate in humanitarian and refugee coordination and response mechanisms, advancing the common ‘localisation’ agenda and accountability to affected populations.
data.zh: 妇女署加强妇女抗灾能力的工作也在继续扩大，现已覆盖61个国家(2021年为51个)。

data.en: The Entity’s work to strengthen women’s resilience to disasters also continued to expand, now reaching 61 countries (51 in 2021).
data.zh: 妇女署继续领导妇女、和平与安全方面的协调工作，担任所有主要全球执行机制的秘书处，包括安全理事会非正式专家组和成员国牵头的协调人网络，以及妇女和平与人道主义基金和女性军警人员参与和平行动埃尔西倡议基金，这两个基金都在2022年扩大了覆盖范围。

data.en: The Entity continued to lead coordination on women, peace and security, serving as the secretariat for all main global implementation mechanisms including the Security Council’s Informal Expert Group and the member-state led Focal Points Network, as well as the Women’s Peace and Humanitarian Fund (WPHF) and the Elsie Initiative Fund for Uniformed Women in Peace Operations, which both expanded their reach in 2022.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署在70多个国家开展了以妇女、和平与安全为重点的举措，牵头多利益攸关方的努力，迄今已制定和实施了100多项关于妇女、和平与安全的国家行动计划，在这些地区取得了提高妇女地位的具体成果。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women undertook women, peace and security-focused initiatives in over 70 countries, spearheading multi-stakeholder efforts, that have resulted in the development and implementation of over 100 National Action Plans on women, peace and security to date, generating concrete results on women’s advancement in these areas.
data.zh: 2022年，建设妇女署2.0和确保对外地工作持续关注的努力得到加强，其中妇女署实现了100%的业务改进里程碑，从而可在资源和专门知识最亟需的地点附近提供。

data.en: Efforts to build UN-Women 2.0 and ensure continued focus on the field gathered steam in 2022, during which UN-Women achieved 100 per cent of its milestones relating to business improvement, so resources and expertise are available closest to where they are most needed.
data.zh: 妇女署在追求透明度和业务卓越方面取得的一项主要成就是推出了妇女署的透明度门户网站。

data.en: A key achievement in the Entity’s pursuit of transparency and operational excellence was the launch of UN-Women’s Transparency Portal.
data.zh: 妇女署已进入《2022-2025年战略计划》执行工作的第二年，该计划的中期审查也即将到来。妇女署将需要满足日益增加和复杂的需求，并在各种情况下战略性地部署其三重任务：规范任务、协调任务和业务任务，以便所有妇女和女童在各种情况下都能享有属于她们的全部人权。

data.en: Going into the second year of implementation and approaching the mid-term review of its Strategic Plan 2022-2025, the Entity will need to meet mounting and compounding needs and strategically deploy its triple mandate – normative, coordination and operational – across a diversity of contexts so all women and girls in all their diversities benefit from the full range of human rights that is their due.
data.zh: 2022年的主要成果

data.en: Key results in 2022
data.zh: 在《2022-2025年战略计划》第一年，妇女署与更多的合作伙伴协作，努力在整体人道主义-发展-和平联系中维护和促进妇女和女童的权利，并取得了以下初步成果：

data.en: During the first year of its Strategic Plan 2022-2025, in collaboration with an expanded set of partners, UN-Women worked to safeguard and advance the rights of women and girls across the humanitarian-development-peace nexus and achieved the following early results:
data.zh: 全球规范框架以及促进性别平等的法律、政策和体制

data.en: Global normative frameworks and gender-responsive laws, policies and institutions
data.zh: 大会、安全理事会和人权理事会通过的决议中有62%纳入了性别平等视角。

data.en: Sixty-two per cent of resolutions adopted by the General Assembly, the Security Council and the Human Rights Council integrated a gender perspective.
data.zh: 在42个国家通过了156项促进性别平等的国家/地方多部门政策、战略和计划。

data.en: One hundred and fifty-six gender-responsive national/local multi-sectoral policies, strategies, and plans adopted across 42 countries.
data.zh: 在6个区域通过或修订了157项促进性别平等和增强妇女权能的法律。

data.en: One hundred and fifty-seven laws across six regions adopted or amended to advance gender equality and women’s empowerment.
data.zh: 100%的联合国国家工作队向消除对妇女歧视委员会提交了报告(19份)。

data.en: 100 per cent of UN Country Teams submitted reports (19) to the Committee on the Elimination of Discrimination Against Women.
data.zh: 为性别平等筹措资金

data.en: Financing for gender equality
data.zh: 有64个国家改进了促进性别平等的财政法律、政策、预算和制度，使政府能够更好地跟踪和使用公共资源。

data.en: Sixty-four countries advanced gender-responsive fiscal laws, policies, budgets and systems enabling governments to better track and target public resources.
data.zh: 有254个政府合作伙伴应用新获得的知识、技术技能和能力，有效地将性别平等纳入税收、贸易和权力下放等领域的财政法律、政策和标准的主流。

data.en: Two hundred and fifty-four government partners applied newly-obtained knowledge, technical skills and capacities to effectively mainstream gender into fiscal laws, policies and standards, in areas including taxation, trade and decentralization.
data.zh: 联合国建设和平基金将47%的资源分配给支持性别平等和增强妇女权能的项目，超过了该基金将30%资金用于性别平等的目标。

data.en: The United Nations Peacebuilding Fund exceeded its 30 per cent gender funding target, by allocating 47 per cent of resources to projects supporting gender equality and women’s empowerment.
data.zh: 积极的社会规范，包括通过吸引男子和男童参与

data.en: Positive social norms, including through engaging men and boys
data.zh: 有16个国家推进了制止暴力侵害妇女和女童行为的政策，重点是预防，包括消除有害的社会规范。

data.en: Sixteen countries advanced policies to end violence against women and girls, with a strong focus on prevention including addressing harmful social norms.
data.zh: 在各种环境下制定和实施了44项预防暴力侵害妇女和女童行为的方案拟订倡议，以支持性别/社会规范方面的积极变化，包括吸引男子和男童以及信仰机构参与。

data.en: Forty-four programming initiatives to prevent violence against women and girls developed and implemented across various settings to support positive changes around gender/social norms, including by engaging men and boys and faith-based institutions.
data.zh: 妇女平等获得服务、商品和资源

data.en: Women’s equitable access to services, goods & resources
data.zh: 包括暴力幸存者、境内流离失所的妇女和难民在内的500多万妇女通过妇女署支持的关于生计、金融服务、社会保障和法律援助的平台和方案获得信息、商品、资源和(或)服务。

data.en: Over 5 million women, including survivors of violence and internally-displaced women and refugees, accessed information, goods, resources and/or services through UN-Women supported platforms and programmes in relation to livelihoods, financial services, social protection and legal aid.
data.zh: 妇女署在34个国家扩大了预防和应对公共和(或)私人场所性暴力的工作，其中在31个国家侧重于关于性骚扰的多利益攸关方新倡议，在18个国家侧重于调整此类倡议使其适应城市环境。

data.en: In 34 countries UN-Women expanded work on preventing and responding to sexual violence in public and/or private spaces, with 31 countries focusing on new multi-stakeholder initiatives on sexual harassment and adaptations to urban settings in 18 countries.
data.zh: 妇女的发言权、领导力和能动性

data.en: Women’s voice, leadership & agency
data.zh: 发起140多项全球倡议，支持妇女权利组织以及青年和青春期少女带头倡导性别平等，向从事促进性别平等和增强妇女权能的民间社会组织支付约5900万美元，包括通过联合国信托基金和妇女和平与人道主义基金支付。

data.en: Over 140 global initiatives launched to support women’s rights organizations, and youth and adolescent girls to lead the call for gender equality, disbursing approximately $59 million to civil society organisations working on gender equality and women’s empowerment, including through the UN Trust Fund and the WPHF.
data.zh: 在40个危机环境中支持1 330多个地方和国家妇女组织参与人道主义协调和决策进程。

data.en: Over 1330 local and national women’s organizations across 40 crisis-contexts supported to participate in humanitarian coordination and decision-making processes.
data.zh: 编制、分析和使用性别统计、性别分类数据和知识

data.en: Production, analysis and use of gender statistics and sex-disaggregated data and knowledge
data.zh: 有46个机构间协调机制加强了统计系统，有数据可监测的可持续发展目标性别指标从42%增加到50%。

data.en: Forty-six inter-agency coordination mechanisms strengthened statistical systems contributing to increased data to monitor SDG gender indicators from 42 to 50 per cent.
data.zh: 有43个国家的统计系统表明将可持续发展目标性别数据用于促进性别平等的政策决策。

data.en: Statistical systems in 43 countries demonstrated the use of SDG gender data for gender-responsive policy decision-making.
data.zh: 为促进性别平等与联合国系统协调

data.en: UN system coordination for gender equality
data.zh: 与人口基金协作，在9个国家支持33个纳入女青年的建设和平进程。

data.en: Thirty-three peacebuilding processes inclusive of young women supported in 9 countries in collaboration with UNFPA.
data.zh: 在妇女署参与的人道主义国家工作队的人道主义应急计划中，87%纳入了推进性别平等成果的步骤(超过75%这一里程碑)。

data.en: Eighty-seven per cent of humanitarian response plans of Humanitarian Country Teams (HCTs) that UN-Women engaged with incorporated steps to advance gender equality outcomes (exceeding the milestone of 75 per cent).
data.zh: 2022年，43%的联合国联合方案将可持续发展目标5或性别平等作为其关键重点领域之一。

data.en: Forty-three per cent of United Nations joint programmes in 2022 included SDG 5 or gender equality as one of their key focus areas.
data.zh: 有76个联合国国家工作队实施了联合国国家工作队全系统行动计划 (2020年为38个，2021年为61个)。

data.en: Seventy-six United Nations Country Teams implemented the United Nations Country Team-System-wide Action Plan (UNCT-SWAP) (up from 38 in 2020 and 61 in 2021).
data.zh: 组织效率和效力

data.en: Organizational efficiency and effectiveness
data.zh: 启动了透明度门户网站，以履行妇女署对国际援助保持透明度和问责的承诺。

data.en: Launched the Transparency Portal to deliver on UN-Women’s commitments to international aid transparency and accountability.
data.zh: 伙伴关系总数增加了35%，使妇女署的支助基础多样化，并扩大了妇女署推动持久和有影响力变革的能力。

data.en: Total number of partnerships increased by 35 per cent, diversifying the Entity’s base of support and expanding its ability to drive lasting and impactful change.
data.zh: 实现了100%与执行内部和外部审计建议有关的里程碑。

data.en: 100 per cent of milestones relating to the implementation of internal and external audit recommendations achieved.
data.zh: 平等的一代

data.en: Generation Equality
data.zh: 由妇女署召集的“平等的一代”是全世界为在性别平等方面释放政治意愿、加快投资和行动而做出的重要努力。

data.en: Convened by UN-Women, Generation Equality is the world’s leading effort to unlock political will and accelerate investment and action for gender equality.
data.zh: 在其感召下，130个国家的各类行为体作出了2 700多项承诺，由一个公共看板对承诺进行跟踪。

data.en: It has secured over 2,700 commitments, tracked in a public dashboard, from a wide spectrum of actors in 130 countries.
data.zh: 2022年编制的首份《平等的一代问责报告》的证据显示，近80%的承诺正在通过6个行动联盟和《妇女、和平、安全和人道主义行动契约》等途径得到落实，60%的承诺提供了取得进展的明确证据。

data.en: Evidence from 2022’s first Generation Equality Accountability Report shows almost 80 per cent of commitments are being implemented, including through the 6 Action Coalitions and the Compact on Women, Peace, Security and Humanitarian Action, and 60 per cent provide clear evidence of progress.
data.zh: 2023年9月的中点时刻将是一个重要的里程碑，届时合作伙伴聚集在一起，展示取得的进展和雄心勃勃的新承诺。

data.en: The Midpoint Moment in September 2023 will be a critical milestone as partners gather to demonstrate progress made and spotlight bold new commitments.
data.zh: 影响领域的表现

data.en: Performance under Impact areas
data.zh: 妇女署在《2022-2025年战略计划》的第一年，支持包括高收入国家在内的100个国家和地区推进性别平等和增强妇女权能。

data.en: In the first year of its Strategic Plan 2022-2025, UN-Women supported 100 countries and territories, including high-income countries, to advance gender equality and women’s empowerment.
data.zh: 在发展成果产出一级提供了数据的指标中，妇女署在77%的指标方面表现良好(至少达到2022年里程碑的90%)(图1)。

data.en: The Entity achieved good performance (reaching at least 90 per cent of the 2022 milestone) for 77 per cent of indicators with data available at the development results output level (Figure 1).
data.zh: 影响1：治理和参与公共生活

data.en: Impact 1: Governance & Participation in Public Life
data.zh: 妇女继续面临多重和交叉形式的歧视，她们在决策时没有发言权，用于执行促进性别平等政策的资源仍然不足。

data.en: Women continue to face multiple and intersecting forms of discrimination, their voices are missing in decision-making, and resources for implementing gender-responsive policies remain insufficient.
data.zh: 根据《我们的共同议程》，妇女署与各国政府、民间社会以及包括联合国艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署(艾滋病署)、联合国开发计划署(开发署)、国际货币基金组织、各国议会联盟和经济合作与发展组织(经合组织)在内的其他伙伴合作，支持促进性别平等的法律，包括在国家和地方各级立法规定的性别配额、政策、体制和问责机制。

data.en: Aligned to Our Common Agenda, UN-Women worked with governments, civil society, and other partners, including the Joint United Nations Programme on HIV and AIDS (UNAIDS), United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), International Monetary Fund, Inter-Parliamentary Union and Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), to support gender-responsive laws, including legislated gender quotas, policies, institutions, and accountability mechanisms at national and local levels.
data.zh: 可持续发展目标指标5.5.1和5.c.1进展缓慢。

data.en: Progress on SDG indicators 5.5.1 and 5.c.1 has been slow.
data.zh: 女议员比例从2021年的25.5%微升至26.5%；妇女在地方一级的代表人数从33.9%增加到34.3%。

data.en: The proportion of women parliamentarians inched up to 26.5 per cent from 25.5 per cent in 2021; and women’s representation at the local level increased to 34.3 per cent from 33.9 per cent.
data.zh: 然而，妇女在议会中所占比例达到或超过40%的国家从32个减少到29个。2021年的数据显示，在105个进行报告的国家中，只有26%的国家已建立跟踪用于性别平等的预算拨款的综合系统。

data.en: However, the number of countries with 40 per cent or more women’s representation in parliaments declined from 32 to 29. 2021 data show only 26 per cent of 105 reporting countries have comprehensive systems to track gender budget allocations.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署为64个国家加强实施促进性别平等的预算提供支持。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women supported 64 countries to strengthen implementation of gender-responsive budgets.
data.zh: 妇女署将继续支持促进性别平等的治理和妇女参与，将其作为关键战略。

data.en: The Entity will continue to support gender-responsive governance and women’s participation as key strategies.
data.zh: 影响2：增强妇女经济权能

data.en: Impact 2: Women’s Economic Empowerment
data.zh: 2022年支出共计6 784万美元

data.en: Total 2022 expenditure $67.84 million
data.zh: 妇女花在无偿照护和家务上的时间和劳动畸高，在非正规就业中占主体，缺乏享有金融普惠和社会保障的机会，严重限制了她们的经济权能。

data.en: Women’s disproportionate time and labour spent on unpaid care and domestic work, predominance in informal employment and lack of access to financial inclusion and social protection severely constrain their economic empowerment.
data.zh: 妇女署认识到可持续发展目标指标5.4.1、8.3.1和1.3.1进展缓慢且缺乏数据，利用对全球大流行病和《我们的共同议程》促成的对这些问题的关注，于2022年共同牵头促进公正转型的就业和社会保护全球行动加速器的非正式经济、社会保障和照护问题机构间工作组，并向30个国家提供促进照护经济转型的证据、政策和方案方面的支持。

data.en: Recognizing slow progress and the unavailability of data on SDG indicators 5.4.1, 8.3.1 and 1.3.1, and seizing the attention to these issues generated by the global pandemic and Our Common Agenda, in 2022 UN-Women co-led the Inter-Agency Task Teams on informality, social protection and care of the Global Accelerator on Jobs and Social Protection for Just Transitions and supported 30 countries on evidence, policies and programmes to transform the care economy.
data.zh: 妇女署与拉加经委会和阿根廷政府合作，共同举办了第十五届拉丁美洲和加勒比妇女区域会议，并促使30个国家的政府通过了将获得照护确定为一项基本人权的《布宜诺斯艾利斯承诺》。

data.en: In collaboration with the ECLAC and the Government of Argentina, UN-Women co-organized the XV Women’s Regional Conference for Latin America and the Caribbean and facilitated 30 governments to adopt the Buenos Aires Commitment establishing care as a fundamental human right.
data.zh: 妇女署与秘书长办公厅合作，发起了联合国各实体之间的对话，以形成关于照护问题的共同愿景和方针。

data.en: In partnership with the Executive Office of the Secretary-General, UN-Women initiated a dialogue of United Nations entities toward a common vision and approach to care.
data.zh: 妇女署在非正规经济方面的工作侧重于扩大妇女获得体面工作和创业的机会。

data.en: UN-Women’s work on informality focused on expanding opportunities for decent work and entrepreneurship for women.
data.zh: 在2022年11月的东南亚国家联盟(东盟)峰会上，妇女署的技术支持和参与促使东盟的10个成员国通过了《建设一个更加可持续、包容和有弹性的未来：释放东盟妇女的创业精神的宣言》，重申了这些国家对促进增强妇女经济权能的承诺。

data.en: UN-Women's technical support and engagement contributed to the adoption of the Declaration on Building a more Sustainable, Inclusive and Resilient Future: Unlocking Women’s Entrepreneurship in ASEAN at the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) Summit in November 2022 by the ten ASEAN Member States, reaffirming their commitment to promote women’s economic empowerment.
data.zh: 妇女署在20个非洲国家提供支持，借助促进性别平等的气候适应型农业、妇女创业和促进性别平等的采购，增加了妇女获得体面工作的机会。

data.en: UN-Women’s support across 20 African countries improved women’s access to decent work through gender-responsive climate-resilient agriculture, women’s entrepreneurship and gender-responsive procurement.
data.zh: 影响3：制止暴力侵害妇女行为

data.en: Impact 3: Ending Violence Against Women
data.zh: 2022年支出共计9 287万美元

data.en: Total 2022 expenditure $92.87 million
data.zh: 在COVID-19疫情过后，在私人、公共和网络空间的暴力侵害妇女和女童行为仍然高得惊人，而经济不安全、生计中断和社会保障机制有限继续导致妇女和女童更易遭受暴力。

data.en: In the COVID-19 aftermath, violence against women and girls remains alarmingly high in private, public and online spaces, while economic insecurity, disrupted livelihoods and limited social protection mechanisms continue to increase women and girls’ vulnerability to violence.
data.zh: 对性别平等的反对体现在暴力行为的“正常化”，包括抵制在全球规范框架中承认亲密伴侣间暴力，以及在人道主义-发展-和平联系中针对妇女人权维护者、残疾妇女、男女同性恋、双性恋、跨性别者、性别奇异者和间性者。

data.en: Growing opposition to gender equality is apparent through the ‘normalization’ of violence, including the pushback against recognizing intimate partner violence in global normative frameworks, and the targeting of women human rights defenders, women with disabilities, and lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer and intersex (LGBTQI+) persons, across the humanitarian-development-peace nexus.
data.zh: 必须采取综合办法制止暴力侵害妇女和女童行为，同时考虑到妇女的政治参与、经济权能和韧性、社会保障，并通过“平等的一代”消除性别暴力行动联盟等平台加强伙伴关系。

data.en: Integrated approaches to ending violence against women and girls that consider women’s political participation, economic empowerment and resilience, social protection, and strengthening partnerships through platforms like the Generation Equality Gender-Based Violence Action Coalition, are critical.
data.zh: 为应对挑战，妇女署正在加强法律和政策框架、制定关于暴力侵害妇女行为(包括可持续发展目标的相关指标)的数据收集标准和准则、与妇女组织合作，并加强预防和应对措施，包括根据《我们的共同议程》制定的应急计划。

data.en: UN-Women is addressing challenges by strengthening legal and policy frameworks, developing data collection standards and guidelines on violence against women (including on related SDG indicators), working alongside women’s organizations, and bolstering prevention and response measures, including emergency plans developed in line with Our Common Agenda.
data.zh: 影响4：妇女、和平与安全、人道主义行动和减少灾害风险

data.en: Impact 4: Women Peace and Security, Humanitarian Action & Disaster Risk Reduction
data.zh: 2022年支出共计1.0511亿美元

data.en: Total 2022 expenditure $105.11 million
data.zh: 妇女的切实参与对于建设可持续和平和有效提供人道主义服务至关重要。

data.en: Women’s meaningful participation is central to building sustainable peace and the effective provision of humanitarian services.
data.zh: 然而，在1992年至2019年的主要和平进程中，女性仅占谈判代表的13%和调解人的6%。

data.en: Yet women represented only 13 per cent of negotiators and 6 per cent of mediators in major peace processes between 1992 and 2019.
data.zh: 要实现这一领域的承诺，就必须作出根本性的转变。

data.en: A radical shift is needed to realize commitments in this area.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署加大了对冲突和危机中妇女的支持力度。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women’s support to women in conflict and crises intensified.
data.zh: 妇女署在阿富汗、乌克兰和缅甸等许多复杂的冲突和人道主义环境中支持以妇女、和平与安全为重点的举措，并提供顾及性别因素的冲突分析和快速的性别平等评估。

data.en: The Entity supported women, peace and security-focused initiatives and provided gender-responsive conflict analysis and rapid gender assessments in numerous complex conflict and humanitarian settings including Afghanistan, Ukraine, and Myanmar.
data.zh: 妇女署还带头开展多利益攸关方努力，支持通过8项关于妇女、和平与安全的国家行动计划，在妇女和女童参与建设和平方面取得了具体成果。

data.en: UN-Women also spearheaded multi-stakeholder efforts to support the adoption of 8 National Action Plans on women, peace and security, generating concrete results for women and girls in peacebuilding.
data.zh: 妇女署加强了性别平等分析，并为在安全理事会和人道主义国家工作队等关键论坛中更有力地表达妇女的呼声开辟了空间。

data.en: The Entity elevated gender analysis and opened spaces for stronger representation of women’s voices in key fora, from the Security Council to HCTs.
data.zh: 妇女署在61个国家加强妇女的抗灾能力，并倡导增加灾害风险的分类数据和对灾害风险中性别不平等现象的认识，弥补仙台框架中期审查中查明的欠缺。

data.en: UN-Women promoted women’s resilience to disasters across 61 countries and advocated for increased disaggregated data and understanding of the gender inequalities of disaster risk, addressing gaps identified in the of the Sendai Framework’s mid-term review.
data.zh: 七项系统性成果下的表现

data.en: Performance under seven systemic Outcomes
data.zh: 成果1：全球规范框架以及促进性别平等的法律、政策和体制

data.en: Outcome 1: Global normative frameworks and gender-responsive laws, policies and institutions
data.zh: 妇女署继续作为性别平等方面全球思想和实践领导者，协助会员国加强全球规范，并将其转化为国家一级促进性别平等的法律、政策和体制。

data.en: UN-Women continues to be a global thought and practice leader on gender equality, assisting Member States in strengthening global norms and translating them into gender-responsive laws, policies and institutions at the national level.
data.zh: 在实现这一成果方面进展顺利，所有指标都取得了积极成果；平均产出完成率为130%。

data.en: Progress towards this outcome is on track with positive results achieved across all indicators; the average output attainment rate was 130 per cent.
data.zh: 响应秘书长的人权行动呼吁，妇女署牵头打击法律中的歧视机构间工作队。

data.en: UN-Women leads the Inter-Agency Task Team on Combating Discrimination in Law, in response to the Secretary-General’s Call to Action on Human Rights.
data.zh: 妇女署规范性工作的一个核心部分是继续向政府间机构提供技术支持，并侧重于实现性别平等与可持续发展之间的协同增效。

data.en: As a central part of its normative work, UN-Women continues to provide technical support to intergovernmental bodies and focus on synergies between achieving gender equality and sustainable development.
data.zh: 大会、安全理事会和人权理事会通过的决议中有62%纳入了性别平等视角，超过了里程碑。

data.en: Sixty-two per cent of resolutions adopted by the General Assembly, the Security Council, and the Human Rights Council integrated a gender perspective, surpassing the milestone.
data.zh: 全球范围的努力反映在妇女署在各国继续通过提供知识、宣传和技术援助，支持会员国实施《消除对妇女一切形式歧视公约》和妇女地位委员会成果等全球规范。

data.en: Global efforts were mirrored across countries, where UN-Women continued to support Member States to operationalize global norms such as the Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women (CEDAW) and the outcomes of the Commission on the Status of Women (CSW) through the provision of knowledge, advocacy and technical assistance.
data.zh: 妇女署在42个国家提供了政策和能力发展支助，促成通过了156项促进性别平等的多部门政策、战略和计划。

data.en: In 42 countries, the Entity provided policy and capacity development support resulting in the adoption of 156 gender-responsive multi-sectoral policies, strategies, and plans.
data.zh: 之所以能够实现上述成果，部分原因是促成了与各国政府、妇女组织和其他利益攸关方在各专题领域的961次多利益攸关方对话。

data.en: This was partly achieved through the facilitation of 961 multi-stakeholder dialogues with governments, women’s organizations and other stakeholders across various thematic areas.
data.zh: 突尼斯制定了一项促进性别平等的减轻灾害风险计划，将妇女的需求和领导能力作为优先事项；此外，还通过了另外四项附有监测框架的妇女、和平与安全国家行动计划，包括乌克兰经修订的妇女、和平与安全国家行动计划。

data.en: Tunisia developed a gender-responsive DRR plan that prioritizes women’s needs and leadership; four additional National Action Plans on women, peace and security with monitoring frameworks were adopted, including Ukraine’s revised National Action Plan on Women, Peace and Security.
data.zh: 100%的联合国国家工作队向消除对妇女歧视委员会提交了报告(19份)。

data.en: One hundred per cent of United Nations Country Teams submitted reports (19) to the CEDAW Committee.
data.zh: 通过或修订了157项促进性别平等和增强妇女权能的法律。

data.en: 157 laws advancing gender equality and women’s empowerment were adopted or amended.
data.zh: 科特迪瓦、科索沃和尼泊尔通过了立法，以更好地保护妇女免受家庭暴力和其他形式的暴力。

data.en: Cote d’Ivoire, Kosovo and Nepal passed legislation to better protect women from domestic and other forms of violence.
data.zh: 刚果民主共和国、洪都拉斯和马拉维通过了促进决策中性别均衡的新法律，推进了妇女地位委员会第六十五届会议商定结论的执行。

data.en: Implementation of the agreed conclusions of the sixty-fifth session of CSW was advanced through the adoption of new laws promoting gender balance in decision-making in the Democratic Republic of Congo, Honduras and Malawi.
data.zh: 政府和民间社会伙伴提高了影响促进性别平等的立法、多部门政策和体制的能力。

data.en: Government and civil society partners increased capacities to influence gender-responsive legislation, multi-sectoral policies and institutions.
data.zh: 有26个国家艾滋病协调机构增加了将性别平等视角纳入艾滋病毒战略、预算和指标框架的专门知识，包括坦桑尼亚艾滋病委员会将改变不平等性别规范的行动纳入其多部门战略框架。

data.en: Twenty-six national AIDS coordinating bodies increased expertise to integrate gender perspectives into HIV strategies, budgets, and indicator frameworks. This resulted in the Tanzania Commission for AIDS integrating actions to transform unequal gender norms in its multi-sectoral strategic framework.
data.zh: 在全球妇女权利方面的挫折对实现《2030年议程》构成挑战之际，妇女署与各国政府、民间社会和联合国系统建立强有力的伙伴关系，催生前沿知识，制定地方治理数据的全球标准，并循证拟订方案，这些都有助于在这一成果下取得良好进展。

data.en: Strong partnerships with governments, civil society and the United Nations system, the production of cutting-edge knowledge, setting global standards on local governance data, and evidence-based programming contributed to good progress under this outcome, while global setbacks to women’s rights pose challenges to achieving the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 妇女署将继续与各国政府和其他方面合作，解决结构性不平等问题，改革歧视性法律和政策，并推动妇女参与领导，以帮助那些落在最后面的人。

data.en: UN-Women will continue to work with governments and others to address structural inequalities, reform discriminatory laws and policies and advance women’s participation in leadership to reach those left furthest behind.
data.zh: 气候变化行动

data.en: Action on climate change
data.zh: 妇女署力求通过利用其性别方面的专门知识、召集能力和多利益攸关方伙伴关系，取得性别平等和气候行动的双重惠益，以促进可持续发展与和平。
