data.en: UN-Women sought to secure the co-benefits of gender equality and climate action for sustainable development and peace by leveraging its gender expertise, convening power and multi-stakeholder partnerships.
data.zh: 这包括支持妇女地位委员会第六十六届会议历史性地通过了关于“在气候变化、环境和减少灾害风险的政策和方案背景下实现性别平等及增强全体妇女和女童权能”的商定结论，并在第二十七届联合国气候变化大会上通过“平等的一代”争取气候公正女权行动联盟等途径，宣传了关键信息。

data.en: This included supporting the historic adoption of the agreed conclusions on ‘Achieving gender equality and the empowerment of all women and girls in the context of climate change, environmental and DRR policies and programmes’ during the 66th session of the CSW and amplifying key messages at the 27th United Nations Climate Change Conference, including through the Generation Equality Action Coalition on Feminist Action for Climate Justice.
data.zh: 成果2：为性别平等筹措资金

data.en: Outcome 2: Financing for gender equality
data.zh: 充足的资金是执行促进性别平等的法律和政策的先决条件。

data.en: Adequate financing is a prerequisite for the implementation of gender-responsive laws and policies.
data.zh: 由于财政空间日益有限，各国必须更有效率和效力地利用现有预算。

data.en: With increasingly constrained fiscal space, countries must use existing budgets more efficiently and effectively.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署加大力度将性别平等纳入筹资框架的主流，加强了性别反应预算编制的机构能力，并改善了公共财政管理。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women enhanced gender mainstreaming in financing frameworks, strengthened institutional capacities on gender-responsive budgeting (GRB), and improved public finance management.
data.zh: 妇女署根据《我们的共同议程》，支持会员国加强关于性别问题和税收的全球规范，将其作为发展筹资后续进程的一部分。

data.en: Aligned to Our Common Agenda, UN-Women supported Member States to strengthen global norms on gender and taxation, as part of the Financing for Development follow-up process.
data.zh: 妇女署与各国政府、国际金融机构和民间社会等伙伴合作，取得了长足进展，成功达到或超过了2022年的所有产出里程碑，平均产出完成率为121%。

data.en: Working with partners, including governments, international financial institutions (IFIs) and civil society, UN-Women made strong progress, successfully meeting or exceeding all 2022 output milestones with an average output attainment rate of 121 per cent.
data.zh: 由于将性别平等目标纳入了筹资和预算框架，总拨款额增加。

data.en: The integration of gender targets into financing and budget frameworks resulted in increased overall allocations.
data.zh: 土耳其财政部在其2022年绩效预算框架中列入了上述目标，为妇女参与劳动力队伍、女童入学和利用数字技术拨款。

data.en: In Türkiye, the Ministry of Treasury and Finance included targets in its 2022 performance budget framework with allocations for women's labour force participation, girls’ school enrolment and digital technology access.
data.zh: 在妇女署的技术支持下，阿根廷2023年国家用于促进性别平等的预算预计占总预算的14.65%，按名义价值计算比2022年高出106%。

data.en: In Argentina, with UN-Women’s technical support, the 2023 national projected budget for gender equality represents 14.65 per cent of the total budget, 106 per cent higher in nominal terms than 2022.
data.zh: 全球对性别反应预算编制技术援助的需求不断增加，因此超过了2022年的里程碑，达到了853个国家和地方政府合作伙伴、民间社会和监督机构。

data.en: Increasing global demand for GRB technical assistance led to exceeding the 2022 milestone, reaching 853 national and local government partners, civil society, and oversight institutions
data.zh: 在印度，开发了一个创新的电子政务工具，用于跟踪国家部委和4个国家以下区域用于性别平等的预算拨款。

data.en: In India, an innovative e-governance tool was developed to track gender budget allocations in national ministries and 4 sub-national regions.
data.zh: 因此，向妇女署提出了对6个国家以下一级区域和30个中央部委扩大支助的请求。

data.en: As a result, scaled-up support to 6 sub-national regions and 30 central ministries was requested.
data.zh: 在肯尼亚，地方政府和民间社会优先考虑并分配预算用于提供各种服务，包括帮助残疾人和妇女的职业活动和无障碍基础设施。

data.en: In Kenya, local governments and civil society prioritized and allocated budgets for services, including vocational activities and accessible infrastructure that benefit people living with disabilities and women.
data.zh: 妇女署提高了254个合作伙伴将性别平等纳入财政法律、政策和标准主流的能力。

data.en: UN-Women increased the capacities of 254 partners to mainstream gender into fiscal laws, policies, and standards.
data.zh: 妇女署成功地加强了政府各部门之间以及与非国家行为体之间的协调，以高效利用现有资源。

data.en: The Entity successfully strengthened coordination across government departments and with non-state actors for efficient use of existing resources.
data.zh: 在巴勒斯坦国，国家经济部和财政部的能力得到加强，促成了对增值税法的修订，以支持中小微企业，重点支持女企业家。

data.en: In the State of Palestine, strengthened capacities of the Ministry of National Economy and the Ministry of Finance contributed to a revised value-added tax law to support Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, focused on women entrepreneurs.
data.zh: 在阿尔巴尼亚，妇女署与Prisma欧洲网络合作，在5个市镇促进政府与基层妇女之间的对话，以影响预算规划进程。

data.en: In Albania, UN-Women, in partnership with Prisma European Network, fostered dialogue between government and grassroots women to influence budget planning processes in 5 municipalities.
data.zh: 妇女署成功地与联合国建设和平基金结成伙伴关系，该基金在过去两年中将47%的资金分配给性别平等和增强妇女权能，超过了将30%资金用于性别平等的目标。

data.en: UN-Women successfully partnered with the United Nations Peacebuilding Fund, which exceeded its 30 per cent gender funding target, by allocating 47 per cent to gender equality and women’s empowerment over the past two years.
data.zh: 4该基金在危地马拉、海地、尼日尔和冈比亚试行了一项新的促进性别平等倡议，为专门促进性别平等的建设和平项目分配资源。

data.en: 4 The Fund piloted a new Gender Promotion Initiative in Guatemala, Haiti, Niger, and the Gambia allocating resources for dedicated gender-responsive peacebuilding projects.
data.zh: 妇女署吉尔吉斯斯坦办事处与合作伙伴开展协作，利用可持续发展目标5的创新筹资资源，最终促成亚洲银行发行了首个性别主题债券。

data.en: Leveraging innovative financing resources for SDG 5, a collaboration between UN-Women Kyrgyzstan and partners culminated in the issuance of the first gender bond by the Bank of Asia.
data.zh: 妇女署将通过提供高质量技术援助、加强能力和促进包容性伙伴关系，继续支持采取政府整体一盘棋办法为性别平等筹资。

data.en: UN-Women will continue to support a whole of government approach to financing for gender equality through the provision of high-quality technical assistance, capacity strengthening and fostering inclusive partnerships.
data.zh: 成果3：积极的社会规范，包括通过吸引男子和男童参与

data.en: Outcome 3: Positive social norms, including through engaging men and boys
data.zh: 根据整体评价和外部审查的建议，《妇女署2022-2025年战略计划》首次专门列入促进积极社会规范这一重点领域。

data.en: Responding to recommendations from corporate evaluations and external reviews, UN-Women’s Strategic Plan 2022-2025 included for the first time a dedicated focus on positive social norms.
data.zh: 这一成果下的所有可衡量指标都取得了积极成果，平均完成率为150%。

data.en: Positive results were achieved across all measurable indicators under this outcome, with an average attainment rate of 150 per cent.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署对外部文献和自身工作进行了系统性审查，以评估实地状况并为今后建立基线。

data.en: In 2022 UN-Women conducted systematic reviews of external literature and its own work, to assess the state of the field and establish baselines going forward.
data.zh: 审查显示了丰富多样的创新办法，以及在设计干预措施方面的挑战，包括对成果进行一致的衡量。

data.en: The reviews revealed the richness of innovative approaches, as well as challenges in designing interventions, including consistent measurement of results.
data.zh: 妇女署正在从基础广泛的宣传运动转向可衡量、全面和跨部门的办法，建设查明和应对社会规范的内部能力和伙伴能力。

data.en: The Entity is moving away from broad-based awareness-raising campaigns towards measurable, holistic, and intersectional approaches, building internal and partner capacities to identify and address social norms.
data.zh: 在采取学习姿态的同时，妇女署在获得成效方面取得进展，特别是在预防暴力侵害妇女和女童行为方面。

data.en: While taking a learning posture, UN-Women made progress toward results, particularly the prevention of violence against women and girls.
data.zh: 妇女署协助制定了16项政策，应对不同形式的暴力侵害妇女和女童行为，并重点在国家和国家以下各级进行预防，包括在阿根廷、喀麦隆和东帝汶。

data.en: The Entity contributed to the development of 16 policies addressing different forms of violence against women and girls with a strong focus on prevention, at national and sub-national levels, including in Argentina, Cameroon, and Timor Leste.
data.zh: 妇女署与世卫组织和人口基金合作，加强了非洲和亚洲14个国家的政府和民间社会在《尊重妇女》框架基础上进行循证方案拟订的能力，其中转变社会规范是七项主要预防战略之一。

data.en: In partnership with WHO and UNFPA, UN-Women strengthened the capacities of governments and civil society in 14 countries across Africa and Asia on evidence-based programming building on the RESPECT framework, in which transforming social norms is one of seven key strategies for prevention.
data.zh: 妇女署让创新部门参与应对社会规范，包括卢旺达和智利的采矿业以及巴西、阿根廷和太平洋地区的体育产业。

data.en: UN-Women engaged innovative sectors to address social norms, including the mining industry in Rwanda and Chile and sports in Brazil, Argentina, and the Pacific.
data.zh: 在巴西，妇女署与国际奥林匹克委员会合作，通过与WomenWin组织共同制定的行之有效的方法，利用体育培养自信的一代女童，使她们成为变革推动者。

data.en: In Brazil, with the International Olympic Committee, UN-Women utilized sports to foster a confident generation of girls as change agents through a proven methodology developed with the organization Women Win.
data.zh: 在参与调查的青春期少女中，76%自认为是引领者，高于基线时的53%。

data.en: Among participating adolescent girls, 76 per cent self-identified as leaders, up from 53 per cent at baseline.
data.zh: 反刻板印象联盟与广告业合作，于2022年发布了第二版《性别平等态度研究报告》，利用市场研究测定了20个国家的歧视态度普遍度，国家数是2019年的两倍。

data.en: With the advertising industry, the Unstereotype Alliance published the second edition of its Gender Equality Attitudes Study in 2022, using market research to measure the prevalence of discriminatory attitudes in 20 countries, twice the number in 2019.
data.zh: 妇女署采用循证方法与男子和男童合作，将他们作为改变社会规范的伙伴。

data.en: UN-Women applies evidence-based approaches to work with men and boys as partners for social norm change.
data.zh: 在埃及、摩洛哥和巴勒斯坦国开展了一项专注父母责任的区域方案，作为成果，报告其男性伴侣平等承担育儿责任的妇女比例从2021年的14.84%平均增加到2022年的27.7%。

data.en: A regional programme addressing parental responsibilities in Egypt, Morocco and the State of Palestine resulted in women reporting that their male partners undertake childcare equally increased on average from 14.84 per cent in 2021 to 27.7 per cent in 2022.
data.zh: 根据欧洲联盟-联合国聚光灯倡议，非洲传统领导人理事会公开承诺废除有害的传统习俗。

data.en: Under the European Union-United Nations Spotlight Initiative, the Council of Traditional Leaders of Africa publicly committed to abolish harmful traditional practices.
data.zh: 成果包括马拉维的早婚现象和利比里亚的残割女性生殖器现象减少。

data.en: Results include reductions in early marriage in Malawi and female genital mutilation in Liberia.
data.zh: 在肯尼亚，男性社区领袖帮助达成对女性候选人的积极态度，并通过为竞选活动建立安全空间以及为女性候选人和投票站提供安全保障，为2022年当选的女性代表人数增加做出了贡献。

data.en: In Kenya, male community leaders helped shape positive attitudes towards women candidates and contributed to an increase in elected women representatives in 2022 by building safe spaces for campaigning and providing security for women candidates and at polling stations.
data.zh: 计划在2022年审查的基础上，于2023年对妇女署的社会规范工作进行一次整体评价，以便继续加强妇女署在这一领域的工作。

data.en: A corporate evaluation of UN-Women’s social norms work is planned for 2023, building on reviews in 2022, to continue strengthening the Entity’s work in this area.
data.zh: 成果4：妇女平等获得服务、商品和资源

data.en: Outcome 4: Women’s equitable access to services, goods & resources
data.zh: 提供基本服务、公益物和资源对于妇女的能动性、自主性和福祉至关重要。

data.en: The provision of essential services, public goods and resources is fundamental for women’s agency, autonomy and wellbeing.
data.zh: 缺乏行政信息系统、用于社会保障的财政空间缩小并且妇女获得资源的机会不平等，这些都制约了性别平等。

data.en: The lack of administrative information systems, shrinking fiscal space for social protection, and women’s unequal access to resources constrain gender equality.
data.zh: 在就可持续发展目标指标5.a.1提交报告的47个国家中，有41个国家的农业土地所有者或权利持有者中男性多于女性。

data.en: In 41 of 47 countries reporting on SDG indicator 5.a.1, more men than women are owners or rights bearers of agricultural land.
data.zh: 妇女署的循证方案拟订应对了这些制约因素，超过了这一成果下的大多数指标里程碑，平均产出完成率为135%。

data.en: UN-Women’s evidence-based programming addressed these constraints, surpassing most indicator milestones under this outcome, with an average output attainment rate of 135 per cent.
data.zh: 优异的表现还得益于妇女署强有力的伙伴关系和联合国系统的协调，包括通过“平等的一代”经济正义和权利行动联盟、争取气候公正女权行动联盟和性别暴力问题行动联盟。

data.en: High performance stemmed also from the Entity’s strong partnerships and United Nations system coordination, including through the Generation Equality Action Coalitions on Economic Justice and Rights, Feminist Action for Climate Justice, and Gender-based Violence.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署为41个国家的多部门系统、战略或方案做出了贡献，以解决妇女公平获得货物、服务和(或)资源的问题，加强了包括政府、私营部门和民间社会在内的1 581个机构提供货物、服务和资源的能力，并支持惠及近510万妇女和女童的平台和方案。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women contributed to multi-sectoral systems, strategies or programmes addressing women’s equitable access to goods, services, and/or resources is 41 countries, strengthening capacities of 1,581 institutions, including government, private sector and civil society, o provide goods, services and resources and supporting platforms and programmes benefiting almost 5.1 million women and girls.
data.zh: 在布隆迪、中国、埃及和哈萨克斯坦，妇女在扩大的企业发展服务的支持下增加了收入并创造了就业机会。

data.en: In Burundi, China, Egypt and Kazakhstan, women increased their incomes and created jobs supported by expanded business development services.
data.zh: 在卢旺达，2 772名农村妇女通过与粮食及农业组织(粮农组织)、国际农业发展基金(农发基金)和世界粮食计划署(粮食署)共同实施的增强农村妇女经济权能联合方案，获得了农业投入和有气候适应能力的技术，并参与了关于无偿照护的认可、减少和重新分配方案。

data.en: In Rwanda, 2,772 rural women accessed agricultural inputs and climate-resilient technologies under the Joint Programme on Rural Women’s Economic Empowerment, implemented with the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO), the International Fund for Agricultural Development (IFAD), and the World Food Programme (WFP), and the 3R Programme on unpaid care.
data.zh: 在肯尼亚，270名妇女从政府采购中受益。

data.en: In Kenya, 270 women benefited from government procurement.
data.zh: 在塞内加尔，14 000多名妇女获得了创业和参与促进性别平等的采购的能力。

data.en: In Senegal, more than 14,000 women gained capacities in entrepreneurship and gender-responsive procurement.
data.zh: 在南非，10个行业领导者承诺开展促进性别平等的采购。

data.en: In South Africa, 10 industry leaders committed to gender-responsive procurement.
data.zh: 妇女署支持2 465个妇女组织监测货物、服务和资源的提供情况，包括支持巴西全国家政工人联合会监测照护服务和政策。

data.en: UN-Women supported 2,465 women’s organizations to monitor the provision of goods, services and resources, including Brazil’s National Federation of Domestic Workers on care services and policies.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署在31个国家开展工作，支持制定和(或)执行加强为暴力幸存者提供基本服务的准则、规程和标准操作程序。有29个国家报告说，在遭受暴力或歧视后获得服务的妇女人数有所增加。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women worked in 31 countries to support the development and/or implementation of guidelines, protocols and standard operating procedures to strengthen essential services for survivors of violence. 29 countries reported increases in the number of women accessing services after experiencing violence or discrimination.
data.zh: 2022年前7个月，吉尔吉斯斯坦加强了立法、宣传和司法人员的能力，因此提交法院的暴力侵害妇女案件数增加为前一年的三倍。

data.en: Strengthening of legislation, advocacy and justice personnel capacities in Kyrgyzstan in the first seven months of 2022 led to a three-fold increase in violence against women cases brought before the courts, compared to the previous year.
data.zh: 妇女署在34个国家实施了预防和应对性暴力的新的多利益攸关方倡议，其中31项倡议重点关注性骚扰问题，18项倡议调整其方法，以适应城市环境。

data.en: UN-Women implemented new multi-stakeholder initiatives to prevent and respond to sexual violence in 34 countries, of which 31 included a focus on sexual harassment, and 18 adapted their approach to urban settings.
data.zh: 妇女署还支持全球51909人获得司法救助，其中包括科索沃1687名与冲突有关的性暴力女性幸存者。

data.en: The Entity also supported access to justice for 51,909 people globally, including 1,687 women survivors of conflict-related sexual violence in Kosovo.
data.zh: 在孟加拉国、喀麦隆、哥伦比亚、埃塞俄比亚、缅甸和巴勒斯坦国，在妇女署的支持下，包括难民和境内流离失所者在内的145 000多名妇女和女童获得了救生保护、现金转移和生计服务。

data.en: In Bangladesh, Cameroon, Colombia, Ethiopia, Myanmar and the State of Palestine, with UN-Women’s support more than 145,000 women and girls, including refugees and internally-displaced persons, accessed life-saving protection, cash transfers and livelihoods services.
data.zh: 妇女署打算扩大这种变革性方案拟订，使更多个人、机构和妇女组织能够获得服务、商品和资源，以改善其生活、生计和福祉。

data.en: UN-Women intends to scale-up such transformative programming so that more individuals, institutions and women’s organizations will have access to services, goods and resources to improve their lives, livelihoods and wellbeing.
data.zh: 成果5：妇女的发言权、领导力和能动性

data.en: Outcome 5: Women’s voice, leadership & agency
data.zh: 2022年，在公共生活中针对妇女的威胁和攻击呈上升趋势。

data.en: In 2022, threats and attacks against women in public life were on the rise.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署在这一重要成果领域取得了良好进展，总体产出完成率为125%。

data.en: UN-Women made good progress under this important outcome area in 2022 with an overall output attainment rate of 125 per cent.
data.zh: 2021年5月至2022年4月，联合国人权事务高级专员办事处(人权高专办)记录了172起妇女、女童、妇女人权捍卫者、和平建设者和民间社会组织因与联合国合作而遭报复和恐吓的事件。

data.en: Between May 2021 and April 2022, the Office of the United Nations High Commission for Human Rights (OHCHR) documented 172 incidents of reprisal and intimidation against women, girls, women human rights defenders, peacebuilders and civil society organisations for cooperating with the United Nations.
data.zh: 妇女署为32项应对政治和公共生活中暴力侵害妇女行为的法律、政策和方案拟订对策提供支持。

data.en: UN-Women supported 32 legal, policy and programming responses to address violence against women in politics and in public life.
data.zh: 妇女署与人权高专办和非政府组织妇女、和平与安全工作组合作，召开了一次关于在冲突中保护妇女人权维护者的协商会议，为安全理事会关于这一问题的首次公开辩论提供了参考。

data.en: The Entity partnered with OHCHR and the NGO Working Group on Women, Peace and Security to convene a consultation on protecting women human rights defenders in conflict, informing the first Security Council open debate on the issue.
data.zh: 2022年在全球范围内，15-49岁妇女中只有56%能够自主决定性关系、避孕药具的使用和卫生保健事项(可持续发展目标指标5.6.1)。

data.en: Globally, in 2022, only 56 per cent of women aged 15–49 years were able to make their own decisions on sexual relations, use of contraceptives and health care (SDG indicator 5.6.1).
data.zh: 进展停滞不前，需要加快努力，以实现目标，达成承诺，并抵制在实现妇女性和生殖健康及权利方面的阻力。

data.en: Progress has stalled, requiring accelerated efforts to achieve goals, reach commitments, and counter pushback in realizing women’s sexual and reproductive health and rights.
data.zh: 妇女署将继续与多利益攸关方伙伴合作，通过“平等的一代”身体自主以及性和生殖健康及权利行动联盟加快进展，该联盟已在64个国家获得400多项行动承诺。

data.en: UN-Women will continue to work with multi-stakeholder partners to accelerate progress through the Generation Equality Action Coalition on Bodily Autonomy and Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights which has garnered over 400 commitments for action across 64 countries.
data.zh: 经合组织-发展援助委员会2021年报告称，针对性别平等和增强妇女权能的双边援助总额为552亿美元。

data.en: The OECD-Development Assistance Committee reported in 2021 that bilateral aid targeting gender equality and women’s empowerment amounted to $55.2 billion.
data.zh: 其中，122亿美元提供给民间社会组织或通过民间社会组织分发，比前一年增加了8%。

data.en: Of this, $12.2 billion were channelled to or through civil society organisations, marking an increase of 8 per cent from the previous year.
data.zh: 然而，妇女组织获得核心供资和多年期供资的机会仍然有限，危及其可持续性。

data.en: However, women’s organizations’ limited access to core and multi-year financing persists, imperilling their sustainability.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署开展了140多项全球宣传和资源调动活动，并通过联合国信托基金、聚光灯倡议和妇女和平与人道主义基金等渠道支付了5 900万美元，以支持致力于促进妇女、青年和青春期少女权利的民间社会组织。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women launched over 140 global advocacy and resource mobilization campaigns and disbursed $59 million, including through the UN Trust Fund, the Spotlight Initiative and the WPHF, in support of civil society organisations working to advance the rights of women, youth and adolescent girls.
data.zh: 妇女署支持阿富汗、布隆迪、马里、也门、乌克兰和委内瑞拉等40多个国家的妇女民间社会组织切实安全地参与决策、政治与和平进程、人道主义行动、救灾和社会经济决策。

data.en: UN-Women supported women’s civil society organisations in over 40 countries, including in Afghanistan, Burundi, Mali, Yemen, Ukraine and Venezuela, to meaningfully and safely opportunities engage in policy-making, political and peace processes, humanitarian action, disaster response and socio-economic decision-making.
data.zh: 超过1 330个地方和国家妇女组织得到支持，参与人道主义和难民协调及应对工作。

data.en: Over 1330 local and national women’s organizations were supported to participate in humanitarian and refugee coordination and response efforts.
data.zh: 妇女署根据《我们的共同议程》的优先事项，与86 000多名妇女和女童以及3 148个民间社会组织(其中50%以上致力于制止暴力侵害妇女行为)建立了青年领袖骨干队伍，提高他们切实参与公共生活和决策的能力。

data.en: UN-Women built cadres of youth leaders with over 86,000 women and girls and 3,148 civil society organizations – more than 50 per cent working to end violence against women -- increasing their capacities to engage meaningfully in public life and decision-making in line with Our Common Agenda priorities.
data.zh: 有7 000多名女政治家和有抱负的候选人提高了她们在竞选规划、宣传、选区外联和开展联络方面的技能，包括在巴布亚新几内亚妇女署设立的妇女政治学院以及领导和治理政治研究所。

data.en: Over 7,000 women politicians and aspiring candidates enhanced their skills on campaign planning, communications, constituency outreach and networking, including in Papua New Guinea in the Political Academy for Women which was established by UN-Women and the Political Institute of Leadership and Governance.
data.zh: 随着性别平等方面的进展被逆转，2023年需要采取大胆行动，以抵御负面趋势，保护妇女和女童的权利，并支持促进性别平等的民间社会和社会运动。

data.en: With progress on gender equality in reverse, bold action is needed in 2023 to counter negative trends and protect women’s and girls’ rights and support civil society and social movements promoting gender equality.
data.zh: 不让任何一个人掉队

data.en: Leaving no one behind
data.zh: 在哥伦比亚，根据《残疾人权利公约》，妇女署与人口基金和儿基会一道，开展能力建设，以加强残疾妇女参与公共政策规划，重点关注新的《2022-2026年国家发展计划》，成果是残疾问题和跨部门视角被作为主流纳入国家发展计划

data.en: In Colombia, aligned with the Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities (CRPD), UN-Women, together with UNPFA and UNICEF, built capacities to strengthen the participation of women with disabilities in public policy planning, focusing on the new National Development Plan (NDP) for 2022-2026 and resulting in disability and intersectional perspectives being mainstreamed into the NDP
data.zh: 在尼泊尔，妇女署与开发署和世卫组织合作，将残疾问题纳入地方治理和规划的主流，促进妇女和包括残疾人在内的其他经常被落在后面的群体参与政策和预算协商

data.en: In Nepal, working with UNDP and WHO, UN-Women integrated disability mainstreaming into local governance and planning, promoting the participation of women and other groups often left behind, including persons with disabilities in policy and budget consultations
data.zh: 领导建设联合国国家工作队能力的机构间工作，将“不让任何一个人掉队”原则、性别平等和人权纳入共同国家分析/联合国可持续发展合作框架，与联合国系统职员学院共同推出在线课程

data.en: Led an inter-agency effort to build United Nations Country Teams’ capacities to integrate the leave no one behind principle, gender equality and human rights into Common Country Analyses/United Nations Sustainable Development Cooperation Frameworks (CCAs/UNSDCFs), launching an online course with the United Nations Systems Staff College
data.zh: 与粮食署协作提供“劳动得现金”机会，使约旦的1 732名难民和收容社区妇女受益于基于区块链的现金支付平台和“OneCard”技术

data.en: 1,732 refugees and host community women benefitted from a blockchain-based cash disbursement platform and ‘OneCard’ technology in Jordan, through cash-for-work opportunities delivered in collaboration with WFP
data.zh: 在12个国家，感染艾滋病毒的妇女向促进性别平等的国家艾滋病毒政策、战略和法律提供意见

data.en: Across 12 countries, women living with HIV informed gender-responsive national HIV policies, strategies and laws
data.zh: 在危地马拉，妇女署帮助扩大了土著妇女平台的成员，并加强了该平台对最高级别政治和社会对话的参与

data.en: In Guatemala, UN-Women helped expand membership to the Platform of Indigenous Women and strengthen its engagement in political and social dialogues at the highest level
data.zh: 在尼日尔，妇女署与60个民间社会组织合作，监测移民妇女权利受保护情况，加强国家移民政策，并支持批准和执行国际劳工组织关于家庭工人的第189号公约

data.en: In Niger, UN-Women worked with 60 civil society organisations to monitor protection of migrant women’s rights, strengthen the National Migration Policy, and support ratification and implementation of the International Labour Organisation’s Convention No.189 on domestic workers
data.zh: 成果6：编制、分析和使用性别统计、性别分类数据和知识

data.en: Outcome 6: Production, analysis and use of gender statistics and sex-disaggregated data and knowledge
data.zh: 妇女署为确保性别统计、数据和知识越来越普及、易于查阅并越来越多地用于推动变革作出了贡献，但仍需取得实质性进展。

data.en: UN-Women has contributed to ensuring that gender statistics, data and knowledge are increasingly available, accessible and used to drive change, although substantial progress is still needed.
data.zh: 妇女署2022年实现了此成果下84%的整体产出完成率。

data.en: In 2022, the Entity achieved an overall output attainment rate under this outcome of 84 per cent.
data.zh: 妇女署作为推动增加性别数据的编制、使用和传播工作的联合国主要实体，在2022年影响了23个国家计划和战略，使其将性别数据和统计作为主流纳入。

data.en: As the leading United Nations entity driving efforts to increase the production, use and dissemination of gender data, in 2022 UN-Women influenced 23 national plans and strategies to mainstream gender data and statistics.
data.zh: 如今，监测可持续发展目标性别指标所需的数据约有一半已提供，这表明在持续存在欠缺的情况下取得了重要进展。

data.en: Today about half of the data required to monitor the SDG gender indicators are available, indicating important progress alongside persistent gaps.
data.zh: 可持续发展目标5的所有指标都例行纳入可持续发展目标监测工作，包括关于妇女遭受的亲密伴侣间暴力的指标5.2.1和关于妇女在地方政府中的代表性的指标5.5.1b，这两个指标现在都处于第一级。妇女署负责管理的其他指标，如5.1.1、5.4.1和5.c.1也取得了进展。

data.en: All SDG 5 indicators are routinely included in SDG monitoring, including indicators 5.2.1 on intimate partner violence against women and 5.5.1b on women’s representation in local governments, which are now both Tier I. Progress has also been made on other indicators for which UN-Women is custodian such as 5.1.1, 5.4.1, and 5.c.1.
data.zh: 有43个国家利用性别统计、分析和政策相关研究为政策制定和作出决策提供参考。

data.en: Forty-three countries used gender statistics, analysis, and policy relevant research to inform policy and decision making.
data.zh: 在越南，有了分类数据，妇女署得以向受洪灾影响的女户主家庭提供用于重建生计的紧急赠款。

data.en: In Vietnam, the availability of disaggregated data allowed UN-Women to provide emergency cash grants to flood-affected women-headed households to rebuild their livelihoods.
data.zh: 在肯尼亚，妇女署支持国家统计局进行了肯尼亚有史以来第一次时间使用调查，并利用调查数据编制了照护需求评估，作为制定该国政府有史以来第一个国家照护政策的依据。

data.en: In Kenya, the Entity supported the National Bureau of Statistics to conduct Kenya’s first-ever time-use survey and used the data to produce a care needs assessment, which served as the basis for developing the Government’s first-ever national care policy.
data.zh: 在全球一级，妇女署在整个2022年还为制定数据收集和分析的标准和准则作出了贡献。

data.en: At the global level, throughout 2022 UN-Women also contributed to setting standards and guidelines for data collection and analysis.
data.zh: 各国正在测试和使用通过妇女署与世界卫生组织(世卫组织)暴力侵害妇女行为数据联合方案制定的准则，以及与联合国毒品和犯罪问题办公室(毒品和犯罪问题办公室)共同制定并经联合国统计委员会认可的衡量与性别相关杀害妇女和女童行为的框架，以填补这些领域的重大数据空白。

data.en: Guidelines developed through the UN-Women and World Health Organization (WHO) joint programme on Violence Against Women data and the framework for the measurement of gender-related killings of women and girls, developed with the United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC) and endorsed by the United Nations Statistical Commission, are being tested and used by countries to fill vital data gaps in these areas.
data.zh: 妇女署与减轻灾害风险动态组织协作，开发了妇女抗灾能力政策跟踪系统，支持分析和监测193个会员国在与减轻灾害风险、气候变化和抗灾能力有关的促进性别平等的法律、政策、战略和计划方面的进展情况。

data.en: In collaboration with DRR dynamics, UN-Women developed the Women’s Resilience to Disasters Policy Tracker supporting the analysis and monitoring of progress across 193 Member States on gender-responsive laws, policies, strategies, and plans related to DRR, climate change, and resilience.
data.zh: 妇女署每年代表机构间常设委员会性别平等咨商小组编写的《性别平等问责框架报告》是跟踪机构间常设委员会性别平等政策及其在危机环境下承诺的执行情况的唯一监测机制。

data.en: The Gender Accountability Framework Report produced annually by UN-Women on behalf of the IASC's Gender Reference Group, is the only monitoring mechanism tracking implementation of the IASC’s Gender Policy and its commitments in crisis settings.
data.zh: 该报告涵盖全球和外地执行情况，是推动机构间常设委员会注重性别平等以及加强全系统一致性和成果的核心倡导工具。

data.en: The report, which covers global and field implementation, is a central advocacy tool that drives the IASC’s focus on gender equality and greater systemwide coherence and results.
data.zh: 妇女署作为联合国妇女、和平与安全问题常设委员会的秘书处，领导了加强联合国关于此问题监测框架的工作队。

data.en: As the Secretariat of the United Nations Standing Committee on Women, Peace and Security, UN-Women led a task force to strengthen the United Nations monitoring framework on this issue.
data.zh: 协商进程促使各实体更好地将妇女、和平与安全问题纳入其战略计划和成果框架。

data.en: The consultative process motivated entities to better integrate women, peace and security in their strategic plans and results frameworks.
data.zh: 妇女署收集和分析的数据加强了证据基础，为秘书长关于妇女、和平与安全方面趋势和进展的年度报告、安全理事会的审议工作、相关的政策制定和方案拟订以及执行委员会的决定提供了参考。

data.en: The data collected and analysed by the Entity has reinforced the evidence base, informing the annual reports of the Secretary-General on trends and progress in women, peace and security, deliberations of the Security Council and related policy-making and programming, as well as Executive Committee decisions.
data.zh: 妇女署继续监测类型广泛的性别平等和增强妇女权能指标的趋势。

data.en: UN-Women continued to monitor trends across a wide range of gender equality and women’s empowerment indicators.
data.zh: 妇女署与联合国各机构和国际金融机构合作，推动超过46个机构间性别统计协调机制的参与，编制了关键数据和知识，以支持监测和问责工作以及在国家和全球两级实施可持续发展目标的工作，包括秘书长关于全球目标的年度报告。

data.en: Working with United Nations agencies and international financial institutions, UN-Women engaged over 46 inter-agency gender statistics coordination mechanisms, producing essential data and knowledge to support monitoring and accountability efforts and implementation of the SDGs at national and global levels, including the Secretary-General’s annual report on the global goals.
data.zh: 成果7：为促进性别平等与联合国系统协调

data.en: Outcome 7: UN system coordination for gender equality
data.zh: 这一成果领域第一次反映了妇女署协调任务下各具体专题领域的发展成果，协调任务旨在推动在强有力问责框架的基础上，将性别平等纳入联合国全系统的成果和业务。

data.en: This outcome area for the first time captures development results across specific thematic areas arising from UN-Women’s coordination mandate to drive the inclusion of gender equality in United Nations system-wide results and operations, underpinned by robust accountability frameworks.
data.zh: 作为人道主义国家工作队的成员和人道主义行动中的性别平等问题工作组的牵头机构，妇女署提供支持，结果将性别平等纳入人道主义国家工作队应急计划和战略的2022年里程碑被超越，覆盖率达到87%(里程碑为75%)。

data.en: As members of HCTs and leads of Gender in Humanitarian Action Working Groups, UN-Women’s support contributed to exceeding the 2022 milestone of HCTs’ response plans and strategies incorporating gender equality, by achieving 87 per cent coverage (milestone of 75 per cent).
data.zh: 妇女署最近作为成员加入机构间常设委员会，为在这些成就的基础上再接再厉提供了重要机会。

data.en: UN-Women’s recent inclusion as a member of the IASC is an important opportunity to build on these achievements.
data.zh: 作为仙台框架中期审查的一部分，妇女署与联合国减少灾害风险办公室(减灾办)、人口基金、47个其他联合国实体以及正在实施妇女抗灾能力办法的61个国家的486个妇女组织密切合作，促使会员国作出为仙台框架的实施工作制定性别平等行动计划的承诺。

data.en: As part of the Sendai Framework mid-term review, UN-Women worked closely with the United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (UNDRR), UNFPA, 47 other United Nations entities, as well as 486 women's organizations in the 61 countries where the Women’s Resilience to Disasters approach is being implemented, to secure commitments from Member States to develop a Gender Action Plan for the Sendai Framework implementation.
data.zh: 妇女署与秘书长办公厅、政治和建设和平事务部、人权高专办和开发署合作，扩大关于暂行特别措施和性别配额的全球知识和宣传，以推动执行秘书长的人权行动呼吁和《我们的共同议程》。

data.en: UN-Women partnered with the Executive Office of the Secretary-General, the Department of Political and Peacebuilding Affairs, OHCHR, and UNDP to expand global knowledge and advocacy on Temporary Special Measures (TSMs) and gender quotas to advance implementation of the Secretary-General’s Call-to-Action for Human Rights and Our Common Agenda.
data.zh: 通过设立专门的暂行特别措施机构间工作队，联合国系统关于暂行特别措施的协调和高级别倡导工作得到加强，提供的技术咨询和相对良好做法为利比里亚和塞拉利昂议会关于通过配额法案的讨论提供了参考。

data.en: Through a dedicated inter-agency task team on TSMs, United Nations system coordination and high-level advocacy on TSMs was strengthened, and the provision of technical advice and comparative good practices informed parliamentary discussions on the passage of quota bills in Liberia and Sierra Leone.
data.zh: 妇女与和平与安全议程在秘书长2019年指示的11个行动要点均取得了进展，包括在妇女署的斡旋下，妇女民间社会通报人参与安全理事会和建设和平委员会的机会增加。

data.en: The women, peace and security agenda witnessed progress across 11 action points of the Secretary-General’s 2019 directives, including increased access for women civil society briefers, brokered by UN-Women, to the Security Council and the Peacebuilding Commission.
data.zh: 在H6伙伴关系/“每个妇女每个儿童”倡议下，妇女署领导机构间的工作，消除与性别有关的障碍，帮助非洲8个国家的妇女获得性和生殖保健服务。

data.en: Under the H6/Every Woman, Every Child initiative, UN-Women led inter-agency efforts to remove gender-related barriers that helped women access sexual and reproductive health services in 8 countries in Africa.
data.zh: 妇女署成功地支持将性别平等视角纳入共同国家分析/联合国可持续发展合作框架进程——2022年制定联合国可持续发展合作框架的联合国国家工作队中，50%纳入了一项专门的性别平等成果。

data.en: UN-Women successfully supported the integration of gender perspectives within CCA/UNSDCF processes – fifty per cent of United Nations Country Teams developing UNSDCFs in 2022 included a dedicated gender equality outcome.
data.zh: 全系统行动计划2.0继续取得进展，73个就全系统行动计划进行报告的联合国实体和76个就联合国国家工作队全系统行动计划进行报告的联合国国家工作队在性别平等主流化方面取得进展。

data.en: The System-wide Action Plan (UN-SWAP) 2.0 continued to demonstrate progress with 73 United Nations entities reporting on the UN-SWAP and 76 United Nations Country Teams reporting on the UNCT-SWAP on their gender mainstreaming performance.
data.zh: 与2021年相比，在全系统行动计划的所有适用评级中，74%达到或超过要求，提高了4分。

data.en: Compared to 2021, 74 per cent of all UN-SWAP applicable ratings met or exceeded requirements, signalling a 4-point improvement.
data.zh: 2022年，性别平等标志的应用继续扩大，并更进一步，得到行政首长协调理事会管理问题高级别委员会的认可，并将其作为联合国全系统报告的一项财务数据标准，这加强了联合国系统对性别平等筹资的负责。

data.en: Application of the Gender Equality Marker continues to expand and was given a significant boost in 2022 when it was endorsed by the Chief Executives Board High-Level Committee for Management as a United Nations financial data standard for system-wide reporting, reinforcing the United Nations system’s accountability for financing gender equality.
data.zh: 展望未来，妇女署将大大加强努力，推动联合国系统在落实可持续发展目标方面向会员国提供促进性别平等的支持。

data.en: Going forward, UN-Women will significantly step-up its efforts to drive the United Nations system’s gender-responsive support to Member States in the implementation of the SDGs.
data.zh: 支出

data.en: Expenditures and types of contributions
data.zh: 2022年总支出达到5.403亿美元。

data.en: Total expenditures in 2022 reached $540.3 million.
data.zh: 从地域上看，对亚太地区的支出最高(9 210万美元)，其次是东非和南部非洲(8 230万美元) (图9)。

data.en: Geographically, the highest expenditure was in Asia Pacific ($92.1 million), followed by East and Southern Africa ($82.3 million) (Figure 9).
data.zh: 就专题而言，在成果领域中，妇女平等获得服务、货物和资源的支出最高(9790万美元)，其次是全球规范框架以及促进性别平等的法律、政策和体制(9 060万美元)

data.en: Thematically, women’s equitable access to services, goods and resources had the highest expenditure ($97.9 million) among outcome areas, followed by global normative frameworks and gender-responsive laws, policies and institutions ($90.6 million).
data.zh: 按职能划分，继续在大多数国家提供能力发展和技术援助，同时也在开展宣传、传播和社会动员(分别在78个和77个国家)。

data.en: By function, capacity development and technical assistance continued to be provided in most countries, along with advocacy, communications and social mobilization (in 78 and 77 countries respectively).
data.zh: 加强组织业绩

data.en: Strengthening organizational performance
data.zh: 妇女署继续注重业务表现，认识到加强组织效率和效力是确保在实现性别平等和增强妇女权能方面产生大规模影响的关键。

data.en: UN-Women sustained its focus on operational excellence, understanding that strengthened organizational efficiency and effectiveness is key to ensuring impact at scale in the achievement of gender equality and women’s empowerment.
data.zh: 为此，妇女署于2022年启动了季度业务审查，这是内部业绩管理工具，涵盖组织效力和效率，推动了业绩以及积极主动的管理和决策文化，提高了反应能力和敏捷性。

data.en: To this end, UN-Women launched the Quarterly Business Review in 2022, an internal performance management tool which covers organizational effectiveness and efficiency, driving performance and a culture of proactive management and decision-making, enabling greater responsiveness and agility.
data.zh: 妇女署在《2022-2025年战略计划》的第一年，在81%的组织效率和效力指标下表现良好(即离2022年里程碑不到10%)。

data.en: In the first year of the Strategic Plan 2022-2025, UN-Women achieved good performance (within 10 per cent of 2022 milestone) on 81 per cent of organizational efficiency and effectiveness indicators.
data.zh: 产出1：通过坚持原则的考绩保证组织的可靠性

data.en: Output 1: Assuring an accountable organization through principled performance
data.zh: 妇女署是一个负责任和值得信赖的组织，尽职尽责地管理其资源。

data.en: UN-Women is an accountable and trustworthy organization that manages its resources with integrity.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署连续第十一次获得无保留审计意见。

data.en: In 2022, the Entity secured its eleventh consecutive unqualified audit opinion.
data.zh: 妇女署努力巩固第二道防线，通过推出首份整体风险偏好声明，加强风险概述管理；通过推出透明度门户网站，加强对透明度的承诺，并继续通过国际援助透明化倡议发布信息；建立新的审计建议采纳机制。2022年因新的企业资源规划系统Quantum推出而意义非凡。

data.en: Efforts were made to shore up the second line of defence, strengthen the profile of risk management by rolling out the first-ever corporate risk appetite statement; increase commitment to transparency by launching the Transparency Portal, and continue publishing through the International Aid Transparency Initiative (IATI); and develop a new uptake mechanism for audit recommendations. 2022 was a significant year due to the rollout of its new Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system, Quantum.
data.zh: 由于这些变化，在执行长期审计建议(内部和外部建议分别达到15%的里程碑)和企业风险管理方面取得积极成果。

data.en: These changes led to positive results in implementing long-standing audit recommendations (meeting twin milestones of 15 per cent respectively for both internal and external recommendations), and enterprise risk management.
data.zh: 尽管取得了积极势头，但妇女署并未达到所有里程碑，并将集中努力在2023年实现这些成果。

data.en: Despite positive momentum UN-Women did not meet all milestones and will focus on strengthening efforts to achieve these results in 2023.
data.zh: 妇女署继续在资源落实、安保和安全、全系统行动计划标准方面达到里程碑。

data.en: UN-Women continued to meet milestones on resource implementation, security and safety, UN-SWAP standards.
data.zh: 产出2：推进伙伴关系和资源配置；为影响力和规模实施影响

data.en: Output 2: Advancing partnerships & resourcing; Effectively influencing for impact & scale
data.zh: 妇女署继续有效地利用和扩大其伙伴关系、传播和宣传工作，加强品牌和伙伴关系，以增加对性别平等议程的支持，并朝着确保为完成其任务获得可持续资源的方向努力。

data.en: UN-Women continues to effectively leverage and expand its partnerships, communications and advocacy efforts, strengthening brand and partner relationships to increase support for the gender equality agenda and move in the direction of securing sustainable resourcing for the delivery of its mandate.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署增加了与公共和私营部门的积极伙伴关系数量以及与国际金融机构和非传统伙伴的接触，包括动员个人为性别平等捐款。

data.en: In 2022, UN-Women increased the number of active partnerships with the public and private sector and engagement with international financial institutions and non-traditional partners, including mobilizing individual giving for gender equality.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署各国家委员会的筹资额比前一年增加49% (50%来自个人捐款)。

data.en: UN-Women National Committees raised 49 per cent more in 2022, compared to the previous year (50 per cent from individual giving).
data.zh: 妇女署通过与所有6个区域方案国的青年问题协调中心密切合作，大大深化了在方案拟订过程中与不同青年和青少年的接触。

data.en: The Entity significantly deepened its engagement with diverse youth and adolescents in its programming, by working closely with youth focal points in programme countries across all 6 regions.
data.zh: 尽管面临包括妇女权利倒退在内的全球挑战，妇女署仍获得188个合作伙伴的持续资金支持(2021年为179个)，其中21个政府伙伴承诺提供多年期供资(2021年为17个)。

data.en: Despite global challenges including the regression of women’s rights, UN-Women received continued financial support from 188 partners (up from 179 in 2021), with 21 government partners committing to multi-year funding (17 in 2021).
data.zh: 妇女署收到缴款[5.454亿美元]，连续第四年超过5亿美元的基线，但仍低于里程碑。

data.en: The Entity received [$545.4] million in contributions, exceeding the $500 million baseline for the fourth consecutive year, but still short of the milestone.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署的自愿捐款首次出现下降，尽管幅度很小(<1%)，主要原因是汇率不利以及改变援助优先事项导致的延期支付。

data.en: UN-Women saw the first decline of voluntary contributions in 2022, although it was minimal (<1 per cent) and largely due to unfavourable exchange rates and late payments related to shifting aid priorities.
data.zh: 然而，经常资源比前一年减少了7%，致使经常资源与其他资源的比率达到28.1%，需要扭转这一不利的下降趋势。

data.en: However, regular resources decreased by 7 per cent from the previous year, bringing the ratio of regular to other resources to 28.1 per cent -- an unfavourable downward trend that needs to be reversed.
data.zh: 成果3：推进业务转型

data.en: Output 3: Advancing business transformation
data.zh: 妇女署《2022-2025年战略计划》的一个重要转变是重申决心关注外地成果和以外地为重点的服务交付，确保在区域和国家两级提供资源、专门知识和授权。

data.en: An important transformation in UN-Women’s Strategic Plan 2022-2025 is the renewed determination to focus on field results and field-focused service delivery, ensuring resources, expertise and authority are available at regional and country levels.
data.zh: 尽管妇女署达到了向外地重新分配总员额的73.5%这一里程碑，但没有达到国家办事处可持续性的里程碑。

data.en: While UN-Women met its milestone of 73.5 per cent for re-distributing posts towards the field, the Entity did not meet milestones on country office sustainability.
data.zh: 需要集中精力积极管理全球足迹，并确保在国家一级提供可持续资源，为此重新关注费用回收，在将于2023年初颁布的新费用回收政策的基础上再接再厉。

data.en: Focused efforts will be needed to actively manage the global footprint and ensure sustainable resourcing at country level through a renewed focus on cost recovery, building on a new cost recovery policy to be promulgated in early 2023.
data.zh: 100. 跨区域知识交流举措(17个)超过了里程碑，业务流程改进(5个)达到了里程碑。

data.en: Milestones were surpassed for cross-regional knowledge exchange initiatives (17) and met for business process improvements (5).
data.zh: 101. 妇女署继续表明其致力于在联合国系统的核心实现以下目标：将共同房地的使用率提高到72%，超过71%这一四年度全面政策审查指标的里程碑。

data.en: UN-Women continues to demonstrate its commitment to delivering at the heart of the United Nations system increasing use of common premises to 72 per cent, exceeding the milestone of 71 per cent for the QCPR indicator.
data.zh: 产出4：培养一支有能力的员工队伍，推进妇女署的包容文化

data.en: Output 4: Nurturing an empowered workforce and advancing an inclusive UN-Women culture
data.zh: 102. 妇女署《2022-2025年战略计划》首次包括了增强员工权能的具体指标，包括人力资源、业务、多样性和包容性以及人员安保和福祉。

data.en: UN-Women’s Strategic Plan 2022-2025 for the first time includes specific indicators around empowered people – encompassing human resources, operations, diversity and inclusion, and personnel safeguarding and wellbeing.
data.zh: 103. 向执行局持续提交的报告确认，预防和应对性剥削和性虐待以及性骚扰仍然是妇女署的优先事项。

data.en: Continued reporting to the Executive Board affirmed that the prevention of and response to sexual exploitation and abuse (SEA) and sexual harassment (SH) remains a priority for UN-Women.
data.zh: 除了在内部处理性剥削和性虐待以及性骚扰问题外，妇女署继续积极参与机构间工作，除其他外，向联合国系统行政首长协调理事会性骚扰问题工作队提供技术支持，以推进以受害者为中心的办法，促进行为改变，衡量数据和成果，并加强合作。

data.en: In addition to addressing SEA and SH internally, UN-Women continued its active inter-agency engagement, inter-alia by providing technical support to the United Nations system’s Chief Executives Board Taskforce on Sexual Harassment on advancing a victim-centred approach, promoting behavioural change, measuring data and results, and enhancing cooperation.
data.zh: 104. 扩大了培训覆盖各类工作人员，内容包括工作场所关系和行为标准、领导能力发展(90%的高级管理人员在上任头两年内参加领导能力课程的里程碑达到)、360度反馈审查和对200名管理人员的辅导，并将残疾包容问题纳入主流。

data.en: Trainings were expanded across the personnel spectrum, including on workplace relations and standards of conduct, leadership development (where the milestone of 90 per cent of senior managers participating in leadership programmes within their first 2 years in position was met), 360-feedback reviews and coaching for 200 managers, and mainstreaming disability inclusion.
data.zh: 加快征聘和多样化的里程碑也已达到。

data.en: Milestones for swifter recruitments and diversity were also met.
data.zh: 105. 为加强对残疾人的包容，妇女署逐步在各地点，包括在总部增加无障碍功能。

data.en: To enhance disability inclusion, UN-Women gradually incorporated accessibility features in locations, including at headquarters.
data.zh: 妇女署促进联合国各实体之间的协作与协调以呼应性别问题与残疾问题的交叉性，并召集了联合国性别平等和残疾包容机构间工作组。

data.en: The Entity promoted collaboration and coordination among United Nations entities to address the intersectionality of gender and disability, convening the United Nations Interagency Working Group on Gender Equality and Disability Inclusion.
data.zh: 通过提供政策指导和技术援助，支持了20多项联合国国家工作队关于残疾包容的联合方案拟订和宣传举措。

data.en: Over 20 United Nations Country Teams’ joint programming and advocacy initiatives on disability inclusion were supported through the provision of policy guidance and technical assistance.
data.zh: 成果5：有效的规范、方案和协调方面产品、服务和流程

data.en: Output 5: Effective normative, programmatic and coordination products, services and processes
data.zh: 106. 妇女署通过有效执行其业务流程，包括通过提高产品和服务的标准化，推动其任务的交付。

data.en: UN-Women drives delivery of its mandate by effectively executing its business processes, including through greater standardization of products and services.
data.zh: 服务跟踪系统是确保迅速回应支助请求的关键，妇女署对首次请求的反应时间平均为1.3天(超过了1.5天的里程碑)。

data.en: The service tracker system is key in ensuring swift responses to requested support, and the Entity’s average reaction time to first request was 1.3 days (surpassing the milestone of 1.5 days).
data.zh: 妇女署还通过精简各种规划和监测进程，加强了全球、区域和国家各级的战略规划。

data.en: UN-Women also strengthened strategic planning at global, regional and country levels by streamlining various planning and monitoring processes.
data.zh: 107. 妇女署继续利用高质量的评价获得证据和经验教训，促进组织学习和决策。

data.en: UN-Women continued to leverage high-quality evaluations to generate evidence and lessons learned, supporting organizational learning and decision-making.
data.zh: 2022年，根据外部评估，86%的已完成评价(仍低于90%的里程碑)获得“良好及以上”评级。

data.en: In 2022, 86 per cent of completed evaluations (still below the milestone of 90 per cent) obtained “good and above” ratings based on an external assessment.
data.zh: 妇女署参与了33项联合评价，占全年评价总数的29%，包括两项独立的全系统全球评价和不同区域的多项联合国可持续发展合作框架评价。

data.en: The Entity engaged in 33 joint evaluations, representing 29 per cent of the total evaluations conducted throughout the year, including two independent system-wide global evaluations and several UNSDCF evaluations across different regions.
data.zh: 执行伙伴的参与和管理

data.en: Engagement and management of implementing partners
data.zh: 妇女署继续加强吸引合作伙伴参与的工作，包括在能力建设、防范性剥削和性虐待以及统一做法方面的参与。

data.en: UN-Women continues to strengthen the engagement of partners, including on capacity building, protection from sexual exploitation and abuse and harmonized practices.
data.zh: 2022年，妇女署加入了联合国伙伴门户网站，协作开展统一的合作伙伴预防性剥削和性虐待能力建设。

data.en: In 2022 UN-Women joined the United Nations Partner Portal (UNPP), collaborating on harmonized PSEA capacity building for partners.
data.zh: 包括政府实体和民间社会组织在内的执行伙伴是妇女署履行三重任务的重要组成部分。

data.en: Implementing partners, including government entities and civil society organisations and are an essential part of the delivery of UN-Women’s triple mandate.
data.zh: 方案是通过与国家、多国或区域各级的合作伙伴开展协商进程制定的。

data.en: Programmes are developed through consultative processes with partners at country, multi-country or regional levels.
data.zh: 然后通过透明、竞争性和公开的招标书/意向书来确定执行伙伴。

data.en: Implementing partners are then identified through transparent, competitive and open calls for proposals/expressions of interest.
data.zh: 联合国伙伴门户网站还为民间社会组织提供了一个平台，使其能够与联合国就伙伴关系机会进行接触，提高了妇女署的透明度和可及性。

data.en: The UNPP also serves a platform for civil society organisations to engage with the United Nations on partnership opportunities, increasing transparency and accessibility to UN-Women.
data.zh: 决定草案要点

data.en: Elements for a draft decision
data.zh: 执行局不妨：

data.en: The Executive Board may wish to,
data.zh: 注意到副秘书长兼联合国促进性别平等和增强妇女权能署执行主任关于《2022-2025年战略计划》实施进展的报告，并赞扬妇女署迄今取得的优秀业绩；

data.en: Take note of the report of the Under-Secretary-General/Executive Director of the United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women on progress made on the implementation of the Strategic Plan 2022-2025, and commend UN-Women on its strong performance to-date;
data.zh: 欢迎妇女署作出贡献并有重点地参与了联合国发展系统工作，以确保性别平等和增强妇女权能在可持续发展议程、包括在合作框架中处于中心地位；

data.en: Welcome UN-Women’s contribution and its focused engagement within the United Nations development system to ensure that gender equality and women’s empowerment feature centrally in the sustainable development agenda, including in the Cooperation Frameworks;
data.zh: 关切地注意到经常资源的供资缺口，鼓励所有有能力的国家增加自愿捐款，以全面有效地执行《2022-2025年战略计划》，并鼓励在这方面加强伙伴关系；

data.en: Take note with concern of the funding gap in regular resources, and encourage all countries in a position to do so to increase voluntary contributions for the full and effective implementation of the Strategic Plan 2022-2025, and encourage strengthened partnerships in this regard;
data.zh: 决定将报告转交经济及社会理事会。

data.en: Decide to transmit the report to the Economic and Social Council.
data.zh: 联合国

data.en: United Nations
data.zh: 联合国促进性别平等和增强妇女权能署执行局

data.en: 2023 session

data.zh: 议程项目12(h)

data.en: Agenda item 12 (h)
data.zh: 协调、方案和其他问题：联合国 艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署

data.en: Coordination, programme and other questions: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS
data.zh: 经社理事会主席拉谢扎拉·斯托伊娃(保加利亚)在非正式协商基础上提出的决议草案

data.en: Draft resolution submitted by the President of the Council, Lachezara Stoeva (Bulgaria), on the basis of informal consultations
data.zh: 联合国艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署

data.en: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS
data.zh: 经济及社会理事会，

data.en: The Economic and Social Council,
data.zh: 重申其设立联合国艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署的1994年7月26日第1994/24号决议和1995年7月3日第1995/2号决议，并回顾其2021年7月22日第2021/26号决议，

data.en: Reaffirming its resolutions 1994/24 of 26 July 1994 and 1995/2 of 3 July 1995, by which the Council established the Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS, and recalling its resolution 2021/26 of 22 July 2021,
data.zh: 审议了联合国艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署执行主任向理事会提交的报告，

data.en: Having considered the report of the Executive Director of the Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS to the Council,
data.zh: 表示注意到2021年《关于艾滋病毒和艾滋病问题的政治宣言：结束不平等现象，进入2030年之前消除艾滋病的轨道》 以及《2021-2026年全球艾滋病战略——“终结不平等，终结艾滋病》的重要性，并注意到它们与《2030年可持续发展议程》相辅相成，保持一致，

data.en: Taking note of the importance of the 2021 Political Declaration on HIV and AIDS: Ending Inequalities and Getting on Track to End AIDS by 2030 as well as the Global AIDS Strategy 2021–2026, “End Inequalities, End AIDS”, and noting that they are complementary and aligned with the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development,
data.zh: 重申庄严载入《联合国宪章》的会员国主权权利，重申各国必须按照本国法律、国家发展优先事项、国际人权履行2021年《政治宣言》中作出的承诺和保证，

data.en: Reaffirming the sovereign rights of Member States, as enshrined in the Charter of the United Nations, and the need for all countries to implement the commitments and pledges in the 2021 Political Declaration consistent with national laws, national development priorities and international human rights,
data.zh: 欢迎在提高艾滋病毒治疗机率和预防新增艾滋病毒感染方面取得进展，并注意到艾滋病毒感染率和艾滋病死亡率大幅下降，因为许多国家在实现95-95-95目标方面取得了进展，并为少女和年轻妇女及重点人群推出和扩大了预防艾滋病毒的创新办法，

data.en: Welcoming the progress made in increasing access to HIV treatment and preventing new HIV infections, and noting significant reductions in HIV incidence and AIDS mortality as many countries have made progress towards the 95-95-95 targets and introduced and scaled up HIV prevention innovations for adolescent girls and young women and key populations,
data.zh: 表示深为关切尽管取得了进展，但国家和区域之间及其内部、男女之间、不同年龄组之间以及流行病学证据表明全球艾滋病毒感染风险较高的重点人群之间仍存在许多差距和不平等，2021年《政治宣言》概述的2025年目标可能无法实现，2021年有150万人新感染艾滋病毒，650000人死于艾滋病相关原因，3840万艾滋病毒感染者中有970万人尚未得到治疗，部分因为没有很好地执行有效的循证政策，一些国家以及一些亚群和地区新感染艾滋病毒的人数正在增加，

data.en: Expressing deep concern that, despite the progress made, there remain many disparities and inequalities between and within countries and regions, between men and women, for different age groups, and for key populations that epidemiological evidence shows to be globally at higher risk of HIV infection, and that the 2025 targets outlined in the 2021 Political Declaration may not be met, and that, in 2021, 1.5 million people were newly infected with HIV and 650,000 people died from AIDS-related causes, and of the 38.4 million people living with HIV, 9.7 million were not yet receiving treatment, with new HIV infections on the rise in some countries and within some subpopulations and locations, owing in part to poor implementation of effective, evidence-based policies,
data.zh: 关切在儿童艾滋病毒防治方面持续存在差距，2021年儿童治疗覆盖率低于成年人，儿童占艾滋病毒携带者的4%，但占艾滋病相关死亡人数的15%， 欢迎努力加强儿童艾滋病毒防治工作，

data.en: Concerned about the persistent gaps in the HIV response for children, who had lower treatment coverage compared to adults in 2021, and that children accounted for 4 per cent of people living with HIV, but constituted 15 per cent of AIDS-related deaths, and welcoming efforts to strengthen the HIV response for children,
data.zh: 承认存在艾滋病毒循证干预措施，并对不同国情下扩大干预措施程度不均衡以及预防资金支出速度缓慢导致预防工作出现重大差距表示关切，

data.en: Acknowledging the availability of evidence-based HIV interventions, and expressing concern regarding their uneven scale-up, according to national contexts, as well as the slow rates of expenditure of prevention funds resulting in critical gaps in prevention efforts,
data.zh: 认识到《2021-2026年全球艾滋病战略》各项目标和承诺的重要性，特别是承诺到2025年将每年新增艾滋病毒感染人数减少到370 000以下，将每年与艾滋病相关的死亡人数减少到250 000以下，并消除与艾滋病毒相关的一切形式的污名化与歧视，

data.en: Recognizing the importance of the targets and commitments of the Global AIDS Strategy 2021–2026, especially the commitments to reduce annual new HIV infections to under 370,000 and annual AIDS-related deaths to under 250,000 by 2025, and eliminate all forms of HIV-related stigma and discrimination,
data.zh: 关切地注意到可预防和可治疗的疾病和状况——包括结核病和其他混合感染、宫颈癌和精神健康问题以及其他传染性和非传染性疾病——与艾滋病毒感染、艾滋病毒治疗效果差和艾滋病毒携带者的死亡率有关，

data.en: Noting with concern that preventable and treatable diseases and conditions – including tuberculosis and other co-infections, cervical cancer and mental health conditions and other communicable and non-communicable diseases – are linked with HIV infection, poor HIV treatment outcomes and mortality among people living with HIV,
data.zh: 关切结核病，包括其耐药形式，依然是全球艾滋病毒携带者死亡的主要原因，2021年全世界结核病估计感染病例中有6.7%是艾滋病毒携带者，但在2021年，携带艾滋病毒的结核病估计病例中只有46%得到诊断，只有76%的已知结核病患者得到艾滋病毒检测，未能治疗，导致可预防死亡，

data.en: Concerned that tuberculosis, including its drug-resistant forms, remains the leading global cause of death among people living with HIV and that 6.7 per cent of estimated incident tuberculosis cases worldwide in 2021 were among people living with HIV, yet, in 2021, only 46 per cent of the estimated tuberculosis cases in people living with HIV were diagnosed, and only 76 per cent of known tuberculosis patients were tested for HIV, precluding treatment and resulting in preventable deaths,
data.zh: 又关切冠状病毒病(COVID-19)大流行加剧了国家内部和国家之间现有的不平等和不公平，减缓了艾滋病防治工作的进展，并认识到需要使艾滋病防治工作回到正轨以实现可持续发展目标，

data.en: Concerned also that the coronavirus disease (COVID-19) pandemic has exacerbated existing inequalities and inequities within and between countries and slowed progress on the AIDS response, and recognizing the need to put the AIDS response back on track to reach the Sustainable Development Goals,
data.zh: 还表示关切与艾滋病毒有关的污名化、歧视和不平等，包括经济不利地位，依然是有效防治艾滋病毒的障碍，特别是对女童和年轻妇女、处境脆弱的人，包括流行病学证据表明全球艾滋病毒感染风险较高的重点人群，以及遭受一种或多种形式歧视的所有人而言，

data.en: Further expressing concern that HIV-related stigma and discrimination and inequalities, including economic disadvantage, remain an impediment to an effective HIV response, especially for adolescent girls and young women, those in vulnerable situations, including key populations that epidemiological evidence shows to be globally at higher risk of HIV infection, and all those experiencing one or more forms of discrimination,
data.zh: 表示关切可能阻碍向所有人提供艾滋病毒预防、治疗、护理和支持服务的法律、政策和做法，

data.en: Expressing concern over laws, policies and practices that may hinder access for all people to HIV prevention, treatment, care and support services,
data.zh: 认识到民间社会切实参与全球应对艾滋病疫情的关键作用，重申促进、保护和实现所有人的所有人权和基本自由是全球应对艾滋病疫情的一个基本要素，包括预防、检测、诊断、治疗、护理和支助领域在内，

data.en: Recognizing the critical role that meaningful involvement of civil society plays in the global response to the AIDS epidemic, and reaffirming that the promotion, protection and fulfilment of all human rights and fundamental freedoms for all is an essential element in the global response to the AIDS epidemic, including in the areas of prevention, testing, diagnosis, treatment, care and support,
data.zh: 又认识到实现全民健康覆盖有助于更好地获得服务，发展和加强卫生系统，改善能力满足艾滋病毒携带者或可能感染艾滋病毒者的多种需求，推动以综合方式提供服务，并将艾滋病毒预防、检测、诊断、治疗、护理和支助服务纳入国家确定的全套优质基本保健服务，特别是初级保健服务，从而加速完成到2030年消除艾滋病疫情的工作，

data.en: Recognizing also that achieving universal health coverage can be an accelerator to ending the AIDS epidemic by 2030 through supporting greater access to services, the development and strengthening of health systems, improving the capacity to address the multiple needs of people living with or at risk of HIV and promoting integrated approaches to service delivery, as well as through the inclusion of HIV prevention, testing, diagnosis, treatment, care and support services into nationally determined sets of quality essential health-care services, particularly at the level of primary health care,
data.zh: 还认识到实现全民健康覆盖的努力应借鉴从艾滋病毒的多部门应对工作中汲取的经验教训，包括注重公平、结果和问责、遵循人权原则和满足最边缘化群体的需求、创新筹集保健资金、包容各方的保健治理、根据国情酌情提供的基于社区和社区牵头的服务、注重健康的社会、经济和结构决定因素、克服污名化和歧视的重要意义，

data.en: Recognizing further that efforts to achieve universal health coverage should be informed by the lessons learned from the multisectoral HIV response, including a focus on equity, outcomes and accountability, responsiveness to human rights principles and the needs of the most marginalized, innovation in health financing, inclusive health governance, community-based and community-led service delivery, as appropriate in the national context, a focus on the social, economic and structural determinants of health, and the importance of addressing stigma and discrimination,
data.zh: 认识到艾滋病毒的多部门应对工作的经验教训以及各国和各个社区利用艾滋病毒投资和基础设施的方式对应对卫生和发展方面的其他复杂挑战不无价值，又认识到应对艾滋病毒工作的进展已促进取得更广泛的发展成果，

data.en: Recognizing the value of lessons learned from the multisectoral response to HIV and how countries and communities have leveraged their HIV investments and infrastructure in addressing other complex health and development challenges, and that progress in the HIV response has led to progress on broader development outcomes,
data.zh: 重申在按照大会2020年12月21日第75/233号决议实现可持续发展目标和不让任何一个人掉队的更广泛努力背景下，联合国艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署凝聚秘书处和11个共同赞助方的努力，在激励和支持针对艾滋病毒的多部门对策方面发挥着关键作用，

data.en: Reaffirming the pivotal role of the Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS, which unites the efforts of the secretariat and 11 co-sponsors, in galvanizing and supporting multisectoral HIV responses in the context of broader efforts to reach the Sustainable Development Goals and leave no one behind, in line with General Assembly resolution 75/233 of 21 December 2020,
data.zh: 回顾联合规划署的目标是实现和促进全球就政策和方案方针达成共识，促进国内为预防和应对艾滋病毒和艾滋病进行广泛的政治和社会动员，确保国家的应对措施包括众多部门和机构，

data.en: Recalling the objectives of the Joint Programme to achieve and promote global consensus on policy and programmatic approaches and promote broad-based political and social mobilization to prevent and respond to HIV and AIDS within countries, ensuring that national responses involve a wide range of sectors and institutions,
data.zh: 赞赏地注意到会员国继续报告在应对艾滋病毒方面取得的进展以及联合规划署向会员国提供的支持，包括方便获取和使用优质数据以衡量艾滋病毒应对工作的进展并完善战略，

data.en: Noting with appreciation the continued reporting by Member States on progress in their HIV responses and the support provided by the Joint Programme to Member States, including by enabling increased access to and use of quality data to measure progress and refine strategies in the HIV response,
data.zh: 强调指出联合规划署需要继续向会员国特别是艾滋病毒负担高或者疫情不断加重或集中的会员国提供支持，

data.en: Stressing the need for the Joint Programme to continue to provide support to Member States, especially those with a high HIV burden or growing or concentrated epidemics,
data.zh: 表示深为关切艾滋病毒防治工作的资金依然短缺，发展中国家特别是艾滋病毒疫情影响严重的国家尤其如此，

data.en: Expressing deep concern that there is a continuing shortfall in the financing of the HIV response, especially with respect to developing countries, in particular those that are highly affected by the HIV epidemic,
data.zh: 认识到需要提供资金，研究和开发优质、安全、负担得起和有效的艾滋病毒新药以及公平、及时和不受阻碍地获得这些救命药品，

data.en: Recognizing the need for funding, research and development of new quality, safe, affordable and effective HIV medicines as well as equitable, timely and unhindered access to these life-saving medicines,
data.zh: 关切地注意到统一预算、成果和问责制框架资金持续短缺，以及秘书处工作人员、共同赞助者拨款和国家封套资金的大幅削减及艾滋病署秘书处国家办事处关闭和区域支助小组关闭后区域职能合并对联合规划署执行年度工作计划的能力造成负面影响，

data.en: Noting with concern the persistent shortfalls in the Unified Budget, Results and Accountability Framework funding and the negative impact on the capacity of the Joint Programme to implement its annual workplan as a result of significant reductions in secretariat staff, co-sponsor allocations and country envelopes as well as the closure of UNAIDS secretariat country offices and the amalgamation of regional functions following the closure of a regional support team,
data.zh: 赞赏地注意到方案协调委员会关于治理问题以及为联合规划署提供更多的可持续资金的必要性的讨论，包括讨论方案协调委员会非正式多利益攸关方工作组为调集更多的新资源以弥补持续且不断扩大的供资缺口而开展的工作和提出的建议，

data.en: Noting with appreciation the discussions of the Programme Coordinating Board on governance issues and the need for increased and sustainable funding of the Joint Programme, including the work and recommendations of the informal multi‑stakeholder task team of the Programme Coordinating Board to mobilize more and new resources to close the continuous and increasing funding gap,
data.zh: 表示赞赏地注意到方案协调委员会最近就方案协调委员会非政府组织代表团在联合规划署治理中发挥的重要作用进行讨论，

data.en: Requests the Secretary-General to transmit to the Council, at its 2025 session, a report prepared by the Executive Director of the Joint Programme in collaboration with its co-sponsors and other relevant organizations and bodies of the United Nations system, on progress made in implementing a coordinated response by the United Nations system to the HIV and AIDS epidemic.
data.zh: 大会第75/284号决议，附件。

data.en: General Assembly resolution 75/284, annex.
data.zh: 大会第70/1号决议。

data.en: General Assembly resolution 70/1.
data.zh: 正如《2021-2026年全球艾滋病战略——“终结不平等，终结艾滋病”》中所述以及2016年“预防差距报告”中所讨论的那样，每个国家都应该根据流行病学和社会情况，确定对其疫情和应对措施至关重要的具体人群。

data.en: As referred to in the Global AIDS Strategy 2021–2026, “End Inequalities, End AIDS”, and discussed in the 2016 “Prevention gap report”, each country should define the specific populations that are key to its epidemic and response based on the epidemiological and social context.
data.zh: 联合国艾滋病毒/艾滋病联合规划署2022年流行病学估计。

data.zh: 世界卫生组织《2022年全球结核病报告》(日内瓦，2022年)。

data.zh: 请秘书长在题为“协调、方案和其他问题”的项目中题为“非传染性疾病预防和控制”的分项下，向理事会2024年届会提交一份关于第2013/12号决议执行进展的最新报告，为届会期间的讨论提供参考，同时注意到关于该分项审议周期的讨论。

data.en: Requests the Secretary-General to submit an updated report to the Council to inform the discussions at its 2024 session on progress achieved in implementing resolution 2013/12, under the sub-item entitled “Prevention and control of non‑communicable diseases” of the item entitled “Coordination, programme and other questions”, taking note of the discussion on the periodicity of the consideration of the sub-item.

data.zh: 世界卫生组织总干事关于联合国预防和控制非传染性疾病机构间工作队的报告

data.en: Report of the Director General of the World Health Organization on the United Nations Inter-Agency Task Force on the Prevention and Control of Non‑communicable Diseases
data.zh: 一.

data.en: I.
data.zh: 导言：工作队的十年

data.en: The year 2023 marks the tenth anniversary of the establishment by the Secretary-General of the United Nations Inter-Agency Task Force on the Prevention and Control of Non-communicable Diseases in line with resolution 2013/12 of the Economic and Social Council.
data.zh: 本报告重点介绍了工作队在过去10年里取得的成就，同时重点介绍了2022年期间采取的具体行动。

data.en: The Task Force was established to bring the full force of the United Nations in supporting countries in scaling up action on non-communicable diseases.
data.zh: 设立工作队的原因如下：
非传染性疾病是世界各地死亡和健康不良的主要原因；
非传染性疾病影响许多处于最活跃年龄段的人，造成巨大的社会经济影响；
大部分负担是可以预防的；
需要在卫生以外的其他部门采取行动，工作队成员可以接触政府和社会的各个部门；
联合国在作为一个整体开展工作时最有效。

data.en: Since 2013, the Council has broadened the mandate of the Task Force, including to support countries in delivering on mental health and other non-communicable disease-related Sustainable Development Goal targets (see figure I).
data.zh: 图一

data.en: Figure I
data.zh: 经社理事会2013-2022年期间关于工作队工作的各项决议的主要内容

data.en: The 2022–2025 strategy of the Task Force, described in the 2022 report to the Council (E/2022/59), builds on the 2019–2021 strategy of the Task Force and previous workplans.
data.zh: 2022-2025年战略有四个优先事项：(a) 支持各国就可持续发展目标中与非传染性疾病有关的具体目标采取多部门行动；(b) 调动资源，支持制定国家对策，以实现可持续发展目标中与非传染性疾病有关的具体目标；(c) 协调行动，建立伙伴关系；(d) 成为联合国改革的典范。
联合方案规划访问团:

data.en: Joint programming missions:
data.zh: 与国家元首和部长、议员和非国家行为者举行会议，以促进整个政府、整个社会的行动。

data.en: Meeting heads of State and ministers, parliamentarians and non-State actors to promote whole-of-government, whole-of-society action.
data.zh: 提高联合国国家工作队对非传染性疾病和精神卫生的关注程度，并承诺采取行动。
实际技术支助：

data.en: Hands-on technical support:
data.zh: 加强国家协调机制和多部门行动计划。

data.en: Strengthening national coordination mechanisms and multi-sectoral action plans.
data.zh: 为增加资源进行投资论证。

data.en: Developing investment cases for increased resources.
data.zh: 促进国家政策和战略变革。

data.en: Catalysing changes in national policy and strategy.
data.zh: 扩大非传染性疾病和精神卫生方案规划。
发展创新伙伴关系，例如：

data.en: Developing innovative partnerships, for example:
data.zh: 联合国促进非传染性疾病和精神卫生国家行动多伙伴信托基金(Health4Life基金)；

data.en: The United Nations multi-partner trust fund to catalyse country action for non‑communicable diseases and mental health (Health4Life Fund).
data.zh: 为支持各国加强非传染性疾病治理而设立的NCD2030。

data.en: NCD2030, established to support countries in strengthening governance for non-communicable diseases.
data.zh: 为减少酒精的有害使用而制定的SAFER倡议。

data.en: The SAFER initiative, established to reduce the harmful use of alcohol.
data.zh: 支持全球消除宫颈癌联合行动小组。

data.en: A joint action group to support the global elimination of cervical cancer.
data.zh: 为应对冠状病毒病(COVID-19)而制定的获取戒烟服务倡议。

data.en: The Access Initiative for Quitting Tobacco, established to respond to the coronavirus disease (COVID-19).
data.zh: 关于数字解决方案、共病和人权的其他伙伴关系。
制作指导和宣传材料，例如部门简报、 工作队成员简报 和COVID-19简报。

data.en: Development of guidance and advocacy material, for example, sectoral briefs, Task Force member briefs, and COVID-19 briefs.
