7–10 February 2023
data.zh: 临时议程*项目9

data.en: Item 9 of the provisional agenda*
data.zh: 关于儿基会实现《2022-2025年战略计划》的定位的可评价性评估和形成性评价

data.en: Evaluability assessment and formative evaluation of the UNICEF positioning to achieve the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025
data.zh: 摘要**

data.en: Summary**
data.zh: 摘要

data.en: Summary
data.zh: 当今世界，儿童面临越来越多不确定性，加上2019冠状病毒病疫情令本就停滞不前的实现可持续发展目标的进展发生逆转，儿基会必须找到最佳定位，在未来几年恢复势头，加快进展，并以尽可能最好的方式协助为儿童取得成果。

data.en: In a world of increasing uncertainty for children, coupled with the reversal of already stalled progress towards the Sustainable Development Goals resulting from the coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic, it is crucial that UNICEF be optimally positioned to regain momentum, accelerate progress, and contribute to the achievement of results for children in the best possible ways in the years ahead.
data.zh: 为此，儿基会在其《2022-2025年战略计划》中阐述了一套前所未有的雄心勃勃的目标。

data.en: Towards this end, the organization, in its Strategic Plan 2022–2025, articulated a set of goals of unprecedented ambition.
data.zh: 为此，《战略计划》还确定了一套同样雄心勃勃的变革战略、推进手段和其他行动，这对于最大限度地提高成功实现目标的可能性，进而以尽可能好的方式促进对世界各地每个儿童的权利产生积极影响至关重要。

data.en: Towards this end, the Strategic Plan also identified an equally ambitious set of change strategies, enablers and other actions that will be crucial for maximizing the likelihood that it succeeds in achieving its ambitions and, by extension, in contributing to positive impact on the rights of every child, everywhere, in the best possible ways.
data.zh: 雄心勃勃的行动本质上包含着潜在的风险。

data.en: Ambitious action intrinsically embodies potential risk.
data.zh: 为此，评价职能部门开发了一套评价产品，以帮助儿基会尽早预见和管理这些风险。

data.en: For this reason, the evaluation function has developed a suite of evaluative exercises to help the organization foresee and manage these risks as early as possible.
data.zh: 这一前瞻性视角是“关于儿基会实现《2022-2025年战略计划》的定位的可评价性评估和形成性评价”的目标。

data.en: This forward-looking lens was the objective of the “Evaluability assessment and formative evaluation of the UNICEF positioning to achieve the goals of the Strategic Plan, 2022–2025”.
data.zh: 在《战略计划》的第一年受托进行的评价旨在确定机构优势和需要调整路线的领域。

data.en: Commissioned in the first year of the Strategic Plan, it sought to identify points of institutional strength and areas that require course adjustment.
data.zh: 通过这种方式，评价力求在这些问题可能成为儿基会及其合作伙伴和其他主要利益攸关方（包括执行局）在四年期的晚些时候必须解决的、更具挑战性的问题之前，先查明问题。

data.en: In this way it sought to identify issues before these might become more challenging problems for UNICEF and its partners and other key stakeholders (including the Executive Board) to resolve later on in the quadrennium.
data.zh: 评价的中心是《战略计划》的19个推进手段、变革战略和跨领域方案。

data.en: The evaluation centred on the 19 enablers, change strategies and cross-cutting programmes of the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 它们被称为“战略要素”，旨在确保与五个目标领域方案一起成功编制方案。

data.en: Labelled the “strategic elements”, they are designed to assure programming success in conjunction with the five Goal Area programmes.
data.zh: 通过审查其方法、定位、资源、技术能力和伙伴关系，来评估准备情况。

data.en: Their readiness was assessed by examining their approach, positioning, resources, technical capacity and partnerships.
data.zh: 19个战略要素中，有6个被评为充分准备，3个被评为不充分，10个被评为刚刚起步（正在改善）但还不充分。

data.en: Six of the 19 strategic elements were rated as sufficiently ready, three as insufficient, and ten as nascent (improving) but not yet sufficient.
data.zh: 儿基会在“方法”标准上被评为最强，在“资源”标准上被评为最弱。

data.en: The organization was assessed to be strongest on the “approach” criterion and weakest on the “resources” criterion.
data.zh: 考虑到《战略计划》中雄心勃勃的目标，这一总体结果被认为是相对积极的。

data.en: Given the high level of ambition targeted in the Strategic Plan, this overarching result is considered to be relatively positive.
data.zh: 更具技术性的可评价性评估表明，在四年期结束时，儿基会已经为评价做好了充分的准备，同时，如果儿基会要在整个四年期中进行学习和调整，还有许多准备方面的问题需要改进。

data.en: The more technical evaluability assessment shows sufficient readiness for evaluation at the end of the quadrennium, as well as many readiness issues requiring improvement if the organization is to learn and adjust throughout the quadrennium.
data.zh: 认识到《战略计划》并没有涵盖影响儿基会工作的每一个要素，而且各个推进手段和变革战略并不是以分散的方式展开的，而是密切相关和相互依存的，这项工作还探讨了更广泛的基本组织准备问题。

data.en: Acknowledging the reality that the Strategic Plan does not cover every element affecting the work of UNICEF, and that individual enablers and change strategies do not unfold in a fragmented manner but rather are closely interlinked and mutually interdependent, the exercise also explored broader underlying organizational readiness issues.
data.zh: 在此过程中，评价确定了一套影响准备情况的基础因素，即：长期的组织优势；对《战略计划》的理解和承诺；儿基会业务模式的适宜性；资源配置；以及文化和领导力。

data.en: In doing so, it identified a set of foundational factors affecting readiness, namely: long-standing organizational strengths; the understanding of and commitment to the Strategic Plan; the suitability of the UNICEF business model; resourcing; and culture and leadership.
data.zh: 这些因素都有几个组成部分。

data.en: Each of these factors has several components.
data.zh: 这项工作还确定了12项关键建议，以改善准备情况，从而最大限度地提高儿基会实现其宏伟目标和衡量其进展的可能性。

data.en: The exercise also identifies 12 critical recommendations to improve readiness and thus maximize the likelihood that UNICEF will achieve its ambitious goals and measure its progress.
data.zh: 供执行局审议的决定草案要点载于第六节。

data.en: Elements of a draft decision for consideration by the Executive Board are provided in section VI.
data.zh: 导言

data.en: Introduction
data.zh: 《儿基会2022-2025年战略计划》

data.en: The UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025
data.zh: 儿基会《2022-2025年战略计划》是一个中期框架，用于指导儿基会在当前四年期中执行其任务。

data.en: The UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025 is a medium-term framework guiding the organization’s implementation of its mandate during the current quadrennium.
data.zh: 《战略计划》于2021年9月得到执行局的核可，并于2022年1月开始实施，它使儿基会与联合国发展系统的统一努力保持一致，以加大实现可持续发展目标和《2030年议程》的进展。

data.en: Endorsed by the Executive Board in September 2021 and commenced in January 2022, it aligns UNICEF with the United Nations development system’s unified efforts to scale up progress to achieve the Sustainable Development Goals and the 2030 Agenda.
data.zh: 《2022-2025年战略计划》首次采用双周期的方法，这是在制定2026-2030年后续战略计划之前有意为之，2026-2030年战略计划将以与儿童权利状况和儿基会届时的业务环境相称的方式，进一步实现《2030年议程》的目标。

data.en: Taking a two-cycle approach for the first time, the Strategic Plan, 2022–2025 is an intentional precursor to the 2026–2030 sequel that will further target the goals of the 2030 Agenda in ways that are commensurate with the state of children’s rights and with the organization’s operating environment at that time.
data.zh: 当前的《战略计划》再次强调方案编制优势的历史领域，同时进行创新并将儿基会的工作扩展到新的领域。

data.en: The current Strategic Plan renews the emphasis on historical areas of programming strength while innovating and expanding UNICEF efforts into new areas.
data.zh: 这一新的努力主要体现在一套变革战略、推进手段和跨领域方案中，本报告将其统称为“战略要素”。

data.en: Much of this new effort resides in a set of change strategies, enablers and cross-cutting programmes, which are collectively referred to in the present report as the “strategic elements”.
data.zh: 儿基会认为，战略要素对于成功实现《战略计划》的目标至关重要，并通过将战略要素纳入《战略计划》的综合成果和资源框架（IRRF）来加以确认。

data.en: UNICEF sees the strategic elements as critical to its success in achieving the Strategic Plan goals, as confirmed by their incorporation into the Plan’s Integrated Results and Resources Framework (IRRF).
data.zh: 图一说明了如何设计战略要素来推动实现《战略计划》的中长期成果。

data.en: Figure I illustrates how the strategic elements are designed to propel the medium- and long-term results of the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 图1

data.en: Figure I
data.zh: 儿基会《2022-2025年战略计划》：重振雄心，迈向2030年

data.en: UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025: renewed ambition towards 2030
data.zh: 宗旨、目标、范围和预期用户

data.en: Purpose, objectives, scope and intended users
data.zh: “关于儿基会实现《2022-2025年战略计划》的定位的可评价性评估和形成性评价”（以下简称评价） 立足于一个主要的问题：“儿基会在多大程度上具备最关键的技术和战略要素，以实现其在《2022-2025年战略计划》中承诺的目标，并对照这些目标有意义地监测和评价其进展情况？”

data.en: The “Evaluability assessment and formative evaluation of the UNICEF positioning to achieve the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025” (hereinafter referred to as the evaluation) is anchored in one main overarching question: “To what extent does UNICEF have the most critical technical and strategic elements in place to achieve the goals it has committed to in the Strategic Plan, 2022–2025 and to meaningfully monitor and evaluate its progress against these goals?”
data.zh: 在广泛的机构层面，评价的目标具有深远的范围和战略意义。

data.en: At the broad institutional level, the goals of the evaluation are far-reaching in scope and strategic in implication.
data.zh: 《战略计划》所体现的高水平的雄心，在战略要素没有发挥出应有的作用的情况下，会带来执行不足的风险。

data.en: The high level of ambition embodied in the Strategic Plan entails a risk of under-fulfilment in the event that the strategic elements do not perform as needed.
data.zh: 为此，评价办公室在《战略计划》实施的早期阶段主动委托进行了本次评价。

data.en: Towards this end, the Evaluation Office proactively commissioned this evaluation at the early stage of the Strategic Plan’s implementation.
data.zh: 为了实现这些目标，评价有两个核心目标：
评估儿基会在衡量《战略计划》的进展方面处于何种地位，方法是考察整套技术要素的准备情况（例如，变革理论、目标的明确性、成果管理制、关键绩效指标、监测和评价系统以及证据的使用）。

data.en: Assess how well-placed UNICEF is to measure progress on the Strategic Plan by looking at the readiness of the collective set of technical elements (for example, theory of change, clarity of objectives, results-based management (RBM) systems, key performance indicators, monitoring and evaluation systems, and use of evidence).
data.zh: 评价的可评价性评估部分涉及了这一目标。
评估《战略计划》的战略要素（即五个推进手段、九个变革战略和五个跨领域方案）的准备情况。

data.en: Appraise the state of readiness of the strategic elements of the Strategic Plan (that is, the five enablers, nine change strategies and five cross-cutting programmes).
data.zh: 评价的形成性评价部分涉及了这一目标。

data.en: The formative evaluation portion of the evaluation addressed this objective.
data.zh: 评价分析了儿基会的全球、区域和国家各级情况。

data.en: The evaluation analyses the global, regional and country levels of the organization.
data.zh: 虽然每个业务单位都可以在全球和区域层面作出回应，但儿基会的国家办事处太多，无法完全覆盖。

data.en: While each business unit could respond at the global and regional levels, UNICEF country offices are too numerous for complete coverage.
data.zh: 因此，对地点、国民收入水平、紧急背景和其他变量截然不同的八个国家办事处进行了深入分析。

data.en: Consequently, eight country offices with contrasting locations, national income levels, emergency contexts and other variables were analysed in depth.
data.zh: 然而，下文所述的全球调查是针对所有国家办事处的工作人员的。

data.en: However, the global survey described below was open to staff from all country offices.
data.zh: 虽然核心由战略和技术要素组成，但评价必然在三个方面扩大重点：
它考虑了战略和技术要素与目标领域的联系，而目标领域是《战略计划》大部分行动的载体。
它采用了三个深入的主题作为案例研究。

data.en: It employs three deep-dive topics as case studies.
data.zh: 每个主题都对实现《战略计划》的目标很重要，同时体现了战略和技术要素之间的相互作用。

data.en: Each one is important for reaching Strategic Plan goals while reflecting the interplay of the strategic and technical elements:
data.zh: 组织融合：将儿基会的各个支柱及其合作伙伴汇集在一起，以倍增的方式开展工作。

data.en: Organizational convergence: Bringing together the various pillars of the organization and its partners to work in a multiplicative way.
data.zh: 组织文化：工作方式、思维模式和领导力，以及变革管理。

data.en: Organizational culture: Ways of working, mindset and leadership, and change management.
data.zh: 为预测和应对全球冲击做好准备：设计组织能力，以预测和应对全球冲击的多层面影响。
它包括一套组织绩效的基础因素，这些因素与战略要素部分重叠，但具有作为基本或横向杠杆的特性，可供管理人员用来实现变革。

data.en: It includes a set of foundational factors of organizational performance that partly overlap with the strategic elements but have an identity as underlying or transversal levers available to managers to effect change.
data.zh: 这些因素是：组织文化、结构治理和安排、问责框架、角色和责任的明确性，以及资金的充足性和可预测性。

data.en: These are: organizational culture, structural governance and arrangements, accountability frameworks, clarity of roles and responsibilities, and funding adequacy and predictability.
data.zh: 方法

data.en: Methodology
data.zh: 数据收集

data.en: Data collection
data.zh: 审查了400多份文件，以分析与新《战略计划》的一致性，并确定儿基会应采取的方向。

data.en: Over 400 documents were reviewed to analyse alignment with the new Strategic Plan and identify the direction that UNICEF should take.
data.zh: 焦点小组讨论确定了实施计划、挑战和支持因素、与其他要素和五个目标领域的联系，以及迄今取得的进展。

data.en: Focus group discussions ascertained the plan for implementation, challenges and supporting factors, links with other elements and the five Goal Areas, and progress thus far.
data.zh: 对每个级别、每个案例研究国家、每个战略要素和所有目标领域的工作人员和合作伙伴进行了关键知情人访谈。

data.en: Key informant interviews were held with staff and partners across each level, each case study country, each strategic element, and all Goal Areas.
data.zh: 向儿基会工作人员分发的一项全球调查探讨了他们对《战略计划》、对他们声称熟悉的每个战略和技术要素以及对深入研究的主题的看法。

data.en: A global survey distributed to UNICEF staff explored perspectives on the Strategic Plan, on each strategic and technical element with which they claimed familiarity, and on the deep-dive subjects.
data.zh: 评价小组在关键决策时刻通过研讨会与儿基会的领导层进行磋商。

data.en: The evaluation team consulted with UNICEF leadership via workshops at critical decision-making moments.
data.zh: 在设计阶段和有了早期发现后，召集了由来自整个组织的成员组成的咨商小组。

data.en: A reference group with members from across the organization was convened at the design stage and when early findings were available.
data.zh: 与战略和技术要素负责人举行了四次验证研讨会，以便他们能够评估分析的合理性，对结论草案作出回应，并就前进的方向提出建议。

data.en: Four validation workshops were held with strategic and technical element leads so that they could assess the soundness of the analysis, react to the draft findings, and advise on the way forward.
data.zh: 与全球评价委员会的成员举行了两次类似的研讨会，并与领导层举行了更多的验证研讨会。

data.en: Two similar workshops were held with members of the Global Evaluation Committee, and additional validation workshops were organized with leadership.
data.zh: 图2

data.en: Figure II
data.zh: 数据收集和分析方法简介

data.en: Snapshot of data collection and analysis approach
data.zh: 分析框架

data.en: Analytical frameworks
data.zh: 评价通过由三部分组成的方法实现了分析的一致性。

data.en: The evaluation achieved consistency in analysis through a three-part approach.
data.zh: 第一部分是一个适用于各战略要素的准备情况评估框架（表1）。

data.en: The first was a readiness assessment framework (table 1) applied across the strategic elements.
data.zh: 表1

data.en: Table 1
data.zh: 准备情况评估框架的层面和定义

data.en: Dimensions and definitions of the readiness assessment framework
data.zh: 第二部分是适用于各技术要素的可评价性框架（表5），以评估儿基会如何衡量《战略计划》所取得的进展。

data.en: The second was an evaluability framework applied across the technical elements (table 5) to assess how UNICEF is set to measure the Strategic Plan progress delivered.
data.zh: 所审查的因素是一致性、胜任其职和资源配置。

data.en: The factors examined were coherence, fitness for purpose, and resourcing.
data.zh: 第三部分是根据评价小组在考虑了所有证据后所作的判断，在各战略和技术要素中采用的总体准备情况量表（表2）。

data.en: The third was an overall readiness scale (table 2) employed across the strategic and technical elements, based on the evaluation team’s judgment considering all of the evidence.
data.zh: 表2

data.en: Table 2
data.zh: 准备情况评估框架量表

data.en: Readiness assessment framework scale
data.zh: 评价的局限性

data.en: Evaluation limitations
data.zh: 职权范围的广度，再加上特意为这项工作制定的尽早、快速完成的时间框架，要求采取广泛而非深入的方法。

data.en: The breadth of the terms of reference, coupled with a deliberately early and rapid time frame for the exercise, required a broad rather than deep approach.
data.zh: 因此，这项工作没有彻底审查新方案小组下的目标领域，因此对其补充或协调战略和技术要素工作的能力缺乏具体了解。

data.en: Consequently, the exercise did not thoroughly examine the Goal Areas under the new Programme Group and therefore lacks specific insights into their capacities to complement or coordinate with the efforts of the strategic and technical elements.
data.zh: 此外，外部利益攸关方的代表性不如内部利益攸关方。

data.en: In addition, external stakeholders were less well represented than internal stakeholders.
data.zh: 然而，多边组织业绩评估网（MOPAN）和联合国联合检查组等机构最近报告中的关键文件对外部利益攸关方的访谈进行了补充。

data.en: However, the external stakeholders interviews were augmented by key documents from recent reports of the Multilateral Organization Performance Assessment Network (MOPAN) and the United Nations Joint Inspection Unit, among others.
data.zh: 评价结果

data.en: Findings
data.zh: 本报告中的评价结果直接取自评价报告。

data.en: The findings in the present report are drawn directly from the evaluation report.
data.zh: 为了更简洁地传达相同的信息，评价结果的呈现顺序以及组织方式都偏离了评价报告的结构。

data.en: The sequence in which the findings are presented, as well as how they are organized, veers from the evaluation report structure, in order to convey the same information more succinctly.
data.zh: 战略要素的总体准备情况

data.en: Overall readiness for the strategic elements
data.zh: 本节总结了19个战略要素的准备情况，如表3和表4所示。

data.en: This section summarizes the readiness of the 19 strategic elements, as presented in tables 3 and 4.
data.zh: 表3

data.en: Table 3
data.zh: 战略要素的准备情况评估

data.en: Readiness assessments of the strategic elements
data.zh: 表4

data.en: Table 4
data.zh: 准备情况框架和战略要素热图

data.en: Readiness framework and strategic elements heatmap
data.zh: 图例：1 = 完全缺乏/非常差：该要素需要立即调整，才能支持《战略计划》的实施。2 = 不充分/差：该要素没有充分准备好支持《战略计划》的实施。2 = 不充分，但刚刚起步：该要素提出了初步但不充分的证据，表明已准备好支持《战略计划》的实施。

data.en: Legend: 1 = Totally lacking/very poor: the element requires immediate adjustment to support the implementation of the Strategic Plan. 2 = Insufficient/poor: the element is insufficiently ready to support the implementation of the Strategic Plan. 2 = Insufficient, but nascent: the element presents initial but insufficient evidence that shows readiness for supporting the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 证明的是对产出的贡献，但尚未对成果有所贡献。

data.en: It demonstrates a contribution to outputs but not yet outcomes.
data.zh: 3 = 充分/良好：该要素已准备好支持产出成果的交付，但无法证明对成果的贡献。

data.en: 3 = Sufficient/good enough: the element is ready to support the delivery of output results but cannot demonstrate contributions to outcomes.
data.zh: 4 = 最佳/非常好：该要素为实现成果/中期变革提供了大量证据。

data.en: 4 = Optimal/very good: the element presents a very good amount of evidence towards achieving outcomes/medium-term changes.
data.zh: 第一个关键评价结果是，所有战略要素都已部分到位，6个要素充分/良好，10个要素不充分但刚刚起步，3个要素不充分/差。

data.en: The first key finding is that all strategic elements were partially in place, with six being sufficient/good, ten insufficient but nascent, and three inadequate/poor.
data.zh: 这在很大程度上是积极的评价结果。

data.en: This is largely positive.
data.zh: 如果查明的准备情况问题得到解决，这些都将成为增长的平台。

data.en: These are platforms for growth if the readiness issues identified are addressed.
data.zh: 在保留近年来积累的投入的同时，也承认了一些弱点和实现《战略计划》面临的集体挑战。

data.en: They are preserving the accumulated investments of recent years while acknowledging some weaknesses and the collective challenge of meeting the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 纵观所有19个战略要素，出现了有趣的模式。

data.en: Interesting patterns emerged when looking across all 19 strategic elements.
data.zh: 当前《战略计划》中的新要素或最近《战略计划》中引入的要素准备程度评级较低，因此对实现其目标的准备不足。

data.en: Elements that were new to the current Strategic Plan or were introduced in the most recent Strategic Plan had lower readiness ratings and are thus less ready to achieve their objectives.
data.zh: 虽然这并不令人惊讶，但这也意味着这些要素需要强化，或者需要调低对这些要素的期望。

data.en: While this is unsurprising, it also means they need reinforcement, or their expectations need to be moderated.
data.zh: 在包括工作人员调查在内的所有数据来源中，跨领域要素的准备程度评级最低。

data.en: The cross-cutting elements had the lowest readiness ratings across all data sources, including the staff survey.
data.zh: 这反映了一个持续存在的趋同和交叉问题，这个主题将在下文第四节讨论。

data.en: This reflects a sustained issue with convergence and intersectionality, a theme discussed in section IV below.
data.zh: 然而，性别平等问题作为一项变革战略和跨领域方案，一直获得很高的评级。

data.en: Yet, gender had consistently high ratings as a change strategy and cross-cutting programme.
data.zh: 近年来，六个评级最高的要素都受益于支持，体现在执行局的决定、执行主任的领导、专门单位和可靠的内部沟通上。

data.en: In recent years, each of the six highest-rated elements has benefited from support manifested in Executive Board decisions, Executive Director leadership, specialized units and solid internal communications.
data.zh: 这反映了一个长期成功的公式。

data.en: This represents a formula for success over time.
data.zh: 在准备情况框架的各个方面，这种方法（通常被称为“战略意图”）往往得到很高的评级，因为它清楚地说明了意图，明确地阐述了概念，并制定了完善的战略、政策和指导。

data.en: Turning to the aspects of the readiness framework, the approach – often called the “strategic intent” – was often highly rated owing to clear statements of intent, clear articulation of concepts, and well-developed strategies, policies and guidance.
data.zh: 然而，在与其他致力于实现类似结果的要素保持一致方面，以及在若干要素的监测和学习部分，发现了一些弱点。

data.en: However, weaknesses were found in the coherence with other elements that work towards similar outcomes, and in the monitoring and learning components of several elements.
data.zh: 定位是指该要素在内部的最佳位置，以及相对于其他内部单位或旨在实现相同或类似目标的伙伴组织的最佳位置。

data.en: Positioning is the optimal placement of the element internally and relative to other internal units or partner organizations with the same or similar aims.
data.zh: 超过一半的要素被评为刚刚起步，这意味着通过有针对性的改进，这些要素就可以完全准备就绪。

data.en: More than half of the elements are rated as nascent, meaning that they can be fully ready with targeted improvements.
data.zh: 定位方面的挑战包括：通过划分责任、就跨领域方案达成共识以及界定不同行为者的比较优势来实施融合办法。

data.en: Challenges in positioning include operationalizing converging approaches by mapping out accountabilities, developing a common understanding in the case of cross-cutting programmes, and defining comparative advantages of different actors.
data.zh: 融合——根植于定位——是建议1的主题。

data.en: Convergence – rooted in positioning – is the subject of recommendation 1.
data.zh: 许多领域的技术能力传统上很强，但似乎没有儿基会受众预期的那么强。

data.en: Technical capacity is traditionally strong in many areas but appears less strong than expected by the UNICEF audience.
data.zh: 一个范围界定的解释是，评价没有审视拥有大量专门知识的目标领域，但它反映了《战略计划》大幅提振的雄心。

data.en: A scoping explanation is that the evaluation did not look within the Goal Areas where tremendous expertise resides, but it reflects the greatly expanded ambition of the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 《战略计划》引入了新的议程（例如，气候行动），一些实施战略被重新定义或设定了更大的目标（例如，数字化转型、创新以及社会和行为变化），所有这些都需要更新技术技能。

data.en: New agendas were introduced in the Strategic Plan (for example, climate action), and some implementation strategies were redefined or given larger targets (for example, digital transformation, innovation and social and behavioural change), all of which require updated technical skills.
data.zh: 一个常见的复杂情况是技术人才的分布或获取不均衡（例如，文化、敏捷和反应迅速的商业模式、宣传和沟通方面的技术人才）。

data.en: A common complication is an uneven distribution of, or access to, the pools of technical talent for example, culture, agile and responsive business model, advocacy and communications).
data.zh: 在伙伴关系中，儿基会的存在、在外地的知名度以及与政府和民间社会合作的组织优势得到了重申。

data.en: Within partnerships, the presence of UNICEF, visibility in the field and organizational strength in working with Governments and civil society were reaffirmed.
data.zh: 然而，在那些被评为不充分的国家中，被判定为刚刚起步的国家太少。

data.en: However, too few of those rated insufficient were judged to be nascent.
data.zh: 交叉领域以及创新和数字化转型领域的评级特别低。

data.en: The cross-cutting areas and the innovation and digital transformation areas are especially low rated.
data.zh: 在四个被评为完全缺乏/非常差的情况中，有三个发生在资源配置方面。

data.en: Resourcing was by far the weakest aspect. Three of the four instances when the totally lacking/very poor rating was assigned occur here.
data.zh: 后文将深入探讨这些问题，但这些问题并非源于资金的总体萎缩或短缺。

data.en: The issues are explored in depth later but do not derive from an overall shrinkage or shortage of funds.
data.zh: 相反，《战略计划》雄心的提振，以及资源配置环境的各个方面（如指定用途），都构成了重大障碍。

data.en: Instead, the growth in the Strategic Plan ambition, and aspects of the resourcing environment, such as earmarking, are among the significant barriers.
data.zh: 技术要素的总体准备情况

data.en: Overall readiness for the technical elements
data.zh: 可评价性是指《战略计划》在多大程度上可以用可靠和可信的方式进行评价。

data.en: Evaluability means the extent to which the Strategic Plan is ready to be evaluated in a reliable and credible fashion.
data.zh: 它既包括总结性评价性，指的是《战略计划》结束后的评价，也包括形成性评价性，指的是实施过程中的审查时刻，可以支持战略和业务决策。

data.en: It includes both summative evaluability, referring to evaluation after the Strategic Plan concludes, and formative evaluability, referring to the review moments during implementation that can support strategic and operational decision-making.
data.zh: 如表5所示，在三个可评价性评估组中有七个技术要素。

data.en: There are seven technical elements within three evaluability assessment clusters, as presented in table 5.
data.zh: 表5

data.en: Table 5
data.zh: 技术要素的准备情况评估

data.en: Readiness assessments of the technical elements
data.zh: 第二个关键评价结果是，儿基会可以对2025年实现高质量的总结性评价的前景保持乐观，但形成性评价面临着重要的障碍，尚不胜任其职。

data.en: The second key finding is that UNICEF can be optimistic about the prospects for a high-quality summative evaluation in 2025, but formative evaluability faces important barriers and is not yet fit for purpose.
data.zh: 尽管存在一些严重的局限性，但《战略计划》为总结性评价提供了一个连贯的框架。

data.en: Despite some critical limitations, the Strategic Plan offers a coherent framework for summative evaluation.
data.zh: 《战略计划》的目标和成果领域是明确的；方案、跨领域活动和国家方案的战略大体一致，并将进一步调整；综合成果和资源框架有助于在《战略计划》结束时全面衡量儿基会交付的产出和成果的变化。

data.en: The goal and result areas of the Strategic Plan are clear; strategies for programmes, cross-cutting activities and country programmes are broadly aligned and further aligning; and the IRRF supports comprehensive measurement of outputs delivered by UNICEF and changes in outcomes by the end of the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 然而，总结性评价受到以下因素的制约：缺乏适用于儿基会不同级别的、精心构思的综合（跨目标领域）变革理论或逻辑模型，不清楚变革战略打算如何发挥作用和实现中期变革，也不清楚一些跨领域系统和方案的目标。

data.en: However, summative evaluability is constrained by the absence of a well-conceived integrated (across Goal Areas) theory of change or logic model applicable to UNICEF at different levels, a lack of clarity about how change strategies are intended to work and deliver medium-term changes, and about the objectives of some cross-cutting systems and programmes.
data.zh: 不断发展的与《战略计划》相关的监测、评价和学习进程可以随时支持总结性评价。

data.en: The evolving Strategic Plan-related monitoring, evaluation and learning processes can be ready to support a summative evaluation.
data.zh: 目前的监测、审查和协商进程可以产生评估《战略计划》实施情况所需的信息和证据。

data.en: The current process of monitoring, review and consultation can produce the information and evidence needed to evaluate Strategic Plan implementation.
data.zh: 成果管理制将提供可在任何时期汇总的方案产出数据。

data.en: The RBM system will provide programme output data aggregable across any period.
data.zh: 目前的成果管理制供资、监测和评价人员配置水平，以及通过核心战略指标方法进行修订后的进展监测都是积极的。

data.en: Current RBM funding, monitoring and evaluation staffing levels, and the revised progress monitoring via the core strategic indicators approach are all positives.
data.zh: 然而，研究、监测和评价仍有可能没有得到系统的部署，而且协调不力，无法产生有关《战略计划》进展的证据。

data.en: However, it remains likely that research, monitoring and evaluation will be unsystematically deployed and weakly coordinated to generate evidence about Strategic Plan progress.
data.zh: 因此，将缺乏关于结果和系统性变化的关键证据。

data.en: Critical evidence will therefore be lacking about outcomes and systemic changes.
data.zh: 形成性评价的准备工作由于在应用逻辑和记录结果的方法方面存在缺陷而受到影响。

data.en: The readiness for formative evaluability is harmed by weaknesses in applied logic and approaches to capturing outcomes.
data.zh: 《战略计划》的目标和成果领域是明确的，综合成果和资源框架可以记录与基线和目标相比的累积成就，但由于变革理论、变革战略和中期变革不明确，使儿基会在实施过程中了解其有效性并加以调整的能力变得复杂化。

data.en: The goal and result areas of the Strategic Plan are clear, and the IRRF can capture cumulative achievements compared to baselines and targets, but a lack of clarity about theories of change, change strategies and medium-term changes complicates the ability of UNICEF to learn about their effectiveness and adapt them during implementation.
data.zh: 《战略计划》提供了一个高级别变革理论和每个目标领域变革理论。

data.en: The Strategic Plan offers a high-level theory of change and theories of change for each Goal Area.
data.zh: 然而，对方案变革理论和“中期变革”——包括战略要素——在不同层面的作用的理解还不够。

data.en: Nevertheless, there is insufficient understanding of programme theories of change and the role of “medium-term changes” – including the strategic elements – at different levels.
data.zh: 很少有国家方案文件提到变革理论，而且其应用被认为是有问题的。

data.en: Few country programme documents mention theories of change, and their application is considered problematic.
data.zh: 尽管在成果管理制方面投入了大量精力，而且所有方案工作人员都持续参与其中，但监测、评价和学习进程缺乏足够集中的资源来进行形成性评价。

data.en: The monitoring, evaluation and learning process lacks adequately focused resources for formative evaluation despite considerable effort invested in RBM and continuous engagement by all programme staff.
data.zh: 虽然根据核心标准指标和年度报告，新的监测、评价和学习进程应该是可行的，但这一进程仍有待推广。

data.en: While the new monitoring, evaluation and learning process should be feasible based on core standard indicators and annual reporting, this process is still being rolled out.
data.zh: 全球报告机制和内部问责程序耗费了太多精力。

data.en: Too much effort has been absorbed in global reporting mechanisms and internal accountability processes.
data.zh: 这助长了一种文化障碍，即报告是为了遵守规定而进行的，而不是为动态审查进程提供信息。

data.en: This has encouraged a cultural impediment in which reporting is undertaken for compliance purposes ahead of feeding into a dynamic review process.
data.zh: 评价还认为，高效管理的指标太多。

data.en: It is also perceived that there are too many indicators for efficient management.
data.zh: 一个更持久的问题是，成果管理制需要充分记录《战略计划》在目标领域和战略要素方面的成果进展。

data.en: A more durable issue is that the RBM system needs to sufficiently capture Strategic Plan progress on outcomes in both the Goal Areas and the strategic elements.
data.zh: 《战略计划》采取了积极的转变，更加注重儿童成果，这是建立在儿基会在社会数据衡量方面的长期机构优势之上的。

data.en: The Strategic Plan has undertaken a positive shift to increase the focus on outcomes for children, which builds on the long-term institutional strength of UNICEF in social data measurement.
data.zh: 然而，综合成果和资源框架没有充分反映儿基会对成果的贡献，妨碍了总结性和形成性审查。

data.en: However, the IRRF does not sufficiently capture the contributions of UNICEF to outcomes, which hampers summative and formative reviews.
data.zh: 使用现有的工具和指标来衡量成果，在主题范围、可负担性、水平、对所有重要群体的覆盖率和时间安排等方面都有困难，因为这些都依赖于每隔几年公布一次的政府数据。

data.en: Measuring outcomes using existing tools and indicators presents difficulties in the range of subjects, affordability, levels, coverage of all important groups, and timing, since these rely on government data published every few years.
data.zh: 研究、调查和评价所能做出的贡献因方案预算不足而大打折扣，尤其是在中等收入和高收入环境中普遍存在的较小办事处。

data.en: The contribution that research, studies, and evaluations can make is undercut by insufficient programme budgets, especially in the smaller offices that prevail in middle- and upper-income settings.
data.zh: 利用证据支持总部和国家办事处一级决策的机制并不完善。

data.en: Mechanisms are incomplete for using evidence to support decision-making at corporate and country office levels.
data.zh: 通过执行主任的年度报告及其数据附录和记分卡向执行局提供的战略计划数据和分析，更多的是用来展示所做的工作，而不是用于决策或战略思考。

data.en: The Strategic Plan data and analysis delivered to the Executive Board via the annual report of the Executive Director, and its data companion and scorecard, are used to demonstrate the work done more than for decision-making or strategic thinking.
data.zh: 在认识到需要更多的高级别战略审查后，一个由总部牵头的、与《战略计划》有关的监测、评价和学习进程正在推出新的监测方法、全球成效审查和学习议程。

data.en: Recognizing the need for more senior-level strategic reviews, a headquarters-led process for Strategic Plan-related monitoring, evaluation and learning is introducing a new monitoring approach, a Global Effectiveness Review, and a learning agenda.
data.zh: 然而，《战略计划》的证据并不是以支持高级管理层或国家办事处管理层决策的形式产生的，而且目前也缺乏使用这种证据的机制。

data.en: However, Strategic Plan evidence is not generated in formats that support decision-making at senior management or country office management levels, and mechanisms for using such evidence are currently lacking.
data.zh: 更多评价结果和和未来的工作

data.en: Expanded findings and the way forward
data.zh: 本次评价的价值在于识别导致准备充分或准备不足的问题，以及找到提高准备程度的方法。

data.en: The value of this evaluation is in identifying issues that lead to strong or weak readiness and in identifying ways to improve readiness.
data.zh: 分析表明，影响单个战略或技术要素的问题通常源于也会影响其他领域的条件。

data.en: The analysis showed that the issues affecting individual strategic or technical elements usually arise from conditions that also affect other areas.
data.zh: 这些共同的影响因素往往存在于评价所审查的基础因素中。

data.en: These common influences are often located in the foundational factors that the evaluation examined.
data.zh: 为了阐述这些强大的影响因素，本节将围绕基础因素展开。

data.en: To convey these powerful influences, the present section is organized around the foundational factors.
data.zh: 实现紧凑性和突出联系意味着本节的结构不同于主要报告，但评价结果都是一致的，并与第五节提出的建议相联系。

data.en: Achieving compactness and highlighting connections mean the section’s organization is different from the main report, but the findings are all consistent and they are linked to the recommendations presented in section V.
data.zh: 从另一个角度来看，儿基会的管理人员对找出变革方式感兴趣。

data.en: From another angle, UNICEF managers are interested in identifying how changes can be accomplished.
data.zh: 基础因素与管理结构（如资源和领导单位）相关联，为应该挂档的档位赋予了战术意义。

data.en: The foundational factors are correlated with managerial structures such as resources and leadership units, giving a tactical sense of the gears that should be engaged.
data.zh: 为了帮助实现这一设想，与这些因素相关的建议被列为促进变革的建议。

data.en: To assist with this envisioning, the recommendations linked to these factors are noted for promoting change.
data.zh: 基本的组织优势

data.en: Fundamental organizational strengths
data.zh: 评价确定了一系列持续和根深蒂固的优势，《战略计划》可以可靠地建立在这些优势之上。

data.en: The evaluation identified a set of ongoing and deep-rooted strengths upon which the Strategic Plan can reliably build.
data.zh: 广泛的存在和合作伙伴的尊重：儿基会在全球各地的众多办事处和办事分处，在区域办事处、全球职能/技术中心和儿基会国家委员会的支持下，打造了一个能够处理《战略计划》等复杂承诺的基础设施。

data.en: Widespread presence and partners’ respect: The extensive offices and sub-offices of UNICEF across the globe, backed by regional offices, global functions/technical hubs and the National Committees for UNICEF, create an infrastructure capable of handling complex commitments such as the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 使命感和应对严峻挑战的准备：每次工作人员调查和审查都显示出高昂的士气和对任务的奉献精神。

data.en: Mission ethos and readiness to confront formidable challenges: High morale and dedication to the mission emerge in each staff survey and review.
data.zh: 这表明存在一种能够激励员工和合作伙伴的基本文化。

data.en: This indicates an underlying culture able to motivate staff and partners.
data.zh: 这还产生了机构韧性，使儿基会能够很好地应对气候变化和维持和平等长期而艰巨的挑战。

data.en: It also generates an institutional resilience that makes UNICEF well-positioned for long-lasting, daunting challenges such as climate change and peacekeeping.
data.zh: 在复杂的紧急情况下，优势最为明显，而复杂的紧急情况现在是儿基会资源和工作人员部署的重要部分。

data.en: Strength is most visible in complex emergencies, now a significant part of UNICEF resources and staff deployment.
data.zh: 它还继承了几十年来对解决目标领域中系统性复杂问题的承诺，也继承了与性别平等和残疾有关的宏大社会目标。

data.en: It also inheres to the decades-long commitments to systemically complex issues embedded in the Goal Areas and socially ambitious goals pertaining to gender and disability.
data.zh: 系统方法和广泛的伙伴关系：儿基会更广泛的变革理论指导其与大规模系统和子系统合作。

data.en: Systems approaches and widespread partnering: The broader UNICEF theory of change guides it to work with large-scale systems and subsystems.
data.zh: 《战略计划》自然以国家系统为中心，特别是政府服务系统。

data.en: The Strategic Plan naturally centres on national systems, especially those of government services.
data.zh: 它还涉及媒体、学术部门和私营企业等公民系统，并在文化和心理领域开展工作，具有强大的沟通以及社会和行为变化组成部分。

data.en: It also addresses civic systems such as media, the academic sector and private enterprise, and works in cultural and psychological spaces with its strong communication and social and behavioural change components.
data.zh: 儿基会已做好准备，能够在从政策批准和实施到评价这一整个系统范围内开展工作。

data.en: UNICEF is prepared to work across the system spectrum from policy approval and implementation to evaluation.
data.zh: 这种广泛的理解和存在为各种合作伙伴开辟了合作的道路，如果没有儿基会的召集，合作伙伴可能无法组织起来。

data.en: This broad understanding and presence opens the path for many kinds of partners to work cooperatively in ways they might not be able to organize without the convening presence of UNICEF.
data.zh: 技术能力：当儿基会致力于一个方案或一个技术领域时，它就围绕这些领域找到并吸收技能，同时在需要时进入市场寻求支持。

data.en: Technical capacity: When UNICEF commits to a programme or a technical domain, it locates and internalizes skills around those areas while accessing the market for support when needed.
data.zh: 这使得教育等目标领域的各个部门以及供应、社会数据和创新等复杂的专业化领域都具备了强大的能力。

data.en: This has led to robust capacities across the Goal Area sectors, such as education, and complex specializations such as supply, social data and innovation.
data.zh: 由于并非所有技能都无所不在，因此有一种广泛分布核心能力的模式，由更专业的人才库或中心支持一系列办事处。

data.en: As not all skills can be omnipresent, there is a model of widespread distribution of core capacities with more specialized pools or hubs supporting a range of offices.
data.zh: 如果不加以监测和调整，这些优势可能会成为弱点。

data.en: These strengths can become points of vulnerability if not monitored and adapted.
data.zh: 以下各节提到的一个主题是，《战略计划》强调了儿基会的优势，以及这些优势在多大程度上得到认可。

data.en: A theme noted in the sections that follow is where the Strategic Plan stresses the organization’s strengths and how well these are being recognized.
data.zh: 培养对《战略计划》的理解和承诺

data.en: Generating understanding of and commitment to the Strategic Plan
data.zh: 每个《战略计划》都是遗留问题和新的优先事项的结合。

data.en: Each Strategic Plan is a combination of carryover and new priorities.
data.zh: 这意味着调整后的（往往是更重的）工作量。

data.en: It implies adjusted – often heavier – workloads.
data.zh: 当工作人员理解《战略计划》并相信《战略计划》是一个实用的指南时，《战略计划》的效果最好。

data.en: It works best when staff understand it and believe it to be a practical guide.
data.zh: 本节讨论了这种理解的发展情况，以及在哪些方面存在准备不足的问题。

data.en: This section discusses how well this understanding is developing and where there are readiness concerns.
data.zh: 熟悉度：只有14%的调查受访者表示以任何形式参与了《战略计划》的审议过程。

data.en: Familiarity: Only 14 per cent of the survey respondents reported participating in the Strategic Plan deliberation process in any form.
data.zh: 然而，57%的调查受访者表示，通过自我阅读或参加内部宣传活动，他们已对《战略计划》非常熟悉或比较熟悉。

data.en: However, 57 per cent stated that they were extremely or moderately familiar with the Plan, based on self-directed reading or participation in internal dissemination events.
data.zh: 不出所料，与工作人员职责直接相关的部分最受关注。

data.en: As expected, interest is highest for those parts that directly relate to the staff member’s duties.
data.zh: 鉴于大多数工作人员不需要立即熟悉，而且国家办事处将在今后几年设计新的国家方案时纳入《战略计划》的内容，直接了解程度低本身并不令人担忧。

data.en: Given that immediate familiarity is not required for most staff and that country offices will integrate the Strategic Plan content over the following years as they design new country programmes, a low level of direct knowledge is not, per se, worrisome.
data.zh: 然而，如果《战略计划》意味着要做出比预期更重大或更激进的变革，或者变革的速度超过了变革管理能力所能承受的范围，那么就会出现问题。

data.en: However, it is problematic if the Strategic Plan implies much more significant or more radical change than is expected or if it occurs faster than change management capacities can handle.
data.zh: 认为《战略计划》是一种抱负：组织的雄心水平很高。

data.en: Perception that the Strategic Plan is aspirational: The level of organizational ambition is high.
data.zh: 工作人员质疑儿基会是否能够实现《战略计划》中的所有目标。

data.en: Staff question whether UNICEF can deliver on everything included in the Plan.
data.zh: 与其他工作人员相比，更多的国家办事处一级工作人员认为《战略计划》过于宽泛，在全球推出了太多的战略优先事项。

data.en: More country office-level staff than other staff perceive the Plan as too broad, with too many strategic priorities being globally rolled out.
data.zh: 许多工作人员认为《战略计划》是一个抱负，而不是一个真正可以实现的计划。

data.en: Many staff see the Strategic Plan as aspirational rather than a genuinely achievable plan.
data.zh: 这种感觉出现在熟悉《战略计划》的人身上，而不仅仅局限于不知情者。

data.en: This sense emerges among those familiar with it, not just the uninformed.
data.zh: 这是一个警告信号，表明《战略计划》在儿基会目前的能力和准备程度与所需的能力和准备程度之间可能存在巨大差距。

data.en: This is a warning sign that the Plan may have a large gap between the present capacities and readiness of UNICEF versus what is needed.
data.zh: 这当然意味着建议5中包括的内部沟通应优先向工作人员介绍《战略计划》，并记录他们的关切，以确定需要采取哪些行动来提高准备程度。

data.en: It certainly means that internal communication, included within recommendation 5, should prioritize informing staff about the Plan and registering their concerns to determine what actions are required to improve readiness.
data.zh: 战略计划是否胜任使命受到质疑的领域：如前所述，许多熟悉《战略计划》的工作人员认为《战略计划》是一种抱负。

data.en: Areas where the Strategic Plan fit for mission is questioned: As noted, many staff familiar with the Strategic Plan consider it aspirational.
data.zh: 当要求他们找出《战略计划》承诺和实际准备情况之间的差距时，他们提到了许多问题。

data.en: Many concerns were mentioned when they were asked to identify the gaps between the Strategic Plan commitments and actual readiness.
data.zh: 由于其规模及其在《战略计划》成功中的核心作用，以下四个问题非常重要：
中等收入和高收入国家：《战略计划》被认为主要是为低收入环境设计的，采用传统的服务提供方法，集中关注目标领域。

data.en: Middle-income and high-income countries: The Strategic Plan is perceived to be designed primarily for low-income contexts with classic service delivery approaches and a central focus on the Goal Areas.
data.zh: 脆弱和紧急的环境得到了有力的体现，但中等收入和高收入环境下的专题关切和业务现实被认为没有得到充分体现。

data.en: Fragile and emergency contexts are strongly present, but the thematic concerns and operational realities in middle-income and upper-income contexts are felt to be underrepresented.
data.zh: 鉴于儿基会在许多中等收入和高收入国家开展工作，许多目标人口和国家办事处均对《战略计划》的有效性持这种怀疑态度。
确定优先次序的指导：儿基会从未期望国家办事处只根据现行的《战略计划》来确定其优先事项。

data.en: Prioritization guidance: UNICEF has never expected the country offices to define their priorities based only on the prevailing Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 东道国的发展目标、遗留方案（反映长期承诺）和通过国家方案规划认识到的问题，增加了潜在的优先事项，超出了可以接受的范围。

data.en: Host nation development goals, carry-over programmes (reflecting long-term commitments) and issues realized through the country programme planning expand the set of potential priorities beyond what can be accepted.
data.zh: 需要有一个严谨的方法来权衡相对重要性。

data.en: A disciplined approach to weighing the relative importance is needed.
data.zh: 儿基会工作人员认为目前缺乏这种方法，特别是对于《战略计划》中较新的要素和总体而言。

data.en: UNICEF staff feel this is presently lacking, especially for the newer elements of the Strategic Plan and in general.
data.zh: 在提供建议4所要求的指导之前，较低优先级/非《战略计划》问题被选中的可能性会更大。
气候：气候行动是一个跨领域方案，气候变化、灾害风险和环境退化是目标领域4的核心部分。

data.en: Climate: Climate action is a cross-cutting programme, and climate change, disaster risk and environmental degradation are a core part of Goal Area 4.
data.zh: 准备程度评级没有反映出所宣布的承诺，在资源和伙伴关系方面存在重大问题，总体评级不足。

data.en: The readiness rating does not reflect the stated commitment, with major issues in resources and partnerships, and an overall insufficient rating.
data.zh: 建议12呼吁儿基会澄清其对气候行动的关注。
交叉性：交叉性是指有意识地努力解决多种制约因素或匮乏问题，其影响将大于仅仅减少一种脆弱性。

data.en: Intersectionality: Intersectionality is the intentional effort to address multiple constraints or deprivations that will achieve a greater impact than just reducing one vulnerability.
data.zh: 例如，社会指标较弱的少数群体中的残疾儿童从同时解决残疾和社会排斥问题中所受惠益多于只解决其中一个问题。

data.en: For example, a disabled child of a minority group with weak social indicators benefits more from addressing the handicap and the social exclusion together than just one or the other.
data.zh: 《战略计划》变革理论强调指出，交叉性是新《战略计划》取得成功的关键驱动因素。

data.en: The Strategic Plan theory of change emphatically states that intersectionality is a critical driver of success in the new Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 然而，目前，儿基会在概念、工具、衡量、业务或方案经验方面还没有做好充分准备。

data.en: However, at present, UNICEF is not sufficiently ready at a conceptual, tool, measurement, operational or programme experience level.
data.zh: 实现这一准备状态是建议8的目的。

data.en: Achieving that readiness is the aim of recommendation 8.
data.zh: 儿基会业务模式的适宜性

data.en: Suitability of the UNICEF business model
data.zh: 儿基会的业务模式包括许多被称为组织优势的要素：广泛的存在、分散的权力以及内部能力和外包能力的结合。

data.en: The UNICEF business model comprises many elements noted as organizational strengths: broad presence, decentralized authority, and a blending of in-house and sourced capacity.
data.zh: 这一基本模式是毋庸置疑的。

data.en: That fundamental model is not in doubt.
data.zh: 然而，《战略计划》正在确立必须纳入该结构的新战略要素。

data.en: However, the Strategic Plan is establishing new strategic elements that must be accommodated within that structure.
data.zh: 谷仓的优缺点：在评价中，谷仓这一概念被许多人作为一个问题反复提出。

data.en: Strengths and weaknesses of silos: The concept of silos was repeatedly raised by many voices in the exercise as a problem.
data.zh: 它指的是专业知识、角色、权力和资源集中在强大的机构单位，其中最常提到的是构成目标领域或方案小组的部门。

data.en: It refers to the concentration of expertise, role, authority and resources in powerful institutional units, with the sectors comprising the Goal Areas or Programme Group most often cited.
data.zh: 谷仓效应据说会占据注意力，从而挤掉其他需求。

data.en: Silos are said to command attention that crowds out other needs.
data.zh: 其内部能力强大，但却被认为在支持新的优先事项方面没有得到充分利用。

data.en: Their strong internal capacities are thought to be insufficiently made available in support of new priorities.
data.zh: 其结果是偏袒传统的部门目标、低收入及紧急情况的保守主义占了上风，并拖累了《战略计划》中承诺的提高新举措影响的敏捷性。

data.en: The result is conservatism in favour of the traditional sectoral goals and lower-income and emergency contexts, and a slowing of the agility promised in the Strategic Plan to raise the impact of newer initiatives.
data.zh: 业务单位之间的竞争：人们认为，许多战略要素都在争夺部门小组、高级管理层以及区域和国家办事处的资源和注意力。

data.en: Competition among business units: It is perceived that many strategic elements compete for resources and attention from the sectoral teams, senior management, and regional and country offices.
data.zh: 因此，处于这种地位的小组正在花费时间寻求关注和支持，而这些时间本可以更好地用于实现《战略计划》目标的实质性工作。

data.en: Teams in this position are thus spending time seeking attention and support that would be better spent in substantive work to reach the Strategic Plan goals.
data.zh: 这是因为资源基础薄弱，业务模式使得所有有方案预算的办事处都可以选择对变革战略和跨领域方案进行投资，但没有足够的指导来说明在何种情况下这些战略和方案必须成为优先事项。

data.en: This arises from a weak resource base and a business model that makes investment in the change strategies and cross-cutting programmes optional by all offices with a programming budget, without sufficient guidance on the contexts in which they must become a priority.
data.zh: 当密切相关的业务部门职权范围重叠时，也会出现这种情况，如在建设和平-韧性-关系战略要素和处理证据生成（数据、研究、评价、知识管理）的工作人员中看到的那样。

data.en: It can also arise when closely related business units have overlapping remits, as seen in the peacebuilding-resilience-nexus strategic elements and the staff that deal with evidence generation (data, research, evaluations, knowledge management).
data.zh: 建议3是一个高度优先事项，敦促儿基会减少这种结构性竞争，建议7寻求在数据、研究、评价和知识管理变革战略方面开展实际合作。

data.en: Recommendation 3, a high priority, urges UNICEF to reduce this structural competition, and recommendation 7 seeks practical collaboration across the data, research, evaluation and knowledge management change strategy.
data.zh: 获得技术支持：许多儿基会小型办事处没有能力为全部技能的补充提供资金，因此对专门领域的技术支持需求很大。

data.en: Accessing technical support: The presence of many small UNICEF offices incapable of financing a full-skills complement creates a great demand for technical support in specialized areas.
data.zh: 儿基会拥有众多内部资源中心，例如创新、供应、数字化转型和研究。

data.en: UNICEF possesses numerous internal resource centres – for example, innovation, supply, digital transformation and research.
data.zh: 然而，办事处和专业中心都报告称，需求远远超过供应。

data.en: However, it is reported from both the offices and the specialized centres that demand far outstrips supply.
data.zh: 尽管有许多获取外部专业知识的方式，但组织这些方式的复杂性和用户的成本意味着这只是一个部分解决方案。

data.en: Despite many modalities for accessing external expertise, the complexities of organizing that and the cost to the users mean it is a partial solution.
data.zh: 随着帮助实现战略要素的需求落在通常较小的单位上，这个问题将会加剧。

data.en: This problem will increase as the demand for help with the strategic elements falls upon what are generally small units.
data.zh: 一个生动的例子是，需要对具有巨大社会和经济影响的潜在严重全球冲击（如2019冠状病毒病）进行预见和风险分析，随后还需要进行备灾规划。

data.en: A vivid example is the need for foresight and risk analysis of potentially severe global shocks with enormous social and economic effects, such as the COVID-19, and subsequent preparedness planning.
data.zh: 即使其他所有问题都解决了，单单是获得技术支持的能力薄弱就会严重影响准备工作。

data.en: Even if every other issue is resolved, weak access to technical support alone will severely brake on readiness.
data.zh: 建议10讨论了改善知识流动和技术能力的问题，建议11讨论了系统应对全球冲击的必要性。

data.en: Improving the flow of knowledge and technical capacity is discussed in recommendation 10, and the need for a systematic approach to global shocks is in recommendation 11.
data.zh: 融合：融合的定义是“将组织的各种支柱（纵向、横向、职能）及其合作伙伴（外部融合）汇集在一起，以倍增的方式开展工作/产生倍增效应”。

data.en: Convergence: Convergence is defined as “bringing together various pillars of the organization (vertically, horizontally, functionally) and its partners (external convergence) to work in a multiplicative way/with a multiplier effect”.
data.zh: 《战略计划》明确指出，要通过各目标领域和各级别的战略要素和从属关系，促进儿基会所有部门的职能、纵向和横向的融合。

data.en: The Strategic Plan makes a clear statement of intent towards catalysing the functional, vertical and horizontal convergence of all parts of the organization via the strategic elements and affiliations across Goal Areas and levels.
data.zh: 对这一主题的深入探讨突出表明，以下因素促进或限制了儿基会为实现其融合潜力所做的准备工作：
国家方案一级的经验表明，有可能打破部门方案编制各自为政的局面。

data.en: Country programme-level experience has shown the potential to transcend sectoral programming silos.
data.zh: 一种方法是生命周期方法，但其相对有效性需要进一步评估。

data.en: One method is the life-cycle approach, but its comparative effectiveness needs further evaluation.
data.zh: 各个目标领域/部门也有许多融合的方法，如营养的多部门方法。
工作人员不清楚战略要素如何支撑目标领域的工作，也不清楚他们如何能从纳入这些要素中受益。
需要澄清共同方案编制在各战略要素中的交叉利益，如共同方案编制韧性、性别平等、关系和气候行动的互利互惠。
如果相关的职能（例如残疾、性别平等和不让任何人掉队）被分开管理，就会损害融合。
管理人员和领导层对融合的激励——以及在较低级别上推动融合的意愿——受到了争夺投资组合、晋升和领导职位的竞争的限制。
儿基会的业务模式和坚实的组织文化阻碍了与其他联合国实体或伙伴组织的伙伴关系；对儿基会具体任务和内部目标的忠诚度似乎比对联合国共同议程的忠诚度高得多。

data.en: The business model and solid corporate culture of UNICEF hinder partnerships with other United Nations entities or partner organizations; loyalty appears to be a lot stronger to the specific mandate of UNICEF and internal objectives than towards the United Nations common agendas.
data.zh: 鉴于融合在《战略计划》中所处的核心地位和所指出的问题，建议1指出要加快实现方案融合和组织融合。

data.en: Given the centrality of convergence in the Strategic Plan and the issues noted, recommendation 1 points to accelerating programmatic and organizational convergence.
data.zh: 资源配置

data.en: Resourcing
data.zh: 加快资源调动是一个战略要素，但更广泛的资源配置贯穿于整个《战略计划》。

data.en: Accelerated resource mobilization is a strategic element, but resourcing more broadly is threaded throughout the Strategic Plan.
data.zh: 所有要素和方案都在努力筹集资金和增加资源。

data.en: All elements and programmes strive to raise funds and increase resources.
data.zh: 综合成果和资源框架落实了一种资源分配方法，而整个成果管理制进程旨在明智地支出。

data.en: The IRRF operationalizes an approach to resource allocation, and the entire RBM process is designed to spend wisely.
data.zh: 减轻财务风险和提高运营效率是管理人员的职责。

data.en: Financial risk mitigation and operational efficiency are an accountability of managers.
data.zh: 尽管如此，资源配置环境和准备工作仍存在很大的弱点。

data.en: Despite this, the resourcing environment and readiness have significant vulnerabilities.
data.zh: 资源调动：这一《战略计划》的推进手段被评为准备充分。

data.en: Resource mobilization: This Strategic Plan enabler is rated as sufficiently ready.
data.zh: 长期以来培养的伙伴关系、国家委员会的结构、利用新机会不断创新的筹资方式以及每年的收入增长，都值得对这一资源调动机制给予有力认可。

data.en: The partnerships nurtured over time, the National Committee structures, the constant innovation in fundraising approaches to take advantage of new opportunities, and the annual growth in revenue merit a strong endorsement of the resource mobilization apparatus.
data.zh: 收入和需求不匹配：尽管收入稳定并在增长，但资源是战略要素中准备最不充分的方面。

data.en: Mismatch of income and needs: Despite the revenue stability and growth, Resources were the least ready aspect of the strategic elements.
data.zh: 这主要反映了来自捐助者的灵活收入持平或下降，捐助者倾向于指定资金用途。

data.en: This primarily reflects flat or declining flexible revenue from donors that prefer to earmark the funds instead.
data.zh: 紧急行动和一些方案和部门获得大量资金，而许多跨领域职能、较新的《战略计划》优先事项以及在中等收入和高收入国家开展的工作却资金不足。

data.en: Emergency operations and some programmes and sectors are strongly funded, whereas many cross-cutting functions, newer Strategic Plan priorities, and the work in middle-income and high-income countries are underfinanced.
data.zh: 缺少完整的《战略计划》成本核算：令人惊讶的是，儿基会尚未估算出实现《战略计划》目标所需的资金。

data.en: Absence of a full Strategic Plan costing: Surprisingly, UNICEF has yet to estimate what is financially needed to meet the Strategic Plan goals.
data.zh: 这将需要计算每个目标领域的需求，并对儿基会将发挥的作用进行衍生的成本核算分析。

data.en: This would require calculating the requirements per Goal Area and a derivative costed analysis of the role that UNICEF will play.
data.zh: 因此，预算和投资决策（包括战略要素）都没有计算成本。

data.en: Consequently, budget and investment decisions – including in the strategic elements – are not costed.
data.zh: 分配方面的问题：一个组织更喜欢将灵活性与某种基于规则的确定性相结合，前者可以将资源用于最需要的地方，后者可以满足部分需求。在多个场合下，儿基会倾向于不太理想的选择：
国家方案灵活资源的分配公式阻碍了资金流向中等收入和高收入国家，也阻碍了资金流向创新的全组织办法。
可评价性技术要素审查得出的结论是，儿基会没有明显的成果预算编制办法，即将业绩较差的方案重新分配给新的机会或准备扩大规模的方案。

data.en: The evaluability technical elements review concluded that there is no visible UNICEF approach to results-based budgeting which reallocates from lower-performing programmes to new opportunities or those ready to go to scale.
data.zh: 与此相关的是缺乏可行的“让资金发挥价值”的工具。
大额预算（方案、国家方案）的“业务所有人”很少有义务与较新的优先事项分享这些预算。

data.en: The “business owners” of large budgets (programmes, country programmes) are rarely obligated to share them with newer priorities.
data.zh: 他们可以选择分享，但这不是强制性要求。

data.en: They may opt in but are not required to do so.
data.zh: 再加上小额的核心拨款，这可能会使残疾人等优先事项的资金不足和代表性不足。

data.en: Combined with small core allocations, this can keep priorities such as disability underfunded and underrepresented.
data.zh: 组织效率：儿基会目前处理效率问题的方法不符合在复杂系统中开展工作并积极管理收入及影响这一现实。

data.en: Organizational efficiencies: The current approach of UNICEF to efficiency is misaligned with the reality of working in a complex system and actively managing income and influence.
data.zh: 其中包括缺乏全组织范围的效率分析历史数据。

data.en: This includes a lack of organization-wide historical data on efficiency analyses.
data.zh: 虽然儿基会在《2014-2017年战略计划》中就承诺提高组织效率，但2020年多边组织业绩评估网（MOPAN）评估得出的结论是，儿基会在效率方面没有达到预期。

data.en: While commitments were made in the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2014–2017 to improve organizational efficiency, the 2020 MOPAN assessment concluded that UNICEF fell short of expectations on efficiency.
data.zh: 由于证据有限以及缺乏衡量和展示效率的手段，儿基会在成果效率方面被评为不令人满意。

data.en: The organization was rated as unsatisfactory in the efficiency of results owing to limited evidence and a lack of means to measure and demonstrate efficiency.
data.zh: 在本次评价中，除了总部效率倡议之外，没有出现相反的证据。

data.en: No contrary evidence appeared in this evaluation beyond the Headquarters Efficiency Initiative.
data.zh: 建议6要求儿基会解决《战略计划》的财政资源与需求之间的差异。

data.en: Recommendation 6 asks UNICEF to address the divergence between the Strategic Plan’s financial resources and demand.
data.zh: 建议2要求明确实施《战略计划》的责任，并将领导力问题与必须提供哪些技能和财政资源的明确性结合起来。

data.en: Recommendation 2 seeks clarified accountabilities for delivering the Strategic Plan, and blending leadership issues and clarity on whose skills and financial resources must be made available.
data.zh: 文化和领导力

data.en: Culture and leadership
data.zh: 组织文化：儿基会的积极因素包括强烈的使命感、韧性和勇于迎接挑战。

data.en: Organizational culture: The positive factors of UNICEF include a strong mission ethos, resilience, and rising to challenges.
data.zh: 这些都是理想的文化属性。

data.en: These are desirable cultural attributes.
data.zh: 而且没有危机感：84%的调查受访者表示，组织文化是一个积极或非常积极的因素，但受访者也指出，组织文化还可以进一步加强。

data.en: Further, there is no sense of crisis: 84 per cent of the survey respondents indicated that organizational culture was a positive or very positive factor, although respondents noted that it can be strengthened.
data.zh: 在《战略计划》的五个推进手段中，有四个是针对儿基会文化氛围的，如敏捷、反应迅速、工作人员参与、有活力、包容、权力下放和增强权能等关键词所表达的。

data.en: Four of the five Strategic Plan enablers target the cultural milieu of UNICEF, as conveyed in the keywords agile, responsive, staff engagement, dynamic, inclusive, decentralized and empowered.
data.zh: 考虑到《战略计划》设计师的压力分配文化，对其进行了深入研究。

data.en: Considering the stress-assigned culture by the Strategic Plan architects, it was examined in a deep dive.
data.zh: 总的观点是，实现必要变革的准备程度很低，而且：
最近为更好地尊重人类价值观和制止虐待行为而发起的运动受到高度赞赏，并被认为管理得当。

data.en: The recent drive to better respect human values and stop abusive behaviour is highly appreciated and is considered well managed.
data.zh: 然而，一些知情人担心，在强调对儿童的问责和成果方面，管理人员没有得到足够的支持。
价值议程、敏捷性和推进手段的其他方面至关重要，但其他关键的文化方面也需要关注。

data.en: The value agenda, agility and other aspects of the enablers are essential, but other critical cultural aspects require attention.
data.zh: 无论是《战略计划》的推进手段还是各种不同的流程，都没有有意识地解决其他紧迫的需求，如工作方式、思维模式和领导力。
高度专业化的文化助长了谷仓效应，这是实现融合的一个持续障碍。
思维习惯和历史惯例造成了一种常规的方法，很难重新引导，就像谷仓和融合问题一样。
承担风险和接受失败等理念在很大程度上是不存在的，却强烈倾向于做出“安全”的努力，以期产生可见和量化的结果。
认识和应对即将到来的全球冲击需要一种分析、预测和抓住机遇的思维模式，而这种思维模式往往是不存在的。
分级决策仍然在各级持续存在，是反面模式，也是增强权能、参与和敏捷性的职能性障碍。

data.en: The persistence of hierarchical decision-making remains at all levels and is the opposite model and a functional barrier to empowerment, engagement and agility.
data.zh: 代表和副代表的分级做法对整个国家办事处的文化产生了负面影响。

data.en: Hierarchical approaches by Representatives and Deputy Representatives negatively affect the office-wide country office culture.
data.zh: 文化不是具体建议的主题。

data.en: Culture is not the subject of a specific recommendation.
data.zh: 总体文化环境是有利的，因为《战略计划》的设计者认识到了当前文化实践与《战略计划》要求之间的差距，而且工作人员也很愿意围绕文化问题进行参与。

data.en: The general context is favourable in the sense that the Strategic Plan designers perceive the gaps between current cultural practices and Strategic Plan requirements, and staff readiness to engage around cultural issues is high.
data.zh: 然而，目前还不清楚实质性的内部障碍是否得到理解，工作人员确定的其他关键文化障碍是否在《战略计划》的覆盖范围内，或者变革管理结构是否有能力消除这些障碍。

data.en: However, it is not clear whether the substantial internal obstacles are understood, the other critical cultural barriers identified by staff are on the Strategic Plan radar, or the change management structures are equipped to address them.
data.zh: 变革管理：由于《战略计划》雄心很高，所需进行的调整数量也很多，为管理这项工作而设立的变革管理结构需要有足够的战略性和完善性。

data.en: Change management: As the ambition of the Strategic Plan is high and the number of adjustments required are large, the change management structures in place to manage this effort need to be sufficiently strategic and well-developed.
data.zh: 儿基会的主要变革管理方法仅限于项目化的努力，而不是所谓的持续改进。

data.en: The primary change management approach of UNICEF is limited to projectized efforts rather than what is termed continuous improvement.
data.zh: 关键结构单位的工作人员主要是从其他办公室短期借调的。

data.en: The critical structural unit is primarily staffed with staff seconded from other offices on short-term assignments.
data.zh: 儿基会工作人员认为，现有的变革管理办法不足以帮助儿基会按照要求加速或转向。

data.en: UNICEF staff feel that existing change management approaches are not sufficiently helping UNICEF to accelerate or pivot as required.
data.zh: 当变革要求被视为特别重要时，儿基会将其纳入现有结构的主流，或创建新的、小型和独立的单位。

data.en: When change requirements are seen to be especially important, UNICEF mainstreams them into existing structures or creates new, small, and discrete units.
data.zh: 这些方法有时会奏效，正如“创新”随着时间的推移所实现的效果那样，“文化”目前正在迈向成功，但许多结构仍然相对较小，资金薄弱，并与管理变革的更强大中央动力相脱离。

data.en: These approaches sometimes work, as Innovation has done over time, and Culture is presently succeeding, but many structures remain relatively small, weakly financed, and detached from a more powerful central drive to manage change.
data.zh: 许多《战略计划》要素缺乏明确的问责制，也阻碍了它们推动变革的杠杆作用，这一点从给予各办事处正式批准《战略计划》优先事项的自由裁量权中可以看出。

data.en: Their leverage to drive change is also hampered by the absence of clear accountabilities for many Strategic Plan elements, as indicated in the discretion accorded to offices to adopt Strategic Plan priorities.
data.zh: 如建议5所述，需要采取一种更加协调、集中领导和资源充足的方法。

data.en: A more coordinated, centrally led and adequately resourced approach is needed, as stated in recommendation 5.
data.zh: 领导力：《战略计划》议程的许多方面，包括重大变革要素，都可以通过现有的流程和结构进行管理。

data.en: Leadership: Many aspects of the Strategic Plan agenda, including major change elements, can be managed through existing processes and structures.
data.zh: 然而，目前各类需求的规模是显而易见的。

data.en: Currently, however, the magnitude of the needs of all types are visible.
data.zh: 工作人员的典型反应和其他机构的经验教训表明，一个关键的、高度公开的领导角色是成功的先决条件。

data.en: The typical reaction of staff and the lessons of other agencies point to a crucial and highly public leadership role as a precursor to success.
data.zh: 有三个方面被提及，包括：
需要执行主任和其他人在许多方面进行持续的领导示范，包括协作和增强权能、注重证据以及接受风险和失败并将之视为学习机会。
分析和调整有助于实现《战略计划》目标的基本激励措施、结构和流程，如融合和对资源配置问题采取更全面的方法。

data.en: Analysing and adjusting the underlying incentives, structures and processes supporting the Strategic Plan goals, such as convergence and a more holistic approach to resourcing issues.
data.zh: 这将需要平衡以下两个目标：(i)注重对成果负责和遵守组织标准；以及(ii) 赋予工作人员权力和下放决策权。
申明管理层对这一评价做出强有力和可操作的回应，并确保包括执行主任在内的儿基会领导层注意到问责制并采取后续行动。

data.en: Affirming a robust and actionable management response to this evaluation, and ensuring that accountabilities are noted and followed up on by UNICEF leadership, including the Executive Director.
data.zh: 如果没有有效的领导，任何建议都不会成功，因此所有建议都依赖于领导力。

data.en: None of the recommendations will succeed without effective leadership, so all are its dependencies.
data.zh: 最重要的建议是，包括执行主任在内的高级领导层需要明显参与落实评价建议。

data.en: The overarching recommendation is the need for a visible presence from senior leadership, including the Executive Director, in acting on the recommendations of the exercise.
data.zh: 这一点很重要，既是为了确保问责制，也是因为领导力是具体建议本身的一个关键驱动因素。

data.en: This is important both for ensuring accountability and because leadership is a key driving factor in the specific recommendations themselves.
data.zh: 建议

data.en: Recommendations
data.zh: 以下是本报告中列举的12项建议。

data.en: The following 12 recommendations are those enumerated in the report.
data.zh: 它们涉及积极行动将可能令儿基会的准备程度得到显著改善的关键领域。

data.en: They address the critical areas in which positive action will likely lead to significant improvement in the organization’s readiness.
data.zh: 然而，报告中还有许多其他建议的行动。

data.en: There are many other recommended actions in the report, however.
data.zh: 除了这12项建议之外，儿基会还将考虑其他建议，以及它将从对报告的持续评估中确定的其他建议。

data.en: UNICEF will consider those in addition to these 12 recommendations, as well as others it will identify from its ongoing appreciation of the report.
data.zh: 加快实现方案融合和组织融合，为儿童取得成果（高优先级；可能不影响成本或节省成本）

data.en: Accelerate programmatic and organizational convergence towards outcomes for children (high priority; likely to be cost-neutral or cost-saving)
data.zh: 儿基会需要通过以下方式加强有利于融合的环境：1.借鉴试点成功国家的经验，将融合编入方案编制指南；2.调整支持性政策、程序和能力；以及 3.通过鼓励系统思考、加强多部门/综合方法以及创新和冒险，来解决文化方面的问题。

data.en: UNICEF needs to strengthen the enabling environment for convergence by: 1. codifying convergence into programming guidance, building on the experience of countries with successful pilots; 2. aligning supportive policies, procedures and capacities; and 3. addressing the cultural aspects by incentivizing system thinking, enhanced multisectoral/comprehensive approaches, and innovation and risk-taking.
data.zh: 明确实施《战略计划》的责任（高优先级；可能节省成本）

data.en: Clarify accountabilities for delivery of the Strategic Plan (high priority; likely to be cost-saving)
data.zh: 《战略计划》中明确的战略要素意图需要辅之以同样明确的后续机制，实现这一目标的方式包括：1.在经修订的问责制框架的基础上，明确规定支持这些框架的角色、职责、可交付成果和资源； 2.通过定期监测、报告和评估采取后续行动；以及 3.表现出明显的领导力。

data.en: The clarity of the strategic elements intent in the Strategic Plan needs to be accompanied by equally clear follow-through mechanisms by: 1. building from the revised accountability framework to specify the roles, responsibilities, deliverables and resources that underpin them; 2. following up with regular monitoring, reporting and evaluation; and 3. manifesting visible leadership.
data.zh: 减少结构性竞争，以支持《战略计划》的执行（高优先级；可能节省成本和/或能够提高分配效率）

data.en: Reduce structural competition to support Strategic Plan performance (high priority; likely to be cost-saving and/or able to improve allocative efficiency)
data.zh: 可以通过以下方式减少争夺国家一级带宽的一长串优先事项之间的竞争：1.审查《战略计划》每一个中心单位/要素的理由，并将多余的部分压缩成数量更少的结构（例如，韧性、建设和平、风险指引型人道主义-发展关系方案编制）；2.促进证据职能等相关职能之间进一步加强协调行动；以及 3.纳入对合作性的绩效评估评级。

data.en: Competition across the lengthy list of priorities competing for country-level bandwidth can be reduced by: 1. examining the justification for every Strategic Plan central unit/element and collapsing redundancies into fewer structures (for example, resilience, peacebuilding, risk-informed humanitarian-development nexus programming); 2. promoting much greater coordinated action across related functions, such as the evidence functions; and 3. including a performance assessment rating for cooperativeness.
data.zh: 进一步澄清国家一级《战略计划》的优先排序进程（高优先级；不影响成本，并有可能提高分配效率）

data.en: Provide additional clarity for country-level Strategic Plan prioritization processes (high priority; cost-neutral, and with the potential to improve allocative efficiency)
data.zh: 可实现《战略计划》意图的行动，即战略要素是可供国家办事处选择的选项菜单，而不是适用于所有情况的结构，这些行动可以包括：1.使国家办事处更加明确如何在不同背景下优先考虑和侧重于《战略计划》要素，包括重点关注中等收入和高收入环境；2.加强区域办事处在这一进程中的作用；以及 3.为确定战略要素与不同方案环境的匹配程度提供指导。

data.en: Actions that can realize the Strategic Plan’s intent that the strategic elements are to be a menu of options from which country offices may draw from rather than structures to be applied to all contexts and can include: 1. providing greater clarity for country offices on prioritizing and focusing on Strategic Plan elements in different contexts, including a focus on middle- and high-income contexts; 2. enhancing the roles of regional offices in this process; and 3. creating guidance on identifying good and poor fits for the strategic elements with different programme environments.
data.zh: 加强变革管理能力（高优先级；需要额外的人力资源，包括对变革举措提供专家支持）

data.en: Strengthen change management capability (high priority; requires additional human resources, including specialist support to change initiatives)
data.zh: 《战略计划》要求在方法和文化方面进行重大变革，包括：1.高层领导的大力参与，从而提供必要的指导，并确保推动变革的文化因素得到示范。2.使变革管理在持续改进模式中更加系统化；以及 3.确保变革经过测试和试点，并通过综合的内部沟通方法得到加强。

data.en: The Strategic Plan requires substantial changes in approach and culture, including: 1. strong engagement by senior leaders, providing the necessary direction and ensuring that the cultural aspects that drive change are modelled; 2. making change management more systematic along the continuous improvement model; and 3. ensuring that changes are tested and piloted, and reinforced with an integrated internal communication approach.
data.zh: 直接解决《战略计划》财政资源与需求之间的差异（高优先级；需要重新分配资源，并可能需要在特定领域增加人力和财政资源）

data.en: Directly address the divergence between Strategic Plan financial resources and demand needs (high priority; requires resource reallocation, and may potentially require additional human and financial resources in specific areas)
data.zh: 要应对捐助者对捐款用途的持续指定和资源配置环境的转变，需要做到以下几点：1.进行实际的《战略计划》成本核算，以量化实现《战略计划》雄心所需的资源；2.与合作伙伴一起重新审视指导资源分配的原则，以满足不同的环境和组织需求；3.激励围绕需求进行切合实际的国家一级预算编制和制定行动计划，而不是基于所获资源的历史趋势；4.与合作伙伴进行更具合作性、成本分担的方案编制；以及 5.在目前的总部效率倡议之外进一步追求效率的提高。

data.en: Coping with continued earmarking by donors and shifts in the resourcing environment requires: 1. undertaking an actual Strategic Plan costing to quantify the resources required to meet the Plan’s ambitions; 2. revisiting, with partners, the principles guiding resource allocation to different contexts and organizational needs; 3. incentivizing realistic country-level budgeting and action plans around needs rather than on historical trends of resources received; 4. entering into more cooperative, cost-shared programming with partners; and 5. pursuing efficiency gains beyond the current Headquarters Efficiency Initiative.
data.zh: 确保在数据、研究、评价和知识管理方面开展实际合作和采用联合方法（高优先级；可能节省资源）

data.en: Ensure practical collaboration and a joined-up approach to data, research, evaluation and knowledge management (high priority; likely to be resource-saving)
data.zh: 尽管有共同的原则，但在儿基会的各种证据职能中，需要采取一种切实可行的协作方法，包括：1.制定更加综合和一致的方法，以满足为方案编制和决策提供信息的需要，包括共同战略、框架、有针对性的方法和资源调动；以及 2.在联合战略中保持角色的必要独立性和独特性。

data.en: Despite shared principles, a practical collaborative approach is needed across the evidence functions of UNICEF, including: 1. developing a more integrated and coherent approach that is responsive to the need to inform programming and decision-making, including a common strategy, framework, targeted approaches and resource mobilization; and 2. maintaining necessary independence and distinctiveness in role within the joint strategies.
data.zh: 充分利用交叉性的潜力（高优先级；不影响资源）

data.en: Capitalize on the full potential of intersectionality (high priority; resource-neutral)
data.zh: 为了履行在实践中尚未体现出来的对交叉性的承诺，儿基会需要：1.明确阐述交叉性是如何补充儿基会目前采用的融合、公平和相关方法而又与之不同的；2.制定切实可行的方法，并提供足够的证据证明其有效性和各种挑战，以便在作出规模化决定时加以考虑；以及 3.将全球技术小组的方法扩大到适用的交叉领域，如性别平等和残疾。

data.en: To meet the commitment to intersectionality that is not yet evident in practice, UNICEF needs to: 1. clearly articulate how intersectionality complements but differs from convergence, equity and related approaches currently employed in UNICEF; 2. develop practical approaches with sufficient evidence of the effectiveness and challenges to consider in going-to-scale decisions; and 3. expand the Global Technical Team’s approach to applicable cross-cutting areas such as gender and disability.
data.zh: 解决影响有效开展定期方案和战略审查的差距和技术障碍（高优先级；需要前期投资，但最终可能会节省成本）

data.en: Address gaps and technical barriers to effective periodic programme and strategic reviews (high priority; requires investment up front but may eventually be cost-saving)
data.zh: 要衡量《战略计划》的进展（特别是成果）以支持战略决策，将需要做到以下几点： 1.重新平衡资源，将其用于新的监测、评价和学习进程，而不是用于合规报告；2.阐明并激励决策者对证据提出强烈要求；3.支持在全球管理小组或国家办事处/区域办事处一级利用《战略计划》证据进行决策；以及 4.在广泛的大规模社会数据调查之外，开发技术方法来记录成果。

data.en: Measuring the progress of the Strategic Plan – especially outcomes – to support strategic decision-making will require: 1. rebalancing resources towards the new monitoring, evaluation and learning processes and away from compliance reporting; 2. articulating and incentivizing a strong demand for evidence from decision makers; 3. supporting the utilization of Strategic Plan evidence for decision-making at the Global Management Team or country office/regional office levels; and 4. developing technical approaches beyond extensive large-scale social data surveys for capturing outcomes.
data.zh: 改善知识的流动和技术能力的获取（中等优先级；可能不影响资源）

data.en: Improve the flow of knowledge and access to technical capacity (medium priority; likely to be resource-neutral)
data.zh: 加强技术能力以支持实施《战略计划》的基本行动包括：1.改善知识的流动和技术能力的获取，包括基本领域和较新领域的专门知识；2.审查儿基会如何通过内部资源最好地提供技术支持，而不是通过伙伴关系或市场获得支持；以及 3.为工作人员提供学习机会，使他们在关键领域的技能得到多样化和发展。

data.en: Essential actions to strengthen technical capacities to support implementation include: 1. improving the flow of knowledge and access to technical capacity, including expertise in essential and newer areas; 2. examining how UNICEF can best deliver technical support via internal resources versus securing support via partnerships or the market; and 3. providing learning opportunities for staff to diversify and develop their skills in critical areas.
data.zh: 确定并颁布应对全球冲击的系统性方法（中等优先级；需要额外资源来开发和实施相关系统）

data.en: Define and enact a systematic approach for responses to global shocks (medium priority; requires additional resources to develop and implement relevant systems)
data.zh: 根据记录在案的全球应对2019冠状病毒病和其他系统性危机的经验教训，儿基会应考虑：1.进一步侧重于应对重大/全球冲击的趋势预测、预见性和准备工作，而不是专门针对应急情况；2.通过对影响和应对措施的长期评估，推广从系统性危机中汲取的有效经验教训；以及 3.利用前瞻分析为制定国家方案文件提供信息，并加强适应性方案编制。

data.en: Drawing on the documented global lessons from the response to COVID-19 and other systemic crises, UNICEF should consider: 1. further focusing on trend forecasting, foresight, and readiness to respond to major/global shocks not specific to emergency response situations; 2. extending the effective learning from systemic crises with longer-term assessments of the effects and responses; and 3. using foresight analysis to inform the development of country programme documents and strengthen adaptive programming.
data.zh: 澄清对气候行动的重视（中等优先级；不影响资源）

data.en: Clarify the focus on climate action (medium priority; resource-neutral)
data.zh: 鉴于这一优先事项的新颖性以及这一领域对《战略计划》成果和可持续发展目标的重要性，儿基会需要考虑：1.确定其在气候行动和适应中的定位，并向工作人员和合作伙伴阐明重点；以及 2.将儿基会的品牌和儿童的声音作为变革的动力。

data.en: Given the newness of the priority as well as the criticality of this area for Strategic Plan outcomes and the Sustainable Development Goals, UNICEF needs to consider: 1. identifying its niche in climate action and adaptation, and clarifying the focus to staff and partners; and 2. leveraging the UNICEF brand and the voice of children as agents of change.
data.zh: 管理层对评价报告的回应由儿基会管理层单独提交给执行局。

data.en: A management response to the evaluation report is presented separately to the Executive Board by UNICEF management.
data.zh: 决定草案

data.en: Draft decision
data.zh: 执行局

data.en: The Executive Board
data.zh: 注意到关于儿基会实现《2022-2025年战略计划》的定位的可评价性评估和形成性评价、其摘要（E/ICEF/2023/3）及管理层的回应（E/ICEF/2023/4）。

data.en: Takes note of the evaluability assessment and formative evaluation of the UNICEF positioning to achieve the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025, its summary (E/ICEF/2023/3) and its management response (E/ICEF/2023/4).

data.zh: 由于篇幅所限，本附件没有包含关于儿基会实现儿基会《2022-2025年战略计划》的定位的可评价性评估和形成性评价。

data.en: Due to space limitations, the evaluability assessment and formative evaluation of the UNICEF positioning to achieve the UNICEF Strategic Plan, 2022–2025 is not contained within the present annex.
data.zh: 可从儿基会评价办公室网站获得报告全文：https://www.unicef.org/evaluation/reports#/。

data.zh: 2023年实质性会议

data.en: Substantive session of 2023
data.zh: 2023年8月10日下列国家常驻联合国代表致会议委员会主席的信：文莱达鲁萨兰国、柬埔寨、中国、印度尼西亚、老挝人民民主共和国、马来西亚、毛里求斯、菲律宾、大韩民国、新加坡、泰国和越南

data.en: Letter dated 10 August 2023 from the Permanent Representatives of Brunei Darussalam, Cambodia, China, Indonesia, the Lao People’s Democratic Republic, Malaysia, Mauritius, the Philippines, the Republic of Korea, Singapore, Thailand and Viet Nam to the United Nations addressed to the Chair of the Committee on Conferences
data.zh: 几千年来，农历新年一直是全球最重要的节日之一。

data.en: For thousands of years, the Lunar New Year has remained one of the most important festivals and holidays globally.
data.zh: 这是一个家庭团聚的日子，也是一个辞旧迎新的日子。

data.en: It is a day for family reunion and for bidding farewell to the old, while embracing the new.
data.zh: 人们通过丰富多彩的传统(习俗)和文化活动来庆祝这个节日，表达对幸福生活的憧憬，向家人和朋友送上衷心的祝福，向祖先和长辈致以敬意，同时展现对大自然的感激和敬畏。

data.en: People celebrate this occasion through a rich tapestry of traditions and cultural activities, expressing their hope for a happy life, conveying heartfelt blessings to family and friends, paying homage to their ancestors and elders and showing gratitude and reverence to Nature.
data.zh: 这个节日体现了家庭和睦、社会融合以及人与自然和谐共处的核心理念，数千年的演变过程承载着丰富的历史和文化遗产。

data.en: This festival embodies the core ideals of family harmony, social cohesion and harmonious coexistence between man and Nature, carrying an abundant historical and cultural heritage through its millenniums-long evolution.
data.zh: 随着经济和社会的向前发展，以及文化和人们的广泛交往，农历新年庆祝活动不仅限于东亚或东南亚，而是已遍及各大洲。

data.en: As economic and social development progresses, along with extensive cultural and people-to-people exchanges, the Lunar New Year is not only celebrated in East Asia or South-East Asia. Instead, its popularity has spread across continents.
data.zh: 据统计，世界上约有五分之一的人口庆祝农历新年。

data.en: According to statistics, approximately one fifth of the world’s population celebrates the Lunar New Year.
data.zh: 许多国家和地区将农历新年定为全国或特定城市的官方公共假日。

data.en: Numerous countries and regions have designated the Lunar New Year as an official public holiday for the entire nation or specific cities.
data.zh: 为了体现联合国对多元和包容价值观的承诺，我们真诚希望能够适当重视农历新年及其深刻的文化意义，将这一广泛庆祝的节日纳入联合国日历。

data.en: To exemplify the commitment of the United Nations to the values of diversity and inclusivity, we sincerely hope that due importance can be accorded to the Lunar New Year and its profound cultural significance and that this widely observed holiday can be incorporated into the United Nations calendar.
data.zh: 这也将使庆祝这一传统佳节的联合国工作人员能够在这一天与家人和朋友团聚，欢度新年的到来，共同分享节日的喜悦。

data.en: This would also enable United Nations staff who observe this cherished tradition to reunite with their families and friends on this day, rejoicing in the arrival of the new year and sharing in the festive joy together.
data.zh: 我们——以下所列常驻团代表——致函要求从2024年起将农历新年列入联合国浮动假日(清单)。

data.en: We, the representatives of the delegations listed below, are writing to request that the Lunar New Year be included in the list of floating holidays of the United Nations as from 2024.
data.zh: 为此，请将本函作为会议委员会的文件分发以便其2023年实质性会议审议为荷。

data.en: To that end, we should be grateful if you would have the present letter circulated as a document of the Committee on Conferences for consideration at its 2023 substantive session.

data.en: Agenda item 18 (i)
data.zh: 经济和环境问题：地理空间信息

data.en: Economic and environmental questions: geospatial information
data.zh: 2023年6月15日伊朗伊斯兰共和国常驻联合国代表给经济及社会理事会主席的信

data.en: Letter dated 15 June 2023 from the Permanent Representative of the Islamic Republic of Iran to the United Nations addressed to the President of the Economic and Social Council
data.zh: 奉我国政府指示，并提及2023年5月1日至5日举行的联合国地名专家组2023年届会，鉴于会议的GEGN.2/2023/103/CRP.103和GEGN.2/2023/91/CRP.91号文件对波斯湾使用了错误的名称，我谨声明如下：

data.en: Upon instructions from my Government, and with reference to the 2023 session of the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names, held from 1 to 5 May 2023, at which an erroneous name was used for the Persian Gulf, as contained in documents GEGN.2/2023/103/CRP.103 and GEGN.2/2023/91/CRP.91, I would like to state the following:
data.zh: 地名是人类从过去继承下来的宝贵遗产的一部分，保护地名并将其传给子孙后代是包括联合国在内的多方多年来一直强调的义务。

data.en: Geographical names are a part of the valuable heritage of human beings, inherited from the past, and their preservation and transmission to future generations is a duty that has been emphasized for years by many, including the United Nations.
data.zh: 有些地名有其历史渊源，数千年来一直在地图、书籍、游记和书信中被不断提及。

data.en: Some geographical names are rooted in history and continue to be made mention of in maps, books, travelogues and correspondence for thousands of years.
data.zh: 它们的真实性毋庸置疑，包括世界上最著名的海洋和山脉的名称。

data.en: There is no doubt about their authenticity, including the names of the world’s most famous oceans and mountain ranges.
data.zh: 毫无疑问，波斯湾的名称在所有文献和地图、所有语言和文字中都是独一无二的，可以追溯到数千年前。

data.en: The name of the Persian Gulf is clearly, and without a shadow of a doubt, unique in all documents and maps, and in all languages and scripts, dating back thousands of years.
data.zh: 因此，即使是出于非科学的原因，玷污波斯湾的名称也不是出席会议的专家所能决定的。

data.en: Therefore, blemishing the name of the Persian Gulf, even for non-scientific reasons, is not up to the experts present at that meeting.
data.zh: 此外，关于波斯湾历史名称文件的合法性和准确性问题的1999年5月14日秘书处ST/CS/SER.A/29/Rev.1号文件，以及不同国家和联合国在过去一个世纪中只使用这一历史名称的既定做法，都承认并强调：位于伊朗高原和阿拉伯半岛之间的水体的唯一真正地理名称是波斯湾。

data.en: Furthermore, Secretariat document ST/CS/SER.A/29/Rev.1, dated 14 May 1999, regarding the legitimacy and accuracy of the documents of the historical name of the Persian Gulf, as well as the established practice of different countries and the United Nations over the past century in using only this historical name, all recognize and emphasize that the only true geographical designation for the body of water lying between the Iranian Plateau and the Arabian Peninsula is the Persian Gulf.
data.zh: 鉴于上述情况，我们呼吁会员国遵守关于保护地名的规范和安排。

data.en: In light of the foregoing, we call upon Member States to adhere to the norms and arrangements governing the protection of geographical names.
data.zh: 请将本函作为经济及社会理事会议程项目18 (i)下的文件分发，并将其放置于联合国地名专家组的官方网站为荷。

data.en: I would be grateful if you would circulate the present letter as a document of the Economic and Social Council, under agenda item 18 (i), and place it on the official website of the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names.
data.zh: 阿米尔·赛义德·伊拉瓦尼(签名)

data.en: (Signed) Amir Saeid Iravani
data.zh: 大使

data.en: Ambassador
data.zh: 常驻代表
